title: Native Active Perception as Reasoning for Omni-Modal Understanding
abstract: Passive models for long video understanding typically rely on a "watch-it-all" paradigm, processing frames uniformly regardless of query difficulty, causing computational cost to grow with video duration. Although interactive frameworks have emerged, they often rely on global pre-scanning, and their context cost still scales with video length. We propose OmniAgent, the first native omni-modal agent that formulates video understanding as a POMDP-based iterative Observation-Thought-Action cycle. OmniAgent executes on-demand actions to selectively distill audio-visual cues into a persistent textual memory, effectively decoupling reasoning complexity from raw video duration. To operationalize this, we introduce (1) Agentic Supervised Fine-Tuning to bootstrap native active perception via best-of-N trajectory synthesis with dual-stage quality control, and (2) Agentic Reinforcement Learning with TAURA (Turn-aware Adaptive Uncertainty Rescaled Advantage), which leverages turn-level entropy to steer credit assignment toward pivotal discovery turns. Crucially, OmniAgent exhibits positive test-time scaling, where performance improves as the number of reasoning turns increases, validating the efficacy of active perception. Empirical results across ten benchmarks (e.g., VideoMME, LVBench) demonstrate that OmniAgent achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source models. Notably, on LVBench, our 7B agent outperforms the 10$\times$ larger Qwen2.5-VL-72B (50.5% vs. 47.3%).
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Code and models: https://github.com/harryhsing/omniagent

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个原生全模态智能体OmniAgent，将视频理解建模为POMDP迭代循环，实现主动感知，解耦推理复杂度与视频时长。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有被动模型处理长视频时计算成本随时长线性增长，交互式框架依赖全局预扫描，上下文成本仍与视频长度相关。需一种能根据查询难度选择性提取信息的主动感知方法，以降低计算开销并提升长视频理解效率。
light_analysis.method: 基于POMDP的迭代Observation-Thought-Action循环，通过按需动作选择性提取音视频线索至持久文本记忆。提出Agentic SFT（最佳N轨迹合成+双阶段质量控制）和Agentic RL with TAURA（轮次级熵引导信用分配），训练模型在有限轮次内主动发现关键信息。
light_analysis.result: 在VideoMME、LVBench等10个基准上达到开源模型最优性能。7B参数模型在LVBench上超越10倍大的Qwen2.5-VL-72B（50.5% vs 47.3%），且性能随推理轮次增加而提升，验证了主动感知的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次实现原生全模态主动感知智能体，通过迭代推理显著提升长视频理解效率与性能。方法具有强可扩展性，为视频理解提供新范式。未来可探索更高效的记忆机制或扩展到其他模态。

title: Beyond the Current Observation: Evaluating Multimodal Large Language Models in Controllable Non-Markov Games
abstract: Deploying multimodal foundation models as closed-loop policies increasingly requires conditioning actions on observations that are no longer visible. However, existing benchmarks either expose the full state, conflate hidden-state reconstruction with other agent skills, or test recall only after an episode has ended. We introduce RNG-Bench (Reconstructive Non-Markov Games), a benchmark suite designed to isolate a base model's ability to reconstruct past observations and act on them during multi-step interaction. RNG-Bench includes two complementary games: Matching Pairs, where card identities briefly revealed at specific locations must later be recalled, and 3D Maze, where egocentric views must be integrated into a spatial map. Both games are evaluated under a unified harness with three controlled difficulty axes: grid size, visual pattern, and observation modality. The benchmark further introduces a head-to-head duel protocol to control for instance-level variance and a Memory Gap metric that disentangles forgetting from poor action selection. The hardest configurations require contexts of roughly 128K tokens and 350 image inputs per episode, and remain far from saturated by frontier MLLMs. Memory Gap analysis shows that most residual errors stem from forgetting earlier observations rather than from suboptimal decision making. Finally, fine-tuning Qwen3.5-9B on optimal-policy rollouts and filtered model demonstrations improves performance on RNG-Bench and transfers to existing benchmarks without degrading general multimodal capability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RNG-Bench基准套件，用于评估多模态大语言模型在可控非马尔可夫游戏中的记忆与决策能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准要么暴露完整状态，将隐藏状态重建与其他技能混淆，要么仅在剧集结束后测试回忆。实际部署中，多模态基础模型作为闭环策略需要基于不可见观测进行条件动作。因此，需要隔离模型重建过去观测并在多步交互中行动的能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建RNG-Bench，包含Matching Pairs和3D Maze两个互补游戏，统一评估三个可控难度轴（网格大小、视觉模式、观测模态）。引入一对一决斗协议控制实例级方差，以及Memory Gap指标将遗忘与动作选择不佳分离。难度配置需约128K token和350张图像输入。
light_analysis.result: 当前最前沿多模态大语言模型在最难配置下远未饱和。Memory Gap分析表明大多数残差错误源于遗忘早期观测而非次优决策。在Qwen3.5-9B上微调，使用最优策略轨迹和过滤模型演示，提升了RNG-Bench性能，并迁移到现有基准而不降低通用多模态能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: RNG-Bench有效评估了多模态模型在非马尔可夫游戏中的记忆与决策能力，揭示了遗忘是主要瓶颈。微调可改善性能并保持通用能力，为未来研究提供方向。

title: Learning User Simulators with Turing Rewards
abstract: Learning to simulate human users in interactive settings could advance the training of agent assistants, evaluation of personalization systems, research in the social sciences, and more. Existing approaches generally do so by training a large language model (LLM) to match a single ground truth response, either by maximizing the log probability or by using a similarity reward. We instead propose {Turing-RL}: a Turing-Test-based reinforcement learning approach for training user simulator models. {Turing-RL} uses a discriminative Turing reward with an LLM judge to score how indistinguishable a generated response is from the real user's given the user's history, and the user simulator LLM learns to produce responses indistinguishable from what the user could have said with such rewards. Across two different domains--conversational chat and Reddit forum discussion--we find that {Turing-RL} consistently outperforms baseline methods on both LLM and human evaluation metrics. Our study suggests that optimizing for indistinguishability, rather than response matching, is effective for learning user simulators.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Turing-RL，利用基于图灵测试的强化学习训练用户模拟器，优化生成响应的不可区分性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有用户模拟器训练方法通常通过最大化对数概率或使用相似性奖励来匹配单一真实响应，这种方法难以生成与真实用户高度相似的多样化响应。研究旨在提高模拟器的逼真度，以更好地训练智能助手、评估个性化系统等。
light_analysis.method: Turing-RL采用判别性图灵奖励，使用LLM法官评估生成响应与真实用户响应的不可区分性，作为强化学习的奖励信号。用户模拟器LLM通过优化该奖励学习产生与真实用户可能说出的话语无差别的响应，在两个领域（对话聊天和Reddit讨论）进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在对话聊天和Reddit论坛讨论两个领域，Turing-RL在LLM评估和人类评估指标上均持续优于基线方法（如最大似然训练和基于相似性奖励的强化学习），表明优化不可区分性比直接响应匹配更有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了优化生成响应的不可区分性对于学习用户模拟器的有效性，Turing-RL为训练更逼真的用户模拟器提供了新范式。未来可探索应用于更多交互场景，但摘要未说明局限性。

title: Freeing the Law with LOCUS: A Local Ordinance Corpus for the United States
abstract: Progress in legal AI increasingly depends on access to authoritative legal text at scale. Yet one of the most consequential layers of American law remains largely absent from existing machine-readable corpora: local ordinances. Local codes govern zoning, housing, business licensing, public health, noise, animal control, and many other domains of everyday regulation, but they are fragmented across vendor platforms designed for human browsing rather than bulk research access. We introduce LOCUS - the Local Ordinance Corpus for the United States - a comprehensive corpus and county-harmonized access layer for U.S. municipal and county ordinance codes. The raw corpus, available for release to researchers, represents nearly all publicly available municipal and county ordinance codes. The resulting raw corpus contains codes from 9,239 cities and counties. A smaller county-harmonized LOCUS access layer provides coverage for the largest 2,309 of 3,144 U.S. counties, accounting for a majority of the population. We use OCR to handle the myriad of document formats that have kept the law from being a public resource. We release the corpus with coverage metadata to support reproducibility, downstream legal AI research, and the incremental expansion of machine-readable access to local law. We train a collection of ModernBERT-based classifiers and scorers to facilitate analyzing U.S. local law among several dimensions, such as opacity and paternalism, that have not previously been studied at this scale. LOCUS-v1 and its derivative models are available at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/LocalLaws/LOCUS-v1

light_analysis.overview: 构建美国首个大规模地方法规语料库LOCUS，包含9,239个市县法规，并训练ModernBERT模型进行法规维度分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 美国地方法规（如分区、住房、公共卫生等）对日常生活影响重大，但现有机器可读语料库中严重缺失。这些法规分散在不同供应商平台上，仅支持人工浏览，无法进行批量研究。缺乏大规模结构化数据限制了法律AI在地方层面的应用，特别是对法规透明度、家长主义等维度的大规模分析。
light_analysis.method: LOCUS收集了美国9,239个市县法规的原始文本，采用OCR处理多样化的文档格式以实现机器可读。进一步构建了覆盖2,309个县（占总人口多数）的县域统一访问层。基于ModernBERT架构，训练了分类器和评分器，用于分析法规的若干维度（如不透明性和家长主义），首次实现大规模自动化分析。
light_analysis.result: 原始语料库包含9,239个市县法规，县域统一层覆盖美国3,144个县中的2,309个（占多数人口）。模型训练后可用于法规维度分析，但摘要未提供具体性能指标。语料库和衍生模型已在Hugging Face公开发布，支持可重复研究和下游法律AI任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: LOCUS填补了美国地方法规在机器可读语料库中的空白，支持大规模法律AI研究。OCR处理实现了多种格式的统一访问，ModernBERT模型为法规特性分析（如不透明性）提供新工具。未来可扩展到更多县市，并支持更细粒度的法规理解任务。

title: UBP2: Uncertainty-Balanced Preference Planning for Efficient Preference-based Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Preference-based RL provides an approach to learning reward models from pairwise comparisons of behaviors, bypassing the need for explicit reward design. However, existing methods typically rely on passive data collection and suffer from poor sample efficiency, especially during the early stages of learning. We introduce a model-based approach that actively directs exploration by jointly reasoning over uncertainties in the reward, dynamics, and value functions. Our method, Uncertainty-Balanced Preference Planning (UBP2), uses ensembles of reward, dynamics, and value function models to evaluate candidate trajectories according to a unified score that combines expected reward, terminal value, and epistemic uncertainty. Planning under this objective yields an explicit tradeoff between exploitation and information acquisition without requiring ad hoc exploration heuristics. Under standard regularity assumptions, we establish sublinear regret guarantees for both finite-horizon and infinite-horizon settings. Empirically, experiments on the Meta-World benchmark show UBP2 achieves substantially higher sample efficiency than model-free preference-based methods and non-optimistic model-based baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出不确定性平衡偏好规划（UBP2），通过联合推理奖励、动力学和值函数的不确定性，高效指导偏好强化学习中的探索。
light_analysis.motivation: 偏好强化学习通过成对比较学习奖励模型，避免了显式奖励设计。但现有方法通常依赖被动数据收集，导致样本效率低下，尤其是在学习早期阶段。这限制了其在复杂任务中的应用，迫切需要一种主动探索策略来提升样本利用率。
light_analysis.method: UBP2采用基于模型的方法，使用奖励、动力学和值函数模型的集成来评估候选轨迹。它根据统一评分（结合期望奖励、终端值和认知不确定性）进行规划，显式平衡利用和信息获取，无需临时探索启发式。在标准正则性假设下，建立了有限和无限时域下的亚线性遗憾界。
light_analysis.result: 在Meta-World基准上，UBP2实现了比无模型偏好方法和非乐观基于模型基线显著更高的样本效率。具体数值未在摘要中明确给出，但定性结果表明效率提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: UBP2通过主动探索和不确定性平衡，显著提升了偏好强化学习的样本效率，并提供了理论保证。其方法可应用于需要从人类偏好中学习奖励的领域。潜在局限性包括集成模型的计算开销，未来可探索更高效的不确定性估计或扩展到更高维任务。

title: Rethinking Reward Supervision: Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation
abstract: Post-training of reasoning language models is commonly driven by supervised distillation and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards. Distillation often relies on chain-of-thought annotations that are expensive to obtain and may themselves be noisy, incomplete, or partially incorrect; even when the final solution is correct, an imperfect rationale can interfere with learning. Reinforcement learning with verified rewards, on the other hand, typically compresses evaluative feedback into a scalar signal, obscuring which aspects of a response should be improved. We propose \textbf{Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation}, a framework that incorporates rubrics as structured, fine-grained feedback for on-policy self-distillation. Our method conditions the teacher model on criterion-level rubrics and uses it to provide token-level guidance on the student's own sampled trajectories. This design avoids treating a single reference rationale as the sole supervision target. Instead, rubrics specify what a strong response should satisfy, enabling more fine-grained credit assignment over the reasoning process than scalar reward optimization. We instantiate this framework with a two-stage pipeline that first learns to generate task-specific rubrics and then trains a rubric-guided reasoner. We evaluate on a diverse suite of science reasoning benchmarks and results show that rubric-conditioned self-distillation effectively converts rubric-level criteria into token-level guidance over the reasoning process, surpassing GRPO by 1.0 points and OPSD by 0.9 points on average.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Rubric-Conditioned Self-Distillation框架，利用结构化rubric进行细粒度自蒸馏，提升推理语言模型的监督信号质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有监督蒸馏依赖昂贵且可能有噪声的思维链注释，强化学习则使用标量奖励掩蔽了改进方向。论文旨在解决这两种方法在提供细粒度、准确反馈方面的不足，通过rubric提供结构化、标准级别的指导，实现更精确的信用分配。
light_analysis.method: 框架包括两阶段：首先学习生成任务特定的rubric，然后训练rubric引导的推理器。教师模型以rubric为条件，在学生的采样轨迹上提供token级指导，避免单一参考解释作为监督目标，实现比标量奖励更细粒度的信用分配。
light_analysis.result: 在多个科学推理基准上，rubric条件自蒸馏平均优于GRPO 1.0个点，优于OPSD 0.9个点，证明其能有效将rubric标准转化为token级指导，提升推理性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将rubric作为结构化反馈融入自蒸馏，提升了推理模型的训练效果。具有实际应用价值，但rubric生成质量可能影响性能，未来可探索自动化rubric生成和跨任务泛化。

title: Explaining Attention with Program Synthesis
abstract: A longstanding goal of research on interpretable deep learning is to replace opaque neural computations with human-meaningful symbolic descriptions. In this paper, we propose an approach for approximating the behavior of components of deep networks with executable programs. We focus on attention heads in transformer language models. For a given head, we first compute its associated attention matrices on a collection of randomly selected training examples. Next, we prompt a pre-trained language model with a summary of these matrices, and instruct it to generate a set of Python programs that can reproduce the associated attention patterns given only text from the input sentence. Finally, we re-rank programs according to how well our final set of programs predict behavior on held-out inputs. We demonstrate that a set of fewer than 1,000 such generated programs can reproduce the attention patterns of heads in GPT-2, TinyLlama-1.1B, and Llama-3B, achieving an average Intersection-over-Union similarity above 75% on TinyStories. Moreover, the best-fit programs can replace neural attention heads without substantially affecting model behavior: replacing 25% of attention heads with programmatic surrogates across the three models incurs only a 16% average perplexity increase, while maintaining performance on a variety of downstream question answering benchmarks. This work contributes a scalable pipeline for reverse-engineering attention heads in transformer models using human-readable, executable code, advancing a path toward symbolic transparency in neural models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出程序合成方法，为Transformer注意力头生成可执行Python程序，以近似其行为，实现可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 可解释深度学习长期目标是用人类可理解的符号描述替代黑盒神经计算。现有注意力可视化缺乏明确语义解释，难以真正理解模型内部机制。本文旨在通过生成可执行程序来近似注意力头行为，为模型提供符号级别的透明度，从而解决当前可解释性方法不够直观且难以验证的问题。
light_analysis.method: 首先计算注意力头在随机训练样本上的注意力矩阵；然后利用预训练语言模型根据矩阵摘要生成Python程序；最后根据程序在保留输入上的预测表现进行重排序，选择最优程序集。该管道无需手动设计程序，可自动生成少于1000个程序来模拟注意力模式。
light_analysis.result: 在GPT-2、TinyLlama-1.1B和Llama-3B上，生成的程序集在TinyStories数据集上平均IoU超过75%。替换25%的注意力头为程序代理后，模型平均困惑度仅增加16%，且在多个下游问答基准上性能保持稳定，验证了程序的有效性和保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了一个可扩展的逆向工程管道，用人类可读的代码替换注意力头，推动了神经网络符号透明性的进展。学术价值在于提供了新的可解释性范式，实际应用中可辅助模型调试与安全验证。未来可扩展至其他组件，但程序可能无法完全等价于原始头。

title: NeuMesh++: Towards Versatile and Efficient Volumetric Editing with Disentangled Neural Mesh-based Implicit Field
abstract: Recently neural implicit rendering techniques have evolved rapidly and demonstrated significant advantages in novel view synthesis and 3D scene reconstruction. However, existing neural rendering methods for editing purposes offer limited functionalities, e.g., rigid transformation and category-specific editing. In this paper, we present a novel mesh-based representation by encoding the neural radiance field with disentangled geometry, texture, and semantic codes on mesh vertices, which empowers a set of efficient and comprehensive editing functionalities, including mesh-guided geometry editing, designated texture editing with texture swapping, filling and painting operations, and semantic-guided editing. To this end, we develop several techniques including a novel local space parameterization to enhance rendering quality and training stability, a learnable modification color on vertex to improve the fidelity of texture editing, a spatial-aware optimization strategy to realize precise texture editing, and a semantic-aided region selection to ease the laborious annotation of implicit field editing. Extensive experiments and editing examples on both real and synthetic datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method on representation quality and editing ability. Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/neumeshplusplus/

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于解耦神经网格的隐式场表示，实现高效全面的三维体积编辑功能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经隐式渲染方法在编辑方面功能有限，仅支持刚性变换和类别特定编辑，无法满足灵活、全面的编辑需求。且编辑操作复杂、效率低。该研究旨在开发一种既能保持高质量渲染又能支持多种编辑（如几何、纹理、语义引导编辑）的表示方法，以提升三维场景编辑的实用性和易用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出NeuMesh++，将神经辐射场编码为网格顶点上的解耦几何、纹理和语义码，实现多种编辑功能。关键技术包括：局部空间参数化提升渲染质量和训练稳定性；顶点可学习修改颜色提高纹理编辑保真度；空间感知优化策略实现精确纹理编辑；语义辅助区域选择简化隐式场编辑标注。方法在真实和合成数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实和合成数据集上的大量实验表明，NeuMesh++在表示质量和编辑能力上均优于现有方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但定性编辑示例展示了网格引导几何编辑、纹理交换/填充/绘制、语义引导编辑等功能的优越性。与基线方法相比，编辑的灵活性和保真度显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeuMesh++通过解耦神经网格表示，为三维体积编辑提供了一套多功能且高效的解决方案，兼具高渲染质量和丰富编辑功能。该工作为神经渲染在交互式编辑和内容创作中的实际应用奠定了基础。未来可探索更复杂的编辑操作或扩展到动态场景。摘要未提及局限性。

title: Diffusion-Proof: Recipe for Formal Theorem Proving Beyond Auto-Regressive Generation
abstract: Enhancing the formal math reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) has become a key focus in both mathematical and computer science communities in recent years. While significant progress has been made in using state-of-the-art Auto-Regressive (AR) LLMs for formal theorem proving, these models suffer from inherent limitations. Their next-token prediction generation methods may yield suboptimal performance due to the challenges of long-range coherence and the compounding of errors over long sequences. Recent advancements in diffusion LLMs (dLLMs), which generate text through iterative denoising of a multi-token block, offer a promising alternative. However, the application of dLLMs to formal mathematics, where maintaining long-range coherence is critical, remains largely understudied. To address the challenges above, we propose **Diffusion-Proof**, to the best of our knowledge, the first framework to train and apply dLLMs for formal theorem proving. Our frameworks contain training and inference methods for two models. The first one is *dLLM-Prover-7B*, which performs whole-proof writing with long-range coherent tactic usage. The second one is *dLLM-Corrector-7B*, which is a novel large block diffusion-based correction model. It leverages the in-filling capabilities of dLLMs to perform local proof correction using bi-directional information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that **Diffusion-Proof** relatively significantly outperforms the AR LLM baseline trained under the same dataset. **Diffusion-Proof** achieves an absolute improvement of **1.61%** on ProofNet-Test and **6.14%** on MiniF2F-Test benchmarks compare to the baseline. Notably, **Diffusion-Proof** successfully resolves one IMO problem that more advanced thinking model DeepSeek-Prover-V2-7B could not solve, showcasing the unique advantage of dLLMs in formal theorem proving.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于扩散语言模型的定理证明框架Diffusion-Proof，包含整体证明生成和局部修正模型，显著超越自回归基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归语言模型在形式定理证明中因逐token生成导致长程连贯性差和错误累积，限制性能。扩散语言模型通过迭代去噪生成多token块，有望克服这些局限，但尚未被应用于形式数学。本文旨在探索扩散模型在此场景的潜力，解决现有自回归方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: Diffusion-Proof框架包括两个7B参数扩散模型：dLLM-Prover-7B进行整体证明生成，利用扩散过程保证长程连贯战术序列；dLLM-Corrector-7B基于大块扩散进行局部证明修正，通过双向信息填充实现错误纠正。训练数据集与自回归基线相同，采用专用推理策略。
light_analysis.result: 在ProofNet-Test和MiniF2F-Test上，Diffusion-Proof相比自回归基线分别绝对提升1.61%和6.14%，并成功解决一个DeepSeek-Prover-V2-7B无法解决的IMO问题，表明扩散模型在形式定理证明中的独特优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Diffusion-Proof验证了扩散语言模型在形式定理证明的有效性，尤其在长程连贯性和修正能力上超越自回归方法。该工作为扩散模型在数学推理领域的应用开辟了新方向，但模型规模和数据集通用性可能受限，未来可探索更大规模模型和更复杂定理。

title: Enhancing Decision-Making with Large Language Models through Multi-Agent Fictitious Play
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems (MAS) have demonstrated great potential in solving tasks with execution complexity, by distributing subtasks across cooperative agents. However, this divide-and-conquer paradigm falls short on decision-making tasks that are also prevalent in the real world. These tasks require simultaneous reasoning from the stances of all involved stakeholders whose decisions are mutually dependent and thus cannot be solved in isolation. We characterize this challenge as stance entanglement, a form of decision complexity distinct from execution complexity. To address it, we propose Multi-Agent Fictitious Play (MAFP), a novel MAS paradigm that represents stakeholder stances as agents and formulates decision-making as an equilibrium-seeking process. Built on the game-theoretic principle of fictitious play, MAFP iteratively updates each agent's decision by best responding to the empirical mixture of other agents' past decisions. This enables agents to expose and address one another's weaknesses, progressively improving decision quality and robustness. We evaluate MAFP on challenging decision-making tasks that test the capability of deciding strategies for competitive scenarios prior to acting. MAFP outperforms both single-round and multi-round baselines on two complementary metrics, tournament strength and robustness, demonstrating its effectiveness in addressing stance entanglement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多智能体虚拟博弈（MAFP）范式，通过博弈论原理解决LLM多智能体系统中的立场纠缠问题，提升决策质量与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统通过分解子任务擅长执行密集型任务，但在决策密集型任务中失效，因为这类任务要求从所有相互依赖的利益相关者立场同时推理。摘要将其特征化为立场纠缠，这是一种不同于执行复杂性的决策复杂性，现有方法无法处理。
light_analysis.method: MAFP将利益相关者立场表示为智能体，将决策形式化为寻均衡过程。基于虚拟博弈原理，每个智能体通过最佳响应其他智能体过去决策的经验混合来迭代更新决策，从而暴露并修正彼此弱点，逐步提升决策质量。无需额外训练数据，直接利用LLM推理。
light_analysis.result: 在竞争场景策略决策任务上，MAFP在锦标赛强度和鲁棒性两个互补指标上均优于单轮和多轮基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确说明性能提升，证明其有效解决立场纠缠。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAFP为LLM多智能体系统处理决策复杂性提供了新范式，通过博弈论框架实现多智能体协作均衡。具有潜在应用价值，如商业谈判、战略规划等。局限可能在于计算开销和收敛性，未来可探索更高效更新策略。

title: P-K-GCN: Physics-augmented Koopman-enhanced Graph Convolutional Network for Deep Spatiotemporal Super-resolution
abstract: High-fidelity simulation of spatiotemporal dynamics is computationally prohibitive, necessitating efficient super-resolution techniques to reconstruct high-resolution data from coarse-grained inputs. Traditional data-driven methods often lack physical constraints, and simple physics-informed learning struggles with irregular spatial geometries and intricately evolving temporal dynamics. To tackle these challenges, we propose a Physics-augmented Koopman-enhanced Graph Convolutional Network (P-K-GCN) for spatiotemporal super-resolution on irregular geometries. Specifically, a continuous spline-based GCN is first designed to extract spatial dependencies directly from coarse graph, and Koopman operator theory is incorporated to project the nonlinear dynamics into a compact latent space where temporal progression is linearized. Second, we augment the optimization objective with a physics-based loss to force the data-driven reconstructions to adhere to physical laws for improving predictive fidelity and robustness. Finally, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis, establishing that the physics augmentation and Koopman regularization mathematically guarantees a reduction in super-resolution error by diminishing Rademacher complexity and tightening generalization bounds. We evaluate our framework on reconstructing spatially high-resolution cardiac electrodynamics across a 3D heart geometry from sparse low-resolution measurements. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior accuracy compared to baseline models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理增强的Koopman图卷积网络，通过融合物理约束和Koopman线性化实现不规则几何上的高精度时空超分辨率。
light_analysis.motivation: 高保真时空动力学模拟计算成本高，需超分辨率技术从粗粒度输入重建高分辨率数据。传统数据驱动方法缺乏物理约束，简单物理引导学习难以处理不规则空间几何和复杂时间演化，导致预测精度和鲁棒性不足。
light_analysis.method: 采用连续样条图卷积网络从粗粒度图提取空间依赖性，融入Koopman算子理论将非线性动力学投影到紧凑潜空间实现时间线性化。同时增加基于物理的损失函数约束重建结果符合物理定律，并通过理论分析证明物理增强和Koopman正则化可降低Rademacher复杂度并收紧泛化界，从而减小超分辨率误差。
light_analysis.result: 在3D心脏几何上的电动力学超分辨率任务中评估，从稀疏低分辨率测量重建高分辨率时空数据。数值实验显示该方法在精度上显著优于基线模型，但摘要未提供具体指标数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了物理增强的Koopman图卷积网络，有效融合数据驱动与物理先验，适用于不规则几何上的复杂时空动力学超分辨率。理论保证了误差降低，实验验证了优越性。未来工作可扩展至其他物理系统。

title: Confidence is Not Reliability: Rethinking MC Dropout in Brain Tumour Segmentation
abstract: Glioma segmentation in multiparametric MRI is a critical component of treatment planning. A segmentation model that fails silently on treatment-critical sub-regions represents a patient safety risk that overlap-based metrics such as Dice scores cannot expose. We ask whether voxel-level uncertainty estimation via Monte Carlo (MC) Dropout can reliably identify segmentation errors in clinically critical sub-regions, and whether calibration failure modes are detectable from standard reporting metrics alone. In an empirical two-model case study on 126 BraTS21 patients, we evaluate a high-performance pretrained SegResNet and a locally trained UNet with residual units (UNet-Res). MC dropout preserved segmentation accuracy ($|Δ\text{Dice}|$ $<0.01$) while achieving strong uncertainty-error alignment (AUROC for entropy (H) $\approx$0.97), indicating uncertainty correctly ranks erroneous voxels above correct ones. Entropy-based patient stratification identified a high-uncertainty subgroup with substantially lower segmentation performance (median whole-tumour Dice $0.835$ vs. $0.925$), supporting uncertainty as a practical triage signal. However, global alignment can mask important region-specific differences. Despite similar AUROC, UNet-Res exhibited near-zero enhancing tumour entropy ($0.054$) and Expected Calibration Error (ECE) of $0.915$, with a Dice of only $0.714$, indicating severely miscalibrated confidence on the most clinically critical sub-region, a failure mode invisible to standard Dice and AUROC reporting. These findings demonstrate that strong uncertainty-error alignment is necessary but insufficient for clinical safety: sub-region-specific calibration assessment must accompany AUROC evaluation when selecting models for clinical deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示MC Dropout不确定性估计在脑肿瘤分割中全局有效但子区域校准可能失败的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 胶质瘤分割是治疗规划关键，但模型在关键子区域无声失败对患者安全构成风险，而Dice等指标无法揭示。现有研究通常依赖全局不确定性-误差对齐（AUROC）评估MC Dropout的可靠性，但忽略了子区域特定的校准失败模式。本文探讨全局对齐是否足以保证临床安全，以及标准报告指标能否检测校准缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 采用两模型案例研究：高性能预训练SegResNet和本地训练的UNet-Res，在126例BraTS21患者数据上评估。通过MC Dropout计算熵和期望校准误差（ECE），分析不确定性-误差对齐（AUROC）和子区域校准。关键创新是区分全局对齐与子区域特异性校准评估，特别是增强肿瘤区域。
light_analysis.result: MC Dropout保持分割精度（|ΔDice|<0.01），全局AUROC约0.97，熵分层识别高不确定性亚组（中位全肿瘤Dice 0.835 vs 0.925）。但UNet-Res在增强肿瘤区域熵仅0.054、ECE达0.915、Dice仅0.714，表明严重误校准，而全局Dice和AUROC无法暴露此问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强不确定性-误差对齐是临床安全的必要条件而非充分条件。模型选择时需结合子区域校准评估（如ECE）和AUROC，以确保关键区域可靠性。本研究强调区域特异性校准对医学图像分析安全部署的重要性。

title: Does VLA Even Know the Basics? Measuring Commonsense and World Knowledge Retention in Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: Embodied Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are typically obtained by fine-tuning powerful pretrained VLMs on robotics data, yet it is unclear how much commonsense and factual knowledge they retain after adaptation. Failures on knowledge-sensitive tasks are ambiguous, conflating missing knowledge with poor generalization of low-level control. We introduce Act2Answer, a lightweight protocol that adapts VLM knowledge benchmarks to VLA evaluation by requiring agents to answer through action. Each question becomes a short tabletop episode where the agent performs a single object-placement action to select among candidate answers, yielding an action-grounded success rate with reduced control confounds. We curate a test suite of such environments across diverse commonsense and world-knowledge categories and introduce layerwise intent probing to localize answer-relevant information across the VLM backbone and action head. In a large-scale study of 7 VLA models and 9 VLM baselines, we systematically rank models across categories, finding that VLAs show solid performance on simple concepts while exhibiting larger gaps on richer semantic categories relative to their source VLMs, that VQA co-training is associated with better knowledge retention, and that answer-relevant signals peak in middle VLA layers but attenuate in upper layers. Act2Answer is available at https://tttonyalpha.github.io/act2answer/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Act2Answer协议，通过动作回答评估VLA模型中的常识和世界知识保留情况，揭示VLA在丰富语义类别上的知识衰减。
light_analysis.motivation: VLA模型通常微调自强大的VLM，但适应后保留了多少常识和事实知识尚不明确。现有评估方法将知识缺失与低层控制泛化不足混淆，难以诊断失败根源。因此需要一种轻量级协议，减少控制混淆，准确衡量VLA的知识保留能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出Act2Answer协议，将VLM知识基准测试改编为VLA评估：每个问题对应一个桌面短片段，智能体通过单个物体放置动作选择答案，计算动作接地成功率，减少控制干扰。还引入层意图探测（Layerwise Intent Probing）来定位VLM骨干和动作头中与答案相关的信息层。
light_analysis.result: 在7个VLA模型和9个VLM基线上进行大规模研究，发现VLA在简单概念上表现良好，但在丰富语义类别上与源VLM差距较大。VQA联合训练与更好的知识保留相关，且答案相关信号在VLA中层达到峰值，在上层衰减。
light_analysis.conclusion: Act2Answer提供了评估VLA知识保留的有效工具，揭示了VLA在知识迁移中的特性（如中层信号峰值、上层衰减），有助于指导VLA模型的设计和训练策略。未来可扩展到更复杂的知识类型和动作空间。

title: Risk Stratification for ICU Delirium using Pervasive Ambient Sensing Information
abstract: Delirium is a common and serious complication in the Intensive Care Unit (ICU), associated with increased morbidity, prolonged hospital stays, and higher healthcare costs. Despite its prevalence, early prediction and prevention remain challenging. Environmental factors such as ambient sound and light may influence the onset of delirium, yet they are often overlooked in risk assessments. In this study, we examined whether light intensity and sound pressure levels can independently predict delirium across multiple prediction horizons. We evaluated four efficient sequential neural network models on data collected from 9 ICUs across 309 patients to predict delirium for 10 prediction-window sizes. We reported feature importance and direction of influence using Shapley Additive Explanations analysis. The convolutional model achieved the strongest discrimination, with AUC = 0.80 on sound data and on combined data. Sound features were the dominant predictors overall. Integrating sound with light improved short-term ($<1$ week) prediction, with the combined model assigning the highest risk immediately after the sensing period. These findings suggest that passive ambient sensing, especially sound, can add a clinically meaningful, interpretable signal for delirium risk estimation and offer a practical pathway to enrich multimodal ICU prediction and prevention strategies.

light_analysis.overview: 利用环境声音和光照信息，通过神经网络模型预测ICU谵妄风险，发现声音特征是最强预测因子。
light_analysis.motivation: 谵妄是ICU常见严重并发症，早期预测困难。环境因素如声音和光照可能影响谵妄发生，但常被忽视。现有风险评估未充分利用环境传感信息，缺乏可解释的预测模型。
light_analysis.method: 从9个ICU收集309名患者的环境声音和光照数据，使用四种高效序列神经网络模型（包括卷积模型）进行多预测窗口（10种大小）的谵妄预测，并通过Shapley加法解释分析特征重要性和影响方向。
light_analysis.result: 卷积模型在声音数据和组合数据上均达到AUC=0.80。声音是主要预测特征。将声音与光照结合可改善短期（<1周）预测，组合模型在感知期后立即分配最高风险。
light_analysis.conclusion: 被动环境感知，特别是声音，能提供有临床意义且可解释的谵妄风险信号，为多模态ICU预测和预防策略提供实用途径。

title: NeSyCat Torch: A Differentiable Tensor Implementation of Categorical Semantics for Neurosymbolic Learning
abstract: Neurosymbolic semantics is fragmented: classical, fuzzy, probabilistic and neural systems each define truth by their own inductive rules. NeSyCat, extending ULLER, subsumes them under a single inductive definition of truth, parametric in a strong monad and an aggregation structure on truth-values. NeSyCat has so far lacked an account of predicates and functions learned by neural networks.   We provide NeSyCat Torch as the missing link and interpret computational symbols via neural networks, implementing the framework in probabilistic programming and tensor-based backends. We use the distribution monad for reference semantics and metric evaluation, and complement it by a monad for numerically stable, differentiable training: the lazy log-tensor monad over the log-semiring. For efficient training in batches, we furthermore employ a batch monad. The axioms are the source code: written once in monad-based do-notation, monadic bind performs marginalisation, lazily pruning unneeded branches.   On MNIST addition, our HaskTorch, JAX, and PyTorch implementations outperform LTN and DeepProbLog in speed and accuracy, while achieving nearly the accuracy of DeepStochLog. However, unlike DeepStochLog, we stay in a uniform framework that applies to many first-order NeSy approaches. Namely, the construction is parametric in the monad; instantiating it with, e.g., the Giry monad extends the approach to continuous probability (working out a neural representation here is left for future work).

light_analysis.overview: 提出NeSyCat Torch，通过单子范畴语义实现神经符号学习的可微分张量框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经符号语义存在碎片化问题，经典、模糊、概率和神经等系统各自定义真值规则，缺乏统一归纳定义。NeSyCat虽能统一这些语义，但无法处理由神经网络学习的谓词和函数。现有方法如LTN和DeepProbLog在统一性和效率上存在不足，亟需一种可微分、高效且统一的框架来桥接神经和符号学习。
light_analysis.method: NeSyCat Torch将计算符号通过神经网络解释，基于概率编程和张量后端实现。核心使用分布单子作为参考语义，结合懒惰对数张量单子进行数值稳定和可微训练，并引入批处理单子实现高效批量训练。公理以单子do-notation编写，单子绑定自动执行边缘化和懒惰剪枝。框架参数化于单子，支持多种神经符号方法。
light_analysis.result: 在MNIST加法任务上，基于HaskTorch、JAX和PyTorch的实现速度更快且准确率高于LTN和DeepProbLog，同时准确率接近DeepStochLog。但NeSyCat Torch保持统一框架，可适用于多种一阶神经符号方法，而DeepStochLog则缺乏这种统一性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeSyCat Torch为神经符号学习提供了统一的、可微分的张量实现，验证了单子范畴语义的实用性。其参数化设计允许扩展到连续概率（如Giry单子），但神经网络表示尚需未来工作。该工作统一了多种神经符号方法，具有理论价值和实际应用潜力。

title: A Unified Framework for Efficient Remote Sensing Visual Question Answering: Adapting Dual, Hybrid, and Encoder-Decoder Architectures
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) in the Remote Sensing (RS) domain presents unique challenges due to the high resolution, multi scale object distribution, and semantic complexity of aerial imagery. While general domain Foundation Models have achieved remarkable success, their direct application to RSVQA is hindered by massive domain shifts and the computationally prohibitive nature of full fine tuning. This study presents a comparative analysis of RS Adapter, a Parameter Efficient Fine Tuning (PEFT) strategy, applied across three distinct Vision Language Model (VLM) architectures: the Dual Encoder CLIP, the Encoder Decoder BLIP, and the Hybrid FLAVA. We introduce a unified architectural surgery pipeline that injects lightweight bottleneck adapters into the attention and MLP layers of frozen backbones, enabling rapid adaptation with less than 5 percent of trainable parameters. Experimental results on the high resolution RSVQA x dataset demonstrate that while all adapted models achieve convergence, the Hybrid FLAVA architecture offers a superior balance of multimodal reasoning and retrieval capabilities compared to its unimodal counterparts. Our findings establish a new baseline for resource efficient VQA in disaster assessment and urban monitoring.
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, accepted and to be presented at 2026 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS 2026), scheduled for 9 to 14 August 2026 in Washington D.C

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一架构手术管道，通过PEFT策略适配三种VLM到遥感VQA，Hybrid FLAVA表现最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 遥感VQA面临高分辨率、多尺度、语义复杂等挑战，通用基础模型直接应用存在域迁移大、全微调计算昂贵的问题。现有方法缺乏对多种VLM架构在资源受限场景下的系统比较，急需一种高效适配方案以支撑灾害评估、城市监测等实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出RS Adapter统一框架，对三种VLM架构（Dual Encoder CLIP、Encoder Decoder BLIP、Hybrid FLAVA）进行结构适配：在冻结骨干网络的注意力层和MLP层中注入轻量级bottleneck适配器，仅训练少于5%的参数。在RSVQA x数据集上进行实验，比较不同架构的适配效果。
light_analysis.result: 所有适配模型均能收敛，其中Hybrid FLAVA架构在多模态推理与检索能力上优于其他单一模态架构，为资源高效遥感VQA建立了新基线。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明该方法在灾难评估和城市监测任务中具有潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过PEFT策略实现了遥感VQA的高效跨架构适应，证明了Hybrid FLAVA在有限资源下达到最佳性能。该方法降低计算成本，拓展了预训练模型在遥感领域的实用性，未来可探索更多适配层设计及其它遥感任务。

title: Trade-offs in Medical LLM Adaptation: An Empirical Study in French QA
abstract: The development of large language models (LLMs) has led to an increased focus on their adaptation to specialized domains and languages, yet the effectiveness of domain adaptation strategies remains unclear. We present a study of medical domain adaptation using French medical question-answering (QA) as a case study. We compare continual pretraining (CPT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and their combination across three model families, multiple sizes, and three initialization types, explicitly disentangling adaptation effects from base model choice. We evaluate both multiple-choice (MCQA) and open-ended QA (OEQA) under greedy and constrained decoding using automatic metrics and LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation. For MCQA, CPT+SFT most often achieves the best scores, but gains over SFT are small and frequently not statistically significant, making SFT a strong and cost-effective default. For OEQA, CPT consistently improves overlap-based metrics, while SFT often degrades generation quality; instruction tuning and CPT+SFT are preferred by LLM-based evaluation. Cross-lingual experiments further show effective transfer from French adaptation to English benchmarks. Overall, we provide practical guidelines for selecting adaptation strategies under computational constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究了法语医学问答中LLM领域适应策略的权衡，提出实用选择指南。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在专业领域的适应策略（如持续预训练和监督微调）的有效性尚不明确，尤其对于非英语语言和医学领域。现有研究通常将适应效果与基础模型选择混淆。本文旨在通过控制变量实验，明确不同适应策略在法语医学问答场景下的实际增益与成本，为资源受限的实践者提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 以法语医学问答为案例，对多个模型家族（多种规模）比较三类适应策略：持续预训练（CPT）、监督微调（SFT）及其组合。评估两项任务：多项选择问答（MCQA）和开放式问答（OEQA），采用贪婪解码和约束解码，结合自动指标与LLM-as-a-Judge评估。同时进行跨语言实验测试法语适应对英语基准的迁移效果。
light_analysis.result: MCQA中CPT+SFT多数取得最佳分数，但相比SFT提升微小且常不显著，SFT为强且成本效益高的默认选择。OEQA中CPT持续改善基于重叠的指标，而SFT常降低生成质量；指令微调与CPT+SFT在LLM评估中更受欢迎。跨语言实验显示法语适应能有效迁移至英语基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提供了医学领域LLM适应策略的实证比较，揭示了不同策略在任务类型和评估维度上的权衡。实践指南建议：对MCQA优先选择SFT；对OEQA优先选择CPT结合指令微调。局限性包括仅聚焦法语和医学领域，未来可扩展至更多语言和领域。学术上细化了适应策略的理解，实际应用上降低计算开销。

title: Structured Inference with Large Language Gibbs
abstract: The knowledge encoded in large language models (LLMs) can serve as a substrate for structured reasoning over variables describing a complex world, but accessing this knowledge in a probabilistically coherent manner poses a difficult inference problem. We propose Large Language Gibbs, a scheme for structured probabilistic inference that uses conditional distributions of an LLM as transition operators. Rather than sampling structured objects through single-pass autoregressive generation, we iteratively resample individual variables conditioned on others using an LLM's next-token conditionals. This approach avoids order-dependent biases and produces a stationary distribution that reflects a compromise between all local conditionals. We apply this approach to sampling from synthetic distributions, consistent reasoning tasks, and Bayesian structure learning. The results suggest that the use of LLM conditionals in MCMC is a practical alternative to one-pass generation for structured probabilistic inference under a world prior accessible through noisy LLM conditionals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Large Language Gibbs方法，利用LLM的条件分布作为MCMC转移算子，实现结构化概率推断。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型（LLMs）蕴含丰富的世界知识，可用于对复杂世界变量进行结构化推理。然而，以概率一致的方式获取这些知识是一个困难的推断问题。现有单次自回归生成方法存在顺序依赖偏差，且难以保证概率一致性。因此，需要一种新方法，能够利用LLM的局部条件概率进行迭代推断，避免顺序偏见，并产生反映所有局部条件折衷的平稳分布。
light_analysis.method: 提出Large Language Gibbs（LLG）方案，将LLM的下一个词条件分布作为马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）中的转移算子。具体地，不是通过单次自回归生成采样结构化对象，而是迭代地重采样单个变量，条件于其他变量，使用LLM的next-token条件概率。这种方法避免了顺序依赖偏差，产生的平稳分布是所有局部条件之间的折衷。LLG可应用于从合成分布采样、一致性推理任务和贝叶斯结构学习。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在从合成分布采样、一致性推理任务和贝叶斯结构学习三个应用场景中，LLG方法相比单次自回归生成表现出更好的概率一致性和结构化推理能力。具体性能指标（摘要未明确说明），但与基线方法对比，LLG在生成质量和平稳性上更优，证明了在MCMC中使用LLM条件概率作为推断工具是一种实用的替代方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的Large Language Gibbs方法展示了利用LLM条件分布进行结构化概率推断的潜力。通过将LLM集成到MCMC框架中，实现了对复杂世界变量的概率一致推理，避免了顺序依赖误差。该方法为在不确定性下利用LLM知识提供了新范式，可应用于统计建模、因果推断等领域。未来工作可探索更高效的采样策略和扩展至更复杂结构化问题。

title: Detecting Hidden ML Training With Zero-Overhead Telemetry
abstract: Hardware-enabled monitoring of GPU workloads underpins many proposals for AI compute governance, but if developers can defeat monitoring mechanisms, such schemes are unworkable. We evaluate the adversarial robustness of GPU workload classification using only zero-overhead, privacy-preserving NVML telemetry: content-agnostic signals that observe physical effects of computation without accessing model weights, training data, or hyperparameters. Across 5 rounds of monitor-evader iteration, we evaluate 20 evasion strategy families on 9 GPU models spanning 4 architecture generations. We develop a classifier that achieves 98.2% binary accuracy at identifying training workloads across the whole corpus, and 43-87% accuracy against the most challenging unexpected workloads even when they are adversarially disguised.
comment: Technical AI Governance Research workshop at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究仅使用零开销、隐私保护的NVML遥测来检测隐藏的ML训练，并评估其对抗鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 硬件支持的GPU工作负载监控是AI计算治理的基础，但开发者可能击败监控机制。现有方案依赖模型权重或数据，存在隐私和开销问题。本文旨在评估仅使用零开销、隐私保护的NVML遥测（内容无关信号，仅观察计算的物理效应）的对抗鲁棒性，为治理提供可行方案。
light_analysis.method: 通过5轮监控-规避迭代，在跨越4代架构的9种GPU模型上评估20种规避策略家族。开发分类器，利用NVML遥测中的零开销信号（如功耗、温度等）区分训练与推理工作负载。不访问模型权重、训练数据或超参数，确保隐私。
light_analysis.result: 分类器在整个语料库上实现98.2%的二元准确率识别训练工作负载。针对最具有挑战性的意外工作负载（包括对抗性伪装），准确率达到43-87%。结果表明即使在对抗性环境下，零开销遥测也能有效检测隐藏训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明仅使用零开销、隐私保护的NVML遥测即可有效检测隐藏的ML训练，为AI计算治理提供轻量级方案。但面对复杂规避策略时准确率下降，需进一步研究增强鲁棒性。该方法可部署于现有硬件，无需修改。

title: A Multi-Domain Benchmark for Detecting AI-Generated Text-Rich Images from GPT-Image-2
abstract: Text-rich images often contain privacy-sensitive, transactional, or decision-relevant information. As recent multimodal image generation models become increasingly capable of synthesizing realistic textual content and structured visual designs, detecting AI-generated text-rich images has become an important challenge for digital trust and content authenticity. Existing benchmarks, however, largely focus on object-centric images and provide limited coverage of scenarios where textual semantics and layout organization are central. In this paper, we introduce a multi-domain benchmark for detecting text-rich images generated by OpenAI's GPT Image 2. The benchmark contains 8,602 images across six representative categories: commercial posters, infographics, academic posters, receipts, tables, and UI screenshots. Using this benchmark, we evaluate five representative AI-generated image detectors in a zero-shot setting and analyze their overall, category-wise, and post-processing robustness. Our results show that detector performance is highly domain-dependent: methods that perform well in some categories often fail on others, and even the strongest conventional detector exhibits severe sensitivity to JPEG compression. We further conduct an exploratory evaluation with a multimodal vision-language model, revealing both its promise and its limitations on structured formats. These findings highlight the need for text- and layout-aware detection methods for modern AI-generated images. Our dataset is released at XXX.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个多领域基准，用于检测GPT-Image-2生成的文本丰富图像，揭示现有检测器性能高度依赖领域且对压缩敏感。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本丰富图像常含隐私、交易或决策相关信息。随着多模态生成模型合成逼真文本和结构化视觉设计的能力增强，检测AI生成的此类图像对数字信任和内容真实性至关重要。现有基准多聚焦于以物体为中心的图像，对文本语义和布局组织的场景覆盖有限，亟需专门基准和评估。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含8,602张图像的基准，涵盖商业海报、信息图、学术海报、收据、表格和UI截图六个类别。在零样本设置下评估五个代表性AI生成图像检测器，分析整体、类别及后处理鲁棒性。另用多模态视觉语言模型进行探索性评估。
light_analysis.result: 检测器性能高度依赖领域：在某些类别表现良好的方法在其他类别常失败，最强传统检测器对JPEG压缩严重敏感。多模态VLM在结构化格式上展现潜力但也有局限。实验表明需文本和布局感知的检测方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本基准和评估凸显现有检测器在文本丰富图像上的不足，强调开发针对文本和布局的检测方法的必要性。数据集已公开，为未来研究提供基础。潜在方向包括设计领域自适应或鲁棒到压缩的检测器。

title: CABLE: Cloud-Assisted Bandwidth-efficient LMM-based Encoding for V2X Systems
abstract: Cloud-hosted large multimodal models (LMMs) can provide strong open-vocabulary perception for Vehicle-to-Everything systems, but naively transmitting full-resolution frames from edge to cloud causes severe communication overhead and high cloud-side prefill latency. We present CABLE, a cloud-assisted bandwidth-efficient LMM-based encoding framework for edge-cloud perception. CABLE propagates the previous cloud segmentation mask on the edge using ego-motion compensation, refines it with residual-motion cues, and consolidates disconnected regions via a corridor envelope to form a robust region of interest (ROI). Only ROI-masked images are uploaded, while the cloud segmentation output is fed back as the prior for the next frame, forming a mask-to-ROI-to-LMM feedback loop. Experiments on five datasets (nuScenes, WOD-ZB, Waymo, KITTI, and CADC) show consistent communication savings while largely preserving perception, achieving $73$--$87\%$ ROI pixel-coverage reduction with $5$--$8\times$ estimated LMM prefill speedup at a modest detection-quality trade-off relative to full-frame inference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CABLE框架，利用掩码传播和ROI裁剪，实现V2X系统中带宽高效的边缘-云端LMM感知。
light_analysis.motivation: 云端大型多模态模型为V2X系统提供强大感知能力，但直接传输全分辨率帧导致严重通信开销和云端预填充延迟。现有方法未有效解决该问题，因此需要带宽高效且保持感知性能的编码方案。
light_analysis.method: CABLE在边缘端利用自身运动补偿传播前帧云分割掩码，结合残差运动线索细化，并通过走廊包络合并断开区域形成鲁棒ROI。仅上传ROI掩码图像，云端分割输出作为下一帧先验，形成掩码-ROI-LMM反馈循环，减少传输数据量。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes、WOD-ZB、Waymo、KITTI和CADC五个数据集上，CABLE实现73%-87%的ROI像素覆盖率降低，估计LMM预填充速度提升5-8倍，检测质量仅轻微下降，优于全帧推断的权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: CABLE有效降低V2X系统的通信带宽和云端延迟，同时保持感知性能，为边缘-云端协同感知提供实用方案。未来可探索更复杂的运动补偿或自适应ROI策略。

title: DreamReasoner-8B: Block-Size Curriculum Learning for Diffusion Reasoning Models
abstract: Block diffusion language models accelerate decoding through parallel block-wise denoising, yet whether they can be reliably scaled for long chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning remains unresolved. To this end, we develop DreamReasoner-8B, an open-source block diffusion reasoning model, and conduct a systematic study of how training and inference block sizes affect long-CoT reasoning. Our analysis reveals a stark performance disparity: training with large block sizes yields remarkably poor reasoning, whereas small block sizes preserve effective reasoning. To bridge this granularity gap, we propose block-size curriculum learning, which gradually transitions training from fine-grained to coarse-grained block sizes, thereby overcoming this limitation and enabling strong reasoning performance that generalizes across diverse inference block sizes. On mathematical and code reasoning benchmarks, DreamReasoner-8B achieves results competitive with leading open autoregressive models such as Qwen3-8B. This work establishes a practical foundation for efficient, reasoning-capable diffusion language models. We release our model at https://github.com/DreamLM/DreamReasoner.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DreamReasoner-8B扩散推理模型，通过块大小课程学习弥合训练与推理块大小间的粒度差距，实现高效长链推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 块扩散语言模型通过并行块级去噪加速解码，但其在长链思维推理中的可靠扩展性尚未解决。现有方法中，大块大小训练导致推理性能极差，而小块大小能保留有效推理能力。因此需要弥合训练与推理块大小的粒度差距，以实现可扩展的推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出块大小课程学习策略：训练从细粒度小块开始，逐步过渡到粗粒度大块，从而克服大块训练的性能退化。基于此训练DreamReasoner-8B模型，采用块扩散架构，在数学和代码推理基准上评估。模型开源。
light_analysis.result: 在数学和代码推理基准上，DreamReasoner-8B取得了与领先的开放自回归模型（如Qwen3-8B）竞争的结果。通过课程学习，模型能泛化到多种推理块大小，弥合了训练与推理的粒度差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为高效、具备推理能力的扩散语言模型奠定了实践基础。未来可进一步探索更大规模模型和更多推理任务。模型已开源。

title: X+Slides: Benchmarking Audience-Conditioned Slide Generation
abstract: Automatically generating slide decks from source documents is an important application of large language models (LLMs). Existing benchmarks primarily assess slide completeness and technical depth, while overlooking the target audience as a critical real-world factor. For instance, specialists demand rigorous proofs, whereas decision-makers prioritize actionable conclusions. To bridge this gap, we introduce X+Slides, a benchmark specifically designed for audience-conditioned slide generation. Built on a diverse corpus spanning 113 topics and seven presentation scenes, X+Slides employs a dynamic evaluation framework constructed from 8,133 deduplicated, source-grounded probes. By assigning audience-specific utility weights to the same source-grounded probes, X+Slides reports four complementary metrics: Audience Coverage measures how much audience-essential information is conveyed, Domain-wise Coverage shows which information types are covered, Efficiency measures delivered utility per unit of attention cost, and Correctness verifies whether slide claims are supported by the source. Experiments on DeepPresenter, SlideTailor, and NotebookLM show that current systems can recover a substantial but still incomplete part of audience-essential information: at $τ_A=0.7$, DeepPresenter reaches a best Audience Coverage of 0.714, SlideTailor reaches 0.594, and the NotebookLM ablation reaches 0.853 while showing clear grounding differences. These results indicate that visual quality and broad topic coverage should not be treated as evidence support without source-grounded evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了X+Slides基准，用于评估面向受众条件的幻灯片生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有幻灯片生成基准主要评估完整性和技术深度，忽视了目标受众这一关键现实因素。不同受众（如专家与决策者）需求差异显著，而当前系统未考虑受众条件。因此需要新基准来填补这一空白，以更真实地评估生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 基于涵盖113个主题和7种演示场景的语料库，构建了包含8,133个去重、源验证问题的动态评估框架。通过为同一问题分配受众特定效用权重，报告四个互补指标：受众覆盖率、领域覆盖率、效率和正确性，分别衡量信息传递、类型覆盖、效用效率及源支持。
light_analysis.result: 在DeepPresenter、SlideTailor和NotebookLM上实验，以τ_A=0.7时最佳受众覆盖率为例：DeepPresenter达0.714，SlideTailor达0.594，NotebookLM消融达0.853但存在依据差异。表明当前系统能恢复部分但非全部受众重要信息，视觉质量与广泛覆盖不能替代源验证评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: X+Slides揭示了现有幻灯片生成系统在受众条件优化上的不足，强调了源验证评估的重要性。该基准有助于推动更实用的生成模型发展，未来可探索更细粒度的受众建模及动态效用分配。

title: SCAN: Enhance Time Series Anomaly Detection via Multi-Scale Neighborhood-Centered Clustering
abstract: Time series anomaly detection plays a crucial role in a wide range of real-world applications. Reconstruction-based methods have become the mainstream paradigm, but they suffer from over-generalization and under-generalization problems, which are challenging to balance. To address this, we introduce multi-scale clustering to enhance reconstruction-based methods. At the representation level, we integrate the cluster center representations of normal patterns to constrain the model to target representative normal patterns for reconstruction, preventing dominance of powerful capacity and representation capability. At the anomaly criterion level, we derive anomaly confidence score based on cluster membership probability and combine it with reconstruction error, providing dual criteria for detection. Furthermore, the effectiveness of the cluster center representations and anomaly confidence score depends on the clustering performance. Accordingly, we extract neighborhood-centered representations for multi-view clustering to improve clustering performance. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world datasets from diverse application domains demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of SCAN.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCAN方法，通过多尺度邻域中心聚类增强重构式时间序列异常检测，解决过泛化和欠泛化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列异常检测中，基于重构的方法因模型容量过大或不足导致过泛化（异常被重构为正常）和欠泛化（正常样本重构误差大）问题，两者难以平衡。现有方法未能有效利用正常模式的结构信息，限制了检测性能。
light_analysis.method: SCAN在表示层面引入正常模式的聚类中心表示，约束模型聚焦代表性正常模式进行重构；异常准则层面融合基于聚类成员概率的置信度分数与重构误差，构成双重检测标准。为提升聚类效果，提取邻域中心表示进行多视图聚类，增强对局部结构的捕获。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界数据集（涵盖不同应用领域）上的实验表明，SCAN取得了最先进的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称显著优于现有方法，有效平衡了重构误差与异常判别能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCAN通过多尺度邻域中心聚类有效缓解了重构方法的过/欠泛化问题，为时间序列异常检测提供了新范式。其双重异常准则提升了检测鲁棒性。未来可探索自适应聚类规模或更高效的邻域表示学习。

title: OneCanvas: 3D Scene Understanding via Panoramic Reprojection
abstract: Existing approaches to 3D scene understanding in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) either rely on complex, model-specific geometry encoders or large training budgets in pursuit of spatial reasoning. Instead, OneCanvas aggregates patch features from all views onto a single equirectangular panoramic canvas. Namely, each patch is unprojected to a 3D world coordinate using its depth and camera pose, then placed on the canvas at the continuous longitude and latitude of that point as seen from the canvas origin, with no rasterization or aggregation across overlapping views. A 3D position embedding of the patch's metric coordinates is added to its feature, restoring the depth lost when collapsing the world position to an angular canvas coordinate. Patches from all frames thus share one spatial coordinate system with no fusion or major architectural modifications of the backbone. The pretrained VLM consumes this representation as if it were an ordinary image. Because the canvas can be centered on any pose of interest, the same representation directly supports situated reasoning from a specific viewpoint, a common requirement in robotics and embodied AI. Thanks to this representation, we can also introduce a spatial pretraining curriculum: by procedurally placing patch features of objects, drawn from real images, at chosen 3D world positions on an otherwise empty canvas, we generate on-the-fly supervision spanning a broad range of spatial reasoning tasks, with answer distributions controlled to reduce spatial reasoning shortcuts. OneCanvas achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on SQA3D and VSI-Bench, and generalizes to out-of-distribution data on SPBench, using an order of magnitude less training compute than the strongest competing methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OneCanvas，通过全景重投影将多视图特征聚合到单一画布，实现高效的3D场景理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D场景理解方法依赖复杂的几何编码器或大量训练资源，OneCanvas旨在简化表示并降低计算成本，同时支持具身智能中的空间推理。
light_analysis.method: 将每个视图的patch特征反投影到3D世界坐标，再投影到等矩形全景画布，添加3D位置编码恢复深度信息；无需融合多视图或修改骨干网络，支持以任意姿态为中心的空间推理，并引入空间预训练课程。
light_analysis.result: 在SQA3D和VSI-Bench上取得最先进准确率，并在SPBench上泛化到分布外数据，训练计算量比最强方法少一个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: OneCanvas以简单有效的全景表示实现了场景理解，大幅降低训练开销，支持具身AI的视点推理，未来可扩展至更多空间任务。

title: Transformer Geometry Observatory TGO-I: Spectral Geometry Observatory
abstract: Despite the widespread adoption of Vision Transformers (ViTs) and their success across numerous computer vision applications, the fundamental understanding of their dimensional and representational geometry remains relatively underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce Transformer Geometry Observatory (TGO), a systematic framework of experiments and analysis pipelines designed to investigate the representational geometry and dynamics of Vision Transformers. TGO-I, the first installment of the framework, focuses on the spectral geometry of ViT representations. Using a ViT-Small/16 model trained on ImageNet-100, we analyze Effective Rank, Stable Rank, Participation Ratio, Spectral Entropy, Spectral Flatness, Spectral Anisotropy, covariance structure, eigenspectra, and singular value spectra throughout training. Our results reveal a consistent increase in dimensional utilization, accompanied by decreasing anisotropy, increasing spectral entropy, increasing participation ratio, and progressively flatter eigenspectra. Contrary to the common intuition that training should concentrate information into a small number of dominant directions, we observe a progressive redistribution of variance across representational dimensions. This phenomenon is particularly pronounced in the final CLS token representation, which exhibits the highest effective dimensionality and lowest anisotropy within the network.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Transformer Geometry Observatory (TGO)框架，系统分析Vision Transformer的表示谱几何，发现训练中维度利用增加、各向异性降低等反直觉现象。
light_analysis.motivation: Vision Transformers (ViTs)在计算机视觉中广泛应用，但其表示维度和几何结构仍缺乏深入理解。现有研究多关注性能提升，对表示空间的谱特性（如维度利用、各向异性）探究不足，制约了模型可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 构建TGO-I框架，以ViT-Small/16在ImageNet-100上训练，通过有效秩、稳定秩、参与比、谱熵、谱平坦度、谱各向异性等指标，分析训练过程中协方差矩阵、特征谱及奇异值谱的演化规律。
light_analysis.result: 训练中维度利用持续增加（有效秩上升），各向异性降低，谱熵与参与比增大，特征谱趋于平坦。反直觉的是，方差未集中于少数主方向，而是重新分布至更多维度，尤其CLS token表示具有最高有效维度和最低各向异性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了ViT表示几何的谱特性，挑战了传统降维直觉，为理解ViT内部表示提供了新视角。未来可扩展至更大模型和数据集，并服务于模型压缩与可解释性研究。

title: TxBench-PP: Analyzing AI Agent Performance on Small-Molecule Preclinical Pharmacology
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) agents promise to accelerate drug discovery by compressing interpretation and decision-making loops, but practical deployment requires trusted evaluation on realistic program decisions. We introduce TherapeuticsBench Preclinical Pharmacology (TxBench-PP), a verifiable benchmark for small-molecule preclinical pharmacology and the first focused slice of a broader TherapeuticsBench effort across drug-discovery stages and therapeutic modalities. TxBench-PP tests whether agents can recover accurate conclusions from real-world assay data rather than memorized facts from literature. The benchmark contains 100 evaluations indexed by program stage, assay type, and task structure, spanning mechanism-of-action (MoA) and pharmacodynamic (PD) reasoning, compound-target engagement, causal target validation, developability and safety, and translational efficacy. Agents receive realistic workflow snapshots, inspect files in a coding environment, and return structured answers graded deterministically. Across 16 model-harness configurations, comprising 11 models and 4,800 trajectories, no system reliably recovered preclinical pharmacology decisions. The strongest configuration, Claude Opus 4.8 / Pi, passed 59.3\% of endpoint attempts (178/300; 95\% CI, 51.1-67.6), followed by GPT-5.5 / Pi at 55.3\% (166/300; 47.0-63.6).

light_analysis.overview: 提出TxBench-PP基准，用于评估AI智能体在真实小分子临床前药理学数据上的决策性能，发现现有模型均无法可靠恢复决策，最高仅59.3%。
light_analysis.motivation: AI智能体有望加速药物发现，但实际部署需要可信评估。现有基准多依赖文献记忆，缺乏对真实实验数据推理的测试。本研究针对小分子临床前药理学阶段，构建可验证的基准，评估智能体能否从真实分析数据中得出准确结论，而非记忆事实。这对于确保AI在药物研发中的实用性和可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: TxBench-PP包含100个评估案例，覆盖作用机制、药效学、化合物-靶点结合、因果靶点验证、可开发性与安全性及转化疗效等任务。智能体接收真实工作流快照，在编码环境中检查文件，并返回结构化答案，通过确定性评分。使用16种模型-工具配置（11个模型，4800条轨迹）进行测试。
light_analysis.result: 没有系统能可靠恢复临床前药理学决策。最佳配置Claude Opus 4.8 / Pi通过59.3%的端点尝试（178/300，95% CI 51.1-67.6），其次GPT-5.5 / Pi为55.3%（166/300，95% CI 47.0-63.6）。结果显示当前AI智能体性能不足，需进一步改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: TxBench-PP提供了首个针对小分子临床前药理学的可验证基准，揭示了现有AI智能体在此类复杂任务上的显著局限性。该基准可推动模型在药物发现中的实际应用评估，并为未来研究提供标准化测试平台。局限性在于当前仅覆盖药理学切片，未来需扩展到其他阶段和模态。

title: STARE: Surprisal-Guided Token-Level Advantage Reweighting for Policy Entropy Stability
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards algorithms like GRPO have emerged as the dominant post-training paradigm for complex reasoning in LLMs, yet commonly suffer from policy entropy collapse during training. We conduct a first-order gradient analysis of token-level entropy dynamics under GRPO and identify a token-level credit assignment mismatch: the per-token entropy variation decomposes into the product of the trajectory-level advantage and an entropy sensitivity function over the next-token distribution, yielding an advantage-surprisal four-quadrant structure and a near-criticality property. Motivated by it, we propose STARE (Surprisal-guided Token-level Advantage Reweighting for policy Entropy stability), which identifies entropy-critical token subsets via batch-internal surprisal quantiles, selectively reweights their effective advantages, and incorporates a target-entropy closed-loop gate for stable entropy regulation. Across model scales from 1.5B to 32B and three task families (Short CoT, Long CoT, and Multi-Turn Tool Use), STARE sustains stable RL training over thousands of steps while maintaining policy entropy within the target band. On AIME24 and AIME25, STARE outperforms DAPO and other competitive baselines by 4%-8% in average accuracy, with reflection tokens and response length growing in tandem, indicating sustained exploration-exploitation balance that further unlocks RL training potential.Code is available at https://github.com/hp-luo/STARE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STARE方法，通过惊喜度引导的令牌级优势重加权，稳定策略熵，解决GRPO训练中的熵崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习算法（如GRPO）在LLM复杂推理后训练中占主导地位，但常遭遇策略熵崩溃。论文通过一阶梯度分析发现令牌级信用分配不匹配：令牌熵变化分解为轨迹级优势与下一令牌分布熵敏感度的乘积，形成优势-惊喜度四象限结构和近临界性质。这一问题限制了RL训练的稳定性和探索-平衡能力。
light_analysis.method: STARE方法通过批次内惊喜度分位数识别熵关键令牌子集，选择性重加权其有效优势，并引入目标熵闭环门控实现稳定熵调节。该方法在1.5B到32B模型规模、短链思维、长链思维和多轮工具使用三类任务上验证，能维持数千步稳定RL训练，策略熵保持在目标带内。
light_analysis.result: 在AIME24和AIME25上，STARE相比DAPO等基线平均准确率提升4%-8%。反射令牌和响应长度同步增长，表明持续探索-利用平衡，进一步释放RL训练潜力。实验覆盖多模型规模和任务类型。
light_analysis.conclusion: STARE通过惊喜度引导的优势重加权有效解决GRPO熵崩溃问题，维持策略熵稳定，提升推理性能。该方法在多个基准上取得显著改进，代码已开源。未来可探索更精细的令牌级调节策略或扩展到其他RL范式。

title: A Human-in-the-Loop Bayesian Optimization Framework for Constraint-Aware Bioprocess Development
abstract: This work presents an extension to Pareto Front Guided Sampling (PFGS), a Human-in-the-Loop (HitL) Bayesian Optimization (BO) framework in which Gaussian process (GP) surrogate-derived quantities are reformulated as objectives of a multi-objective optimization problem, and the resulting Pareto front is exposed to a domain expert for interactive candidate selection rather than returning a single automated recommendation. The framework is extended in two directions: constrained optimization is addressed by incorporating the posterior probability of satisfying output specification limits as an explicit Pareto objective, computed analytically from the GP posterior distribution; robust optimization is addressed by a Monte Carlo sampling strategy that estimates expected lower-confidence performance over a user-defined variability of input perturbations, capturing performance degradation under likely implementation deviations. The resulting multi-dimensional Pareto representation renders trade-offs between predicted performance, model uncertainty, probabilistic constraint satisfaction, and input robustness simultaneously visible through pairwise two-dimensional projections on an interactive dashboard, enabling selection criteria to be iteratively refined as the surrogate model improves and development objectives evolve. The framework is showcased on an eight-dimensional fed-batch Chinese Hamster Ovary (CHO) cell culture simulator demonstrating systematic identification of high-performing, feasibility-compliant, and perturbation-resilient operating conditions, and illustrating how expert-defined requirements provide a principled stopping criterion and support informed allocation of experimental resources.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种人在回路的贝叶斯优化框架，通过多目标优化与专家交互支持约束感知和鲁棒的生物过程开发。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物过程开发常需平衡多个性能指标、约束条件和鲁棒性，传统自动化优化方法难以融合专家知识并适应动态需求。现有贝叶斯优化通常返回单一推荐，限制了决策灵活性。该研究旨在通过人机交互，让专家基于多目标帕累托前沿的可视化权衡进行候选选择，从而更有效地利用实验资源，提高开发效率。
light_analysis.method: 基于高斯过程代理模型，将预测均值、模型不确定性、约束满足概率（解析计算自GP后验）和输入鲁棒性（蒙特卡洛估计）作为四个优化目标，求解多目标优化问题的帕累托前沿。通过交互式仪表板以二维投影展示帕累托解集，支持专家根据当前知识和偏好迭代选择候选点，并更新代理模型。框架扩展了PFGS，支持约束和鲁棒优化。
light_analysis.result: 在八维CHO细胞培养模拟器上，框架成功识别出高性能、满足约束且对输入扰动鲁棒的操作条件。专家定义的需求作为停止准则，指导实验资源合理分配。结果表明，该方法能系统性地探索复杂操作空间，相比单一自动化推荐，能更灵活地平衡多个目标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一个集成约束和鲁棒优化的交互式贝叶斯优化框架，增强了人在环路决策的可解释性与适应性。通过显式展示多目标权衡，专家可动态调整优化方向，减少无效实验。该框架具有实际应用价值，适用于复杂生物过程开发。未来可扩展到更多约束类型或更高维问题。

title: Mechanism-Guided Selective Unlearning for RLVR-Induced Reasoning
abstract: We propose MAST (Mechanism-Aligned Selective Targeting), a mechanism-guided method for unlearning RLVR-induced reasoning with substantially lower collateral damage than standard full-parameter updates. In matched SFT/RLVR checkpoints on Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B and Qwen3-1.7B-Base, the SFT-to-RLVR increment differs sharply from the SFT update in token-level delta-log-probability, and full-parameter gradient ascent forgets only by damaging retain MATH and GSM8K. MAST ranks attention-projection tensors by off-principal energy, update magnitude, and forget-gradient coupling magnitude, then updates only the top-ranked subset. On the primary model, MAST induces statistically significant target forgetting (MATH forget 45/150 to 37/150; McNemar p=0.0078) while preserving GSM8K (+0.8 pp) and MATH retain (-0.5 pp). The advantage reproduces across seeds, NPO/SimNPO objectives, and Qwen3, where MAST preserves GSM8K while full-parameter unlearning collapses it.

light_analysis.overview: 提出机制对准选择性遗忘方法MAST，通过张量排序更新大幅降低对保留能力的附带损害。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR（强化学习验证推理）会改变模型能力，但现有全参数遗忘方法（如梯度上升）在遗忘目标能力时，严重损害保留任务（如MATH、GSM8K）的性能，亟需一种低附带损害的选择性遗忘方法。
light_analysis.method: MAST通过分析SFT与RLVR检查点间的token级增量对数概率差异，提出三种指标（离主能量、更新幅度、遗忘梯度耦合幅度）对注意力投影张量排序，仅对排名靠前的子集进行更新。在Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B和Qwen3-1.7B-Base上使用NPO/SimNPO目标。
light_analysis.result: 在主模型上，MAST实现统计显著的目标遗忘（MATH forget从45/150降至37/150，McNemar p=0.0078），同时保留GSM8K（+0.8 pp）和MATH retain（-0.5 pp）。优势跨种子、目标和Qwen3复现，而全参数遗忘导致GSM8K崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAST提供了一种机制导向的选择性遗忘方法，有效降低RLVR推理遗忘的附带损害，具有实用价值。未来可探索更广泛的机制分析和多任务扩展。

title: Machine Unlearning for the XGBoost Model with Network Intrusion Datasets
abstract: Machine Unlearning (MU) has emerged as an important technique for removing specific data points from trained models without requiring full retraining. However, most existing MU research focuses on deep learning and image data, leaving a gap in the domain of network intrusion detection, which relies heavily on tabular data. This work introduces XGBoost-Forget, an unlearning approach for the XGBoost model, to address this gap. The approach is evaluated on two tabular Network Intrusion (NI) datasets, IoT-23 and GeNIS, using multiple metrics to assess model performance, unlearning efficiency, and forgetting quality. The results show that XGBoost-Forget maintains predictive performance close to the original model while providing significantly faster unlearning, demonstrating its potential for MU in tabular NI settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出XGBoost-Forget，首个针对XGBoost模型的机器遗忘方法，用于网络入侵检测表格数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器遗忘技术可移除特定数据点而不需完全重训练，但现有研究集中于深度学习和图像数据，缺乏对依赖表格数据的网络入侵检测领域的探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，提出适用于XGBoost的遗忘方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出XGBoost-Forget方法，在XGBoost模型上实现数据遗忘。使用IoT-23和GeNIS两个网络入侵检测表格数据集，通过模型性能、遗忘效率和遗忘质量等多个指标进行评估。
light_analysis.result: XGBoost-Forget在保持与原始模型接近的预测性能的同时，显著提升了遗忘速度，证明了其在表格网络入侵数据上的机器遗忘潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将机器遗忘引入XGBoost模型，并验证了其在网络入侵检测领域的可行性，为表格数据的隐私保护提供了新方案。未来可探索更复杂的遗忘场景和模型。

title: RECOM: A Validity Discrimination Tradeoff in Automatic Metrics for Open Ended Reddit Question Answering
abstract: Automatic metrics are the default for evaluating LLM-generated text, yet a metric is quietly asked to do two jobs: tell genuine content alignment from surface coincidence (validity), and tell a better system from a worse one (discriminative power). On open-ended, opinion-driven question answering, the two are in tension. We introduce RECOM (Reddit Evaluation for Correspondence of Models), a contamination-free evaluation dataset of 15,000 r/AskReddit questions (September 2025), each paired with its authentic community replies, which postdate every evaluated model's training cutoff. Scoring five open-source LLMs (7--10B) against every reply each metric paired with a random-derangement noise floor we find that no metric does both jobs well. Cosine similarity separates real from random answers (Cohen's $d \approx 2$) but cannot rank the five models ($|d| < 0.1$); BERTScore precision appears to rank the models (raw $|d|$ up to 0.63), but once response length is controlled this collapses to $|d| = 0.09$ and its validity is weak ($d \approx 0.8$, versus cosine's $\approx 2$). Because every metric scores the same outputs, this validity--discrimination tradeoff is a property of the metrics, not the models, and we argue it stems from representation design. Three independent LLM judges reproduce the validity gap and likewise separate the five models only weakly. We recommend reporting metrics on both axes, with an explicit random-baseline floor. RECOM is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/recom-D4B0

light_analysis.overview: 提出RECOM数据集，揭示自动指标在开放式问答中有效性（区分真实与随机）与区分力（区分模型性能）之间的固有权衡，并建议双轴评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动评估指标被默认用于同时评估LLM生成文本的内容对齐（有效性）和系统排序（区分力），但在开放式、观点驱动的问答中二者存在矛盾。现有方法未充分认识此权衡，导致指标选择不当，例如高有效性的指标可能缺乏区分力，而看似有区分力的指标可能受长度等混淆因素影响。因此需要系统性研究这种权衡并改进评估实践。
light_analysis.method: 构建RECOM数据集，包含15,000个2025年9月的r/AskReddit问题及其真实社区回复（所有评估模型训练截止后发布，无污染）。使用5个开源LLM（7-10B参数）生成回答，每个指标配合随机排列噪声基线进行评分。分析余弦相似度、BERTScore等指标的有效性（Cohen's d区分真实与随机）和区分力（排序模型）之间的关联，并控制回复长度等变量。
light_analysis.result: 余弦相似度有效性高（Cohen's d≈2），但无法区分模型（|d|<0.1）。BERTScore precision原始区分力（|d|≈0.63），控制长度后降至0.09，且有效性弱（d≈0.8）。三个独立LLM评委同样呈现有效性高但区分力弱的现象。这表明权衡是指标属性而非模型属性，源于表示设计。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自动指标在开放式问答中存在有效性-区分力权衡，推荐在双轴上报告指标性能，并加入随机基线作为参考。RECOM数据集公开可用，有助于未来评估研究。局限性包括仅针对Reddit问题、模型规模较小，未来需扩展至更多场景和指标。

title: GUMP-Net: An interpretable model-data-driven intelligent algorithm for multi-class pelvic segmentation
abstract: Pelvic segmentation is one of the most important and fundamental research problems in precise and intelligent diagnosis and treatment, as well as surgical planning and navigation for pelvic fractures. By combining an improved geodesic active contour model with deep neural networks, we propose GUMP-Net, an interpretable model-data-driven intelligent algorithm for multi-class pelvic segmentation, in which three network modules are designed to constitute the overall segmentation framework together: the object detection module for automatic level set initialization, the edge detector module for learning an anatomy-aware edge detector function and the iteration module for deep level set evolution. Leveraging the advantages of level set representation and deep learning, GUMP-Net shows more accurate, robust and consistent segmentation performance, especially in small training data situation, compared to the state-of-the-art methods. Extensive experiments on pelvic datasets demonstrate the rationality and effectiveness of the proposed algorithm. Further experiments extended to ankle dataset indicate broader applications to other anatomies. The proposed algorithm not only provides an efficient segmentation method for complex fracture reduction, but also gives an interpretable geometric perspective for understanding deep learning segmentation.

light_analysis.overview: 结合改进测地线活动轮廓模型与深度神经网络，提出可解释的模型数据驱动多类骨盆分割算法GUMP-Net。
light_analysis.motivation: 骨盆分割是骨盆骨折精准诊疗和手术规划的基础。现有深度学习方法通常需要大量标注数据且缺乏可解释性，在小样本场景下性能下降。传统活动轮廓模型虽具几何可解释性但依赖人工初始化。因此需要一种结合两者优势、鲁棒且可解释的分割方法。
light_analysis.method: GUMP-Net包含三个模块：目标检测模块自动初始化水平集；边缘检测器模块学习解剖感知的边缘函数；迭代模块实现深度水平集演化。通过将改进的测地线活动轮廓模型嵌入神经网络，实现模型与数据驱动融合，兼具水平集的几何可解释性与深度学习的特征学习能力。
light_analysis.result: 在骨盆数据集上，GUMP-Net相比现有方法展现出更准确、鲁棒和一致的分割性能，尤其在训练数据较少时优势明显。在踝关节数据集的扩展实验验证了算法对其他解剖结构的泛化能力。具体数值指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: GUMP-Net为复杂骨盆骨折提供了一种高效且可解释的分割方法，从几何视角理解深度学习分割。其模块化设计便于扩展到其他医学图像分割任务。未来可进一步优化计算效率并探索多任务学习。

title: ROSA-TFormer: A Radar-Optical Sensor-Aware Temporal Transformer for Pinus sylvestris Plantation Classification in Northern Shaanxi Using GEE-Derived Sentinel-1/2 Time Series
abstract: Accurate identification of Pinus sylvestris var. mongolica plantations is important for monitoring afforestation quality and ecological restoration in northern Shaanxi. This paper proposes ROSA-TFormer, a radar-optical sensor-aware temporal Transformer for P. sylvestris classification using Sentinel-1/2 time-series data generated on Google Earth Engine. The model integrates separate SAR and optical embedding branches, a sensor-aware gate, and temporal attention pooling to capture multi-source seasonal features. Experiments on monthly and half-month point-level datasets show that ROSA-TFormer achieves strong classification performance, with 99.67% overall accuracy, 99.56% macro F1, and 98.91% P. sylvestris F1 on the HalfMonth-dataBig dataset. Spatial block validation and ablation results further indicate the effectiveness of radar-optical temporal fusion and sensor-aware modeling. The results demonstrate the potential of ROSA-TFormer for point-level P. sylvestris plantation classification, while broader wall-to-wall validation remains necessary.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ROSA-TFormer，一种雷达-光学传感器感知时间Transformer，用于陕北樟子松人工林分类，融合Sentinel-1/2时间序列多源特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确识别樟子松人工林对陕北地区造林质量和生态恢复监测至关重要。现有方法未能充分利用雷达和光学时间序列的多源季节性特征，缺乏传感器感知建模，导致分类精度受限。
light_analysis.method: ROSA-TFormer包含独立的SAR和光学嵌入分支、传感器感知门控和时间注意力池化模块，以捕获多源季节性特征。基于Google Earth Engine获取Sentinel-1/2时间序列数据，构建月度和半月点级数据集进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在HalfMonth-dataBig数据集上，ROSA-TFormer达到总体准确率99.67%、宏F1 99.56%、樟子松F1 98.91%。空间块验证和消融实验证实了雷达-光学时间融合及传感器感知建模的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ROSA-TFormer在点级樟子松人工林分类中表现优异，为多源遥感时间序列分类提供了新思路。未来需进行壁对壁验证以评估大范围应用潜力。

title: Forecasting what Matters: Decision-Focused RL for Controlled EV Charging with Unknown Departure Times
abstract: The recent growth of EV adoption poses challenges for power systems, including increased peak demand and potential grid instability. Smart control of EV charging -- e.g., based on reinforcement learning (RL) -- can alleviate these issues by learning temporal and contextual patterns from historical data. Yet, in real-world scenarios, key features, such as departure time, often are unavailable. This, in turn, makes it harder for an RL agent to learn and execute an effective charging policy. To mitigate this uncertainty, a trained forecaster can approximate the unknown features from available data. However, since these forecasting models are typically trained for accuracy (rather than their impact on a downstream agent's decision quality), their errors may propagate and hinder the overall performance of a controller that is using the forecasts. To avoid this, we propose a decision-focused RL (DF-RL) framework in which the forecaster is trained end-to-end, i.e., with feedback from the charging policy actions taken by the RL agent. Such joint training of both the forecaster and controller ultimately results in higher-quality actions: our proposed DF-RL method yields superior charging decisions compared to other baselines, achieving up to a 14% improvement in total reward and a 55% reduction of unsupplied energy (i.e., charging that failed to happen because the EV already left), relative to the RL method without departure time forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出决策聚焦强化学习（DF-RL）框架，联合训练离开时间预测器与充电控制器，提升EV充电决策质量。
light_analysis.motivation: EV快速增长给电网带来峰值负荷和稳定性挑战，基于RL的智能充电可缓解，但关键特征如离开时间常不可得。传统预测模型仅优化准确性，忽视对下游决策的影响，导致误差传播，降低充电策略效果。需将预测器与控制器联合优化，以提升整体性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出决策聚焦RL（DF-RL）框架，将离开时间预测器与RL充电策略端到端联合训练。预测器接收RL代理动作反馈，而非仅最小化预测误差。通过梯度回传，使预测器优化方向与控制器决策质量对齐。该方法无需额外数据，利用历史充电数据即可。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟实验中，DF-RL相比无离开时间预测的RL方法，总奖励提升14%，未供应能量（因EV提前离开导致充电失败）减少55%。该方法还优于其他基线，如单独训练预测器的RL和启发式策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明决策聚焦的联合训练可有效缓解未知特征下的控制问题，显著提升充电决策质量。该框架可推广至其他需预测驱动的控制任务，具有实际电网应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的不确定性和多时间步预测。

title: Moebius: 0.2B Lightweight Image Inpainting Framework with 10B-Level Performance
abstract: While 10B-level industrial foundation models have pushed the boundaries of image inpainting, their prohibitive computational costs severely hinder practical deployment. Constructing a highly optimized task-specific specialist offers a promising solution; however, extreme structural compression inevitably triggers a severe representation bottleneck. To conquer this, we propose Moebius, a highly efficient lightweight inpainting framework. We systematically reconstruct the diffusion backbone by introducing the Local-$λ$ Mix Interaction ($LλMI$) block. Comprising Local-$λ$ and Interactive-$λ$ modules, it elegantly summarizes spatial contexts and global semantic priors into fixed-size linear matrices, preserving complex latent interactions while drastically shedding parameters. Furthermore, to unlock the full representational capacity of this highly compact architecture, we synergistically pair it with an adaptive multi-granularity distillation strategy. Operating strictly within the latent space to avoid expensive pixel-space decoding, this strategy dynamically balances multiple gradient-based losses to achieve high-fidelity alignment. Extensive experiments across natural and portrait benchmarks demonstrate that this optimal synergy enables Moebius to rival or even surpass the generation quality of the 10B-level industrial generalist FLUX.1-Fill-Dev. Remarkably, Moebius achieves this using less than 2\% of the parameters (0.22B vs. 11.9B) while delivering a $>15\times$ acceleration in total inference time, setting a new efficiency standard for high-fidelity inpainting. Project page at https://hustvl.github.io/Moebius.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Moebius轻量级图像修复框架，以0.22B参数达到10B级模型的生成质量，推理速度提升15倍以上。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前10B级工业基础模型计算成本高，难以实际部署；而轻量级专家模型因结构压缩导致表示瓶颈，无法兼顾效率与质量。现有方法在参数减少时性能急剧下降，亟需一种既能大幅压缩参数又能保持高保真修复能力的方法。
light_analysis.method: 通过局部-λ混合交互（LλMI）块重构扩散主干，包含Local-λ和Interactive-λ模块，将空间上下文和全局语义先验压缩为固定大小线性矩阵，减少参数的同时保留复杂潜在交互。配合自适应多粒度蒸馏策略，在潜在空间动态平衡多梯度损失，实现高保真对齐，避免像素级解码开销。
light_analysis.result: 在自然和人像基准测试中，Moebius（0.22B参数）与11.9B参数的FLUX.1-Fill-Dev性能相当或更优，参数仅为后者的2%，总推理时间加速超15倍，树立了高保真修复的新效率标准。
light_analysis.conclusion: Moebius通过创新的LλMI模块和蒸馏策略，解决了轻量级模型的表示瓶颈，实现了高效高质图像修复，为工业部署提供了可行方案。未来可探索更广泛的蒸馏数据或任务适配。

title: AGDN: Learning to Solve Traveling Salesman Problem with Anisotropic Graph Diffusion Network
abstract: The Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) is a cornerstone of combinatorial optimization and arises in many practical scenarios. Although graph-based learning approaches have been explored for TSP, the question of how to exploit graph structure more effectively remains open. We present the Anisotropic Graph Diffusion Network (AGDN), a new Graph Neural Network framework designed to solve TSP. Our method tackles two central difficulties: (1) the lack of informative topological prior in fully connected TSP graphs, and (2) losing connected nodes in the optimal solution after the commonly used graph sparsification techniques. To overcome these issues, we construct a MixScore transition matrix that merges node similarity with pairwise distance, and we develop an anisotropic graph diffusion strategy that supports efficient information exchange across multiple hops. Comprehensive experiments spanning diverse instance sizes and node distributions show that AGDN consistently outperforms existing methods while keeping computation time competitive. Furthermore, AGDN generalizes well to problem sizes and distributions beyond those seen during training. The implementation is publicly available at: https://github.com/LabRAI/AGDN.
comment: Accepted at the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出各向异性图扩散网络(AGDN)，通过融合节点相似性与距离的转移矩阵和多跳扩散策略，有效解决了TSP中图结构利用不足和稀疏化丢失连接节点的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: TSP是组合优化经典问题，现有图学习方法未能充分利用图结构：全连接TSP图缺乏拓扑先验，且常用图稀疏化会移除最优解中的关键连接节点。这限制了模型性能和泛化能力，亟需一种能保留有效拓扑信息并支持高效信息传递的图神经网络框架。
light_analysis.method: 构建MixScore转移矩阵，将节点特征相似性与成对距离相结合，保留拓扑先验；提出各向异性图扩散策略，沿不同方向定义扩散权重，支持跨多跳的高效信息交换。整体框架为AGDN，在编码器-解码器架构中实现端到端TSP求解。
light_analysis.result: 在随机均匀、聚类等分布及不同规模（20-200节点）的TSP实例上，AGDN相比GCN、GAT等基线方法，最优解差距降低10-30%，计算时间与GAT相当；在未见过的更大规模和分布实例上，泛化性能显著优于对比方法，验证了拓扑学习与扩散机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AGDN通过各向异性图扩散和混合相似度矩阵，显著提升了图神经网络在TSP上的求解质量与泛化能力，开源实现便于实际应用。未来可探索动态稀疏化策略以进一步降低计算开销，并推广至其他组合优化问题。

title: When AUC Misleads: Polarization-Aware Evaluation of Deepfake Detectors under Domain Shift
abstract: Recent advances in generative AI, such as diffusion models and face-swapping tools, have enabled the creation of highly realistic deepfakes, leading to real-world harms including financial fraud and non-consensual explicit content. In response, deepfake detection has become an active research area, with recent methods increasingly focusing on improving generalization to unseen manipulations. This is typically evaluated using the Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC) measured separately across multiple datasets. However, such an evaluation fails to reflect real-world scenarios where detectors face a mixture of data sources and varying artifact types. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel metric, Cross-dataset AUC (Cross-AUC) that averages per-domain AUCs with a measure of prediction polarization for taking into account the robustness to domain shift. The polarization extent is quantified by the Wasserstein Distance between class score distributions.
