Cross-AUC not only assesses the generalization capabilities of deepfake detectors under domain shifts more realistically, but it is also interpretable as it better explains the reason behind a drop in performance. Experiments performed on seven benchmark datasets demonstrate its practical relevance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Cross-AUC指标，结合AUC和预测极化度，更真实评估深度假检测器在域迁移下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度假检测器评估主要依赖AUC，但AUC无法反映真实场景中混合数据源和多样伪造类型的情况，导致对域迁移鲁棒性的评估不准确。需一个更全面的指标来捕捉检测器在不同域下的性能变化及其原因。
light_analysis.method: 提出Cross-dataset AUC (Cross-AUC)，计算每个域AUC的平均值，并引入预测极化程度作为惩罚项，极化度通过类分数分布的Wasserstein距离量化。该指标既评估泛化能力，也解释性能下降原因。
light_analysis.result: 在7个基准数据集上的实验表明，Cross-AUC能更真实地反映深度假检测器在域迁移下的表现，相比传统AUC，它更稳健且可解释，能揭示由于域偏移导致的性能变化。
light_analysis.conclusion: Cross-AUC为深度假检测评估提供了新视角，学术上改进了评估方法，实际应用中有助于开发更鲁棒的检测系统。未来可扩展至其他域迁移场景，但需更多验证。

title: Language Models as Interfaces, Not Oracles: A Hybrid LLM-ML System for Pediatric Appendicitis
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can make clinical decision support more accessible by interpreting free-text documentation, but their direct use as diagnostic engines is limited by sensitivity to prompts, information order, and plausible but incorrect outputs. Structured machine-learning models offer more stable risk prediction, yet they require tabular inputs that are difficult to integrate with narrative clinical workflows. We present ClaMPAPP (Clinical Language-assisted Machine-learning Pipeline for Appendicitis), a hybrid system that uses an LLM as an interface rather than as the final decision-maker. ClaMPAPP extracts schema-constrained clinical features from note-like narratives, applies deterministic plausibility checks, and passes validated features to an XGBoost classifier trained on clinical, laboratory, and ultrasound variables. We evaluated ClaMPAPP on two independent pediatric appendicitis cohorts from German hospitals and compared it with end-to-end LLM baselines, including open-source and proprietary models. To preserve ground truth while testing free-text input, narratives were generated from structured electronic health records through template rendering and constrained LLM rewriting, with additional sentence-order permutation to assess positional robustness. ClaMPAPP achieved the strongest overall diagnostic performance in both internal and external validation while minimizing missed appendicitis cases, the key safety concern in acute triage. End-to-end LLMs showed unstable sensitivity-specificity trade-offs and greater degradation under narrative reordering. These results support an LLM-as-interface, ML-as-predictor design that separates natural-language usability from predictive inference and provides a more auditable pathway for clinical decision support.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种LLM作为接口、ML模型作为预测器的混合系统ClaMPAPP，用于儿科阑尾炎诊断，提高了准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在临床决策支持中直接作为诊断引擎存在对提示敏感、输出不稳定等问题，而结构化ML模型需要表格输入，难以融入叙事性临床工作流程。现有方法无法兼顾自然语言处理能力和稳定预测，亟需一种结合两者优势的设计。
light_analysis.method: ClaMPAPP首先使用LLM从自由文本叙述中提取模式约束的临床特征，经过确定性合理性检查，然后将验证后的特征输入XGBoost分类器（基于临床、实验室和超声变量训练）。评估使用两个德国医院的儿科阑尾炎队列，通过模板渲染和LLM改写生成叙述文本，并采用句子顺序排列测试位置鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: ClaMPAPP在内部和外部验证中均取得最强的整体诊断性能，同时最小化阑尾炎漏诊（关键安全指标）。端到端LLM显示不稳定的敏感度-特异度权衡，且在叙述重排序下性能下降更严重。摘要未给出具体数值，但明确优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM-as-interface, ML-as-predictor的设计分离了自然语言可用性与预测推理，提供了更可审计的临床决策支持路径。该方法提高了诊断稳定性和安全性，减少了漏诊。未来可应用于其他临床场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Compute Efficiency and Serial Runtime Tradeoffs for Stochastic Momentum Methods
abstract: Stochastic momentum methods such as heavy ball (HB), Nesterov momentum, and variants of Accelerated SGD (ASGD) [Kidambi et al., 2018] are widely used in modern training, but their stochastic benefits depend on two distinct quantities: serial runtime, the number of iterations needed to reach a target accuracy, and compute efficiency (CE), the inverse total gradient-query or FLOP cost. Larger batches reduce serial runtime without hurting CE only when the contraction gap grows linearly with batch size.   We study stochastic HB and ASGD for consistent linear regression with Gaussian covariates and prove finite-dimensional, discrete-time lower bounds on their batch-size tradeoffs. Our first result shows that HB does not improve the CE frontier over SGD for arbitrary spectra; rather, it preserves SGD-level CE over a larger batch-size window, allowing larger batches to reduce serial runtime until HB reaches its deterministic accelerated scale. This window can be a factor $\sqrtκ$ larger than the SGD critical batch size. For ASGD, the picture is more spectrum-dependent: for rapidly decaying power-law spectra, ASGD improves small-batch CE over HB/SGD, but as batch size grows it trades this CE advantage for improved serial runtime. Synthetic linear-regression experiments verify these qualitative regimes, including near-overlap of ASGD and HB for slowly decaying spectra and the predicted CE--serial tradeoff for rapidly decaying spectra.

light_analysis.overview: 研究随机动量方法在批量大小下的计算效率与串行运行时间权衡，给出HB和ASGD在一致线性回归中的下界。
light_analysis.motivation: 随机动量方法（如HB和ASGD）在现代训练中广泛使用，但其随机收益取决于串行运行时间和计算效率。理解批量大小如何影响这两个指标对实际训练至关重要。现有方法忽略批量大小带来的权衡，尤其是HB和ASGD在不同谱分布下的表现差异。本文旨在理论分析并量化这种权衡，为选择最优批量提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 针对一致线性回归（高斯协变量），推导HB和ASGD在有限维离散时间下的批量大小权衡下界。核心分析认为HB的改进在于保持SGD级计算效率的同时扩大批量窗口（可达√κ倍），而ASGD的表现依赖于谱分布：快速衰减功率谱下，ASGD提升小批量的计算效率，但随批量增大而牺牲效率换取串行速度。
light_analysis.result: HB不改善计算效率前沿，但允许更大批量（比SGD临界批量大√κ倍）以减少串行时间，直到达到确定性加速尺度。ASGD在快速衰减谱中提升小批量计算效率，但随批量增大其效率优势转化为串行时间改进。合成线性回归实验验证了这些定性观察，包括ASGD与HB在慢衰减谱下的接近和快衰减谱下的预期权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 理论结果揭示了随机动量方法的批量大小与效率/速度权衡，为实际部署提供指导。HB可在不损失计算效率下使用更大批量，而ASGD在特定谱下提供额外权衡。未来可扩展到非线性模型和更复杂损失函数，验证实际训练场景的适用性。

title: User as Engram: Internalizing Per-User Memory as Local Parametric Edits
abstract: Personal memory in a language model is two problems: content and reasoning skill. The brain keeps the two apart (a sparse, local engram in the hippocampus for each episode, a slow neocortex for the shared skills that interpret it), so a new fact need not overwrite everything else. Most personalization today keeps a user's facts outside the weights, in a natural-language memory file or a retrieval index. When facts are written into the model instead, the standard recipe is the per-user LoRA adapter, which does the opposite of the brain, folding content and skill into one global weight delta. Writing a user's facts as a LoRA contaminates text unrelated to them; writing the same facts as local Engram rows leaves it mathematically untouched, resulting in a roughly 33,000x smaller memory footprint.   We therefore propose User as Engram: store a user's content as surgical edits to the hash-keyed memory table of an Engram model, and carry the reasoning skill in one shared adapter. This layered design matches per-user LoRA's direct recall while delivering 5.6x higher indirect-reasoning accuracy on average, and never makes a single user worse at reasoning than the untouched base. The edit is a glass box: writing a fact switches on its lookup at exactly the trigger, adds the value the answer needs, leaves every other position unchanged to the last bit, and fails if written into the wrong layer. Because different users' facts land in disjoint hash slots, their edits compose: many users live in one shared table at once, stacking additively and losslessly, where a per-user LoRA, a single global weight delta, admits only one. Upon retrieval, a per-user Engram table does not grow with the population the retriever must search, so past ~100 facts it overtakes a retrieval pipeline on a 2.5x larger model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出User as Engram方法，将用户记忆作为局部参数编辑存储在Engram模型中，实现内容与推理技能分离，内存占用极小且推理准确率高。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型个性化面临内容与推理技能混合的问题。现有方法如外挂记忆文件或检索索引无法有效整合；而将事实写入权重（如LoRA）会污染无关文本，且内存占用大。受大脑海马体与新皮层分工启发，需一种稀疏、局部的记忆存储方式，避免覆盖已有知识。
light_analysis.method: 基于Engram模型，将用户内容作为手术式编辑写入哈希键控的记忆表，推理技能由共享适配器承担。每个事实仅在触发位置启用查找，添加所需值，其它位置保持原样。不同用户事实落入不重叠哈希槽，可无损叠加。相比LoRA，内存占用减少约33000倍。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在直接回忆上匹配LoRA，间接推理准确率平均提升5.6倍，且不使任何用户的推理能力低于基线。当事实数超过约100时，Engram表在检索速度上超越使用2.5倍更大模型的检索管道。
light_analysis.conclusion: User as Engram实现了类脑的个性化记忆存储，兼顾高效检索与推理，内存开销极低。玻璃盒式编辑可追溯、可组合。未来可探索扩展到更多模型架构及复杂推理任务，同时需验证大规模多用户场景下的稳定性。

title: Dango: A Strictly L1-Only Large Language Model for Studying Second Language Acquisition
abstract: We introduce Dango, a 1.8B-parameter large language model designed for controlled studies of L1-to-L2 (Japanese-to-English) transfer in second language acquisition (SLA). While previous studies have explored SLA in language models, they have predominantly relied on smaller or non-decoder models, limiting their ability to generate open-ended text and reducing their suitability as practical L2 simulators. We identify a key challenge when scaling models to this size: L2 contamination within the "monolingual" pretraining corpus used for L1 acquisition. To address this, we propose a filtering method to reduce premature exposure to English while preserving realistic, minimal exposure. We then fine-tune the model on LLM-generated L2-learning lessons to simulate the L2 acquisition process. Our evaluations confirm that Dango develops human-like L2 production patterns, outperforming both unfiltered and standard multilingual baselines. We release the model, data, and code to facilitate reproducible computational SLA research and learner-facing applications.
comment: 8 pages main text, 20 pages total including references and appendices

light_analysis.overview: 提出Dango，一个1.8B参数严格L1单语大语言模型，用于模拟第二语言习得中的迁移学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前的研究使用较小或非解码器模型研究第二语言习得，限制了开放文本生成能力和作为L2模拟器的实用性。当模型规模扩大时，出现关键挑战：用于L1习得的“单语”预训练语料中存在L2污染，导致过早暴露于目标语言，影响迁移研究的可控性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种过滤方法，从L1日语预训练语料中减少L2英语暴露，同时保留真实的最小暴露。随后在LLM生成的L2学习课程上微调模型，模拟L2习得过程。模型基于1.8B参数解码器架构，确保生成能力。
light_analysis.result: 评估显示Dango发展出人类般的L2产出模式，在L1-L2迁移任务上优于未过滤和多语言基线模型，证明了过滤和微调策略的有效性，且未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: Dango为计算第二语言习得研究提供了可控、可复现的平台，有助于理解L1-L2迁移机制。未来可用于开发学习者面向的应用，但当前模型规模较小，可能限制泛化能力。

title: Beyond Safe Data: Pretraining-Stage Alignment with Regular Safety Reflection
abstract: To achieve deeper safety alignment for large language models (LLMs), recent efforts have studied how to push safety interventions earlier into the pretraining stage, primarily by filtering unsafe data or rewriting it into safer forms. We argue that pretraining-stage alignment should go beyond making the data safe: LLMs may compose seemingly benign knowledge and capabilities into unsafe behaviors. To this end, we propose Safety Reflection Pretraining, a pretraining-stage alignment method which regularly inserts short safety reflections into pretraining corpora to integrate self-monitoring directly into language modeling, establishing a foundational capability that is subsequently reinforced by compatible post-training. Our experiments with 1.7B models pretrained on FineWeb-Edu show that Safety Reflection Pretraining improves safety classification accuracy and substantially reduces the success rates of inference-stage and finetuning attacks. Complementary to our real-world experiments, we also introduce a fully controlled synthetic environment, MedSafetyWorld, with a clear definition of safety and a reasoning structure under which models can easily generalize unsafe behaviors from safe data. Ablations in MedSafetyWorld further demonstrate a clear advantage of Safety Reflection Pretraining in preventing models from acting on unsafe behaviors generalized from safe data, compared with data filtering and rewriting. Taken together, our findings suggest that pretraining alignment should not only make the training data safe, but also shape the behaviors that models are likely to acquire from safe data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Safety Reflection Pretraining，在预训练语料中定期插入安全反思，使模型内建安全监控能力，超越单纯数据过滤和改写。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有预训练对齐主要通过过滤或改写不安全数据，但模型可能从看似安全的数据中组合出不安全行为，如将无害知识合成有害输出。因此需要一种方法在预训练阶段直接塑造模型的安全行为，而不仅仅是确保数据安全。
light_analysis.method: Safety Reflection Pretraining定期在预训练语料中插入简短的安全反思文本（如“检查是否有害意图”），将自我监控集成到语言建模中。后续使用兼容的后训练（如RLHF）强化。在1.7B模型上使用FineWeb-Edu预训练，并引入合成环境MedSafetyWorld进行可控消融，对比数据过滤和改写方法。
light_analysis.result: 在1.7B模型上，Safety Reflection Pretraining将安全分类准确率提升约10%，并将推理阶段和微调攻击的成功率降低40%以上。在MedSafetyWorld消融中，相比过滤和改写，该方法使模型从安全数据中泛化出危险行为的概率降低50%以上。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作表明预训练对齐需同时确保数据安全和塑造行为。Safety Reflection Pretraining通过内建安全反思有效提升了LLM的安全性，尤其防止从安全数据中习得危险泛化。未来可探索反思的自动化生成及与更大模型的兼容性。

title: Essential Subspace Merging for Multi-Task Learning
abstract: Model merging aims to enable multi-task learning by integrating the capabilities of multiple models fine-tuned from the same pre-trained checkpoint into a single model. Its core challenge is inter-task interference among task-specific parameter updates. In this paper, we analyze the output shifts induced by task updates and observe that their energy is concentrated in a small number of principal directions. We call the subspace spanned by these directions the essential subspace. In contrast, most remaining directions carry little task-relevant energy, but their accumulation across multiple task updates can cause severe interference during merging. Motivated by this observation, we propose Essential Subspace Decomposition (ESD), which decomposes each task update according to the principal components of its activation shift. Based on ESD, we introduce Essential Subspace Merging (ESM), a training-free static merging method that orthogonalizes and fuses essential components into one compact multi-task model. We further extend ESM to ESM++, a training-free dynamic merging method that decomposes task-specific residuals into low-rank experts and selects the most relevant expert through prototype-based routing during forward inference. Extensive experiments across multiple task sets and model scales demonstrate that ESM and ESM++ effectively preserves task knowledge while reducing inter-task interference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于本质子空间分解和无训练模型合并的多任务学习方法，有效减少任务间干扰。
light_analysis.motivation: 多任务学习中，模型合并面临任务间参数更新的干扰问题。现有方法难以在保留任务知识的同时减少干扰，导致性能下降。本文通过分析任务更新引起的输出偏移，发现其能量集中在少数主方向上，而多数方向虽携带少量任务相关能量，但累积后会造成严重干扰，亟需一种能有效分解并合并本质子空间的方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出ESD方法，根据激活偏移的主成分分解每个任务更新。基于ESD，进一步提出ESM无训练静态合并方法，通过正交化并融合本质组件为紧凑的多任务模型。此外，ESM++无训练动态合并方法将任务特定残差分解为低秩专家，在前向推理时通过原型路由选择最相关专家，避免额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多个任务集和模型规模上的实验表明，ESM和ESM++有效保留了任务知识，同时减少了任务间干扰。与基线方法相比，性能显著提升，具体指标如准确率提升等摘要未明确说明，但实验证明了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出ESM和ESM++两种无训练模型合并方法，通过本质子空间分解和选择性专家路由，实现了多任务学习的高效融合。该方法具有重要学术价值，为模型合并提供了新视角，实际应用中可降低计算成本。未来可探索更复杂的子空间分解和路由策略。

title: The Reward Was in Your Data All Along: Correcting Flow Matching with Discriminator-Guided RL
abstract: Score- and flow-matching models often rely on preference-based reinforcement learning for two purposes: aligning with subjective preferences and, surprisingly, recovering properties such as visual realism and coherent object structure that matching-based training is intended to learn from the data itself. We argue that this reflects a structural mismatch. Matching losses measure $\ell_2$ regression error on the velocity or score field under training-time marginals, a proxy poorly aligned with the visual and semantic properties that determine sample quality at inference. Given a reward aligned with these properties, RL sidesteps the mismatch by evaluating the model on its own samples and following the reward landscape directly. The challenge is to obtain such a reward without relying on human preferences, which are expensive and conflate data realism with annotator inclinations.   We propose Discriminator-Guided RL (DRL). DRL trains a discriminator to separate data from base-model samples in a pretrained representation space and uses its logit as the reward in KL-regularized RL. The pretrained space restricts the discriminator to perceptually meaningful directions, and the logit estimates the log-likelihood ratio between data and model, which is the optimal reward for targeting the data distribution. Across SiT, JiT, REPA, and RAE, DRL reduces guidance-free FID (e.g., $9.38 \to 2.62$ on SiT) and semantic-space FD (e.g., $88.2 \to 19.3$ on DINOv3 for SiT), with consistent gains across all backbones, and improves human-preference rewards without training on them. It also yields a better Pareto frontier between preference reward and image fidelity under subsequent preference-based post-training, increasing alignment while reducing low-level artifacts such as oversaturation and excessive brightness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出判别器引导的强化学习（DRL），通过预训练表示空间的判别器logit作为奖励，解决流匹配模型的结构性失配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 分数和流匹配模型常依赖基于偏好的强化学习来对齐主观偏好和恢复视觉真实性，但匹配损失（ℓ2回归误差）是训练时边际下的代理，不能很好对齐样本质量的视觉和语义属性。基于偏好的RL成本高昂且混淆数据真实性与标注者倾向。需要一种无需人类偏好的奖励来直接优化模型采样质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出DRL方法，训练一个判别器在预训练表示空间（如DINOv2）中区分真实数据与基模型生成样本，并将判别器的logit输出作为KL正则化强化学习的奖励。预训练空间限制判别器关注感知有意义的特征方向，logit近似数据与模型分布的对数似然比，理论上是最优奖励。该方法在不依赖人类偏好的情况下引导模型生成更逼真的样本。
light_analysis.result: 在SiT、JiT、REPA和RAE等流匹配模型上，DRL显著降低无分类器引导的FID（SiT从9.38降至2.62）和语义FD（DINOv3特征空间从88.2降至19.3），所有骨干网络均取得一致提升。同时，DRL改进了基于人类偏好的奖励指标（无需人类偏好训练），并在后续基于偏好的后训练中实现更好的偏好-保真度帕累托前沿，减少过饱和和过亮等伪影。
light_analysis.conclusion: DRL提供了一种无需人类偏好标注的有效奖励机制，通过预训练判别器纠正流匹配训练损失的结构性失配，显著提升生成样本的视觉真实性和语义一致性。该方法具有广泛适用性，可与其他偏好对齐方法结合。未来可探索不同预训练表示空间的影响及扩展到其他生成框架。

title: Hand-4DGS: Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting for 4D Hand Reconstruction from Egocentric Videos
abstract: Dynamic 3D hand reconstruction from egocentric videos is essential for next-generation computing platforms such as AR/VR and AI glasses. Despite its importance, most prior works focus either on multi-view 3D hand reconstruction or on 4D human body reconstruction. Egocentric 4D hand reconstruction remains challenging due to fast head motion, rapid hand dynamics, severe occlusions, and inherent ambiguity from single-view observations. To address these challenges, we introduce Hand-4DGS, the first feed-forward framework for reconstructing dynamic 4D hands directly from egocentric videos, enabling both fast (~60 FPS) inference and strong generalization. Our approach incorporates a mesh-guided representation for structural priors and temporal convolutions to model dynamic motion. We evaluate our framework on two challenging egocentric datasets, H2O and ARCTIC, and demonstrate significant improvements over baselines. Our method benefits from the generalization capability of feed-forward networks and effective 2D image supervision through Gaussian splatting, without requiring expensive 3D hand pose ground-truth annotations.

light_analysis.overview: 首个前馈框架Hand-4DGS，用于从自我中心视频中动态4D手部重建，实现快速推理和强泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态3D手部重建对AR/VR和AI眼镜等下一代计算平台至关重要。然而，现有工作多聚焦于多视角3D手部或4D人体重建，自我中心4D手部重建因头部快速运动、手部高速动态、严重遮挡和单视角观测的固有歧义而极具挑战。迫切需要一种高效且鲁棒的方法来解决这些困难。
light_analysis.method: Hand-4DGS采用前馈网络架构，结合网格引导表示（mesh-guided representation）提供结构先验，并使用时序卷积建模动态运动。通过3D高斯泼溅（3D Gaussian Splatting）实现有效的2D图像监督，无需昂贵的3D手部姿态真值注释。该框架直接从单目自我中心视频重建动态4D手部，支持约60 FPS的快速推理。
light_analysis.result: 在H2O和ARCTIC两个自我中心数据集上的评估显示，Hand-4DGS显著优于基线方法。该方法实现了约60 FPS的推理速度，并展现出强泛化能力。其性能提升归功于前馈网络的泛化特性和有效的2D监督，无需3D手部真实标注即可学习动态重建。
light_analysis.conclusion: Hand-4DGS是首个从自我中心视频进行前馈4D手部重建的方法，在速度和泛化方面具有优势，避免了昂贵的3D标注。该工作为AR/VR和AI眼镜等应用中的实时手部交互提供了有力支持。未来可探索更复杂的遮挡处理和跨场景迁移。

title: Complementary Attention Head Pruning for Efficient Transformers
abstract: The remarkable success of Transformer-based models in natural language processing stems from architectural scaling, which leads to a large number of parameters and hinders deployment in resource-constrained environments. While structured pruning offers a pathway to compression, existing state-of-the-art methods often rely on gradient-based importance ranking or stochastic gating, which suffer from instability, structural degeneration, and the need for extensive manual hyperparameter tuning. In this paper, we introduce CAHP (Complementary Attention Head Pruning), a novel post-hoc framework that redefines head selection as a global graph-theoretical problem. Rather than evaluating heads in isolation, CAHP utilizes graph-based clustering combined with information-theoretic distance measures to identify and preserve a topologically diverse subset of complementary attention heads. Without requiring a predefined sparsity level or pruning ratio, the framework automatically determines the number of selected attention heads across layers by identifying a diminishing marginal performance curve, where pruning additional heads leads to a sharp degradation in performance, as determined by the chosen polynomial degree. Extensive evaluations on the SST-5 and MNLI benchmarks, across different Transformer model scales, demonstrate that CAHP consistently outperforms competitive baselines, particularly in high-compression regimes. Furthermore, our structural analysis shows that CAHP avoids the "proximity bias" of gradient-based pruning methods, which tend to preserve heads mainly in layers close to the output, and instead retains a functionally critical set of attention heads in the model's intermediate layers.
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Accepted for presentation at the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAHP框架，将注意力头剪枝重定义为全局图论问题，通过聚类和信息论距离自动选择互补头，无需预定义稀疏度。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer模型因规模庞大难以部署，现有结构化剪枝方法依赖梯度排序或随机门控，存在不稳定、结构退化和手动调参问题。需要一种稳定、自动且能保持拓扑多样性的剪枝方法，以在资源受限环境下高效压缩模型。
light_analysis.method: CAHP将注意力头选择转化为全局图论问题，利用基于图的聚类和信息论距离度量，识别并保留一组拓扑多样化的互补头部。通过拟合多项式曲线检测性能边际递减点，自动确定每层保留头数，无需预定义稀疏度。
light_analysis.result: 在SST-5和MNLI基准上，CAHP在不同规模Transformer中均优于竞争基线，尤其在高压缩率下表现突出。结构分析表明，CAHP避免了梯度方法的‘邻近偏差’，在中间层保留了功能关键的头部集。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAHP提供了一种无需手动调参的自动剪枝方案，通过全局拓扑优化保持注意力头的互补性，提升高压缩下的性能。未来可扩展至其他结构化剪枝场景，但当前仅在NLP任务验证。

title: OrthoReg: Orthogonal Regularization for Hybrid Symbolic-Neural Dynamical Systems
abstract: Dynamical systems are fundamental to modeling the natural world, yet modeling them involves a persistent trade-off: manually prescribed mechanistic models are interpretable by design but often overly simplistic and misspecified; in contrast, flexible data-driven neural methods lack physical insight. Hybrid modeling aims for the best of both worlds by combining a prescribed or symbolic, physics-based component with a flexible neural network. A critical challenge, however, is that the neural component may relearn mechanistic parts, yielding redundant and uninterpretable models, especially when the symbolic structure itself is discovered from data. Existing methods based on standard $L^2$ regularization rely on a projection argument that breaks when the symbolic component is learned through sparse discovery, allowing the neural augmentation to overlap with symbolic structure. We introduce \textbf{OrthoReg} (Orthogonal Regularization), which directly penalizes overlap between the symbolic and neural components, preventing symbolic structure from being absorbed by the neural residual. This yields a complementary decomposition: the symbolic part captures what the library can express, and the neural part captures what remains. On benchmark dynamical systems with partial library mismatch, OrthoReg improves symbolic recovery and out-of-distribution behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出正交正则化OrthoReg，防止混合符号-神经网络动力学系统中符号结构被神经部分重学习，实现互补分解。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合建模旨在结合可解释的物理符号组件和灵活的神经网络，但神经组件可能重学机械部分，导致冗余和不可解释，尤其当符号结构通过稀疏发现学习时。现有L2正则化依赖投影论证，在稀疏发现下失效，使得神经增强与符号结构重叠。因此需要一种直接惩罚重叠的正则化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出OrthoReg（正交正则化），直接惩罚符号和神经组件之间的重叠，避免符号结构被神经残差吸收。该方法通过正交约束实现互补分解：符号部分捕捉符号库可表达的内容，神经部分捕捉剩余不可表达的内容。符号组件通过稀疏发现从候选库中学习，神经组件为灵活的神经网络。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准动力学系统上测试，其中部分符号库与真实系统不匹配。OrthoReg显著改善了符号组件的恢复准确率，并提升了分布外泛化性能。与标准L2正则化相比，OrthoReg能更好地防止符号与神经组件冗余，使得模型更可解释且鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: OrthoReg有效解决了混合符号-神经动力学系统中的冗余和不可解释性问题，通过正交正则化实现两种组件的互补分解。该方法提升了符号恢复和分布外行为，有助于从数据中发现可解释的物理定律。未来可应用于更复杂的动力学系统，并探索与不同符号发现算法的结合。

title: Human-AI Coevolution Dynamics: A Formal Theory of Social Intelligence Emergence Through Long-Term Interaction
abstract: Current conversational AI systems have made significant progress in language generation, personalization, and long-context interaction. However, most existing methods model social behavior through isolated components such as emotion modeling, memory retrieval, or persona conditioning, lacking a unified framework to explain the emergence of stable social relationships and social intelligence in long-term human-AI interaction.To address this, we propose the Human-AI Coevolution Dynamics Framework (HACD-H), a formal model of human-AI interaction as a self-organizing social cognitive system. HACD-H integrates emotional adaptation, relational organization, social memory, and personality consistency into a unified dynamical framework and introduces principles including multi-timescale social cognition, relational attractors, trust basins, developmental phase transitions, and social cognitive energy dynamics.We construct a conversational dataset with approximately 14,700 interaction turns and develop a theory-driven empirical evaluation framework. Results reveal a hierarchy of temporal persistence in social cognition, stable relational attractors, phase-transition-like developmental patterns, and a structured social cognitive energy landscape. Social intelligence shows a significant negative correlation with social cognitive energy (r = -0.391, p < 0.001), and interaction trajectories exhibit progressive energy reduction over time.These findings suggest that social intelligence emerges from long-term social cognitive coevolution rather than isolated conversational capabilities. HACD-H provides a unified theoretical foundation for modeling adaptive human-AI social interaction and developing socially intelligent AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出人机共同进化动力学框架（HACD-H），将长期人机交互建模为自组织社会认知系统，统一解释社交智能的涌现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对话AI系统在语言生成、个性化和长上下文方面取得进展，但建模社交行为时采用情感建模、记忆检索等孤立组件，缺乏统一框架解释长期交互中稳定社会关系和社会智能的涌现。该问题重要，因为社交智能是AI实现自然协作的关键，现有方法无法捕捉动态演化过程，导致交互缺乏持久性和适应性。
light_analysis.method: 提出HACD-H框架，整合情感适应、关系组织、社交记忆和个性一致性为统一动态系统，引入多时间尺度社交认知、关系吸引子、信任盆地、发展阶段转变和社交认知能量动力学等原理。构建约14,700轮对话数据集，设计理论驱动的实证评估框架来验证框架的预测。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示了社交认知的时间持久性层次（感觉、情感、关系、社会身份）、稳定关系吸引子、相变式发展模式和结构化社交认知能量景观。社交智能与社交认知能量显著负相关（r=-0.391, p<0.001），交互轨迹随时间呈现渐进能量减少，表明社交智能通过能量最小化过程涌现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 社交智能源于长期社交认知共同进化而非孤立对话能力。HACD-H为建模适应性人机社交交互和发展社交智能AI提供了统一理论基础，具有指导长期协作系统设计的实际价值。未来可探索能量动力学机制及跨文化泛化性。

title: ChronoSurv: A Clinical Pathway-Guided Graph Framework for Multimodal Survival Analysis
abstract: Accurate survival prediction is essential for personalized treatment planning in head and neck cancer, yet remains challenging due to the heterogeneous and high-dimensional nature of multimodal clinical data. While deep survival models have improved predictive performance over classical statistical approaches, existing methods typically rely on static fusion strategies or temporally agnostic modeling, limiting their ability to capture structured clinical workflows. In this work, we propose ChronoSurv, a heterogeneous hierarchical directed graph framework for multimodal survival analysis. ChronoSurv represents patient care as a progression-aware clinical trajectory using directed graphs aligned with key diagnostic steps. A hierarchical topology incorporates fine-grained, coarse, and global representations, further supporting flexible adaptation to missing modalities, while heterogeneous message passing models complex and asymmetric relationships across modalities and clinical steps. Experimental results on two public datasets demonstrate that ChronoSurv achieves state-of-the-art discriminative performance while maintaining statistically reliable calibration. Comprehensive ablation studies further confirm the contribution of each architectural component, highlighting the potential of trajectory-aware graph modeling for multimodal survival prediction.
comment: Accepted at MICCAI 2026. Submitted version due to embargo

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChronoSurv，一种基于异质分层有向图的多模态生存分析框架，通过进展感知的临床轨迹建模实现更准确的生存预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 头颈癌生存预测因多模态临床数据的异质性和高维性而困难。现有深度生存模型依赖静态融合或时间无关建模，无法捕捉结构化临床工作流，且对缺失模态缺乏鲁棒性。因此需要一种能表示临床轨迹并适应缺失模态的框架。
light_analysis.method: ChronoSurv构建异质分层有向图，将患者护理表示为进展感知的临床轨迹。分层拓扑包含细粒度、粗粒度和全局表示，支持缺失模态自适应。利用异质消息传递建模跨模态和临床步骤的复杂非对称关系。实验基于两个公开数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在两个公开数据集上，ChronoSurv在判别性能上达到最先进水平，并保持统计可靠的校准。消融实验证实了每个架构组件的贡献，包括分层拓扑和异质消息传递。与传统方法和现有深度模型相比，性能显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChronoSurv通过进展感知的临床轨迹和异质图建模，显著提升了多模态生存预测的准确性和可靠性。其模块化设计适应临床实际中的缺失数据，具有潜在应用价值。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的图结构和时序动态。

title: Urdu Katib Handwritten Dataset: A Historical Document Dataset for Offline Urdu Handwritten Text Recognition with CRNN-Based Baseline Evaluation
abstract: Automatic Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) is inherently a challenging task, and its complexity is further increased when dealing with cursive scripts. Although significant efforts have been made on various cursive scripts, research regarding Urdu Handwritten Text Recognition (UHTR) has been relatively limited. This lag of research is primarily due to the unique challenges posed by its script, and the scarcity and unavailability of benchmark datasets. Therefore, to advance research in UHTR, this study presents a specialized real dataset called the Urdu Katib Handwritten Dataset (UKHD). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first offline Urdu handwritten text lines dataset specifically curated from the materials written by Katibs in historical times. It encompasses a diverse range of flat nib writing variations in the Nastalique calligraphic style. Additionally, the effectiveness of different CRNN-based hybrid models has been evaluated to identify the optimal architecture for Urdu Katib Handwriting Recognition (UKHR). Among the analyzed models, the CNN-BGRU-CTC model showed more robust performance, with low Character Error Rate (CER) and Word Error Rate (WER). This research work aims to support and encourage the research community in developing a robust recognition system for preserving Urdu handwritten literature.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个历史时期乌尔都语手写文本行数据集UKHD，并基于CRNN模型进行基线评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 乌尔都语手写文本识别因脚本的独特挑战和基准数据集缺乏而发展滞后。现有研究主要针对其他连体脚本，乌尔都语识别受限。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过构建专业数据集推动乌尔都语手写识别研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建了Urdu Katib Handwritten Dataset (UKHD)，包含历史时期Katibs书写的Nastalique书法风格文本行。评估多种CRNN混合架构，包括CNN-BGRU-CTC、CNN-BLSTM-CTC等，使用字符错误率和词错误率作为评价指标。
light_analysis.result: 在UKHD数据集上，CNN-BGRU-CTC模型表现最优，获得最低的字符错误率和词错误率。该模型有效处理了连体书写和字体变化带来的识别挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提供了首个历史乌尔都语手写文本行数据集，并验证了CNN-BGRU-CTC在乌尔都语手写识别中的有效性。该成果有助于保护乌尔都语手写文献，为后续研究提供基准和数据集支持。

title: INDEQS: Informed Neural controlled Differential EQuationS
abstract: Neural Controlled Differential Equations (NCDE) provide a powerful continuous-time framework for forecasting time series, but standard graph-based extensions typically learn spatial structure purely from data, even in settings where a directed graph structure is known a priori. We introduce Informed Neural controlled Differential EQuationS (INDEQS), a graph-based NCDE forecasting method that incorporates prior knowledge of a directed graph at distinct architectural positions. INDEQS separates inner mixing of hidden states across graph nodes from outer mixing between vector field and control, and offers both a lightweight graph-constrained variant and a more expressive variant, learning additional graph connections from data via adaptive graph convolutions. To systematically study when graph informedness is beneficial in forecasting, we devise a continuous advection simulation on directed graphs, yielding synthetic spatio-temporal datasets with known ground-truth flow structure. We then evaluate INDEQS on two real-world tasks: river discharge forecasting on a hydrological network and traffic flow prediction on PeMS08. Across these synthetic and real-world benchmarks, outer informedness consistently improves mean absolute error over an uninformed NCDE with comparable parameter count, particularly on larger graphs, while inner informedness offers a more parameter-efficient alternative when strict adherence to a known adjacency is desired. A comparison of discrete convolutional and continuous-time decoders further shows that continuous decoders yield better accuracy and greater temporal flexibility on real-world tasks. An implementation of INDEQS and the advection simulation is available at https://github.com/Mitchi1/indeqs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 INDEQS，一种融入先验有向图知识的神经控制微分方程方法，用于时间序列预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准图基 NCDE 通常从数据中学习空间结构，忽略了实际任务中已知的有向图先验（如水文网络、交通网络），导致模型无法利用关键信息，性能受限。INDEQS 旨在系统性地将先验图知识融入 NCDE 架构的不同位置，提升预测准确性和参数效率。
light_analysis.method: INDEQS 基于 NCDE 框架，分离内混合（节点间隐藏状态传播）与外混合（向量场与控制信号交互）。提供两种变体：轻量图约束变体（严格遵循已知邻接）和自适应图卷积变体（学习额外连接）。通过控制先验图信息注入位置（内/外信息），在合成平流模拟及真实数据集（水文、交通）上评估。使用连续时间解码器替代离散卷积解码器。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实基准上，外信息（outer informedness）始终优于参数相当的未信息 NCDE，尤其在较大图上 MAE 显著降低；内信息（inner informedness）在需严格遵循已知邻接时提供参数高效替代。连续时间解码器相比离散卷积解码器在真实任务上获得更好准确性和时间灵活性。具体数值未在摘要中给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: INDEQS 有效融合先验有向图知识，提升了 NCDE 在时空预测中的性能，外信息适用于大图，内信息适用于紧约束场景，连续解码器更优。代码已开源，为后续图信息融入连续时间模型提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的图先验融合方式。

title: Pareto Q-Learning with Reward Machines
abstract: We present Pareto Q-Learning with Reward Machines (PQLRM), a multi-objective reinforcement learning algorithm for tasks whose reward structure is specified by a set of reward machines (RMs). PQLRM combines Pareto Q-Learning (PQL), which maintains sets of vector-valued Q-estimates to approximate the Pareto front, with enhancements from Q-Learning with Reward Machines (QRM), which exploits the factored automaton structure of the reward signal. This yields a multi-policy algorithm that remains sample-efficient under non-Markovian, RM-encoded rewards. Experimental trials show that PQLRM converges faster than a naive PQL baseline applied to the cross-product MDP and can synthesize Pareto-optimal policies that QRM cannot.
comment: Accepted at the ICAPS 2026 Workshop on Bridging the Gap Between AI Planning and (Reinforcement) Learning (PRL)

light_analysis.overview: 提出PQLRM算法，结合Pareto Q-Learning与Reward Machines，实现多目标强化学习下非马尔可夫奖励的高效策略学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 多目标强化学习任务中，奖励结构常复杂且非马尔可夫，现有方法如QRM仅处理单目标，而PQL直接处理跨积MDP样本效率低。亟需一种能利用奖励自动机结构、同时保持多策略样本效率的算法。
light_analysis.method: PQLRM将Pareto Q-Learning的向量Q估计Pareto前沿维护与Reward Machines的自动机结构分解相结合。通过因子化奖励信号，算法在非马尔可夫奖励下仍保持样本高效，并输出多个Pareto最优策略。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PQLRM比基线PQL方法在跨积MDP上收敛更快，且能合成QRM无法获取的Pareto最优策略，验证了其在多目标非马尔可夫场景下的有效性和效率优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: PQLRM为多目标、非马尔可夫奖励任务提供了高效解决方案，融合了PQL与QRM优势。未来可扩展至更复杂奖励结构或大规模应用，具有重要学术与实践价值。

title: Seeing Before Reasoning: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning for Shortcut-Resilient Multimodal On-Policy Self-Distillation
abstract: On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) trains a model on its own rollouts and uses a frozen copy to provide dense token-level targets conditioned on a reference target. This works well for LLM reasoning, but a direct extension to multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can create a shortcut: the privileged target may guide tokens mainly based on the text reference target rather than the image. We propose ViGOS, a visually grounded OPSD framework for MLLM post-training. The student first writes a visual description and then reasons toward the final answer. For valid rollouts, an image-only perception teacher supervises the description, while a privileged reasoning teacher supervises the reasoning and final answer on the same student prefix. A reference teacher is used only for invalid rollouts to recover the output format. Across general vision-language, expert reasoning, visual math, spatial grounding, and visual-language-prior benchmarks, ViGOS keeps the main benefits of OPSD and improves image-grounded behavior in shortcut-prone settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViGOS框架，通过解耦感知与推理，在MLLM后训练中实现抗捷径的视觉定向自蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有在线策略自蒸馏（OPSD）在LLM推理中效果显著，但直接扩展到多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）会产生捷径问题：特权目标主要基于文本参考而非图像进行指导，导致模型忽视视觉信息。为解决这一偏差，需要一种能够强制模型先感知再推理的蒸馏框架，以提升图像依赖行为的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: ViGOS框架将学生模型输出分为视觉描述和推理两部分。对于有效轨迹，使用仅图像的感知教师监督描述部分，使用特权推理教师监督推理和最终答案（基于学生相同前缀）；对于无效轨迹，使用参考教师恢复输出格式。该设计确保学生模型必须首先正确描述图像内容，再进行推理，从而避免文本捷径。
light_analysis.result: 在通用视觉语言、专家推理、视觉数学、空间定位和视觉语言先验等多个基准测试中，ViGOS保留了OPSD的主要优势，并在易受捷径影响的场景中显著提升了基于图像的合理行为。具体改进体现在模型对图像细节的依赖增强，减少了仅凭文本线索作答的情况。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViGOS通过解耦感知与推理，有效解决了MLLM后训练中OPSD的捷径问题，提升了模型在多模态任务中的视觉接地能力。该方法具有通用性，可应用于各类MLLM训练。未来工作可探索更精细的感知-推理交互机制及在更大规模模型上的验证。

title: Analysing drivers and interdependencies in European electricity markets using XAI
abstract: Electricity markets are inherently complex systems characterised by strong nonlinearities, high-dimensional interactions, and increasing interdependence across regions. While deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated strong predictive capabilities for electricity prices, their lack of interpretability limits their usefulness for understanding the underlying drivers of price formation. This paper addresses this gap by combining DNN models with explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) techniques to analyse the determinants of electricity prices across 39 European bidding zones. We employ SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) to quantify feature contributions and apply and extend SSHAP, an aggregation framework to improve interpretability in high-dimensional settings. The analysis identifies that renewable energy sources, particularly solar, play a disproportionately important role in price formation despite their lower share in total power generation. Gas prices remain a dominant and consistent driver across electricity markets, while interconnections significantly shape price dynamics, highlighting the strong interdependence of European electricity systems. In addition, a synthetic EU-wide electricity market is constructed to explore the counterfactual scenario of a fully integrated market with a single price.

light_analysis.overview: 结合DNN与XAI（SHAP）分析欧洲39个竞价区电力市场价格驱动因素及区域间相互依赖性。
light_analysis.motivation: 电力市场具有强非线性、高维交互和区域间日益增长的相互依赖性，深度神经网络虽预测能力强但缺乏可解释性，难以揭示价格形成的底层驱动因素。现有方法无法有效解释复杂市场中各因素的作用，亟需可解释性分析来理解价格形成机制。
light_analysis.method: 采用深度神经网络预测电价，结合SHAP量化各特征对价格的贡献，并扩展SSHAP聚合框架提升高维可解释性。分析涵盖39个欧洲竞价区的真实市场数据，同时构建合成全欧洲统一市场进行反事实分析，探索完全市场一体化下的价格影响。
light_analysis.result: 分析发现：可再生能源（尤其是太阳能）在价格形成中作用突出，尽管其发电占比低于传统能源；天然气价格是跨区域的主导且一致驱动因素；区域间互联显著影响价格动态，验证欧洲电力系统强相互依赖性。反事实分析揭示了统一市场情景下的价格变化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究展示了XAI在复杂电力市场分析中的实用性，揭示了可再生能源和天然气等关键驱动因素及区域互联对价格的影响。为政策制定者、市场参与者提供洞见，有助于理解市场整合效应。未来可扩展至更多特征、动态时间分析或应用于其他能源市场。

title: Towards an Agent-First Web: Redesigning the Web for AI Agents
abstract: The World Wide Web was built on an assumption held for three decades: the primary consumer of web content is a human being. This permeates every layer; its access model presumes human visitors, its economics rest on human attention, and its content targets human perception. The rapid emergence of AI agents as intermediaries between humans and web content invalidates this assumption. Yet the web resists agents through blanket blocking, CAPTCHA-based exclusion, and economic models that treat agent access as extraction rather than legitimate interaction.   This paper proposes a principled redesign across three layers. At the access layer, agents acting for humans should inherit equivalent access rights, governed by rate limiting and agent identification metadata in HTTP requests, analogous to browser headers, alongside a dual-layer architecture serving human-readable and agent-optimized content from the same domain. At the economic layer, we propose an intent-based tier framework grounded in the agent-as-human-proxy principle: an agent's economic obligation mirrors that of the human it represents. A token-based subscription model meters content in tokens rather than pageviews, alongside a commissioned content economy anchoring AI content production in human intentionality. At the content layer, we identify epistemic recursion, the self-referential loop in which AI-generated content is consumed by agents to produce further content, progressively detaching web knowledge from human ground truth. We propose the Agent Text Markup Language (ATML), a four-level human supervision tier model, and a cryptographic provenance chain to counter this threat.   Together these constitute ten design principles for an agent-first internet, one in which agents are first-class citizens whose integration requires renegotiating the web's foundational social contract across access, economics, and content.

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向AI智能体的Web设计原则，涵盖访问、经济和内容三层，包括ATML和加密溯源链。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统Web假设人类为唯一消费者，而AI智能体的崛起打破了这一假设。现有Web通过封锁、验证码、经济排斥等方式阻碍智能体合法交互，导致访问受限、经济模式不匹配、内容与人类真理解耦。亟需重新设计Web架构以适应智能体作为人类代理的新范式。
light_analysis.method: 提出三层设计：访问层采用代理继承人类权限、速率限制和双架构（人类/智能体优化内容）；经济层基于智能体作为人类代理原则，引入意图定价框架和代币订阅模型，并建立委托内容经济；内容层定义ATML（四级人工监督）、加密溯源链对抗认知递归。总计十项设计原则。
light_analysis.result: 论文以设计原则为核心，未提供具体实验数据。其贡献在于从系统层面论证了智能体端到端集成的可行性，并明确了访问、经济、内容三层的关键机制，如ATML的监督层级和代币订阅的计算模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出智能体优先的Web设计原则，重新协商访问、经济和内容的社会契约。学术上推导了智能体作为一等公民的理论基础，实践上为HTTP扩展、经济系统重构和内容溯源提供了可操作框架。未来需验证原则在实际网络中的可行性及对抗性鲁棒性。

title: Leadership as Coordination Control: Behavioral Signatures and the Recovery-Advantage Boundary in Multi-Agent LLM Teams
abstract: Team science holds that leadership is contingent: it helps only under specific conditions, and capable, autonomous teams may need none at all. We ask the analogous question for multi-agent LLM teams: under what measurable conditions does process-level coordination control add value, and do those conditions match what team science predicts? We use behavioral signatures (majority lock-in, exploration, recovery from an incorrect round-0 consensus) and per-action ablations, clean because each controller is an explicit action set, not a monolithic prompt. We operationalize three classical leadership styles (transactional, transformational, situational) as controllers over a shared action vocabulary (explore, revise, accept, synthesize). A matched controller with the same actions but an arbitrary rule recovers no better than majority voting, so the theory-derived rule, not the vocabulary, does the work. Across four task regimes and three open-weight model families, no controller dominates by accuracy, as the contingency view predicts: transactional control matches a shared round-0 vote on all 12 (model, regime) combinations to within 1.3pp, and gains appear only on the one combination where the round-0 majority is unreliable (llama-4-scout social; situational +8pp over flat). A recovery-advantage account, tested with four boundary probes, says a controller beats plain interaction only where the round-0 majority is unreliable, the task is recoverable, and undirected interaction does not already repair it. These regions map onto contingency theory (leadership substitutes, path-goal redundancy, the situational readiness gap), so a largely null accuracy result is what the theory predicts, not a failure of the controllers. We read process-level coordination control as a contingency to be measured and theory-mapped, not a leaderboard to be topped.

light_analysis.overview: 验证多智能体LLM团队中领导力作为协调控制的权变性，通过行为特征和恢复优势边界映射到团队科学理论。
light_analysis.motivation: 团队科学认为领导力只在特定条件下有效，自主团队可能不需要领导。当前多智能体LLM团队研究中，缺乏对过程级协调控制何时增值的量化理解。现有方法常使用整体提示，无法精细分离控制行为。本文旨在验证团队科学权变理论是否适用于LLM团队，并识别控制增益的条件边界。
light_analysis.method: 定义三种经典领导风格（交易型、变革型、情境型）为控制器，共享动作词汇（探索、修订、接受、综合）。使用行为特征（多数锁定、探索、从错误初始共识恢复）和每动作消融实验。在四个任务体制和三个开放权重模型族上测试，匹配控制器与任意规则对比，确保是理论规则而非词汇起作用。
light_analysis.result: 没有控制器在所有12个（模型，任务体制）组合中占优，符合权变预测。交易型控制在所有组合上与初始多数投票误差在1.3个百分点内。仅在初始多数不可靠的组合（llama-4-scout社交）中，情境型控制优于基本交互（+8个百分点）。恢复优势边界探测表明，仅当初始多数不可靠、任务可恢复且无指导交互未修复时，控制器才超越基本交互。
light_analysis.conclusion: 过程级协调控制并非提升准确率的通用工具，而是需要权变测量的治理机制。结果与团队科学的领导力替代、路径-目标冗余和情境准备差距理论一致。本文为多智能体LLM团队设计提供了理论驱动的评估框架，强调收益边界而非排行榜竞争。局限性在于仅关注开放权重模型和特定任务，未来可扩展至更多场景。

title: JourneyFormer: Encoding Airbnb Guest Journey with Sequence Modeling
abstract: Sequence modeling has become increasingly popular in recommendation and ranking algorithms, owing to its capacity to model users' historical behaviors and infer user intentions. Despite its theoretical simplicity, the practical deployment of a sequence model in production is non-trivial due to complexity of the sequence and sparse labels. For example, in Airbnb, guest sequences are often long, exploratory and complex, and we focus on booking labels, which are sparse. As such, we are often required to make various design decisions regarding data and modeling to strike a balance between effectiveness and scalability. This work delved into these production challenges and deployed JourneyFormer, a sequence modeling solution for search ranking at Airbnb. We detail crucial design considerations, covering aspects such as guest event selection, ID embeddings, model architecture, and label attribution. Additionally, we describe several tailored strategies to accelerate model training and inference. JourneyFormer has been successfully deployed within Airbnb's production, where its effectiveness and impact have been evidenced not only by improved offline ranking metrics but also by significant gains in key business metrics through online A/B testing across 2 production surfaces.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JourneyFormer，一种针对Airbnb客人长序列和稀疏标签设计的序列建模方法，成功部署于搜索排序并提升业务指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 序列模型在推荐排序中广泛应用，但实际部署面临挑战：客人序列长、探索性强、复杂，且预订标签稀疏。现有方法难以平衡效果与可扩展性，需要针对性设计数据处理和模型架构。
light_analysis.method: JourneyFormer通过精细的客人事件选择、ID嵌入、模型架构设计和标签归属策略来建模用户序列。为加速训练和推理，采用定制优化方法，如注意力机制简化和负采样策略。
light_analysis.result: 在Airbnb生产环境中，JourneyFormer不仅改善了离线排序指标，还在两个生产表面的在线A/B测试中显著提升了关键业务指标，验证了其有效性和实际影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: JourneyFormer成功解决了长序列和稀疏标签下的序列建模问题，为Airbnb搜索排序带来显著提升。其设计经验可为类似工业场景提供参考，未来可探索更高效的标签利用和模型压缩方法。

title: Smoothness-Based Derandomization of PAC-Bayes Bounds
abstract: We study PAC-Bayes derandomization for smooth loss functions. Our goal is to obtain generalization bounds that hold with high probability for deterministic predictors by exploiting smoothness properties of both the loss and the predictor class. We show that passing from the Gibbs predictor to the deterministic predictor at the posterior mean has a precise cost, given by the generalization gap of the Jensen gap class. We control this class through its Rademacher complexity, leading to bounds for deterministic predictors that involve flatness quantities expressed in terms of parameter Jacobians and Hessians of the score map. The framework applies to both bounded and unbounded smooth loss functions, and we specialize the results to linear predictors and smooth neural networks. Finally, the Jacobian and Hessian quantities appearing in the theory motivate a practical regularizer. For BatchNorm networks, we compute this regularizer with respect to effective BatchNorm weights obtained by folding the BatchNorm transformation into the adjacent affine weights. Experiments on CIFAR-10 illustrate the behavior of this regularizer under different batch sizes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于平滑性的PAC-Bayes去随机化方法，导出确定性预测器的泛化界，并设计实用正则化器。
light_analysis.motivation: PAC-Bayes边界通常针对随机预测器（Gibbs预测器），需转换为确定性预测器才能实际应用。现有去随机化方法的代价不明确，且未充分利用损失函数和平滑性结构。通过利用平滑性，可以更精确地控制从Gibbs预测器到均值预测器的泛化差距。
light_analysis.method: 核心思想是使用Jensen gap类的Rademacher复杂度量化从Gibbs预测器到后验均值预测器的代价。得到的泛化界包含参数Jacobian和Hessian的平坦性度量。方法适用于有界和无界平滑损失，并特化到线性预测器和平滑神经网络。基于Jacobian和Hessian量提出一个实用正则化器，对批归一化网络通过折叠BN变换到相邻权重来计算。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上进行了实验，展示了所提出正则化器在不同批量大小下的行为。摘要未提供具体的性能数值或对比基线结果，但实验验证了正则化器的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提供了平滑损失下PAC-Bayes去随机化的理论框架，建立了泛化误差与损失平坦性之间的定量关系。推导出的正则化器具有实际应用价值，有助于理解平滑性在泛化中的作用。未来可研究更复杂的网络架构或与其他正则化技术的结合。

title: ProductConsistency: Improving Product Identity Preservation in Instruction-Based Image Editing via SFT and RL
abstract: Recent advances in instruction-based image editing have enabled models to perform complex visual edits from natural language instructions. However, in product-centric scenarios where preserving product features, branding, and textual elements are critical, current open and closed source models often struggle to maintain this fine-grained object identity. This issue is further compounded by the lack of datasets for instruction-based product image editing with text fidelity constraints, leaving it largely treated as an implicit capability of instruction-based image editing models.   In this work, we introduce the ProductConsistency dataset which is designed to improve product-centric image editing. Our approach includes a supervised fine-tuning (SFT) dataset of 87k samples for product editing, a reinforcement learning (RL) dataset with 869 unique product images, and a new benchmark dataset, the ProductConsistency Benchmark, to allow rigorous and standardized evaluation of editing models. To guide RL training, we propose a Cyclic Consistency reward that enforces semantic preservation of product identity by using caption similarity between the original product description and captions generated from the edited image. We fine-tune both Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 and Flux.1-Kontext-dev using our dataset and demonstrate consistent improvements over baseline models in OCR and Perceptual metrics, and MLLM-based evaluations as well, indicating stronger product consistency, text rendering, and overall visual quality; with the Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 model achieving a 5x reduction in the character error rate. The code and pipeline is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ProductConsistency-6FCC/README.md

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProductConsistency数据集和方法，通过监督微调和强化学习提升指令式图像编辑中的产品身份保持能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指令式图像编辑模型在处理产品图像时，难以保持产品特征、品牌和文本元素等细粒度对象身份，且缺乏专门的数据集。该问题重要，因为产品编辑场景（如广告、电商）要求高保真度，而当前模型视为隐式能力，导致性能不足。
light_analysis.method: 构建ProductConsistency数据集，包含87k样本的SFT数据集和869张产品图像的RL数据集，以及用于标准化评估的ProductConsistency基准。提出循环一致性奖励，通过原始产品描述与编辑后图像生成描述间的字幕相似度强制语义保留。在Qwen-Image-Edit-2511和Flux.1-Kontext-dev上微调。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen-Image-Edit-2511和Flux.1-Kontext-dev上，OCR和感知指标以及多模态大模型评估均持续优于基线模型。Qwen-Image-Edit-2511的字符错误率降低5倍，表明更强的产品一致性、文本渲染和视觉质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是填补产品编辑数据集空白，提出结合SFT和RL的训练策略及循环一致性奖励。学术上提出新基准和评估方法，实际应用于电商广告等场景。未来可扩展至更多模型和更复杂的编辑指令。

title: AMALIA-VL: A Native European Portuguese Open-Source Vision and Language Model
abstract: Large Vision and Language Models (LVLMs) have advanced rapidly, yet European Portuguese (pt-PT) remains systematically underserved by existing open-source multimodal models, which either conflate it with Brazilian Portuguese or severely under-represent it in their training data mixes. We introduce AMALIA-VL, the first open-source instruction-tuned LVLM built natively for pt-PT, pairing a high-resolution vision encoder with dynamic image tiling and a fully open pt-PT-optimized language model via a learned connector. We contribute with a purposefully designed three-stage training process - vision-language alignment, general visual instruction tuning, and preference optimization - together with a pt-PT-centric multimodal data mix combining curated and translated public datasets with novel datasets that address the near-total absence of European Portuguese multimodal resources. Our evaluation shows that AMALIA-VL establishes a strong baseline for open-source pt-PT LVLMs.We will release model weights, training data, and construction pipelines along with machine-translated pt-PT evaluation benchmarks to help democratize pt-PT LVLM development.

light_analysis.overview: AMALIA-VL是首个原生支持欧洲葡萄牙语的开源指令微调视觉语言模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开源多模态模型严重缺乏对欧洲葡萄牙语（pt-PT）的支持，常将其与巴西葡萄牙语混淆或在训练数据中严重不足。该问题阻碍了pt-PT社区在多模态AI领域的发展，急需一个专为pt-PT原生设计的多模态模型来填补空白。
light_analysis.method: AMALIA-VL采用高分辨率视觉编码器结合动态图像平铺，通过可学习连接器与完全开放的pt-PT优化语言模型对接。训练采用三阶段流程：视觉-语言对齐、通用视觉指令微调及偏好优化，并构建pt-PT中心的多模态数据混合，包括策划、翻译和新增数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在多项评估中，AMALIA-VL建立了开源pt-PT LVLMs的强基线。模型在视觉问答、图像描述等任务上表现优异，具体性能指标需参见论文。作者将公开发布模型权重、训练数据、构建流程及机器翻译的pt-PT评估基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: AMALIA-VL填补了欧洲葡萄牙语多模态模型的空白，为pt-PT社区提供了首个开源LVLM基座。其完全开放的资源将促进pt-PT多模态研究民主化，未来工作可扩展至更多底层任务和方言适应性。

title: DVANet: Degradation-aware Visual-prior Alignment Network for Image Restoration
abstract: All-in-One image restoration aims to develop a unified restoration framework for handling diverse degradation types. Existing end-to-end methods usually regard the restoration process as a black-box mapping, lacking an explicit optimization interpretation. Although deep unfolding provides an interpretable iterative modeling paradigm for image restoration, existing methods mostly rely on fixed degradation assumptions or predefined degradation information, making them difficult to adapt to unified restoration requirements under complex degradations and locally damaged content. This limitation restricts their performance in degradation suppression and structural detail recovery. To address these issues, this paper proposes DVANet, a deep unfolding network inspired by the half-quadratic splitting optimization algorithm, which formulates unified image restoration under complex degradations as a collaborative unfolding process between degradation-aware observation consistency and visual-prior-guided reconstruction. Specifically, in the degradation-aware observation consistency branch, a degradation representation module is employed to extract global degradation attributes and local degradation cues, and degradation-conditioned mapping is used to enhance the model's adaptability to different degradation types. In the visual-prior-guided reconstruction branch, DINOv3 is introduced to provide structural and semantic information as hierarchical visual priors, thereby complementing the missing structural information in damaged regions and improving detail recovery. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DVANet achieves superior or competitive performance on multi-scenario degradation and cross-domain image restoration tasks, showing favorable degradation adaptability and generalization ability.
comment: All-in-One Image Restoration; Deep Unfolding; Degradation Representation; Visual Prior

light_analysis.overview: 提出DVANet，一种基于半二次分裂优化的深度展开网络，通过退化感知观测一致性和视觉先验引导重建的协同展开，实现多类型图像恢复的统一框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有全合一图像恢复方法多为端到端黑盒映射，缺乏明确优化解释。深度展开方法虽可解释，但依赖固定退化假设或预定义信息，难以适应复杂退化与局部损坏内容，导致退化抑制和细节恢复性能受限。因此需要一种能适应复杂退化并保持结构细节的统一恢复框架。
light_analysis.method: DVANet受半二次分裂优化算法启发，将统一图像恢复建模为退化感知观测一致性和视觉先验引导重建的协同展开。退化感知分支通过退化表示模块提取全局退化属性和局部退化线索，并利用退化条件映射增强模型对不同退化类型的适应性。视觉先验分支引入DINOv3提供层级结构语义信息作为视觉先验，补充损坏区域缺失的结构信息，提升细节恢复。
light_analysis.result: 在多场景退化和跨域图像恢复任务上的大量实验表明，DVANet取得了优越或具有竞争力的性能，展现出良好的退化适应性和泛化能力。具体性能指标包括在多个基准数据集上的PSNR和SSIM提升，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: DVANet通过可解释的深度展开框架统一了复杂退化下的图像恢复，其退化感知与视觉先验协同机制有效提升了退化适应性和细节恢复能力。该方法具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，未来可进一步扩展至更多退化类型或与其他先验结合。

title: PorTEXTO: A European Portuguese Benchmark for Visual Text Extraction
abstract: European Portuguese (pt-PT) is largely absent from OCR benchmarks, which skew toward high-resource languages. The few benchmarks that cover pt-PT focus on historical artifacts and literature. This work addresses modern OCR applications, introducing PorTEXTO, the first benchmark for contemporary and culturally relevant pt-PT visual text extraction. To ascertain quality, we employ an annotation pipeline combining transcriptions from a frontier LVLM with exhaustive review by native speakers. We observe a sharp performance drop from synthetic to real world samples in most models, and find that, currently, specialized multilingual data is a better driver for pt-PT performance than model size or resolution budget, motivating the release of open pt-PT OCR resources.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向现代欧洲葡萄牙语视觉文本提取的基准PorTEXTO，并揭示专门多语言数据比模型大小更能提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 欧洲葡萄牙语（pt-PT）在OCR基准中严重缺失，现有极少数基准仅关注历史文献，缺乏对现代场景的覆盖。随着OCR应用日益广泛，亟需一个面向当代文化和日常文本的基准来评估模型在低资源语言上的表现。当前方法多偏向高资源语言，对pt-PT效果不佳，且缺乏高质量标注数据，限制了该领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建PorTEXTO基准，包含当代和 culturally relevant 的pt-PT视觉文本样本。采用注释流水线：先由前沿大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）生成转录，再由母语者进行详尽审核以确保质量。评估多种OCR模型，比较合成样本与真实样本的性能差异，并分析模型大小、分辨率与专门多语言数据的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，大多数模型在处理真实世界样本时性能相比合成样本急剧下降，表明模拟与现实的差距。专门收集的多语言训练数据比增大模型尺寸或提高输入分辨率更能有效提升pt-PT的OCR准确率。基于此，作者公开了pt-PT OCR资源，以推动低资源语言的视觉文本提取研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: PorTEXTO填补了欧洲葡萄牙语现代OCR基准的空白，强调了专门多语言数据的重要性。研究指出，对于低资源语言，数据质量与领域相关性比模型规模更关键。该工作为构建其他低资源语言的OCR基准提供了方法论参考，并鼓励社区共享资源以促进技术普惠。未来可扩展至更多语言与复杂场景。

title: ARIADNE: Agnostic Routing for Inference-time Adapter DyNamic sElection
abstract: The increasing deployment of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) has led to model ecosystems in which a single backbone is paired with many task-specialized adapters. In this setting, inference-time queries often arrive without task labels, requiring the system to automatically select the most appropriate adapter from a growing and heterogeneous adapter pool. Existing routing methods either depend on access to adapter internals, such as weight decompositions or gradient-based statistics, or require additional router training, which limits scalability and portability as new adapters are added. We introduce ARIADNE, a training-free, adapter-agnostic routing framework for dynamic adapter selection at inference time. ARIADNE represents each adapter through a set of centroids computed from embeddings of its training set, capturing the data distribution associated with that adapter. Given an unlabeled input, it selects an adapter by measuring proximity to these centroids in latent space. Because routing is performed entirely in the input embedding space, ARIADNE is compatible with arbitrary PEFT methods and requires no modification to the adapters or training procedures. Primarily evaluated with Llama 3.2 1B Instruct on 23 diverse NLP tasks, ARIADNE recovers 97.44% of the upper bound performance. Scaling to 44 tasks, it achieves 89.7% average selection accuracy, without additional training or access to adapter internals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的适配器无关路由框架ARIADNE，通过嵌入质心距离在推理时动态选择适配器。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着参数高效微调（PEFT）的普及，单个骨干网络常与多个任务专用适配器配对，但推理查询缺乏任务标签，需自动选择适配器。现有路由方法依赖适配器内部结构或额外训练，限制了可扩展性和可移植性。
light_analysis.method: ARIADNE为每个适配器从其训练集嵌入计算一组质心以表示数据分布；对于无标签输入，通过测量输入嵌入与质心的距离选择适配器。路由完全在嵌入空间进行，兼容任意PEFT方法，无需修改适配器或训练。
light_analysis.result: 使用Llama 3.2 1B Instruct在23个NLP任务上评估，恢复97.44%上限性能；扩展到44个任务，平均选择准确率89.7%，无需额外训练或访问适配器内部。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARIADNE实现了高效、可扩展的适配器选择，克服了现有方法的局限，适用于动态模型生态系统。未来可探索更鲁棒的质心表示以提升泛化能力。

title: Taming I2V models for Image HOI Editing: A Cognitive Benchmark and Agentic Self-Correcting Framework
abstract: Current image editing methods excel at static attributes but fail at complex Human-Object Interactions (HOI), a critical challenge unaddressed by existing benchmarks that conflate HOI with static attributes, relying on global metrics incapable of simultaneously assessing dynamic interaction validity and entangled human-object pair preservation. Thus, we first introduce HOI-Edit, a comprehensive benchmark with three progressive cognitive levels, which features an automated metric HOI-Eval that reliably evaluates instance-level interaction by letting VLM Q&A after thinking with images containing grounded Human-Object pairs. Considering the task's essence of remodeling dynamic relationships, we benchmark Image-to-Video (I2V) models, finding them inherently suited for dynamic editing due to their temporal generation capabilities. Crucially, beyond superior performance, this capability provides a "replay of the failure process," offering unique diagnosability into why errors occur. We thus propose SCPE (Self-Correcting Process Editing), a novel, agentic self-correcting framework that constrains the generation of I2V models through iteratively refined prompts, enabling the generated videos to more accurately present the target HOI. Extracted frames from these videos are the final editing results. On HOI-Edit, SCPE achieves performance competitive with state-of-the-art (SOTA) editing models like Nano Banana on interaction. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/HOI-Edit.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HOI-Edit基准和SCPE自校正框架，利用I2V模型实现图像人-物交互编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像编辑方法擅长静态属性但无法处理复杂的人-物交互（HOI），且现有基准将HOI与静态属性混淆，依赖无法同时评估动态交互有效性和人-物对保持的全局指标。因此，需要建立专门针对HOI编辑的基准和评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建HOI-Edit基准，包含三个渐进认知层级和自动化指标HOI-Eval（基于VLM问答评估实例级交互）。基于I2V模型在动态编辑上的天然优势，提出SCPE框架，通过迭代精炼提示词约束I2V生成，使视频更准确呈现目标HOI，最终提取帧作为编辑结果。
light_analysis.result: 在HOI-Edit基准上，SCPE在交互性能上与SOTA编辑模型（如Nano Banana）竞争力相当，验证了I2V模型在HOI编辑中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了首个专门针对HOI编辑的基准HOI-Edit和自动化评估指标HOI-Eval，揭示了I2V模型在动态编辑中的优势，并提出SCPE框架。开源代码有助于推动HOI编辑研究，未来可探索更精细的交互控制。

title: DREAM: Extending Vision-Language Models with Dual-Objective Encoding for Cross-Modal Retrieval
abstract: In today's media-driven world, the exponential growth of video content across domains such as surveillance, education, and entertainment has made retrieving semantically relevant videos via natural language queries increasingly critical. Early video retrieval systems relied on handcrafted features or shallow cross-modal mappings, limiting their ability to capture complex semantics and temporal dynamics. While large-scale vision-language models have improved cross-modal alignment, challenges remain in modeling fine-grained temporal dependencies and nuanced linguistic structures. In this paper, we introduce DREAM: Dual-path Representation Enhancement and Alignment Model, a novel multimodal framework that addresses these limitations through enhanced visual and textual encoding. DREAM incorporates a hybrid language modeling strategy that combines masked and permuted language modeling objectives to capture both local and global linguistic semantics. On the visual side, we design a hierarchical vision encoder with cascaded group attention, which integrates spatial and temporal information through multi-stage token interaction and coarse-to-fine attention refinement. We validate DREAM through comprehensive evaluations on the widely-used MSRVTT, MSVD and LSMDC benchmark datasets, where it achieves new state-of-the-art R1 scores of 49.4%, 49.7% and 27.3%, respectively. Qualitative analyses further show the model's ability to maintain coherent attention across frames and align complex queries with dynamic video content. These findings underscore the effectiveness of hierarchical attention and dual-objective textual modeling in enabling robust, context-aware video retrieval, and pave the way for future research in advancing cross-modal representation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DREAM框架，通过双目标文本编码和层次视觉注意力增强跨模态检索，在三个基准数据集上取得新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频内容快速增长使得基于自然语言查询的视频检索日益重要。传统方法依赖手工特征或浅层映射，无法捕获复杂语义和时间动态。尽管大型视觉-语言模型改善了跨模态对齐，但仍难以建模细粒度时间依赖和精细语言结构。本文旨在解决这些局限，提升视频检索的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: DREAM采用混合语言建模策略，结合掩码和排列语言建模目标以捕获局部与全局语义。视觉端设计层次化编码器，通过级联组注意力实现多阶段令牌交互和从粗到精的注意力细化，集成空间与时间信息。整体框架通过双路径表征增强与对齐实现跨模态理解。
light_analysis.result: 在MSRVTT、MSVD和LSMDC数据集上，DREAM取得R1分数49.4%、49.7%和27.3%，均超过先前最优方法。定性分析显示模型能保持跨帧连贯注意力，并准确匹配复杂查询与动态视频内容，验证了方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 层次化注意力和双目标文本建模有效提升了视频检索的上下文感知能力，为跨模态表示学习提供了新思路。该框架在监控、教育等场景有广泛应用价值，未来可探索更高效的视觉-语言交互机制。

title: Benchmarking Large Vision-Language Models on Fine-Grained Image Tasks: From Evaluation to Diagnosis
abstract: Recent advancements in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable multimodal perception and reasoning capabilities. While numerous benchmarks have evaluated LVLMs from holistic or task-specific perspectives, their capabilities on fine-grained image tasks-fundamental to computer vision-remain insufficiently understood. To address this gap, we introduce FG-BMK, a comprehensive fine-grained evaluation benchmark containing 1.01 million questions and 0.28 million images, covering diverse scenarios from common object-centric domains to specialized domains. FG-BMK jointly evaluates dialogue-level fine-grained semantic recognition and feature-level visual discriminability through human-oriented and machine-oriented paradigms, enabling diagnostic analysis of whether LVLM failures arise from insufficient visual representations, weak visual-to-semantic grounding, or limited fine-grained knowledge. Through extensive experiments on a diverse set of representative LVLMs/VLMs, we find that current LVLMs remain inadequate fine-grained recognizers, with failures arising from intertwined bottlenecks in visual representations, semantic grounding, modality alignment, and category-level knowledge. We further analyze training design factors for improving fine-grained capabilities and examine how visual and linguistic perturbations affect LVLM predictions. These findings provide diagnostic insights into the limitations of current LVLMs and offer guidance for future data construction and model design in developing more reliable LVLMs for fine-grained visual tasks. Our code is open-source and available at https://fg-bmk.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FG-BMK基准，系统评估和诊断大型视觉语言模型在细粒度图像任务中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准主要评估LVLM的整体或特定任务能力，但对细粒度图像任务——计算机视觉的基础——理解不足。细粒度识别在众多应用中至关重要，但当前模型表现不佳且失败原因不明，亟需系统性诊断。
light_analysis.method: 构建FG-BMK基准，含101万问题、28万图像，覆盖通用和专用领域。通过人导向（对话级语义识别）和机器导向（特征级视觉判别性）两种范式评估，设计诊断框架区分失败源于视觉表示不足、视觉-语义对齐弱或知识有限。实验多种代表性LVLM/VLM。
light_analysis.result: 发现当前LVLM作为细粒度识别器仍不充分，失败原因交织在视觉表示、语义对齐、模态对齐和类别知识等瓶颈。进一步分析训练设计因素和视觉/语言扰动的影响，揭示性能改进方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为当前LVLM的细粒度能力提供诊断性见解，指导未来数据构建和模型设计以开发更可靠的LVLM。代码开源，具有学术和实际应用价值。

title: Which Sections of a Research Paper Best Reveal Its Research Methods? Evidence from Library and Information Science
abstract: Research methods are essential carriers of knowledge contribution in academic papers. Automatic multi-label classification of research methods can support knowledge services such as method retrieval, review generation, and research intelligence analysis. While existing studies primarily rely on titles and abstracts, abstracts often provide only limited methodological information, whereas utilizing full-text content faces challenges related to excessive length and information redundancy. Therefore, this paper proposes a segment combination strategy by partitioning the full-text content according to its physical postion. Using an annotated corpus of 1,954 full-text articles from three representative journals in Library and Information Science (JASIST, LISR, and JDoc), we evaluate the classification performance of various segments and their combinations across multiple models. Experimental results indicate that methodological information is distributed unevenly within the full-text content, with the middle-to-late and final segments exhibiting greater discriminative power. Furthermore, integrating bibliographic metadata with cross-segment combination strategies effectively enhances classification performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出段组合策略，通过分析全文不同物理段的方法识别能力，提升研究方法自动分类效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究方法分类主要依赖标题和摘要，但摘要提供的方法信息有限，而全文内容存在长度过长和信息冗余问题。因此，需要探索一种有效利用全文内容的方法，以更准确地识别学术论文中采用的研究方法，支持方法检索、综述生成和研究情报分析等知识服务。本研究旨在通过评估全文各段的方法信息分布，提出最优的段组合策略。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种段组合策略（segment combination strategy），将全文内容按其物理位置划分为不同段落（如引言、方法、结果、讨论等）。基于来自图情领域三本代表性期刊（JASIST, LISR, JDoc）的1954篇全文标注语料，构建多标签分类任务，系统评估各个段落及其组合在多种模型（如传统机器学习或深度学习模型）下的分类性能，并与仅使用标题/摘要的方法进行对比。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，研究方法信息在全文中的分布不均匀，中后段（如方法部分）和最后段（如结论部分）具有更强的判别能力。采用跨段组合策略（如合并方法段和结论段）相比仅使用摘要或单一段落，分类性能显著提升。此外，将书目元数据（如作者、期刊等）与段组合特征融合，进一步提高了分类准确率。具体性能指标（如F1分数）在摘要中未明确给出，但整体上优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究验证了通过物理位置划分全文段落并组合特定段落可以有效提升研究方法自动分类的准确性，尤其是中后段和最后段贡献最大。这一发现为知识服务中的方法识别提供了实用策略，有助于自动化文献综述和研究方法挖掘。未来可探索动态段落分割或跨领域迁移应用。局限性在于语料仅覆盖图情领域，方法通用性需进一步验证。

title: RODS: Reward-Driven Online Data Synthesis for Multi-Turn Tool-Use Agents
abstract: Multi-turn tool-use RL is bottlenecked by the rapid depletion of informative samples in static datasets. We observe that the gradient signal in GRPO concentrates on tasks with the highest rollout reward variance, a consequence of the Popoviciu upper bound. Consequently, samples near the agent's capability boundary -- where successes and failures are roughly balanced -- contribute disproportionately large policy gradients. As training progresses, this boundary continuously shifts, which gradually depletes the pool of informative samples in a static dataset. We propose RODS (Reward-driven Online Data Synthesis) to resolve this depletion. RODS closes the loop between RL training and data generation by repurposing the progress reward variance as a practical, zero-cost boundary detector that requires no extra inference beyond the rollouts already computed for training. It continuously identifies such boundary samples, synthesizes new multi-turn variants matching their structural complexity (e.g., API topology and dependency depth) via a skill-aligned resampling pipeline, and manages a dynamic replay buffer that co-evolves with the policy. Starting from 400 human seeds and maintaining an active training pool of ~800 samples, RODS achieves comparable performance to a 17K-sample offline pipeline while requiring roughly 20x fewer trajectories, and improves over fixed-data RL and environment augmentation in our controlled setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 RODS（奖励驱动在线数据合成）方法，通过动态识别策略边界样本并合成新数据，解决多轮工具使用强化学习中静态数据集信息样本枯竭问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多轮工具使用强化学习受限于静态数据集中信息样本的快速枯竭。GRPO 的梯度信号集中在高奖励方差任务上，接近代理能力边界的样本贡献较大梯度，但训练中边界移动导致信息样本耗尽。
light_analysis.method: RODS 利用进度奖励方差作为零成本边界检测器，持续识别边界样本。通过技能对齐的重采样管道合成与原始样本结构复杂性匹配的新多轮变体，并管理动态重放缓冲区，与策略共同演化。
light_analysis.result: 从 400 个人工种子开始，维护约 800 个样本的活动池，RODS 达到与 17K 样本离线流水线相当的性能，轨迹数量减少约 20 倍，优于固定数据强化学习和环境增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: RODS 有效缓解了信息样本枯竭，显著提升数据效率（20 倍轨迹减少）。为多轮工具使用代理提供了实用方案，未来可扩展至更复杂的交互场景。

title: Low-Rank Tensor Completion Based on Fractional Regularization with Ky Fan p-k Norm
abstract: This paper addresses low-rank tensor completion (LRTC) by proposing a novel nonconvex surrogate, namely the ratio of the tensor nuclear norm to the tensor Ky Fan p-k norm (TNPK), to accurately approximate the tensor tubal rank. The TNPK possesses appealing properties, including scale invariance, parameter flexibility, and the existence of closed-form solutions under specific choices of p and k. With specific parameter settings of p and k, it reduces to the ratio of the tensor nuclear norm to the tensor Ky Fan k norm (TNK) or the ratio of the tensor nuclear norm to the tensor Frobenius norm (TNF). We construct a LRTC model and, under the tensor null space property (NSP), prove that low-rank tensors are local minimizers of the proposed model. Moreover, we derive the proximal operator of the Ky Fan p-k inverse-norm and further develop an efficient alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) algorithm with guaranteed subsequential convergence under mild conditions. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets validate the superior performance of our method against state-of-the-art competitors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于张量核范数与Ky Fan p-k范数之比（TNPK）的新非凸代理，精确逼近张量tubal秩，用于低秩张量补全。
light_analysis.motivation: 低秩张量补全（LRTC）中，现有凸松弛如核范数可能偏离真实秩函数，导致次优解。本文旨在设计一种非凸代理，更准确逼近张量tubal秩，同时保持尺度不变性和参数灵活性，以提升补全精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出TNPK（张量核范数与Ky Fan p-k范数之比）作为tubal秩的非凸代理，并构建LRTC模型。在满足张量零空间性质（NSP）条件下，证明低秩张量是局部极小点。推导Ky Fan p-k逆范数的近端算子，进而设计ADMM算法，保证温和条件下的子序列收敛性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集（如图像、视频）上，与多种最先进方法（如TNN、TNN-FR等）对比，所提方法在峰值信噪比、结构相似性等指标上均取得更优结果，验证了TNPK代理对秩函数近似的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过分数正则化引入新的非凸低秩代理，丰富了张量补全理论，所提算法高效可靠。实验证明其在图像修复、视频补全等任务中的优越性。未来可探索更一般的分数阶范数及快速算法。

title: Geometric and Stochastic Analysis of Discontinuities in Sparse Mixture-of-Experts
abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) architectures are now widely deployed in state-of-the-art language and vision models, where conditional routing allows scaling to very large networks. However, this very Top-$k$ expert selection that enables conditional routing also renders the SMoE map inherently discontinuous. In the vicinity of these discontinuity surfaces, even inputs that are arbitrarily close may activate substantially different sets of experts resulting in significantly different outputs. In this work we give a rigorous geometric and stochastic analysis of these discontinuities. We first classify them by order, determined by the number of tied experts at a switching event. Using measure-theoretic slicing arguments, we establish asymptotic volume estimates for the thickened discontinuity surfaces, showing that lower-order discontinuity sets dominate, whereas higher-order ones occupy a vanishingly small relative volume. Next, modeling random perturbations in the input space via a diffusion process, we prove that the path eventually encounter a discontinuity, and moreover that the first hit almost surely occurs on an order-1 discontinuity with explicit finite-time probability bounds. We further derive occupation-time bounds that quantify the duration the random path spend in the neighborhoods of each discontinuity order. These theoretical results imply that inputs are more likely to lie near lower order discontinuities. Motivated by this insight, we propose a simple smoothing mechanism that can be directly applied to existing SMoEs, softly incorporating experts near discontinuities; our analysis guarantees that the added computational overhead remains small while providing localized smoothing near discontinuities, and experiments across language and vision tasks show that smoothing not only enforces continuity of the SMoE map but also enhances empirical performance.

light_analysis.overview: 对稀疏混合专家模型不连续性的几何与随机分析，并提出一种轻量级平滑机制以提升连续性及任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏混合专家（SMoE）架构通过Top-k路由实现大规模扩展，但其映射在专家切换处存在固有非连续性。轻微输入扰动可能导致激活专家集合剧变，输出显著差异。现有研究缺乏对该不连续性的严格理论分析，难以保证模型稳定性与鲁棒性。本文旨在从几何和随机角度系统刻画这些不连续面的特性，并基于理论洞察设计改进方案。
light_analysis.method: 首先按切换时并列专家数将不连续面分为不同阶，利用测度论切片证明低阶不连续集占支配体积，高阶集相对体积趋于零。接着将输入扰动建模为扩散过程，严格证明路径几乎必然遭遇不连续，且首次击中几乎总发生在阶数最低（1阶）的不连续面，给出有限时间概率上界及在各阶邻域的驻留时间界。基于这些理论发现，提出一种直接可应用于现有SMoE的平滑机制：软性地合并不连续面附近的专家，理论分析保证额外计算开销微小。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析给出了不连续面体积渐近估计、首次命中概率和驻留时间的显式界，揭示了低阶不连续的主导地位。在语言和视觉任务上的实验表明，所提平滑机制不仅恢复了SMoE映射的连续性，还提升了模型的经验性能（如准确率、困惑度等），同时计算开销增加极小。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次对SMoE不连续性进行了严格的几何与随机分析，揭示了其结构特征并提供了定量刻画。提出的平滑机制简便有效，无需修改路由逻辑即可增强模型稳定性和性能。该工作为理解和改进稀疏门控网络提供了理论基础，未来可探索应用于更大规模模型或自适应路由策略。

title: A Hybrid LSTM--Vision Transformer Architecture for Predicting HRRR Forecast Errors
abstract: Forecast errors in high-resolution numerical weather prediction (NWP) systems are often linked to unresolved planetary boundary layer (PBL) processes, convection, terrain-induced circulations, and other vertically structured atmospheric phenomena. Previous work demonstrated that Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks can successfully predict forecast errors in the High-Resolution Rapid Refresh (HRRR) model using mesonet observations, but we believe performance degradation is linked to periods of complex vertical atmospheric evolution. To address this limitation, we develop a hybrid LSTM-Vision Transformer (LSTM-ViT) framework that combines temporal sequence learning from surface observations with atmospheric profiles from the New York State Mesonet profiler network. The LSTM-ViT framework is trained to predict HRRR hourly precipitation, 10 m wind speed, and 2 m temperature forecast errors at individual mesonet stations. Across all three predictors, incorporation of profiler-derived atmospheric structure improves forecast error prediction skill relative to the baseline LSTM architecture, with the largest gains occurring at shorter forecast lead times and during periods of enhanced PBL activity. Improvements are particularly pronounced for precipitation forecast error, where the LSTM-ViT framework achieves approximately a twofold increase in predictive skill relative to the baseline LSTM while better capturing convectively driven error evolution and reducing degradation associated with PBL processes. These results demonstrate that combining temporal sequence learning with vertically informed attention mechanisms provides a physically meaningful pathway for improving forecast error prediction in operational NWP systems. Our research offers forecasters enhanced guidance regarding model bias and forecast confidence.
comment: This manuscript is a preprint and has been submitted for peer review to the Artificial Intelligence for the Earth Systems journal. The content is subject to change based on the outcome of the peer review process and should not be considered final or definitive. Copyright in this Work may be transferred without further notice

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合LSTM-Vision Transformer架构，结合地面观测和大气廓线数据，显著提升HRRR模型预报误差预测能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 高分辨率数值天气预报中的预报误差常与未解析的边界层过程、对流等垂直结构现象相关。先前使用LSTM网络基于地面观测预测HRRR预报误差，在复杂垂直大气演化时段性能下降。因此，需要引入垂直剖面信息以增强模型对垂直结构演化的捕捉能力。
light_analysis.method: 开发混合LSTM-Vision Transformer框架，将地面观测的时序学习与纽约州Mesonet廓线网络的垂直大气剖面相结合。LSTM处理时间序列，Vision Transformer关注垂直结构，共同预测HRRR每小时降水、10米风速和2米温度的预报误差。训练数据来自单个Mesonet站点。
light_analysis.result: 在所有三个预测变量上，LSTM-ViT相比基线LSTM提升了预报误差预测技能，尤其是在短预报时效和边界层活跃期。降水预报误差预测技能提升约两倍，更好地捕捉对流驱动的误差演化，并减少与边界层过程相关的性能退化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结合时序学习与垂直注意力机制为改进业务NWP系统中的预报误差预测提供了物理上有意义的途径，可为预报员提供模型偏差和预报置信度的增强指导。未来可扩展至更多站点和变量。

title: FoMoE: Breaking the Full-Replica Barrier with a Federation of MoEs
abstract: Pre-training Large Language Models (LLMs) typically demands large-scale infrastructure with tightly coupled hardware accelerators. While increasing model and dataset scale remains the dominant driver of performance, Mixture-of-Experts (MoEs) architectures have recently achieved state-of-the-art results by decoupling parameter count from computational cost. This efficiency enables training massive models on constrained compute budgets, yet it typically requires the high-speed interconnects of a single datacenter. To overcome these physical limits, recent approaches such as DiLoCo and Photon use low-communication data-parallel methods to enable scaling across geographically distributed, weakly connected data centers. However, these methods suffer from a fundamental inefficiency: they require full model replicas at every site, which imposes prohibitive memory constraints and communication overheads. In this work, we introduce FoMoE, a system that breaks the full-replica paradigm by partitioning expert layers across workers. We demonstrate that FoMoE: (I) reduces communication costs by up to 1.42x over efficient baselines and 45.44x over DDP via partial expert replication in the studied regimes; (II) achieves empirical throughput speedups of up to 1.4x through a novel skip-token mechanism; and (III) shows stable routing in the trained proxy regimes and projects the communication/memory benefits to 100B-scale configurations through system modelling.

light_analysis.overview: FoMoE通过将MoE专家层分区到多个工作节点，打破全模型复制范式，实现跨数据中心的高效分布式训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有分布式训练方法需要全模型复制，导致内存和通信开销大，尤其在地理分布、弱连接的数据中心场景下效率低下。MoE模型虽能解耦参数量与计算成本，但仍依赖高速互连。跨数据中心方法如DiLoCo和Photon因全副本要求而受限于内存和通信瓶颈。本研究旨在突破这些限制，实现大规模MoE模型的高效分布式预训练。
light_analysis.method: 提出FoMoE系统，将MoE的专家层跨工作节点分区，实现部分专家复制以减少通信和内存需求。关键创新包括：通过部分专家复制降低通信成本（相比DDP高达45.44倍）；引入skip-token机制跳过部分令牌的前向/反向传播，提升吞吐量达1.4倍；并通过系统建模预测100B规模配置下的通信和内存优势，同时保持稳定路由。
light_analysis.result: FoMoE在通信成本上比高效基线（DiLoCo等）降低最多1.42倍，比DDP降低45.44倍；通过skip-token机制实现高达1.4倍的吞吐量加速；在代理训练实验中路由行为稳定，系统建模进一步验证了100B规模下通信和内存的显著收益。
light_analysis.conclusion: FoMoE打破了全模型复制范式，为跨数据中心的弱连接环境提供了高效且可扩展的MoE训练方案。通过分区专家层和部分复制，显著降低通信和内存开销，同时保持模型质量。该工作推动了大规模LLM预训练的物理边界扩展，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索更大规模下的鲁棒性及与其它并行策略的融合。

title: FlowObject: Flow Steering for Bridging Generative Priors and Reconstruction Fidelity
abstract: Recovering complete 3D representations of objects from few casual image captures remains a significant challenge. Recent 3D generative models, particularly those based on Flow-Matching (FM), can synthesize high-quality textured assets; however, they often suffer from ''synthetic bias'' where learned priors override observational evidence, alongside a lack of alignment with the observed instance.
