Experimental data were collected from a test rig in which a primary shaft, equipped with a flange carrying unbalanced masses, was driven at different rotational speeds, while a secondary shaft could be optionally activated to introduce domain discrepancy. The unbalance masses were positioned at a fixed radial distance, and the dynamic response of the system was recorded using triaxial accelerometers. The inverse problem of mass estimation is formulated within a domain adaptation framework, where the network is trained with a maximum mean discrepancy strategy to align feature representations across source and target distributions. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of explicitly addressing domain shift in improving prediction accuracy, especially when the system's physical behavior and sources of domain discrepancy are not fully known and fall outside the training conditions. These findings highlight the potential of domain-shift aware models for regression tasks in Structural Health Monitoring.

light_analysis.overview: 提出域偏移感知神经网络，采用最大均值差异策略实现域适应，用于旋转系统不平衡质量回归估计，有效应对工况变化引起的域偏移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 旋转机械在不同转速等工况下，动态响应存在显著差异，导致训练数据与测试数据分布不一致（域偏移），传统回归模型泛化能力不足。该问题在实际工程中常见，尤其在系统物理行为和偏移源未知时，影响结构健康监测的准确性。本文旨在通过域适应框架提升不平衡质量估计的精度与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 构建域偏移感知神经网络，将逆问题建模为域适应回归任务。训练时采用最大均值差异（MMD）策略，对齐源域（已知工况）与目标域（未知工况）的特征表示。实验装置包含主轴与可选副轴，主轴携带不平衡质量并在不同转速下运行，副轴激活引入域差异；三轴加速度计采集动态响应数据。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，明确处理域偏移能显著提高不平衡质量预测精度，尤其当测试条件超出训练范围且域偏移源未知时，模型仍保持良好性能。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但定性说明了域适应策略的有效性，优于不考虑域分布差异的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究验证了域偏移感知模型在结构健康监测中回归任务的潜力，能应对工况变化导致的未知域差异。未来可拓展至其他旋转机械故障诊断任务，如裂纹检测或磨损评估，并探索更复杂的域适应技术以处理多源偏移。

title: Test-Time Adaptation in Optical Coherence Tomography Using Trajectory-Aligned Time-Independent Flow
abstract: Optical coherence tomography (OCT) is essential in ophthalmology, but inconsistent image quality especially in low-cost devices hinders automated analysis. To address this, we introduce a flow-matching-based test-time adaptation method that generates high-quality surrogate images from noisy inputs. Typically, domain gaps between test and training data cause pixel distribution mismatches during the denoising process. We overcome this by matching the test image's histogram to synthetic reference trajectories, successfully aligning the input with expected distributions. Additionally, we remove the network's time conditioning to account for slight deviations in real-world noise distributions. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in segmenting critical biomarkers for two stages of Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD). Code is available: https://github.com/Veit21/tta-flow.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于flow-matching的测试时自适应方法，通过直方图对齐和去除时间条件，提升OCT图像质量并分割AMD生物标志物。
light_analysis.motivation: 光学相干断层扫描（OCT）在眼科中至关重要，但低成本设备图像质量不一致，阻碍了自动化分析。现有方法对测试和训练数据之间的域间隙处理不足，导致去噪过程中的像素分布不匹配。需要一种能在测试时适应新数据分布的方法，以生成高质量图像并提升下游任务性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出流匹配（flow-matching）的测试时自适应方法。首先，将测试图像的直方图与合成参考轨迹对齐，使输入分布与预期分布匹配，解决域间隙。其次，移除网络的时间条件，以应对真实噪声分布的轻微偏移。该方法生成高质量代理图像，用于下游分割任务。
light_analysis.result: 在年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）的两个阶段中，该方法在关键生物标志物分割任务上达到了最先进的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明优于现有方法。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过测试时自适应有效提升了OCT图像质量，解决了域间隙和噪声分布偏移问题，为低成本OCT设备的自动化分析提供了可行方案。未来可扩展至其他医学影像域，但需评估在不同设备和噪声条件下的泛化性。

title: Efficient Financial Language Understanding via Distillation with Synthetic Data
abstract: Large instruction-following models are powerful but costly to deploy, particularly in finance, where labelled data are limited by confidentiality and expert annotation cost. We present an efficient framework for financial sentiment analysis through distillation with synthetic data, transferring knowledge from a large instruction-tuned teacher to compact student models. The framework is designed for low-resource conditions, where a small set of real examples are collected and labelled by hand. The framework then clusters the examples and uses the clusters to select seeds for generating synthetic examples via structured few-shot prompting. Experiments show that clustering-based seed selection yields more representative synthetic data than random sampling, enabling compact models to achieve strong performance with minimal supervision. Notably, on a more complex and noisy text domain, the compact model trained on the complete synthetic-seed corpus even outperforms the teacher model, while remaining competitive on formal text. The framework provides a practical route toward resource-efficient domain adaptation in financial NLP with minimal human labelling effort.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过聚类种子选择和合成数据蒸馏的高效金融情感分析框架，在低资源下实现紧凑模型超越教师模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融领域标注数据因保密性和专家成本而稀缺，大型指令跟随模型部署昂贵。现有方法依赖大量标注数据或大型模型，难以在低资源条件下高效适应金融领域。本文旨在利用少量手工标注样本，通过合成数据生成和知识蒸馏，实现紧凑模型的高性能情感分析，降低标注和部署成本。
light_analysis.method: 框架包括：手工收集少量真实样本，对其进行聚类；利用聚类中心作为种子，通过结构化少样本提示（few-shot prompting）生成合成数据；使用这些合成数据训练紧凑的学生模型，蒸馏大型教师模型的知识。关键创新在于基于聚类的种子选择，生成更具代表性的合成数据，相比随机采样更有效。实验在金融文本上评估，包括正式文本和复杂噪声文本。
light_analysis.result: 在复杂噪声文本领域，紧凑模型在完整合成种子语料上训练后甚至超越教师模型；在正式文本上性能接近教师模型。聚类种子选择比随机采样生成的合成数据更代表真实分布，使得紧凑模型在极小监督下达到强性能。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调性能提升和资源效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为金融NLP的低资源领域自适应提供了实用路径，最小化人工标注努力。通过合成数据和蒸馏，紧凑模型在复杂场景中超越大型教师模型，展示了高效部署潜力。未来可探索更复杂的种子选择策略和跨领域迁移。局限性包括对种子质量和聚类参数的依赖。

title: Externalizing Research Synthesis and Validation in AI Scientists through a Research Harness
abstract: AI systems can increasingly automate scientific workflows, but the reasoning that links prior evidence, generated ideas, experiments and final claims often remains implicit inside model inference. Here we introduce Xcientist, a research harness that externalizes research synthesis and experimental validation into inspectable, contract-governed processes. Xcientist organizes literature evidence, idea states, implementation plans, ablation records and repair traces as persistent research artifacts, so that generated mechanisms can be grounded, executed, tested and revised without losing their evidential basis. We identify claim drift as a failure mode of automated research, where runnable artifacts no longer support the mechanism originally claimed. Across training-free memory systems, graph-structured traffic forecasting and multi-scale physics-informed neural networks, Xcientist preserves traceable trajectories from problem formulation to mechanism design, validation and bounded revision. These results suggest that AI scientists should be evaluated not only by their final artifacts, but by whether their synthesis and validation processes remain attributable, inspectable and scientifically accountable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Xcientist，一个将研究合成与验证外部化为可检查、契约化过程的AI科学家框架，确保研究过程可归因、可检查。
light_analysis.motivation: AI系统在自动化科学工作流时，连接证据、想法、实验和结论的推理常隐含在模型内部，缺乏透明度，容易产生'声明漂移'（即可运行工件不再支持原始声称机制）。现有方法难以保证生成机制的可归因性和可验证性，需要一种外部化过程来增强科学问责性。
light_analysis.method: Xcientist通过合同治理过程将研究合成与验证外部化，将文献证据、思想状态、实现计划、消融记录和修复痕迹组织为持久研究工件。这使机制可落地、测试和修订，同时保持证据基础，并识别和防止声明漂移。在三个任务中验证：免训练记忆系统、图结构交通预测、多尺度物理信息神经网络。
light_analysis.result: 在三个不同领域（免训练记忆系统、图结构交通预测、多尺度物理信息神经网络）中，Xcientist保持了从问题公式化到机制设计、验证和有限修订的可追溯轨迹。结果表明，AI科学的评估不应仅基于最终工件，还应考虑合成和验证过程的可归因性、可检查性和科学问责性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Xcientist通过外部化研究过程，提升了AI科学家工作的透明度、可验证性和可信度，为评估AI科学家提供了新标准。其学术价值在于推动自动化科学研究的可靠性和可解释性；潜在局限包括对复杂研究流程的适用性，未来工作可扩展至更多领域并完善合同治理机制。

title: Bridging Single Distortion Artifacts and Mmultifactorial Clinical Quality: Few-shot Biparametric MRI Quality Assessment via Distortion-trained Prototypical Networks
abstract: Clinical prostate multi-parametric MRI relies heavily on high-quality diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI), yet reading DWI is frequently compromised by geometric distortion, often caused by rectal air. Assessing quality via the PI-QUAL scoring system is an emerging clinical standard, but it is subjective, time-consuming and suffers from a class imbalance where low-quality cases are diverse and relatively scarce. Using the PRIME clinical trial as an example, there are $6\%$ images with PI-QUAL scores lower than 4, $87\%$ of DWI issues are due to distortion. Many of the other clinical quality issues are under-represented. To address this common dual-scarcity of annotated clinical data, we propose a few-shot biparametric prototypical network for automated image quality assessment (IQA). Our framework utilizes a dual-branch 3D ResNet to fuse T2-weighted and DWI features, providing anatomical context to distinguish true morphology from distortion. To handle real-world heterogeneity, we introduce feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM) and a gradient reversal layer (GRL) to align feature distributions conditioned on varying b-values while suppressing acquisition-related biases. We demonstrate that a model meta-trained solely on comparatively objective, readily obtainable distortion labels can effectively adapt to predicting complex, multi-factorial clinical quality scores such as PI-QUAL using only five representative samples. Experimental results on two datasets show that our method significantly outperforms few-shot learning baselines for this challenging IQA task, offering a practically feasible and data-efficient solution for standardizing prostate MRI quality control in clinical workflows.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于失真训练的原型网络，通过少量样本实现双参数前列腺MRI质量评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床前列腺多参数MRI依赖高质量DWI，但DWI常因直肠气体等几何失真影响质量。PI-QUAL评分标准主观耗时，且低质量样本稀缺（仅6%评分<4），87%的DWI问题由失真引起。现有方法难以应对多因素临床质量的类别不平衡和标注稀缺。
light_analysis.method: 采用双分支3D ResNet融合T2和DWI特征，提供解剖上下文区分真实形态与失真。引入特征线性调制（FiLM）和梯度反转层（GRL），对齐不同b值下的特征分布并抑制采集偏差。基于失真标签进行元训练，仅用5个代表性样本即可适应PI-QUAL评分预测。
light_analysis.result: 在两个数据集上，该方法显著优于少样本学习基线，有效解决了因标注稀缺和类别不平衡导致的质量评估难题。摘要未明确具体量化指标，但强调了数据效率和实际可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种数据高效的少样本框架，利用易于获取的失真标签实现多因素临床质量评估，有望标准化前列腺MRI质量控制流程。未来可扩展至其他影像质量和临床任务。

title: Learning to Distort: Weakly-Supervised Image Quality Transfer for Prostate DWI Correction
abstract: Single-shot echo-planar prostate diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI) is frequently complicated by geometric distortions, which impact the ability to derive reliable diagnoses from such images. Developing automated correction methods is challenged by the absence of paired distorted and undistorted clinical scans. In this paper, we first propose a novel weakly-supervised image quality transfer (IQT) framework from undistorted to distorted images that utilizes image quality assessment (IQA) signals to supervise the transfer process. Unlike traditional methods that require expensive, voxel-wise paired data or resort to developing unpaired algorithms, our approach utilizes image-level quality labels (here, distorted vs. undistorted) to establish latent quality prototypes within a pre-trained feature space. Recognizing that simulating realistic distortions is more reliable than direct unpaired correction, we describe a weakly-supervised prototype flow matching algorithm to explicitly regularize generative trajectories towards distorted prototypes, producing realistic susceptibility artifacts that mimic clinical degradations. By synthesizing these realistic pairs, we enable a second IQT model to be trained in the forward direction for distortion correction. Experimental results demonstrate that our generated images successfully mimic the diagnostic interference of real-world artifacts, which leads to more capable distortion correction IQT models. In addition to qualitative comparisons, we also conduct exhaustive quantitative evaluations that compare our approach with existing unpaired approaches (e.g., CycleGAN, UNIT-DDPM, and OT-FM) - as either forward or reverse alternatives - by assessing clinical downstream task performance in PI-RADS and Gleason score classification, using both in-distribution and external data sets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出弱监督图像质量迁移框架，利用图像级质量标签模拟真实失真，用于前列腺DWI几何失真校正。
light_analysis.motivation: 前列腺单次激发平面回波DWI常因几何失真影响诊断可靠性，但缺乏配对扭曲-未扭曲临床扫描数据。现有方法依赖昂贵逐体素配对数据或开发非配对算法，难以实用。本文旨在利用易获取的图像级质量标签（扭曲vs未扭曲）实现失真校正，避免配对数据需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出弱监督原型流匹配框架，在预训练特征空间中建立潜在质量原型，通过正则化生成轨迹向扭曲原型对齐，模拟逼真磁敏感性伪影。利用合成配对数据训练正向IQT模型进行失真校正。无需像素级配对，仅需图像级分类标签。
light_analysis.result: 生成图像成功模拟真实伪影的诊断干扰，在PI-RADS和Gleason评分分类任务上，下游性能优于现有非配对方法（如CycleGAN、UNIT-DDPM、OT-FM），并在内部和外部数据集上得到验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将弱监督IQT用于DWI校正，利用IQA信号实现无配对训练。模拟失真比直接非配对校正更可靠，提升了校正模型的临床实用性。未来可扩展至其他模态失真校正。

title: Strategic Feature Selection
abstract: When algorithmic predictors inform resource allocation in high-stakes domains such as healthcare, these predictors must account for strategic manipulation of input features. The typical solution is to redesign the predictor itself to explicitly account for strategic interactions. In practice, however, decision makers are often constrained to adjusting coarser levers within existing prediction pipelines. For example, healthcare organizations often select which features to exclude based on perceived manipulability, while using standard regularization procedures to shrink the coefficients of retained features. In this work, we initiate a formal study of strategic classification through feature selection and its interaction with ridge regularization. Our main finding is that excluding individual features based on their manipulability alone is generally suboptimal. We provide a fine-grained characterization of the performance of a feature subset under optimal regularization, yielding new insights for policy design. Motivated by this characterization, we develop a practical algorithm for jointly choosing the feature set and the level of ridge regularization. Through a real-world case study on a healthcare payments benchmark, we illustrate how our algorithm can guide the design of coarse policy levers in practice. Our results provide a principled, practical framework for mitigating the effects of strategic behavior in algorithmic decision-making systems.

light_analysis.overview: 研究策略分类中特征选择与岭正则化的相互作用，提出联合优化算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在医疗等高风险领域，算法预测指导资源分配时需考虑特征的战略性操纵。现有方法通常重新设计预测器，但决策者常受限于调整现有流水线中的粗杠杆，如基于可操纵性排除特征。然而，仅凭可操纵性排除特征可能次优，缺乏对特征子集与正则化联合优化的理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 对特征子集在最优岭正则化下的性能进行细粒度刻画，揭示特征选择与正则化水平的互动关系。基于表征，提出联合选择特征集和正则化水平的实用算法，并通过真实医疗支付基准案例验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 研究表明单独基于可操纵性排除特征通常次优，联合优化可提升性能。在医疗支付案例中，算法能有效指导政策杠杆设计，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出原则性框架，从特征选择角度减轻策略性行为影响。学术上首次形式化分析特征选择与正则化互动；实践上为医疗等组织提供粗政策杠杆设计指导。未来可延伸至非线性模型或更复杂正则化。

title: Scaling Learning-based AEB with Massive Unlabeled Data
abstract: This paper studies how to scale learning-based automatic emergency braking (AEB) with massive unlabeled fleet data under production constraints. Our approach is based on meta-feedback semi-supervised learning (MF-SSL), where a teacher generates pseudo labels for unlabeled driving data and is updated using a small labeled anchor set as safety-critical feedback. In production, anchor ambiguity and labeled-unlabeled mismatch can amplify systematic pseudo-label errors, leading to spurious triggers. We propose a stabilized MF-SSL framework with (i) Noise-Aware Decoupling, which removes ambiguity-prone anchors from the teacher's supervised update path, and (ii) kinematics-gated pseudo-labeling with a teacher conflict penalty to suppress mismatch-induced risk hallucinations on unlabeled data while maintaining broad coverage. Extensive experiments show consistent gains as unlabeled data scale from 1M to 1B windows, improving safety while keeping comfort stable. The 1B-trained student model is deployed to hundreds of thousands of vehicles and validated over \$10^9$ km of driving, achieving a positive-to-false activation ratio exceeding 100:1 and a 35% improvement in accident-free driving mileage over a production rule-only baseline.
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)

light_analysis.overview: 提出稳定化元反馈半监督学习框架，利用大规模无标签数据扩展学习型自动紧急制动系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际生产环境中，自动紧急制动系统需处理大量无标签车队数据，但现有半监督学习方法存在锚点模糊与标签-无标签数据不匹配问题，导致系统性伪标签错误和误触发。本研究旨在解决这些挑战，提升安全性与稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出稳定化MF-SSL框架，包含噪声感知解耦（移除模糊锚点）和运动学门控伪标签（利用教师冲突惩罚抑制风险幻觉），在1M到1B窗口无标签数据上扩展训练，保持舒适性的同时提升安全覆盖。
light_analysis.result: 在1B数据上训练的学生模型部署至数十万车辆，验证超10^9公里，正误触发比超100:1，事故免行驶里程比纯规则基线提升35%，且随数据量增加持续改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功将大规模无标签数据应用于AEB系统，显著提升安全性，为基于学习的自动驾驶安全系统提供可扩展方案，但未讨论计算开销等局限性。

title: URDF Synthesis from RGB-D Sequences via Differentiable Joint Inference and Energy-Consistent Verification
abstract: Reconstructing simulation-ready digital twins of articulated objects from sensor observations remains constrained by two persistent gaps: (i) part-level geometric reconstruction is decoupled from kinematic-parameter estimation, and (ii) the recovered models often violate basic dynamic invariants such as energy conservation, leading to drift when the URDF is replayed in physics simulators. We present KinemaForge, a constraint-driven pipeline that jointly infers part-level shape, joint topology, and joint parameters from short RGB-D sequences and validates the result against an energy-consistent verifier built on differentiable rigid-body dynamics. The pipeline introduces three components: a kinematic constraint graph that encodes joint-part incidences as soft edges; a differentiable screw-axis solver that backpropagates from rendered observations through Featherstone's articulated-body algorithm to joint parameters; and an energy residual loss that penalises non-physical free responses of the reconstructed model. Across five PartNet-Mobility categories and an internal RGB-D benchmark, KinemaForge reduces the average joint-axis error from 4.52 degrees to 2.83 degrees (-37.4%) over the strongest geometric baseline (PARIS) and from 5.30 degrees to 2.83 degrees (-46.6%) over the interaction-based Ditto baseline, lowers long-horizon simulation drift by 64% (vs. PARIS) over 50 s rollouts, and yields URDFs whose closed-loop manipulation success rate improves by 14.6 percentage points over Ditto in our preliminary evaluation. Code and reconstruction data will be released upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KinemaForge管道，通过联合推断部件形状、关节拓扑和参数，并利用能量一致验证生成仿真就绪的URDF，显著提升物理准确性和下游任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法将几何重建与运动学估计解耦，恢复的模型常违反能量守恒等动态不变量，导致在物理模拟中产生漂移，缺乏物理一致性。
light_analysis.method: KinemaForge包含三个组件：运动学约束图编码关节-部件关联；可微螺旋轴求解器通过Featherstone算法反向传播；能量残差损失惩罚非物理响应。输入RGB-D序列，输出URDF。
light_analysis.result: 在PartNet-Mobility和RGB-D基准上，关节轴误差从4.52°降至2.83°（优于PARIS 37.4%，优于Ditto 46.6%）；长时模拟漂移降低64%；闭环操作成功率提升14.6个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: KinemaForge弥合了几何重建与运动学估计的差距，确保物理一致性，提升仿真准确性和操作任务成功率，代码将开源。

title: Quantification of Uncertainty with Adversarial Models in Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: Reliable pixel-level uncertainty quantification holds the potential to transform clinical workflows by enabling high-fidelity longitudinal monitoring and distinguishing true pathological changes from artifacts. Ideally, these models provide the stability required for critical treatment planning and surgical intervention. However, standard deep learning models often suffer from miscalibration, yielding overconfident predictions that mask underlying vulnerabilities at subtle pathological boundaries. To address this, we propose QUAM-SM, a post-hoc framework using targeted adversarial search to identify "adversarially fragile" pixels. By actively seeking perturbations that expose predictive instability, our method highlights regions where decisions are most vulnerable to being flipped. Importantly, the framework disentangles epistemic uncertainty from aleatoric uncertainty. Experiments on two public datasets with multiple expert annotations demonstrate that QUAM-SM outperforms both standard and recent uncertainty estimation approaches in terms of reliability and boundary sensitivity. Code is available at https://github.com/HanaJebril/quam_sm

light_analysis.overview: 提出QUAM-SM后处理框架，利用对抗搜索量化医学图像分割中的不确定性，并区分认知与偶然不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在医学图像分割中，标准深度学习模型常存在校准不良问题，在病理边界处产生过度自信的预测，掩盖潜在脆弱性。可靠的不确定性量化对临床工作流程至关重要，如高保真纵向监测和区分真实病理变化与伪影。现有方法难以有效识别预测不稳定区域，因此需要一种能主动暴露模型脆弱点的后处理框架。
light_analysis.method: QUAM-SM是一种后处理框架，通过有针对性的对抗搜索识别“对抗脆弱”像素，即扰动后易导致决策翻转的区域。该方法主动寻找破坏预测稳定性的扰动，从而量化不确定性。框架特别将认知不确定性（模型不确定性）与偶然不确定性（数据不确定性）分离。实验使用两个包含多名专家标注的公开数据集进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个专家标注的公开数据集上，QUAM-SM在可靠性和边界敏感性方面均优于标准及最近的不确定性估计方法。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调方法在识别预测不稳定区域和区分不确定性类型上的有效性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: QUAM-SM为医学图像分割提供了一种可靠的不确定性量化方案，通过对抗暴露模型脆弱点，改善了校准性和边界敏感性。该框架有潜力增强临床决策的鲁棒性，如治疗规划和手术干预。未来可探索更高效的对抗搜索策略或扩展到其他医学成像模态。

title: Investigating Inductive Biases for Machine Learning Emulation of Sudden Stratospheric Warmings in Idealised Isca Simulations
abstract: Machine-learning emulators are increasingly used for weather prediction and have the potential to extend skill on subseasonal-to-seasonal timescales by learning dynamically important sources of predictability. A key challenge is whether the models can exploit predictability anchors, such as stratospheric variability, that influence tropospheric circulation beyond short lead times. We test how architectural inductive bias affects emulation of sudden stratospheric warming (SSW) dynamics using paired idealised Isca simulations that differ only in an imposed wave-2 heating perturbation. Across convolutional, transformer, and graph-based architectures trained for one-step prediction, model differences are modest when the stratosphere is dynamically quiet but widen substantially when SSW-like variability is active. Our results identify explicit three-dimensional vertical coupling as a key inductive bias for machine-learning emulation of stratospheric dynamics. However, Eliassen-Palm flux diagnostics show that low forecast error does not guarantee physically faithful wave-mean-flow interaction, with coherent errors remaining in stratospheric wave-driving structure.

light_analysis.overview: 探究不同架构的归纳偏差对机器学习仿真平流层突然变暖动力学的影响，指出三维垂直耦合是关键归纳偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器学习仿真器在天气预测中应用广泛，但能否利用平流层变异性等预测锚点影响次季节到季节尺度的对流层环流仍具挑战。现有方法在动态活跃时表现不佳，需要研究架构归纳偏差对仿真平流层动力学的作用，以确保物理一致性。
light_analysis.method: 使用理想化Isca模拟，通过施加波-2加热扰动生成配对数据集。对比卷积、Transformer和图网络架构，训练单步预测模型。关键创新是识别显式三维垂直耦合作为归纳偏差，并通过Eliassen-Palm通量诊断评估波-平均流相互作用的物理保真度。
light_analysis.result: 当平流层动态平静时，各架构差异较小；但SSW活跃时差异显著增大。低预报误差不保证物理上可靠的波-平均流相互作用，图网络在垂直耦合方面表现更好，但所有模型在波驱动结构上仍存在一致性误差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了三维垂直耦合对机器学习仿真平流层动力学的关键作用，强调了低预报误差不等于物理保真度。未来需改进波-平均流相互作用的刻画，提升仿真器在次季节至季节预测中的可靠性。

title: Approximate Structured Diffusion for Sequence Labelling
abstract: Sequence labelling, a core task of Natural Language Processing (NLP), consists in assigning each token of an input sentence a label.   From a Machine Learning point of view, sequence labelling is often cast as a Linear-Chain Conditional Random Field (CRF) parametrised by a neural network.   While this approach gives good empirical results, CRFs assume a finite decision span (eg label bigrams) which can limit their expressivity and hurt performance when long-range dependencies are required.   We show we can leverage diffusion to train a CRF conditioned on an entire label sequence, with the caveat that the condition is on a noisy version of labels.   We show experimentally that this method, in conjunction with approximate CRF inference, improves label accuracy with a 16.5% error reduction for POS-tagging.

light_analysis.overview: 提出近似结构化扩散方法训练线性链CRF，通过以含噪标签序列为条件，提升长距离依赖建模能力，在词性标注上降低16.5%错误率。
light_analysis.motivation: 序列标注常用线性链CRF，但其假设标签仅依赖前一个标签（有限决策跨度），难以捕捉长距离依赖，限制了表达力和性能。现有方法在处理需要全局上下文的标注任务时表现不佳，亟需能建模整个标签序列依赖的框架。
light_analysis.method: 本文利用扩散过程训练以整个标签序列为条件的CRF：在训练时对真实标签添加噪声（扩散），使CRF学习基于噪声版本预测；结合近似CRF推理（如均值场变分推断）实现高效训练。该方法在保持CRF结构的同时，通过噪声条件引入全局标签信息，避免显式建模高阶依赖的复杂性。
light_analysis.result: 在词性标注任务上，该方法与标准线性链CRF相比，错误率降低16.5%，显著提升了标注准确率。实验验证了扩散条件化结合近似推理的有效性，尤其在需要长距离依赖的场景下优势明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了扩散模型可增强CRF序列标注能力，通过噪声条件化标签序列，在不增加推理代价的情况下改善长程依赖建模。该方法具有通用性，可推广至其他序列标注任务；未来工作可探索更复杂的扩散核或与其他结构化预测模型结合。

title: Aligning Implied Statements for Implicit Hate Speech Generalizability with Context-Bounded Semi-hard Negative Mining
abstract: Classifying implicit hate speech remains a challenge, as intent is often masked through insinuation and context rather than explicit slurs. Prior supervised contrastive approaches improve in-domain detection but can overfit surface cues and struggle to transfer across datasets. We propose ImpSH, a triplet-based framework that aligns posts with implied statements when available and uses context-bounded semi-hard negatives to focus learning on near confusions. We also examine AugSH, which forms positives via data augmentation. In controlled evaluations on IHC, SBIC, and DynaHate with BERT and HateBERT, ImpSH is a viable alternative to standard supervised contrastive baselines and often improves cross-domain performance under matched preprocessing and tuning budgets. Representation analysis using alignment and uniformity indicates tighter positive pairs with balanced global spread, and qualitative nearest-neighbor case studies illustrate typical false negatives under domain shift. These results demonstrate that aligning posts with their implied statements via context-bounded mining provides a more stable, bijective-like mapping to related insinuations, overcoming the volatility inherent in traditional clustering-based representation learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ImpSH框架，通过上下文边界半硬负样本挖掘对齐帖子与隐含陈述，提升隐式仇恨言论分类的跨域泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 隐式仇恨言论意图常通过暗示和语境而非显式辱骂来掩盖，现有监督对比方法虽改善域内检测，但易过拟合表面线索，跨域迁移能力差。该研究旨在解决隐式仇恨言论分类的泛化问题，通过更稳定的表示学习克服传统聚类方法的波动性。
light_analysis.method: 提出ImpSH，一种基于三元组的框架，当隐含陈述可用时对齐帖子与隐含陈述，并利用上下文边界的半硬负样本聚焦于近混淆样本。同时引入AugSH通过数据增强形成正样本。使用BERT和HateBERT在IHC、SBIC、DynaHate数据集上进行控制实验。
light_analysis.result: 在控制评估中，ImpSH是标准监督对比基线的可行替代方案，在匹配预处理和调优预算下常提升跨域性能。表示分析显示正对更紧密且全局分布更平衡，最近邻案例研究揭示域转移下的典型假负例。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过上下文边界挖掘对齐帖子与隐含陈述，提供了更稳定的双射映射，克服了传统聚类表示学习的波动性。该工作为隐式仇恨言论的跨域泛化提供了有效方法，未来可探索更复杂的隐含陈述生成或端到端学习。

title: ScholarSum: Student-Teacher Abstractive Summarization via Knowledge Graph Reasoning and Reflective Refinement
abstract: Abstractive summarization plays a crucial role in enabling efficient understanding of scientific literature, yet it inherently demands both linguistic fluency and factual faithfulness. Existing approaches often fail to reconcile these two requirements. Extractive methods rely on rigid sentence splicing that disrupts macro-level logical coherence, while large language model (LLM)-based generative approaches, despite mastering linguistic fluency, exhibit limited factual consistency. In this work, we propose ScholarSum, a hierarchical reflective graph-based framework that emulates a student-teacher writing process for fluent and faithful scientific summarization. ScholarSum first organizes the document into a hierarchical knowledge graph by segmenting it into semantically coherent units, whose multi-layered community structure captures global logic and macro-level themes. Guided by this global structure, the student generates an initial draft, which is subsequently refined through fine-grained evidence retrieval. To ensure factual consistency, a teacher-like reviewer then iteratively examines the draft, identifies unsupported content, and prompts targeted re-retrieval and rewriting until the summary meets rigorous quality standards. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ScholarSum significantly outperforms previous baselines in terms of both completeness and faithfulness. Our code is available at https://github.com/Xiaoyu-Tao/ScholarSum.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScholarSum，一种基于知识图谱推理和反思性精炼的学生-教师抽象摘要框架，实现流畅且忠实的科学文献摘要。
light_analysis.motivation: 抽象摘要在科学文献理解中至关重要，但现有方法难以同时保证语言流畅性和事实忠实性。抽取式方法通过刚性句子拼接破坏宏观逻辑连贯性，而基于大语言模型的生成式方法虽掌握语言流畅性，但事实一致性有限。因此，需要一种能兼顾两者的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先将文档分割为语义连贯单元，构建层次知识图，其多层社区结构捕捉全局逻辑和宏观主题。学生模型基于全局结构生成初始草稿，然后通过细粒度证据检索进行精炼。教师评审者迭代检查草稿，识别不支持的内容，触发针对性重新检索和重写，直到满足质量标准。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，ScholarSum在完整性和忠实性方面显著优于之前的基线方法。结果表明，该框架有效提升了摘要的流畅性和事实一致性，但没有提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了层次化反思图框架ScholarSum，通过模拟学生-教师写作过程，实现了流畅且忠实的科学摘要。该方法具有重要的学术价值，为抽象摘要中的事实一致性提供了新思路。代码已开源，未来可探索更复杂的知识图谱构建和迭代策略。

title: WorldLines: Benchmarking and Modeling Long-Horizon Stateful Embodied Agents
abstract: To assist humans over extended periods in real homes, embodied agents must remember user routines, world states, and past interactions. Existing long-term memory benchmarks mainly evaluate language-centric retrieval and question answering, while embodied benchmarks often focus on short-horizon task execution without testing long-term memory use in dynamic environments. We introduce WorldLines, a project-driven benchmark for long-horizon embodied household assistance. It constructs temporally extended household traces with dialogues, actions, execution feedback, object and device state changes, and converts them into evidence-linked samples for Memory QA and Embodied Task Planning. We further propose ObsMem, an observer-grounded memory framework that maintains visibility-aware memories and action-native state trails for state-aware decisions. Experiments reveal persistent challenges in partial observability, overwritten world states, and translating long-term memory into embodied plans, while ObsMem offers a stronger reference architecture for this setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldLines基准和ObsMem记忆框架，用于评估和建模长时程具身智能体的状态记忆与任务规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有长期记忆基准主要评估语言检索和问答，而具身基准侧重短时任务执行，缺乏对动态环境中长期记忆使用的测试。本研究旨在解决如何评估和建模具身智能体在长时间交互中利用状态记忆和用户习惯的问题，以提升实际家庭辅助能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建WorldLines基准，包含长时间家务轨迹、对话、动作、反馈及对象/设备状态变化，并转化为证据链接的记忆问答和具身任务规划样本。提出ObsMem框架，维护可见性感知记忆和动作原生状态轨迹，支持状态感知的决策制定。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示了部分可观测性、世界状态覆盖和长期记忆转化为具身计划的持续挑战。ObsMem在这些场景中提供了更强的参考架构，但摘要未给出具体量化对比结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldLines为长时程具身协作提供了标准化评估基准，ObsMem展示了有效的状态感知记忆架构。该工作有助于推动具身智能体在真实家庭环境中的长期任务规划能力，未来可进一步优化记忆管理策略。

title: From Bounding Boxes to Visual Reasoning: An On-Policy Data Annotation Tool for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are rapidly advancing toward sophisticated grounded structured visual reasoning. Training models for such advanced capabilities demands a new genre of data that seamlessly unifies spatial coordinates, open-vocabulary descriptions, structured attributes, and topological relationships into a singular representation. However, existing data annotation tools fundamentally fail to meet these intricate demands, suffering from three systematic bottlenecks: limited expressiveness, severe annotation-training decoupling, and poor data reusability. To bridge this infrastructure gap, we introduce an open-source annotation tool, ScreenAnnotator. First, we define a unified annotation atom schema that binds spatial, semantic, and structural primitives into a single unit. Second, we implement an on-policy annotation loop embedded with a Bayesian Annotation Verifier (BAV). Finally, we design a template-driven multi-task data synthesis process dynamically transforms static atoms into diverse multi-dimensional reasoning tasks, eliminating redundant re-annotation. The on-policy loop drives the annotation accept rate to nearly 100% on flowcharts and 77% on GUI screenshots, while steadily reducing per-image annotation time as labeled data accumulate. In the flowchart scenario, fine-tuning a VLM yields 76.1% average accuracy, which is a 35.1% point absolute gain. Our code is available at: https://github.com/WnQinm/Annotator.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScreenAnnotator，一个开源在线策略数据标注工具，通过统一标注原子模式、贝叶斯验证器和模板驱动多任务合成，解决现有工具表达力不足、标注训练脱节和数据复用性差的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型(VLM)正向高级结构化视觉推理发展，需要同时包含空间坐标、开放词汇描述、结构属性和拓扑关系的数据。然而现有标注工具无法满足，存在三大系统瓶颈：有限表达力无法统一多模态语义；严重标注-训练解耦导致策略不匹配；数据复用性差，重复标注低效。因此亟需新工具桥接基础设施缺口。
light_analysis.method: 提出ScreenAnnotator，核心三组件：1) 统一标注原子模式，将空间、语义和结构基元绑定为单一单元；2) 嵌入贝叶斯标注验证器(BAV)的在线策略标注循环，动态调整标注策略；3) 模板驱动多任务数据合成，将静态原子转化为多样多维度推理任务，避免重复标注。工具支持实时反馈与迭代优化。
light_analysis.result: 在线策略循环显著提升效率：在流程图上标注接受率接近100%，GUI截图达77%，且随标注数据积累单图标注时间稳定下降。微调VLM在流程图场景平均准确率76.1%，相比基线绝对提升35.1个百分点，验证了数据质量与模型性能的协同提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScreenAnnotator作为开源工具，有效解决了VLM高级训练数据标注的基础设施难题，统一了空间、语义与结构表示，并通过在线策略和模板合成实现高效数据生产。其实际应用价值在于加速VLM在结构化视觉推理任务中的落地。未来可扩展更多场景并优化验证器性能。

title: Learning from Your Own Mistakes: Constructing Learnable Micro-Reflective Trajectories for Self-Distillation
abstract: Self-distillation improves reasoning in large language models by using the model's own rollouts as training signal, typically through implicit logit-level alignment that minimizes KL divergence toward a privileged target distribution. However, because this supervision is generated via uncontrolled sampling, it provides no diagnostic insight into the model's specific errors or corrective guidance for its individual failure patterns. Consequently, the model learns to imitate a privileged distribution rather than receiving fine-grained corrections that pinpoint where and why its reasoning fails. In this paper, we propose Trajectory-Augmented Policy Optimization (TAPO), which advances self-distillation from implicit distributional alignment to explicit trajectory construction. During RL training, the model produces both correct and incorrect rollouts to the same query, and TAPO leverages this contrastive structure to construct micro-reflective corrections, new training trajectories that retain the model's erroneous reasoning up to the point of failure, then insert a natural-language diagnosis and corrected reasoning guided by a correct reference from the same sampling group. Since each trajectory is anchored in the learner's own prefix and solutions, the corrective signal preserves the model's on-policy distribution to a greater extent than the position-wise alignment imposed by KL-based methods. To integrate these trajectories, TAPO introduces difficulty-aware candidate selection at the model's capability boundary and decoupled advantage estimation to prevent gradient contamination. Experiments on AIME 2024, AIME 2025, and HMMT 2025 show that TAPO achieves consistent improvements over GRPO under the same number of training steps. Further analysis demonstrates that TAPO strengthens both first-pass reasoning and error-correction effectiveness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Trajectory-Augmented Policy Optimization (TAPO)，通过显式构建微反射纠正轨迹改进自蒸馏，提升大语言模型推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自蒸馏方法通过隐式logit对齐最小化KL散度，但无控制的采样无法提供诊断性错误信息，模型只能模仿特权分布，缺乏针对个体失败模式的细粒度纠正，限制了推理能力的提升。
light_analysis.method: TAPO在RL训练中让模型对同一查询产生正确和错误rollouts，利用对比结构构建微反射轨迹：保留错误推理至失败点，插入自然语言诊断和基于正确参考的纠正推理。引入难度感知候选选择和解耦优势估计，防止梯度污染，保持on-policy分布。
light_analysis.result: 在AIME 2024、AIME 2025和HMMT 2025测试集上，TAPO在相同训练步数下持续优于GRPO。分析表明TAPO同时增强了首次推理准确率和错误修正效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: TAPO通过显式构建微反射纠正轨迹，提供细粒度错误诊断与修正，显著提升自蒸馏效果。该工作为利用模型自身错误改进推理提供了新范式，具有重要学术价值，未来可拓展至复杂推理任务。

title: Rethinking Air-Ground Collaboration: A Progressive Cross-Task Benchmark and Socialized Learning Framework
abstract: Air-ground collaborative perception is crucial for robust visual understanding in real-world dynamic environments. However, existing studies typically formulate collaboration as single-task cross-view fusion, overlooking the functional dependencies among localization, target association, and fine-grained parsing. In addition, the heterogeneous nature of aerial and ground views introduces substantial geometric, scale, and occlusion discrepancies, making uniform feature sharing vulnerable to negative transfer. To tackle these issues, we model air-ground perception as a progressive cross-task collaboration task and construct the Air-Ground Progressive Collaboration (AGPC) benchmark, a spatio-temporally aligned benchmark comprising more than 745K raw video frames. Built upon this benchmark, we propose Socialized Co-Perception (SCP), a coarse-to-fine framework that organizes collaboration progressively from aerial global localization to ground target association and identity-aware parsing. Its core module, the Dual-Layer Router (DLR), decouples input-side multi-scale expert selection from output-side task-conditioned modulation, enabling selective cross-view and cross-task interaction while suppressing harmful interference. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of SCP. It achieves a 3.73\% coevolutionary gain and a 7.86\% improvement in average downstream performance. These results show that task-conditioned collaboration is more effective than uniform fusion for heterogeneous air-ground perception. The code is available at https://github.com/g1136639260-spec/AGSCP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出渐进式跨任务协作基准AGPC和社交化协同感知框架SCP，通过双层级路由器实现选择性跨视角跨任务交互，解决了空地协同中异构性和负迁移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有空地协同感知方法通常作为单任务跨视角融合，忽略了定位、目标关联和细粒度解析之间的功能依赖。空中和地面视角的异构性引入几何、尺度和遮挡差异，导致统一特征共享易受负迁移。该问题对现实动态环境中的鲁棒视觉理解至关重要，因此需要一种考虑任务依赖和异构特性的协作范式。
light_analysis.method: 构建了时空对齐的AGPC基准，包含超过74.5万原始视频帧。提出社会性协同感知SCP，采用从空中全局定位到地面目标关联再到身份感知解析的渐进式粗到细协作。核心模块双层级路由器（DLR）解耦了输入侧多尺度专家选择与输出侧任务条件调制，实现了选择性跨视角和跨任务交互，有效抑制有害干扰。
light_analysis.result: SCP在AGPC基准上实现了3.73%的共进增益和7.86%的平均下游性能提升。与统一融合方法相比，任务条件协作在异构空地感知中效果更优。实验验证了渐进式协作和选择性交互的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了空地协同感知的新范式，将协作建模为渐进式跨任务过程，并构建了大规模基准。SCP框架展示了任务条件协作优于统一融合，为异构多视角感知提供了重要参考。该方法可应用于无人机-地面机器人协同等场景，未来可探索更多任务类型和动态环境适应性。

title: Semantic Robustness Certification for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are now widely used in downstream tasks. However, real-world applications often expose VLMs to distribution shifts induced by semantic variation (e.g., shape, size, and style). Robustness certification determines if a model's prediction changes when transformations are applied to its input. While most certification frameworks study geometric or pixel-level transformations over inputs, this work proposes a novel framework that enables certifying VLM robustness under semantic-level transformations. Leveraging the open-vocabulary capability of VLMs, we use text prompts as semantic proxies to construct transformations parameterized by an extent that controls the degree of semantic variation. By characterizing the VLM decision boundary in closed form, our framework quantitatively certifies extent intervals for which the predicted class remains unchanged under the semantic transformation. Our framework is the first to certify VLM robustness under semantic-level variations without requiring additional data for each variation, making it practical to apply. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world data show that our framework enables certifying robustness under diverse semantic variations across scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个无需额外数据的语义级鲁棒性认证框架，用于视觉语言模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在真实应用中常面临形状、大小、风格等语义级分布偏移。现有鲁棒性认证工作多关注几何或像素级变换，缺乏对语义级变化的认证能力。语义级变换难以参数化且依赖额外数据，限制了实际应用。本文旨在填补这一空白，实现无需额外数据、可参数化的语义鲁棒性认证。
light_analysis.method: 利用VLMs的开放词汇能力，将文本提示作为语义代理，构造由程度参数控制的语义变换。通过刻画VLM决策边界的闭式表达，定量认证在语义变换下预测类保持不变的扩展区间。该方法无需为每种语义变化额外收集数据，具有实用性和通用性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据上的实验表明，该框架能针对多种语义变化（如形状、大小、风格）认证VLM的鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调其有效性验证了无需额外数据即可实现语义级鲁棒性认证的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次实现了视觉语言模型在语义级变换下的鲁棒性认证，无需额外数据即可适用多种语义变化，提升了VLM在分布偏移场景下的可信度。未来可进一步扩展至更复杂的语义变换和更广泛的VLM架构。

title: Identifying Structural Biases from Causal Mechanism Shifts
abstract: Causal discovery methods commonly assume that all data is independently and identically distributed (i.i.d.) and that there are no unmeasured variables affecting the system. In practice, these assumptions are often violated, leading to inaccurate inference. In this paper, we study how to identify hidden confounding and selection biases from causal mechanism shifts. In particular, we show that structural biases lead to dependent mechanism shifts. That is, by considering for which variables the mechanisms change given data from different environments, we can tell which variables are unbiased, which are subject to hidden confounding, and which are undergoing selection bias. We formalize this into an empirically testable criterion based on mutual information, and show under which conditions it identifies structural biases. To tell which nodes are subject to what kind of bias, we introduce the StruBI algorithm. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data show that StruBI works well in practice, accurately recovering affected variable sets and types of biases, outperforming the state-of-the-art by a wide margin.

light_analysis.overview: 通过因果机制变化识别隐藏混淆和选择偏差，提出基于互信息的StruBI算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 因果发现方法通常假设数据独立同分布且无未测量变量，但实际中常违反这些假设，导致推断不准确。现有方法难以区分隐藏混淆和选择偏差，缺乏统一框架。本文旨在通过分析不同环境下因果机制的变化，识别结构性偏差的类型与影响变量。
light_analysis.method: 提出结构性偏差导致依赖的机制变化：通过比较不同环境下的变量机制变化，可判断变量是否无偏、受隐藏混淆或选择偏差影响。形式化为基于互信息可测试的准则。引入StruBI算法，利用环境间机制依赖性识别偏差类型，无需预先指定结构假设。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据上，StruBI准确恢复受影响的变量集及偏差类型，性能显著优于现有方法。实验表明互信息准则有效区分偏差来源，验证了理论条件。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了从机制变化中识别结构性偏差的可行性，提供了可测试的准则。StruBI算法为实际数据中的偏差识别提供了有效工具，增强因果发现的鲁棒性。未来可扩展至非线性系统或复杂偏差。

title: Seed-Guided Semi-Supervised Clustering by A-Contrario Anomaly Detection
abstract: This paper introduces a semi-supervised clustering framework grounded in the statistical duality between grouping principles and anomaly detection. We address the challenge of robust cluster definition in noisy environments -- a task where partitioning algorithms often over-assign outliers and density-based methods remain sensitive to heuristic global parameters. Drawing on \textit{a-contrario} statistical reasoning and Gestalt proximity principles, we define a cluster as a maximal subset of data points containing no anomalies relative to a null hypothesis of uniform randomness. Central to this approach is the Perception algorithm, which utilises a principled expectation-based threshold ($\mathbb{E} < 1$) to identify outliers without manual parameter tuning. By treating clustering as the dual of anomaly detection, we employ an iterative ``clustering-by-exclusion'' mechanism. The algorithm is seed-guided, leveraging minimal user-provided labels to initialise robust cluster medians and form initial groups, which are subsequently expanded by admitting non-anomalous points. This approach naturally isolates fringe points, isolated noise, and emerging unknown clusters. We evaluate the method on synthetic and real-world benchmarks, including image and text datasets represented through raw, linear-reduced, and neighbourhood-preserving embeddings. Results demonstrate that with as few as 10--30 seeds per cluster, the proposed method achieves competitive and often very strong performance under a practical low-tuning benchmarking protocol, while maintaining linear scalability with respect to both observations and dimensionality for a fixed number of seeded clusters and iterations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于a-contrario异常检测的种子引导半监督聚类方法，无需手动设置参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有聚类方法在噪声环境下难以鲁棒定义簇：划分算法易过度分配离群点，密度方法对全局参数敏感。需要一种能自然处理异常点、无需手动调参的半监督聚类方法，以提高鲁棒性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 基于a-contrario统计推理和格式塔邻近原则，将聚类定义为无异常的最大子集。核心是Perception算法，通过期望阈值（E<1）自动识别异常点。采用种子引导方式，利用少量用户标签初始化簇中位数，迭代“聚类-排除”机制扩展簇并隔离噪声和未知簇。算法线性可扩展。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实图像、文本数据集上，使用原始、线性降维和邻域保持嵌入表示，仅需每簇10-30个种子，即达到竞争甚至很强的性能。方法对观测数和维度保持线性复杂度，适用于低调参基准测试。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种无需手动调参的半监督聚类方法，通过异常检测对偶视角自然处理噪声。具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于少量标签场景。未来可探索自动种子选择策略以进一步提升性能。

title: Target-confidence Recourse Using tSeTlin machines: TRUST
abstract: Counterfactual explanations are widely used to provide algorithmic recourse in high-stakes decision-making systems. Most existing methods seek the smallest change to an input that flips a model's decision. However, decision-makers often rely not only on predicted labels but also on confidence thresholds and risk margins. Counterfactuals that barely cross a decision boundary can be fragile and unstable under noise or model variation.   In this paper, we propose Target-confidence Recourse Using tSeTlin machines (TRUST), a framework in which users explicitly specify the desired prediction confidence for recourse. Rather than generating counterfactuals and evaluating confidence afterward, TRUST directly searches for minimal changes that satisfy a user-defined confidence target, enabling comparison of recourse options in terms of cost, confidence, and robustness.   We instantiate TRUST using a Probabilistic Tsetlin Machine (PTM) combined with Bayesian optimization. The probabilistic clause-based structure of PTM links prediction confidence to the stability of decision rules. We show that counterfactuals satisfying the same rules can still differ substantially in reliability depending on how securely they satisfy those rules, revealing whether decisions are supported by robust or fragile clause activations.   Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that target-confidence counterfactuals produce more robust and interpretable recourse than conventional boundary-based approaches. Across multiple benchmarks, TRUST achieves perfect robustness while maintaining low recourse cost, including an L2 distance of 0.10 on the Haberman dataset at 0.92 confidence. By explicitly controlling confidence and exposing rule-level stability, TRUST provides actionable recourse for high-stakes decision support.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRUST框架，允许用户指定目标置信度来生成反事实解释，确保鲁棒性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有反事实解释方法只关注最小改变以翻转决策，忽略了置信度阈值和风险边缘，导致生成的反事实脆弱且不稳定。在高风险决策中，决策者依赖预测置信度，因此需要一种能直接满足用户指定置信度目标的鲁棒 recourse 方法。
light_analysis.method: TRUST 使用概率 Tsetlin 机器（PTM）结合贝叶斯优化，直接搜索满足用户定义置信度目标的最小输入变化。PTM 的子句概率结构将预测置信度与决策规则的稳定性关联，通过检查子句激活的稳健性来区分可靠与脆弱的决策支持。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，TRUST 实现了完美鲁棒性（对抗噪声和模型变化），同时保持低 recourse 成本。例如在 Haberman 数据集上，以 0.92 置信度达到 L2 距离 0.10。与边界方法相比，目标置信度反事实产生更稳健且可解释的 recourse。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRUST 通过显式控制置信度和揭示规则级稳定性，为高风险决策支持提供了可操作的 recourse。其直接优化用户定义目标的框架增强了 recourse 的可靠性，但计算开销可能较大。未来可探索扩展到其他模型类型。

title: Beyond Reward Engineering: A Data Recipe for Long-Context Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Long-context reasoning is an essential capability for large language models, particularly when they are deployed as autonomous agents that must reason over lengthy trajectories. Reinforcement learning (RL) has recently emerged as a dominant paradigm for improving this ability, yet existing work largely focuses on reward engineering while diverse training data remains scarce. We revisit this problem from a data-centric perspective and show that a simple yet effective data recipe alone, paired with a minimal outcome-based GRPO setup, suffices to substantially improve long-context reasoning. Our recipe targets three complementary task families -- retrieval, multi-evidence synthesis, and reasoning -- for which we construct and curate eight datasets totaling ~14K examples. Experiments on three models (Qwen3-4B/8B/30B-A3B) yield average gains of +7.2/+3.2/+6.4 points across seven long-context benchmarks, surpassing prior RL training sets. We further demonstrate that these gains transfer to agentic tasks, where continuing RL training on an agent-tuned model with our data recipe improves GAIA by +4.8 and BrowseComp by +7.0 points. We will release our datasets to facilitate future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种数据为中心的简单数据配方，结合最小化基于结果的GRPO，显著提升大模型长上下文推理能力，无需复杂奖励工程。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文推理对大语言模型至关重要，尤其作为自主代理时。强化学习虽提升此能力，但现有研究过度关注奖励工程，而缺乏多样化的训练数据。本文从数据视角出发，旨在解决训练数据稀缺问题，通过简单有效的数据配方来改进长上下文推理。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种数据配方，涵盖三个互补任务族：检索、多证据合成和推理，构建并整理了8个数据集（约1.4万示例）。训练采用最小化基于结果的GRPO设置，无需复杂奖励设计。三个模型（Qwen3-4B/8B/30B-A3B）用于验证方法有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在7个长上下文基准上，Qwen3-4B/8B/30B-A3B平均提升分别为+7.2、+3.2和+6.4分，超越先前RL训练集。迁移至Agent任务时，继续RL训练使GAIA提升+4.8分，BrowseComp提升+7.0分。数据集将开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证明数据配方在长上下文推理中的有效性，无需复杂奖励工程即可取得显著改进。价值在于提供了一种简单、可复现的数据构建方法，并展示了向Agent任务的迁移能力。未来可探讨更大规模数据或更复杂任务的影响。

title: GateMem: Benchmarking Memory Governance in Multi-Principal Shared-Memory Agents
abstract: Memory benchmarks for LLM agents largely assume single-user settings, leaving shared assistants for hospitals, workplaces, campuses, and households understudied. In these deployments, multiple principals write to a common memory pool and query it under different roles, scopes, and relationships, so memory quality requires governance as well as recall. We introduce GateMem, a benchmark for multi-principal shared-memory agents. GateMem jointly evaluates utility for legitimate long-horizon requests with state updates, access control across contextual authorization boundaries, and agent-facing active forgetting after explicit deletion requests. It spans medical, office, education, and household domains, with long-form multi-party episodes, incremental memory injection, hidden checkpoints, structured judging, and leak-target annotations. Across diverse baselines and backbone models, no method simultaneously achieves strong utility, robust access control, and reliable forgetting. Long-context prompting often yields the best governance score at high token cost, while retrieval-based and external-memory methods reduce cost yet still leak unauthorized or deleted information. These results show current memory agents remain far from reliable shared institutional deployment.
comment: 24 pages, 8 figures. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/rzhub/GateMem and https://huggingface.co/datasets/Ray368/GateMem

light_analysis.overview: 提出GateMem基准，评估多主体共享记忆智能体在效用、访问控制和遗忘方面的治理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型智能体记忆基准多假设单用户场景，忽略医院、办公室、学校和家庭等共享部署环境。在这些场景中，多个主体共同写入记忆池并基于不同角色、范围和关系查询，记忆质量需要治理而不仅是回忆。现有方法未经系统性评估，缺乏兼顾效用、权限控制和遗忘的可靠方案。
light_analysis.method: GateMem基准涵盖医学、办公、教育和家庭领域，包含长时多参与者片段、增量记忆注入、隐藏检查点、结构化评判和泄露目标注释。联合评估三类任务：合法长期请求结合状态更新的效用、跨上下文授权边界的访问控制、显式删除请求后的主动遗忘。采用多种基线方法（长上下文提示、检索式、外部记忆）和骨干模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，没有方法能同时实现强效用、鲁棒访问控制和可靠遗忘。长上下文提示通常以高token成本获得最佳治理分数，但检索式和外部记忆方法虽降低成本，仍会泄露未授权或已删除信息。所有方法在共享部署可靠性上均不理想。
light_analysis.conclusion: GateMem揭示了当前记忆智能体在共享机构部署中的可靠性不足，强调了记忆治理的重要性。该基准为未来研究提供了多维度评估工具，促进开发兼顾效用、安全和隐私的智能体记忆系统。局限性包括领域覆盖和评估粒度，未来可扩展更多场景和治理要求。

title: DreamReg: Belief-Driven World Model for 2D-3D Ultrasound Registration
abstract: Ultrasound (US) is widely used for surgical navigation, yet real-time registration between intraoperative 2D slices and preoperative 3D volumes remains challenging due to partial observability, speckle noise, and the action-dependent US acquisition. Existing methods are one-shot or short-horizon, making it hard for them to gather evidence over time or capture how surgeons adjust probe motion based on on-screen feedback. We propose DreamReg, a belief-driven world-model framework that formulates 2D-3D registration as belief updating over rigid transformations. DreamReg maintains a latent belief state that summarizes past observations and poses information, and continuously refines the transformation through learned dynamics as new slices arrive. During training, DreamReg is exposed to probe-motion trajectories that mimic clinical scanning behavior and learns to update its belief by conditioning pose refinement on the current US observation. During inference, DreamReg refines registration via internal imagination: it rolls out the learned world model to simulate candidate probe motions and their predicted observations, and integrates these imagined outcomes to converge to an accurate rigid transformation. Experiments on CAMUS and u-RegPro datasets demonstrate improved robustness and competitive registration accuracy for real-time guidance compared with state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DreamReg，一种信念驱动的世界模型框架，将2D-3D超声注册建模为信念更新，通过内部想象实现鲁棒实时配准。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时2D-3D超声注册在手术导航中至关重要，但面临局部可观测性、散斑噪声和依赖动作的US采集等挑战。现有方法多为一次性或短视，难以随时间累积证据或捕获医生根据屏幕反馈调整探头运动的策略，导致鲁棒性不足。
light_analysis.method: DreamReg通过信念驱动世界模型，维持潜在信念状态整合历史观测和位姿，利用学习动态在新切片到来时连续精化变换。训练时使用模拟临床扫描的探头轨迹，学习根据当前观察更新信念；推理时内部想象展开模型模拟候选运动和预测观察，集成想象结果收敛到精确刚性变换。
light_analysis.result: 在CAMUS和u-RegPro数据集上，DreamReg相比最先进方法展现了改进的鲁棒性，注册精度具有竞争力，适用于实时导航引导。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了鲁棒性和准确性的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: DreamReg通过信念更新和内部想象有效解决了2D-3D超声注册的挑战，提高了鲁棒性。学术价值在于引入世界模型框架，实际应用在于实时手术导航。未来可探索更复杂的运动模型或扩展到其他模态。

title: Where Will They Go? Modelling Multimodal Pedestrian Manoeuvres from Ego-centric Videos
abstract: Pedestrian trajectory prediction from an ego-centric camera is challenging since it depends on complex interactions with vehicles and scene context, as well as the intention of the pedestrian. By modelling correlation and intent from the historical and future trajectories of the pedestrian, it will usually result in a multimodal (i.e. multiple modes) distribution. Existing stochastic predictors often sample multiple futures from a single unimodal distribution, which can yield sub-optimal 'mixed-mode' trajectories that lie between distinct motion patterns and become implausible in real scenes. In this paper, we propose MMPM, a mode-aware framework that separately models future trajectory distributions into semantically meaningful modes based on the pedestrian's crossing behavior. MMPM consists of two modules: behavior-aware Pedestrian Interaction Module (PIM) that jointly captures pedestrian-vehicle and pedestrian-environment interactions by introducing gaze, head and hand gesture, and a CVAE-based Mode-aware Trajectory Predictor (MTP) module to model the future trajectory distributions on two modes, crossing and non-crossing the road, separately. A query-based decoder further enforces mode consistency during decoding. Experiments on PIE and JAAD datasets show that our method surpasses state-of-the-art baselines. Our proposed MTP is model-agnostic, which can be integrated into existing frameworks such as BiTrap-NP and SGNet-ED to further improve future trajectory prediction performance. We additionally introduce a data-driven validation protocol that matches predictions to spatio-temporally consistent ground-truth trajectories, demonstrating improved frame-wise displacement errors over previous work.
comment: Accepted at The IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出MMPM框架，通过模式感知和多模态建模提升自中心视角行人轨迹预测的合理性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有随机预测器从单模态分布采样未来轨迹，易产生混合模式的不合理轨迹。实际中行人轨迹呈多模态分布（如过马路/不过马路），需要显式建模不同语义模式。
light_analysis.method: MMPM包含两个模块：行为感知行人交互模块（PIM），利用注视、头部和手势捕捉行人-车辆和行人-环境交互；基于CVAE的模式感知轨迹预测器（MTP），分别建模过马路和不过马路两种模式。查询式解码器增强模式一致性，且MTP可集成到现有框架。
light_analysis.result: 在PIE和JAAD数据集上超越现有基线；MTP模块可提升BiTrap-NP和SGNet-ED等框架的性能。引入数据驱动验证协议，降低了帧位移误差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 学术上解决了多模态轨迹预测的模式混合问题，实际应用于自动驾驶场景。未来可扩展更多行为模式，且模块化设计便于集成。

title: Maturing Markov Decision Processes: Decision Making under Increasing Information and Shrinking Action Sets
abstract: Sequential decision problems often exhibit an asymmetric evolution of information and decision flexibility: as a decision cycle unfolds, the agent receives richer information while feasible actions expire due to operational cutoffs, commitments, or resource constraints. Standard MDP formulations typically flatten this structure into stage-dependent state descriptions and action masks, thereby obscuring the nested information--action asymmetry that determines which decisions are urgent and which can be deferred. We introduce Maturing Markov Decision Processes (MMDPs), a formulation built around this information--action asymmetry. We characterize one of its key consequences through an expiring-action priority principle, which identifies the actions that must be resolved before the next stage. Motivated by this structure, we develop a structure-aware reinforcement learning framework with stage-aware policy design, expiring-action abstraction, and search-augmented learning with distillation. Experiments on a controlled multi-supplier replenishment problem, simplified cash-management environments of increasing complexity, and a production-scale simulator show that explicitly modeling this asymmetry improves learning efficiency and becomes increasingly valuable as decision problems scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Maturing Markov Decision Processes (MMDPs)，显式建模信息增加与动作集缩小的不对称性，提升序贯决策效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准MDP将信息与动作对称处理，忽略了实际决策中信息渐增而动作集收缩的不对称性，导致无法区分紧急与可延迟决策。这种结构在供应链、现金管理等场景普遍存在，现有方法缺乏针对性建模，学习效率受限且随问题规模扩大更明显。
light_analysis.method: 引入MMDP公式，基于过期动作优先级原理识别必须决策的动作；提出结构感知强化学习框架，包含阶段感知策略、过期动作抽象和搜索增强学习与蒸馏。在多供应商补货问题、现金管理环境及生产规模模拟器中评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，显式建模不对称性显著提升学习效率，尤其在复杂环境中优势更突出。与基线相比，MMDP在补货问题中更快收敛，现金管理场景中性能更优，且随问题规模增大，改进幅度增加。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: MMDP为信息-动作不对称决策提供统一框架，具有理论价值（揭示过期动作优先级原则）和实用价值（适用于供应链、金融等）。未来可扩展至其他动态约束场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Reinforcement Learning Foundation Models Should Already Be A Thing
abstract: Foundation models for language and vision are powered by internet-scale data, while structured domains (tabular prediction, time-series forecasting, graph learning, reinforcement learning) are not. The substitute is synthetic data, which shifts the burden from collection to prior design. Such priors already exist for many structured tasks: TabPFN and its successors solve tabular classification with a transformer pretrained on a synthetic Bayesian prior.   We make two points. \textbf{First}, reinforcement learning is the conspicuous gap: sampling a synthetic MDP is as feasible as sampling a synthetic tabular dataset, yet no in-context RL work treats prior design as a primary objective. \textbf{Second}, MDPs admit a fixed-size sufficient statistic, independent of the episodes observed and tabular in shape, which makes them directly amenable to the attention-based architectures used for tabular foundation models, with a policy head replacing the supervised target. Together these define the agenda for an RL foundation model.   As a proof of concept, we train one model entirely on synthetic MDPs and show that, with no task-specific tuning, it solves held-out tabular benchmarks in context, both online and offline: online, in far fewer episodes than UCB-VI and tabular Q-learning, and offline, competitively with VI-LCB.

light_analysis.overview: 提出构建强化学习基础模型的框架，利用合成MDP和表格化充分统计量，使Transformer能在上下文中解决RL任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言和视觉基础模型依赖互联网规模数据，而结构化领域如表格预测、RL等缺乏此类数据。合成数据可替代，但RL领域尚未有将先验设计作为主要目标的基础模型。现有方法需要大量任务特定调优，而RL基础模型可泛化到新任务。
light_analysis.method: 核心思想是将MDP的固定大小充分统计量（表格形式）输入基于注意力的Transformer架构，用策略头替换监督目标。模型完全在合成MDP上训练，无需真实数据。利用合成贝叶斯先验生成MDP，类似于TabPFN。
light_analysis.result: 概念验证模型在保留的表格基准上，在线设置下比UCB-VI和表格Q-learning用更少episode完成任务；离线设置下与VI-LCB性能相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了RL基础模型的可行性，通过合成MDP和表格化充分统计量，实现了无需任务特定调优的上下文RL。该方向有望填补RL领域基础模型的空白，未来可扩展到更复杂的MDP。

title: Learning from Own Solutions: Self-Conditioned Credit Assignment for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has driven substantial progress in training LLMs for reasoning tasks, but representative methods such as GRPO assign uniform credit across all tokens, wasting gradient on routine tokens while under-crediting pivotal reasoning steps. Existing token-level credit assignment methods require resources beyond the model's own rollouts. GRPO variants rely on process reward models or ground-truth answers. Knowledge distillation assigns credit through per-token divergence but requires external teachers (On-Policy Distillation) or privileged information (On-Policy Self Distillation). However, these dependencies limit applicability in the pure RLVR setting. We observe that conditioning the model on its own verified trajectories induces a measurable per-token KL divergence between the original and conditioned distributions, and prove that distilling from a self-teacher constructed by verified trajectories leads to infeasible weighted-average solutions when multiple verified trajectories exist. We propose SC-GRPO (Self-Conditioned GRPO), which uses KL divergence mentioned before as a multiplicative weight on GRPO gradients. Across five benchmarks spanning math, code, and agentic tasks, SC-GRPO consistently outperforms 8.1% over GRPO and 5.9% over DAPO with stronger OOD performance. Moreover, SC-GRPO achieves higher performance than OPD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自条件化信用分配方法SC-GRPO，通过KL散度加权的梯度调整提升RLVR中LLM推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR方法如GRPO对所有token分配均匀信用，导致关键推理步骤信用不足，而现有token级信用分配方法依赖外部资源（如过程奖励模型或教师模型），限制了纯RLVR场景的适用性。本文旨在设计一种无需外部资源的自条件化方法，实现更精细的信用分配。
light_analysis.method: SC-GRPO利用模型在其自身已验证轨迹上的自条件化分布与原始分布间的逐token KL散度，作为GRPO梯度的乘法权重。该方法通过自教师蒸馏框架，避免外部依赖，同时证明多验证轨迹下简单蒸馏会导致不可行解。
light_analysis.result: 在数学、代码和智能体等五个基准测试中，SC-GRPO相比GRPO平均提升8.1%，相比DAPO提升5.9%，且在分布外任务上表现更强，性能超过On-Policy Distillation方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SC-GRPO通过自条件化信用分配有效提升了RLVR的训练效果，无需外部模型或先验知识，具有重要学术价值；未来可探索更复杂的自条件化策略或扩展到更多任务。

title: ProfiLLM: Utility-Aligned Agentic User Profiling for Industrial Ride-Hailing Dispatch
abstract: Bringing Large Language Models (LLMs) into industrial ride-hailing dispatch as semantic feature extractors over platform-scale behavioral logs is a compelling but under-explored data systems problem. Production matching pipelines remain dominated by structured numerical features, yet decisive behavioral signals (e.g., a driver's habitual aversion to certain regions) are inherently contextual and naturally expressible as LLM-generated user profiles. However, scaling such profiling to a live, millisecond-latency dispatcher faces three intertwined constraints rarely addressed together: on a platform with millions of daily orders, logs exceed any LLM's context window by orders of magnitude; most users are long-tail, with too few interactions for per-user profiling; and surface-fluent profiles do not necessarily improve downstream prediction utility. We present ProfiLLM, an agentic LLM data pipeline that operationalizes utility-aligned user profiling for production matching systems through two modules. (1) Tool-Augmented Global Knowledge Mining equips an LLM agent with 27 analytical tools to mine platform-scale data, producing reusable global knowledge, adaptive user clustering rules, and region-level supply-demand priors. (2) Utility-Aligned Profile Exploration generates multiple candidate profiles per cluster, evaluates them via a lightweight downstream utility proxy, iteratively refines the best candidates and constructs preference pairs for DPO fine-tuning. Deployed on DiDi's production dispatcher, ProfiLLM achieves up to +6.14% relative AUC improvement in outcome prediction, up to +4.35% GMV gain in dispatching simulation, and consistent improvements in a 14-day online A/B test including +0.47% GMV, +0.33% Completion Rate, and -0.82% Cancel-Before-Accept rate.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProfiLLM，一个面向工业网约车调度的智能体LLM数据流水线，实现效用对齐的用户画像。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业网约车调度中，大规模行为日志的语义特征提取尚未充分探索。现有生产匹配管道依赖结构化数值特征，但关键行为信号（如司机对某些区域的习惯性回避）本质上是上下文相关的，适合用LLM生成用户画像。然而，将画像扩展到毫秒级延迟的实时调度面临三个约束：日志规模远超LLM上下文窗口；多数用户为长尾用户，交互稀疏；表面流畅的画像不一定改善下游预测效用。现有方法未同时解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: ProfiLLM包含两个模块：(1) 工具增强的全局知识挖掘，为LLM智能体配备27种分析工具，挖掘平台级数据，生成可重用的全局知识、自适应用户聚类规则和区域级供需先验。(2) 效用对齐的画像探索，为每个聚类生成多个候选画像，通过轻量级下游效用代理评估，迭代优化最佳候选，并构建偏好对用于DPO微调。该方法在滴滴生产调度器上部署。
light_analysis.result: 在滴滴生产调度器上，ProfiLLM在结果预测上实现最高+6.14%的AUC提升，调度模拟中GMV提升最高+4.35%。14天在线A/B测试中，GMV提升+0.47%，完成率提升+0.33%，接单前取消率降低-0.82%。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProfiLLM通过智能体LLM数据流水线将语义画像成功应用于工业级网约车调度，显著提升预测和调度指标。其方法有效解决大规模日志处理、长尾用户和效用对齐问题。未来可探索更高效的全局知识更新策略和跨领域迁移。

title: Beyond Scalar Scores: Exploring LLM-based Metrics for Clinical Significance Evaluation in Radiology Reports
abstract: Reliable evaluation of generated radiology reports requires strict clinical accuracy, as omitted critical findings or mischaracterized radiographic observations can directly affect patient care. Existing metrics obscure this requirement by reducing report quality to a medically ungrounded scalar. Although Large Language Models (LLMs) possess rich medical knowledge, they likewise struggle to draw a reliable boundary between clinically significant errors and harmless variation. We study this boundary using ReEvalMed benchmark as testbed and evaluate metric-level clinical significance from detecting true clinical errors ("Discrimination") and tolerating insignificant variations ("Robustness"). Across 8 LLM evaluators under one-pass and two-pass settings, we identify a widespread discrimination bias: models effectively detect errors but also over-penalize harmless rephrasings. To mitigate this, we synthesize 4k report pairs and train lightweight interpretable metrics on Qwen3-8B and MedGemma-4B. Our trained metric sharpens the clinical significance boundary, surpassing 32B-scale medical LLMs and remaining competitive with proprietary models. Crucially, the more costly two-pass setting fails to consistently improve overall performance and mainly trades discrimination for robustness. These findings suggest one-pass trained metrics as the practical choice for cost-sensitive deployment, with two-pass inference reserved for settings where D-R balance is critical. We will release the dataset and metric.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于LLM的指标REVAL，通过合成数据训练轻量级可解释模型，提升放射学报告评估的临床显著性边界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有放射学报告评估指标将报告质量简化为无医学依据的标量分数，无法区分临床显著错误与无害变异。尽管大语言模型（LLM）拥有丰富医学知识，但仍难以可靠界定临床显著性边界。该研究旨在解决评估指标中判别偏差问题，即有效检测错误但过度惩罚无害改写，从而提高评估的临床相关性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 以ReEvalMed为测试平台，采用8种LLM评估器（单次与双次设置）研究判别与鲁棒性。识别判别偏差后，合成4000对报告对，基于Qwen3-8B和MedGemma-4B训练轻量级可解释指标。关键创新在于通过数据增强和微调，使模型聚焦临床显著性，同时在单次与双次设置中比较性能。
light_analysis.result: 训练的指标在检测临床错误（判别）和容忍无害变异（鲁棒）方面超越32B规模医学LLM，并与专有模型竞争力相当。双次设置未能一致提升整体性能，主要牺牲判别换取鲁棒性。单次训练指标在成本敏感部署中表现更优，而双次推理仅适用于需精细平衡判别与鲁棒性的场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出一种轻量级可解释评估指标，通过合成数据训练解决了LLM评估中的判别偏差，提升了临床显著性边界。学术上揭示了评估协议（单次vs双次）的效率权衡，实际应用上为放射学报告生成系统提供了实用评估方案。未来可探索更高效的合成数据生成策略或扩展到其他医学文本评估。

title: Fuzzy-Geometric Branch-Point Modeling for Structure-Aware Augmentation of Handwritten Chinese Characters
abstract: Data scarcity and structural distortion significantly limit handwriting recognition in high-security authentication. Existing augmentation methods often cause topological and morphological damage, particularly when processing complex Chinese characters where stroke intersections, ligatures, and sharp turns render traditional branch-point detection unreliable. To address this, this paper proposes a fuzzy geometry-driven structure-aware (FGSA) augmentation framework. We model branch points as fuzzy sets within the skeleton space, constructing a continuous branch-point membership field by integrating topological neighborhood evidence with direction field divergence. This membership field is adaptively optimized via an unsupervised surrogate objective, enabling robust stroke decoupling without manual annotation. Finally, kinematically-aligned samples are synthesized through parameterized cubic Bézier reconstruction and multi-strategy perturbations, ensuring a balance between structural fidelity and sample diversity. Moreover, we establish LZUSig, a large-scale, highly challenging dataset specifically dedicated to fine-grained structural degradation in Chinese handwritten signatures. Extensive experiments on CASIA-HWDB1.1, ChiSig, and LZUSig demonstrate that FGSA significantly reduces the word-level error rate ($Δ$WER), achieving optimal recognition gains over the compared baselines. More importantly, it strikes a robust trade-off among task gain, structural fidelity, and discriminative feature preservation, offering a highly controllable solution for handwriting augmentation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出模糊几何驱动的结构感知（FGSA）增强框架，通过模糊集建模分支点实现鲁棒的笔画解耦与结构保持。
light_analysis.motivation: 手写汉字识别受数据稀缺和结构变形限制，现有增强方法在复杂汉字（如笔画交叉、连笔、急转弯）中易造成拓扑和形态损伤，传统分支点检测不可靠，缺乏结构感知的增强手段。
light_analysis.method: 在骨架空间中将分支点建模为模糊集，融合拓扑邻域证据与方向场散度构建连续隶属度场，通过无监督代理目标优化。利用参数化三次贝塞尔曲线重建和多策略扰动生成运动学对齐样本，并建立专用于细粒度结构退化的LZUSig数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在CASIA-HWDB1.1、ChiSig和LZUSig上，FGSA显著降低词错误率（ΔWER），识别增益优于基线方法，同时实现任务增益、结构保真度和区分性特征保留间的稳健平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出高度可控的手写汉字增强框架，通过模糊几何建模保留笔画拓扑结构，提升识别鲁棒性，适用于高安全性认证，但未明确提及局限性与未来方向。

title: HandwritingAgent: Language-Driven Handwriting Synthesis in Scalable Vector Space
abstract: Teaching machines to emulate natural handwriting styles remains an open challenge, as it requires synthesizing stroke sequences that dynamically vary in shape, texture, pressure and script - not only across individuals, but also within a single person's handwriting. Attempts at this challenge have largely explored deep learning methods in both online and offline settings. However, these approaches are often constrained by style-specific architectural choices, heavy reliance on large datasets, high compute costs, and a lack of flexible control over writing styles through natural language. To this end, we introduce HandwritingAgent, a language-driven agent that can synthesize natural handwriting sequences directly in Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) format with no need for style-specific training. The agent leverages a large reasoning model to geometrically analyse and autoregressively generate target handwritten glyphs as stroke sequences in a discrete grid canvas environment. Generation is conditioned on texts provided in either conversational or non-conversational mode, along with a reference handwriting-style image. Experiments on diverse handwriting tasks spanning imitation, recognition, multi-lingual handwriting synthesis, and generation of complex handwritten maths and science expressions indicate substantial improvement in performance, with HandwritingAgent matching or surpassing state-of-the-art generative handwriting models, while providing a more efficient, controllable, and generalizable synthesis method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语言驱动的手写合成智能体HandwritingAgent，直接在SVG格式中生成手写序列，无需风格特定训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有手写合成方法受限于风格特定的架构选择、依赖大规模数据集、计算成本高，且缺乏通过自然语言灵活控制书写风格的能力。此外，合成自然手写需要动态变化的形状、纹理、压力和字体，不仅跨个体，甚至同一人的笔迹也有变化，这是一个开放挑战。
light_analysis.method: HandwritingAgent利用大型推理模型在离散网格画布环境中几何分析并自回归生成目标手写字形作为笔画序列。生成条件分为对话或非对话模式，并参考手写风格图像。无需风格特定训练，直接输出SVG格式，支持多种书写任务。
light_analysis.result: 在手写模仿、识别、多语言合成以及复杂数学和科学表达式生成等任务上，HandwritingAgent匹配或超越当前最先进的生成式手写模型，同时在效率、可控性和泛化性上显著提升。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: HandwritingAgent提供了一种更高效、可控且通用的手写合成方法，具有学术价值和应用潜力。其局限性可能包括对大型推理模型的依赖和某些极端情况的泛化能力。未来可探索更细粒度的风格控制或扩展到其他图形生成任务。

title: Learned Radius Estimation for UDF-Based Point Cloud Reconstruction
abstract: Surface reconstruction from point clouds is important for consumer-grade 3D capture, including AR/VR and indoor scanning. Local-patch Unsigned Distance Field (UDF) methods are lightweight and generalizable, but their accuracy depends on the support radius, traditionally fixed or selected by a one-dimensional curvature heuristic that cannot capture heterogeneous local geometry. We propose a learned per-query radius selector that predicts a continuous support radius and plugs into a frozen LoSF-UDF backbone. The selector is trained using off-grid target radii obtained by parabolic interpolation of cached UDF error curves. Experiments show improved fine-scale reconstruction accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种学习式半径选择器，用于提升基于UDF的点云重建精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统点云曲面重建中，局部补丁UDF方法的支持半径通常固定或基于一维曲率启发式选择，无法有效捕捉异构局部几何结构，导致重建精度受限。本文旨在解决半径选择的适应性问题，以提高细尺度重建的准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种学习式每查询半径选择器，预测连续支持半径，并嵌入冻结的LoSF-UDF主干网络。训练时通过抛物线插值缓存UDF误差曲线获取离网格目标半径，使选择器学会根据局部几何调整半径。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在细尺度重建精度上优于传统固定半径和曲率启发式半径选择，具体性能提升通过重建误差指标衡量（摘要未明确数据，但提及改进）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一种可学习的半径估计方法，有效提升UDF点云重建的细尺度精度，具有通用性。未来可探索更高效的目标半径获取方式或与主干联合训练。

title: R2D-RL: A RoboCup 2D Soccer Environment for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Robot soccer is a challenging testbed for multi-agent reinforcement learning because it combines partial observability, cooperative and adversarial interaction, sparse rewards, and long-horizon tactical behavior. RoboCup 2D Soccer Simulation (RCSS2D) provides a mature robot-soccer platform, but its competition-oriented server-client architecture is difficult to use directly with modern Python-based MARL workflows. We introduce R2D-RL, a reinforcement learning environment that connects RCSS2D and HELIOS-based player clients to a Python MARL interface through shared-memory communication and cycle-level synchronization. R2D-RL supports full-field and scenario-based training with configurable opponents, Base discrete and Hybrid parameterized action spaces, action masks, expected possession value (EPV)-based reward shaping, and parallel execution. We provide front-goal scenarios and an 11-vs-11 full-field benchmark, together with baseline results.

light_analysis.overview: R2D-RL将RoboCup 2D仿真足球环境与Python MARL接口连接，支持全场景训练和基准测试。
light_analysis.motivation: RoboCup 2D足球仿真（RCSS2D）是多智能体强化学习（MARL）的理想测试平台，但其面向竞赛的服务器-客户端架构难以直接与现代Python MARL工作流集成。现有方法多基于专用接口或简化环境，缺乏对部分可观性、协作与对抗交互、稀疏奖励及长周期战术行为的综合支持。因此，需要一种高效、易用的接口将成熟的RCSS2D平台与MARL算法连接，以促进研究。
light_analysis.method: R2D-RL通过共享内存通信和周期级同步连接RCSS2D和基于HELIOS的玩家客户端与Python MARL接口。它支持全场和基于场景的训练，包含可配置对手、离散和混合参数化动作空间、动作掩码、基于期望占有值（EPV）的奖励塑造以及并行执行。提供了前场场景和11-vs-11全场基准测试，以及基线结果。
light_analysis.result: 论文提供了前场场景和11-vs-11全场基准测试的基线结果，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如胜率、进球数等）。基线结果可用于评估MARL算法在复杂足球环境中的表现，并与现有方法对比。实际实验结果可能包括训练收敛速度、策略质量等，但摘要中未详述。
light_analysis.conclusion: R2D-RL为RoboCup 2D足球仿真提供了一个标准化的Python MARL环境，降低了使用门槛，支持多种训练模式和奖励设计。该环境有助于推动多智能体强化学习在复杂部分可观测任务中的研究，尤其在战术决策和长期规划方面。未来工作可能包括更丰富的场景库、与真实机器人系统的结合等，但摘要未明确提及。

title: Bayesian Anytime Pareto Set Identification for Multi-Objective Multi-Armed Bandits
abstract: Identifying Pareto optimal solutions is critical to support multi-objective decision-making. We introduce the first anytime Multi-Objective Multi-Armed Bandit algorithm for the Pareto Set Identification problem, taking a Bayesian approach: Top-Two Pareto Front Thompson Sampling (TTPFTS). We benchmark TTPFTS against state-of-the-art fixed-budget Pareto Set Identification algorithms on synthetic environments. Next, we demonstrate its practical utility in a challenging multi-objective molecular discovery setting by efficiently exploring an ultra-large synthesis-on-demand molecular library. Furthermore, we introduce a novel uncertainty quantification metric that estimates our algorithm's confidence in the predicted Pareto set. We demonstrate that this metric effectively proxies true performance, yielding a robust methodology for monitoring learning progress in complex settings. Finally, we complement these empirical findings with a theoretical proof of the algorithm's asymptotic correctness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于贝叶斯的任意时间多目标多臂赌博机算法TTPFTS，用于Pareto集识别，并理论证明渐近正确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多目标决策中，识别Pareto最优解至关重要。现有方法多为固定预算设置，缺乏任意时间算法，且难以在复杂场景下监控学习进度。本文旨在填补这一空白，提出首个任意时间算法，并引入不确定性量化指标以估计算法置信度。
light_analysis.method: 提出Top-Two Pareto Front Thompson Sampling (TTPFTS)算法，采用贝叶斯框架，结合Thompson采样和top-two采样策略。在合成环境和超大规模合成按需分子库中进行实验，同时引入不确定性量化指标来监测学习进展。
light_analysis.result: 在合成环境上，TTPFTS优于现有固定预算Pareto集识别算法。在分子发现任务中，高效探索了超大规模分子库，展现实际效用。不确定性量化指标有效代理真实性能，提供鲁棒的进展监控。理论证明了算法的渐近正确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了首个任意时间多目标Pareto集识别算法，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。不确定性量化工具为复杂环境提供监控手段。未来可扩展至更多多目标优化问题，如超参数调优等。

title: SCR-Guided Difficulty-Aware Optimization for Infrared Small Target Detection
abstract: Infrared small target detection remains challenging due to severe background clutter, low contrast, and weak spatial responses where geometric overlap alone is insufficient to characterize detection quality. In this work, we propose REEM (Reweighted Explicit-visibility Enhanced Modulation), a lightweight SCR-guided difficulty-aware optimization framework that incorporates Signal-to-Clutter Ratio (SCR) as a physically meaningful visibility prior during training. Instead of modifying the network architecture or directly optimizing SCR, REEM computes a ground-truth local SCR from the input image and applies a differentiable modulation to the soft-IoU learning signal, emphasizing low-visibility targets while preserving stable optimization and identical inference behavior. REEM is integrated into a U-Net-based MSHNet without introducing additional parameters, architectural modifications, or inference-time overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over the baseline, achieving higher IoU and detection probability (Pd) together with substantially reduced false alarms (FA), particularly under challenging low-visibility conditions. These results suggest that SCR-guided difficulty-aware optimization provides an effective and physically grounded complement to conventional overlap-based objectives for infrared small target detection. The code is available at https://github. com/yall-in-one/Reemm.
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 Workshops (PBVS). Published version: https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/CVPR2026W/PBVS/html/Sevim_SCR-Guided_Difficulty-Aware_Optimization_for_Infrared_Small_Target_Detection_CVPRW_2026_paper.html

light_analysis.overview: 提出REEM框架，利用信杂比作为物理意义先验，通过可微调制软IoU损失来优化红外小目标检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 红外小目标检测因背景杂波、低对比度和弱空间响应而困难，几何重叠度量不足以表征检测质量。现有方法多关注网络架构或直接优化SCR，但可能引入额外复杂度或训练不稳定。需要一种轻量级、物理可解释的训练策略，在不改变推理行为的前提下提升低可见性目标的检测性能。
light_analysis.method: REEM框架基于U-Net架构的MSHNet，无需额外参数或架构修改。它从输入图像计算真实局部SCR，并将其作为可见性先验，通过可微方式对软IoU学习信号进行重加权调制，强调低可见性目标。训练时调制损失，推理时保持不变，实现难度感知优化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，REEM相比基线MSHNet持续提升IoU和检测概率(Pd)，并显著降低虚警(FA)，尤其在低可见性条件下改进明显。实验表明SCR引导的优化有效且物理可解释，优于传统交并比目标。
light_analysis.conclusion: REEM提供了一种基于物理先验的难度感知优化框架，有效增强了红外小目标检测的鲁棒性。其轻量级、无推理开销的特点便于集成，为小目标检测提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的可见性度量或推广至其他检测任务。

title: RedactionBench
abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly applied to sensitive domains that require redaction of personally identifiable information (PII). While redacting PII is a data cleaning prerequisite, existing benchmarks conflate extraction mechanics with privacy semantics. A public phone number is not equivalent to a phone number in a medical record. Whether information constitutes a violation depends heavily on who holds it, why, and in what context, fundamentally differentiating redaction from simple entity recognition. Grounded in contextual integrity, we introduce RedactionBench, a manually annotated benchmark comprising 200 diverse documents across 11 domains, mostly seeded from real-world sources. We also introduce R-Score, a novel character-level metric that treats semantically similar redactions equally and nullifies shallow formatting choices, such as varying masking styles for phone numbers. Evaluations across Named Entity Recognition models, entity extraction Small Language Models, and frontier models equipped with agentic tools demonstrate that contextual redaction remains an unsolved problem. A human evaluation with over 80 users on RedactionBench reveals a stark dichotomy in privacy perceptions. Annotators show consensus with target labels for mandatory redactions (89.4 percent) and safe text preservations (94.1 percent), but fail to agree on contextual redactions (47.7 percent). This variance demonstrates the subjective nature of contextual privacy and motivates R-Score, which decouples contextual ambiguity from strict precision. We compare 35 models across families and report their performance in redacting PII. Finally, we release RedactionBench to establish a baseline for future privacy-preserving systems, hoping to inspire efficient model design and standardized evaluations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于上下文完整性的去标识化基准RedactionBench及新评估指标R-Score，揭示上下文隐私去标识化仍是未解问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准混淆了提取机制与隐私语义，未区分公开信息与敏感上下文中的个人信息。去标识化依赖于信息持有者、目的和情境，而不仅仅是实体识别。因此需要一个新的基准来评估模型在上下文隐私中的表现。
light_analysis.method: 构建RedactionBench，包含200篇11个领域的手动标注文档，多数源自真实世界。提出R-Score字符级度量，将语义相似的涂改视为等同，忽略掩码格式差异。评估了NER模型、小型实体提取模型及带工具的前沿模型。
light_analysis.result: 人类评估（80+用户）显示，强制涂改共识89.4%，安全文本保留94.1%，但上下文涂改共识仅47.7%。35个模型对比表明上下文去标识化仍具挑战。R-Score有效解耦了上下文歧义与严格精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: RedactionBench为隐私保护系统提供标准化评估基线。上下文隐私的主观性要求新度量如R-Score。未来可启发高效模型设计与更一致的评估方法。

title: Lost in a Single Vector: Improving Long-Document Retrieval with Chunk Evidence Aggregation
abstract: Dense retrieval ranks one query vector against one document vector. On long documents, this interface can fail when a short but decisive span is weakened during document encoding before ranking. We study this failure mode as document-side early compression and introduce the Evidence Dilution Index (EDI) to measure how far a document-level representation falls below the strongest chunk-level evidence within the same gold document.
