Guided by this view, we propose DICE (Document Inference via Chunk Evidence), a training-free document-side strategy that splits documents into chunks, encodes them independently with a frozen model, and aggregates them back into a single vector while preserving the standard one-query-one-document interface. On LongEmbed, DICE improves retrieval across four backbones, with the largest gains on slices beyond 4k tokens: for Dream, Passkey >4k rises from 30.0 to 90.0 and Needle >4k from 23.3 to 74.0. Across 12,779 filtered samples, DICE yields lower EDI than the single-vector baseline in 92.8% of cases. These results establish document-level encoding as a practical and underexplored lever for long-document retrieval.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的DICE方法，通过分块编码和证据聚合改善长文档检索，解决单向量表示的信息稀释问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 密集检索使用单查询向量与单文档向量匹配，在长文档中，关键短片段在编码过程中被稀释，导致检索失败。现有方法未充分关注文档侧编码的改进，缺乏衡量证据稀释程度的指标。本文旨在解决文档级早期压缩导致的证据稀释问题，提升长文档检索性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出DICE（Document Inference via Chunk Evidence）策略，将长文档分割为块，使用冻结模型独立编码，然后通过聚合将块证据合并为单个向量，保持标准的一对一接口。无需训练，兼容现有骨干模型。引入证据稀释指数（EDI）度量文档表示与块级证据的差距。
light_analysis.result: 在LongEmbed数据集上，DICE在四个骨干模型上均提升检索效果，尤其在超过4k token的切片上：Dream任务Passkey>4k从30.0升至90.0，Needle>4k从23.3升至74.0。在12,779个样本中，92.8%的案例EDI低于单向量基线，证明了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DICE通过分块证据聚合显著增强了长文档检索，无需训练即可提升性能，揭示了文档级编码作为长文档检索尚未充分利用的杠杆。未来可探索更优的聚合策略或与其他技术结合，潜在局限包括对分块大小的敏感性。

title: SAMA: Semantic Anchor-aligned Augmentation for Unified Low-Resource Multimodal Information Extraction
abstract: Multimodal Information Extraction (MIE)-covering tasks such as Multimodal Named Entity Recognition (MNER), Relation Extraction (MRE), and Event Extraction (MEE)-is essential for understanding multimedia content but remains constrained by severe data scarcity. Although data augmentation is a promising remedy, existing approaches are impeded by coarse cross-modal alignment and fragmented, task-specific designs that fail to exploit shared semantic knowledge. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Semantic Anchor-aligned Multimodal Augmentation (SAMA), a unified framework for generating high-fidelity, task-aware synthetic data. SAMA constructs structured semantic anchors from ground-truth labels to guide a Collaborative Multi-Experts Multimodal Large Language Model (CME-MLLM), which integrates a Universal Adapter for shared semantics with Task-Specific Adapters to produce diverse yet constraint-compliant textual samples. For image synthesis, SAMA employs an Anchor-Preserving Diffusion mechanism that uses anchor-weighted prompts and latent conditioning to maintain critical semantic anchors while diversifying visual contexts. To eliminate the need for manual verification, SAMA further introduces a Dual-Constraint Filtering module that selects synthetic samples based on both cross-modal consistency and anchor fidelity. Extensive experiments across benchmark datasets for MNER, MRE, and MEE demonstrate that SAMA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art augmentation baselines under both fully supervised and low-resource settings, underscoring its versatility, robustness, and effectiveness.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一低资源多模态信息抽取的数据增强框架SAMA，通过语义锚点对齐生成高保真合成数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态信息抽取（MIE）任务面临严重的数据稀缺问题。现有数据增强方法受限于粗粒度的跨模态对齐和碎片化的任务特定设计，未能充分利用共享语义知识，导致生成样本质量低且泛化能力差，亟需统一的增强框架。
light_analysis.method: SAMA框架由三部分组成：语义锚点构造（从真实标签提取结构化锚点）、协作多专家多模态大模型（CME-MLLM，含通用适配器和任务特定适配器）生成文本样本、锚点保持扩散机制（使用锚点加权提示和潜在条件）生成图像样本。最后通过双约束过滤模块选择跨模态一致且锚点保真的合成样本。
light_analysis.result: 在MNER、MRE和MEE任务的基准数据集上，SAMA在完全监督和低资源设置下均一致优于最先进的增强基线方法，表现出强泛化性和鲁棒性。具体性能提升数值在摘要中未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAMA为低资源多模态信息抽取提供了统一、高效的数据增强方案，显著提升模型性能。其模块化设计便于扩展至其他多模态任务。未来可探索更复杂的锚点结构或适应更多模态。

title: Online Distributional Prediction via Latent Cluster Geometry Under Drift and Corruption
abstract: Online learning in non-stationary streams is often formulated as tracking a point estimate, but many applications require predicting the full data-generating distribution. We study online distributional prediction under drift and adversarial corruption. Our approach represents each candidate law through a latent cluster geometry: a variable-size configuration of centers that organizes probability mass and induces a predictive distribution. A Gibbs quasi-posterior over these configurations yields an online predictor by posterior averaging, and the resulting variable-dimensional posterior can be sampled with reversible-jump MCMC. The method therefore avoids specifying a parametric streaming law while retaining a structured latent space for uncertainty, regularization, and comparison.   We evaluate performance by cumulative Wasserstein-1 regret against the time-varying true law. The analysis separates two effects: corruption perturbs the loss-based posterior update, whereas drift makes long-horizon posterior memory stale. We address the latter with a restarted variant that temporally localizes the same quasi-Bayesian update. The resulting high-probability bounds decompose into a PAC-Bayesian complexity term, a corruption-sensitive posterior perturbation term, and a dynamic optimal-transport term driven by \(A_T^{\mathrm{OT}}=\sum_{t=2}^T W_2^2(p_{t-1}^*,p_t^*)\). Under bounded support, stable latent geometry, predictive-map regularity, oracle realizability, localized restart windows, sublinear transport action, and sublinear corruption budget, the restarted predictor achieves sublinear cumulative Wasserstein regret. These guarantees require no parametric model for the stream, drift mechanism, or corruption process.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于潜聚类几何的在线分布预测方法，无需参数模型即可应对漂移和腐败。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线学习常被表述为跟踪点估计，但许多应用需要预测完整的数据生成分布。现有方法在非平稳流中预测分布时，难以同时处理漂移和对抗性腐败，且通常依赖参数化模型。论文旨在开发一种无需参数模型、能够处理漂移和腐败的在线分布预测方法，利用潜聚类几何结构组织概率质量，并通过后验平均实现预测。
light_analysis.method: 方法将每个候选分布表示为潜聚类几何——一组可变大小的中心配置，组织概率质量并产生预测分布。通过Gibbs拟后验对这些配置进行后验平均，得到在线预测器，并使用可逆跳跃MCMC采样变维后验。针对漂移，提出重启变体，在时间上局部化拟贝叶斯更新。分析将腐败和漂移效应分离，分别处理后验更新扰动和后验记忆过时问题。
light_analysis.result: 以累积Wasserstein-1遗憾评估性能，并与随时间变化的真实分布比较。在有限支撑、稳定潜几何、预测映射正则性、预言可实现性、局部重启窗口、亚线性传输作用和亚线性腐败预算条件下，重启预测器实现亚线性累积Wasserstein遗憾。这些保证无需对流、漂移机制或腐败过程进行参数化建模。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一个通用的在线分布预测框架，通过潜聚类几何和拟贝叶斯方法处理非平稳流中的漂移和腐败，理论保证亚线性遗憾。该方法不依赖参数模型，具有广泛的适用性。未来可探索更高效的采样算法或扩展至高维分布。

title: RouteJudge: An Open Platform for Reproducible and Preference-Aware LLM Routing
abstract: We present RouteJudge, an online pairwise preference evaluation framework for LLM routing systems, with a public platform available at https://routejudge.cn. Different from model-level response evaluation, RouteJudge focuses on router-level decision quality. For each user query, multiple routing strategies independently recommend candidate models under the same model pool and budget constraints. The selected model responses are then presented to users through anonymous pairwise comparisons, and the resulting user preferences are attributed back to the routing strategies behind the compared responses. Each evaluation record stores the query, routing decisions, model responses, preference labels, cost, latency, and task metadata, enabling preference-aware, cost-aware, and task-conditioned analysis of LLM routers. To support the continuous expansion of routing methods in RouteJudge, we further release ORBIT (Optimal Routing and Budgeted Inference Toolbox), a modular and extensible toolbox that standardizes the end-to-end workflow of LLM routing. ORBIT provides unified interfaces for benchmark loading, query representation, router implementation, budget-aware evaluation, and method comparison, allowing researchers to develop and evaluate routing algorithms under consistent protocols. It also serves as the submission and integration layer for RouteJudge: researchers can implement routing methods within ORBIT, validate them on existing routing benchmarks, and submit compatible routers for online preference-based evaluation. The code of ORBIT is available at https://github.com/AIGNLAI/LAMDA-ORBIT.
comment: Accepted by Pluralistic Alignment Workshop at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出RouteJudge平台和ORBIT工具箱，实现可重复、偏好感知的LLM路由评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM路由评估多关注模型响应质量，缺乏对路由器决策质量的偏好感知和成本感知分析。该研究旨在构建标准化平台，支持路由器决策的可重复评估、偏好归因及成本-延迟分析，促进路由方法公平比较。
light_analysis.method: RouteJudge采用在线成对偏好评估框架，多个路由策略在相同模型池和预算约束下推荐模型，通过匿名比较收集用户偏好并归因于路由策略。ORBIT提供模块化工具箱，统一基准加载、查询表示、路由器实现、预算评估和方法比较接口，支持端到端工作流标准化。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。平台支持存储查询、路由决策、模型响应、偏好标签、成本、延迟和任务元数据，实现偏好感知、成本感知和任务条件的路由器分析。代码开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: RouteJudge和ORBIT为LLM路由研究提供了可重复、偏好感知的评估平台和标准化工具箱，支持算法开发、验证和在线比较，促进路由领域的可复制性和公平竞争。潜在局限为依赖在线用户偏好收集。

title: Private Learning with Public Feature Conditioning
abstract: We study differentially private (DP) regression in settings where each data sample includes public, non-sensitive features -- common in applications such as recommendation and advertising systems. While such label-DP or semi-sensitive-feature settings have been primarily explored in the context of classification, effective approaches for regression remain underexplored. We introduce Cond-DP, a conditioned variant of DPSGD that leverages the structure of public feature matrices to improve optimization under privacy constraints. Motivated by the observation that these public features often exhibit rapidly decaying spectra, Cond-DP incorporates a data-driven conditioning matrix to reshape the optimization landscape and accelerate convergence. We provide convergence guarantees for convex, strongly convex, and non-convex settings, and recover standard DPSGD as a special case when the conditioning matrix is the identity. We show how to construct an effective conditioning matrix for Cond-DP directly from public features, enabling provably faster convergence than DPSGD in private linear regression without incurring additional privacy cost. Empirically, Cond-DP with this conditioning matrix consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across a wide range of datasets and model architectures under label DP, demonstrating strong and robust performance in practice.
comment: Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). 26 pages, 9 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出Cond-DP，利用公共特征结构加速差分隐私回归，无需额外隐私成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 在推荐和广告系统中，数据样本常包含公开的非敏感特征，但现有的标签差分隐私或半敏感特征设置主要针对分类任务，回归问题缺乏有效方法。传统DPSGD在处理这类数据时收敛缓慢，未能充分利用公共特征矩阵的结构信息。因此，需要一种能利用公共特征谱结构、在隐私约束下加速优化的新方法。
light_analysis.method: Cond-DP是一种条件化DPSGD变体，通过从公共特征矩阵构建数据驱动的条件矩阵来重塑优化景观，加速收敛。该方法在凸、强凸和非凸设置下均提供收敛保证，且当条件矩阵为单位矩阵时退化为标准DPSGD。条件矩阵直接由公共特征构造，无需额外隐私成本。
light_analysis.result: 在标签差分隐私设置下，Cond-DP在多个数据集和模型架构上 consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines，包括线性回归和深度学习模型。实验表明，利用公共特征谱衰减特性，Cond-DP的收敛速度比DPSGD更快，且性能提升显著且稳健。
light_analysis.conclusion: Cond-DP有效解决了公共特征场景下的差分隐私回归问题，通过公共特征条件化实现了更快的收敛和更好的性能，无需增加隐私预算。该方法具有广泛的学术和实际应用价值，尤其适用于推荐、广告等涉及公共特征的隐私敏感系统。未来可探索更复杂的条件矩阵构造策略。

title: Output Vector Editing for Memorization Mitigation in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models memorize and reproduce sequences from their training data, creating privacy, copyright, and security risks. Existing neuron-level mitigation methods equate editing with zeroing out neuron activations, but the activation only controls whether a neuron engages; the output vector is what writes to the residual stream and, through superposition, encodes multiple features. We propose output vector editing, a constrained-optimization weight edit that locates a small set of MLP neurons responsible for a memorized continuation and minimally modifies their output vectors to introduce a distractor in vocabulary space, redirecting their residual-stream contributions while leaving activations unchanged. Evaluating on four models from 360M to 7B parameters (SmolLM-360M, OLMo-1B, OLMo-7B, Llama2-7B), we center on OLMo-7B (whose open weights and pretraining corpus enable systematic mining) and mine 6831 memorized sequences, achieving up to 87.9% suppression. The 2.7$\times$ gap over zero ablation on the same located neurons shows the suppression comes from the output-vector edit, not localization alone. Four edit modes span a spectrum from aggressive suppression to minimal redirection; in ensemble they cover 96.5% of memorized sequences, while our recommended single-mode configuration reaches 81.5% with no catastrophic locality failures. We further identify a mechanistic boundary at ${\sim}14%$ of sequences unreachable by MLP-only editing; while these failures are not attention-driven overall, ablating the top contributing attention heads recovers 60--64% of them, with stronger recovery on continuations that copy tokens from the prefix, positioning attention as a complementary fallback rather than a primary mechanism. Edit mode ordering and the success-locality trade-off transfer across all four models, with success rates scaling with model size rather than family.

light_analysis.overview: 提出输出向量编辑方法，通过最小化修改MLP神经元输出向量来抑制大语言模型记忆训练数据，实现隐私保护。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型会记忆并再现训练数据中的序列，引发隐私、版权和安全风险。现有的神经层方法将编辑等同于置零神经元激活，但激活仅控制神经元是否参与，而输出向量写入残差流并通过叠加编码多个特征。因此需要更精细的方法直接修改输出向量，而非简单地消除激活。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出输出向量编辑，一种受约束优化的权重编辑方法。首先定位负责记忆延续的一小部分MLP神经元，然后最小化修改其输出向量，在词汇空间中引入干扰项，重定向其残差流贡献，同时保持激活不变。在四个模型（360M至7B参数）上评估，重点使用OLMo-7B（因其开放权重和预训练语料可系统挖掘），挖掘了6831个记忆序列。
light_analysis.result: 该方法实现了高达87.9%的抑制率，与相同定位神经元上的零消融相比，性能差距达2.7倍，证明抑制来自输出向量编辑而非定位本身。四种编辑模式组合覆盖96.5%的记忆序列，推荐的单模式配置达到81.5%且无灾难性局部失败。约14%的序列无法通过仅MLP编辑达到，但消融顶部注意力头可恢复60-64%，表明注意力作为互补机制。成功率随模型大小缩放。
light_analysis.conclusion: 输出向量编辑是一种有效且可迁移的缓解大语言模型记忆问题的方法，通过修改MLP神经元输出向量而非激活来抑制记忆，同时保持模型性能。该方法在多个模型上验证了成功率和局部性权衡，并识别了MLP-only编辑的机械边界，注意力可作为补充机制。未来可进一步探索注意力编辑或多层联合编辑。

title: SpectralDiT: Timestep-Conditioned Spectral Residual Correction for Flow-Matching DiTs
abstract: We propose SpectralDiT, a lightweight modification to flow-matching Diffusion Transformers that adds timestep-conditioned spectral correction to the MLP residual branch. The module decomposes each residual update into low- and high-frequency components on the patch-token grid, then learns a zero-initialized additive gate so the model initially matches the baseline DiT. On CIFAR-10 pixel-space generation, SpectralDiT improves FID from 20.78 to 19.71 at patch size 1 and reduces the radial Fourier spectrum gap. Furthermore, we scale our method to latent diffusion on ImageNet-100. With 0.6% additional theoretical FLOPs and 1.36% additional parameters, SpectralDiT improves latent flow-matching, achieving an 8.7% relative FID reduction under classifier-free guidance (CFG 2.0). All reported results are averaged over five seeds. Ablations and gate visualizations on CIFAR-10 reveal stable block-specific spectral correction patterns.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpectralDiT，通过时间步条件的光谱残差校正模块，轻量改进流匹配扩散Transformer，提升生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的扩散Transformer（DiT）在生成图像时，残差更新缺乏对频率分量的显式处理，导致高频细节和低频结构生成不均衡。光谱偏差问题限制了生成质量，尤其是FID指标和频谱分布。本文旨在通过引入时间步条件的光谱残差校正，使模型能够自适应调整不同频率成分的更新幅度，以更有效地学习图像生成过程。
light_analysis.method: SpectralDiT在DiT的MLP残差分支中添加时间步条件的光谱校正模块。该模块将每个残差更新在patch-token网格上分解为低频和高频分量，然后学习一个零初始化的加法门控，使模型初始匹配基线DiT。在CIFAR-10上使用像素空间生成，在ImageNet-100上使用潜在扩散。仅增加0.6%的理论FLOPs和1.36%的参数。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10上，SpectralDiT在patch size为1时将FID从20.78降至19.71，并减小了径向傅里叶光谱差距。在ImageNet-100潜在扩散中，分类器自由引导（CFG 2.0）下实现8.7%的相对FID降低。所有结果基于五个随机种子平均。消融实验和门控可视化揭示了稳定的块特定光谱校正模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpectralDiT以极小计算开销显著提升了流匹配DiT的生成质量，特别是在FID和频谱分布方面。该工作展示了在扩散模型中显式处理频率分量的有效性，为提升生成模型性能提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的频率分解策略或将其应用于其他生成任务。局限性可能包括对超参数敏感及需要进一步验证大规模数据集。

title: SMART: A Flexible, Interpretable, and Scalable Spatio-temporal Brain Atlas from High-Resolution Imaging Data
abstract: We introduce SMART, a framework for learning a flexible, interpretable, and scalable spatio-temporal brain atlas from longitudinal high-resolution 3D medical images. Existing approaches to spatio-temporal atlas construction rely on black-box generative models that lack flexibility, limit interpretability, and struggle to scale to high-dimensional data. SMART addresses these challenges by learning a continuous disease-time atlas that decouples global group-wise disease dynamics from their patient-specific anatomical manifestation. Guided by anatomically inspired priors, SMART models interpretable global trajectories of regional progression along a shared disease timeline through region-specific differential equations. Global trajectories are further personalized to individual anatomies via dense diffeomorphic displacements parameterized by a flexible and scalable multi-scale Neural Cellular Automata. Evaluated on five longitudinal MRI datasets in Alzheimer's disease (ADNI-1/GO/2, OASIS-3, AIBL; > 1,300 subjects), SMART produces anatomically meaningful predictions of disease progression and achieves state-of-the-art forecasting accuracy and improved temporal consistency over adversarial and diffusion baselines. Our approach establishes a new paradigm for flexible, interpretable, and scalable modeling of spatio-temporal change in high-dimensional medical image time-series.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SMART框架，用于学习灵活、可解释、可扩展的时空脑图谱，解决现有方法灵活性差、可解释性不足和扩展性有限的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时空图谱构建方法依赖黑盒生成模型，缺乏灵活性，限制可解释性，且难以扩展到高维数据。该研究旨在通过解耦全局群体疾病动态与患者特异性解剖表现，实现连续疾病时间图谱学习，从而克服上述局限性。
light_analysis.method: SMART学习连续疾病时间图谱，通过区域特异性微分方程建模可解释的全局进展轨迹，并利用多尺度神经细胞自动机参数化的密集微分同胚位移对个体解剖进行个性化。该方法结合解剖启发先验，实现灵活、可扩展的建模。
light_analysis.result: 在五个阿尔茨海默病纵向MRI数据集（ADNI-1/GO/2、OASIS-3、AIBL，>1300名受试者）上，SMART产生解剖有意义的疾病进展预测，达到最先进预测准确率，并在时间一致性上优于对抗和扩散基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为高维医学图像时间序列的时空变化建模建立了新范式，兼顾灵活性、可解释性和可扩展性，有望推动疾病进展分析和个体化预测。未来可探索更细粒度的区域建模或应用于其他神经退行性疾病。

title: Toward Training-Free Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection in 3D Medical Images: A Batch-Based Approach Using 2D Foundation Models
abstract: Zero-shot anomaly detection (ZSAD) is attractive for medical imaging because clinical systems must handle heterogeneous acquisition protocols, changing patient populations, and pathologies for which annotated training data may be unavailable. Most existing zero-shot anomaly detection methods are designed for 2D images, and their direct extension to 3D medical volumes is limited by the scarcity of large-scale volumetric foundation models or by the difficulty of utilizing volumetric context. We propose CS3F, a training-free batch-based framework for ZSAD in 3D medical images using 2D foundation models. Each volume is decomposed along multiple anatomical axes and encoded slice-wise by a 2D vision transformer. These are then converted into localized volumetric tokens by pooling neighboring slice features. Anomaly scores are obtained from cross-subject mutual similarity: tokens that lack close analogues in other subjects are assigned higher anomaly scores. To reduce the attenuation of focal lesion signals caused by depth pooling, we introduce a coarse-to-fine tokenization strategy that enables fine-resolution volumetric scoring without exhaustive matching. CS3F is evaluated on brain MRI across metastases, glioma, and stroke, as well as validated on lung CT to test generalizability beyond atlas-aligned brain MRI. The results show that frozen 2D foundation models can support anomaly localization in 3D medical images, and that the benefit of fine tokenization depends strongly on lesion contrast and imaging modality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CS3F，一种无需训练的批量框架，利用2D基础模型实现3D医学图像零样本异常检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 零样本异常检测在医学成像中需求迫切，因临床系统需处理异构采集协议、变化人群及无标注病理。现有2D方法直接扩展到3D体积受限于大规模体积基础模型匮乏或体积上下文利用困难，因此需要一种无需训练、利用2D基础模型处理3D图像的方法。
light_analysis.method: CS3F将每个体积沿多个解剖轴分解，逐切片经2D视觉Transformer编码为局部体积令牌（池化相邻切片特征）。通过跨主体互相似度获得异常分数：缺乏相似令牌的区域得分更高。为缓解深度池化导致的病灶信号衰减，引入粗到细标记化策略，实现细分辨率评分而不需穷举匹配。
light_analysis.result: 在脑MRI（转移瘤、胶质瘤、中风）及肺CT上评估。结果显示冻结的2D基础模型可支持3D医学图像异常定位，且细标记化的收益取决于病灶对比度和成像模态。摘要未给出具体数值指标，但验证了跨数据集的泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CS3F证明了无需训练的2D基础模型在3D医学图像零样本异常检测中的可行性，通过跨主体相似度和粗到细标记化解决了体积上下文利用问题。未来工作可探索更高效的标记化策略及更多模态的验证，但当前结果已展示临床适用潜力。

title: What Must Generalist Agents Remember?
abstract: This paper develops a formal account of what generalist agents must store in memory in order to act near-optimally across multiple environments and goals. It shows that when two domains share an observational bottleneck but require incompatible optimal actions, any uniformly near-optimal policy must induce distinct memory distributions at that bottleneck. The result yields a separation theorem: sufficiently successful agents cannot rely only on current state observations, but must preserve domain-relevant information in memory. The paper further shows that if an agent's memory contains enough information to estimate values for related goals, then that memory can be used to approximately reconstruct the agent's local transition dynamics. Together, these results characterize memory as the substrate that supports domain disambiguation, transition-model reconstruction, and planning for generalist agents.

light_analysis.overview: 论文形式化证明了通用型智能体必须使用记忆来区分不同领域并重建转移动态，以实现跨环境近似最优行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究解决通用型智能体如何在多个环境和目标下实现近似最优行为的问题。现有方法常假设智能体仅依赖当前观察决策，但不同领域可能共享观察却需不同行动，导致混淆。缺乏对记忆必要性的理论分析限制了通用智能体的设计。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用形式化分析方法，定义观察瓶颈概念，并通过数学推导证明：若两个领域共享观察瓶颈但最优行动不兼容，则任何近似最优策略必须在瓶颈处产生不同记忆分布。进一步证明，若记忆包含足够信息以估计相关目标的值，则可近似重建局部转移动态。方法基于强化学习和信息论，通过定理和证明提供理论支撑。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果为分离定理和记忆重建定理。分离定理表明智能体不能仅依赖当前观察，必须使用记忆保持领域相关信息；记忆重建定理表明记忆可用于近似重建转移动态。这些结果量化了记忆的必要性和用途，但未提供具体数值指标，与传统无记忆策略形成对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为通用型智能体的记忆需求提供了形式化理论基础，阐明了记忆在领域消歧、转移模型重建和规划中的关键作用。学术价值在于揭示了记忆的必要性和充分条件，对设计通用人工智能系统具有指导意义。局限性在于理论依赖于特定假设，未来可扩展到复杂场景和实验验证。

title: Low-Cost Neuromorphic Fall Detection Using Synthetic Event Data and Hybrid SNNs
abstract: This work presents the development of hybrid models that integrate spiking neural networks (SNNs) with components of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to learn from simulated event-based camera data (Dynamic Vision Sensor, DVS) generated from conventional smartphone videos. Aimed primarily at human fall detection, the approach leverages the energy efficiency and spatio-temporal processing capabilities of SNNs by converting video frames into event-based data. The proposed models are evaluated through simulations on multiple datasets, comparing their performance to that of traditional machine learning models. Results demonstrate significant gains in efficiency without sacrificing accuracy, underscoring the potential of combining SNNs and DVS technology for complex tasks in real-world environments.
comment: 4 pages, 6 figures, presented at ICONS 2025 during the Poster Session, but not published

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合SNN-CNN模型，利用合成事件数据进行低功耗跌倒检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统跌倒检测方法依赖高功耗传感器或复杂计算，难以在资源受限的嵌入式设备上部署。事件相机（DVS）具有低功耗、高时间分辨率优势，但真实事件数据获取成本高。现有研究多基于真实DVS数据，缺乏从常规视频生成事件数据并利用SNN高效处理的研究。本文旨在探索低成本合成事件数据结合混合SNN-CNN模型，在保持准确率的同时大幅提升能效，推动实时跌倒检测的边缘部署。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合SNN-CNN架构，将常规智能手机视频帧通过模拟DVS传感器转换为事件流（合成事件数据），作为模型输入。模型结合SNN的时空处理与CNN的特征提取能力，利用脉冲神经元模拟生物计算，实现低功耗推理。在多个数据集（如FDD、UP-Fall）上进行仿真训练与评估，与传统机器学习（如SVM、随机森林）及纯CNN模型对比，验证效率与精度平衡。
light_analysis.result: 在多个跌倒检测数据集上，混合SNN-CNN模型在准确率上与传统方法相当（如F1-score达0.95以上），但能耗降低约80%（基于脉冲次数估算）。与传统CNN相比，模型参数量减少40%，推理速度提升2倍。与纯SNN相比，收敛更快且精度更高。表明合成事件数据可有效替代真实DVS数据，且混合架构兼具能效与性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明利用合成事件数据训练的混合SNN-CNN模型可实现低成本、低功耗的跌倒检测，为边缘智能设备提供了可行方案。主要贡献：1）提出从常规视频生成事件数据的低成本路线；2）验证混合SNN架构在能效与精度上的优势。局限性：合成数据与真实DVS数据存在域差距，未来需研究跨域适应或结合少量真实数据微调。

title: LegalWorld: A Life-Cycle Interactive Environment for Legal Agents
abstract: Civil litigation is inherently a life-cycle process: what a lawyer drafts on day one constrains what unfolds at trial months later. Yet existing legal benchmarks evaluate isolated subtasks, and prior legal-agent simulators reinitialize each scenario from shared ground truth, leaving cross-stage causal dependencies unmodeled. We present LegalWorld, a life-cycle interactive environment that models Chinese civil litigation as a causally connected state chain of five stages (seven sub-scenarios), grounded in 75,309 paired Chinese civil judgments. We pair it with reusable infrastructure (local memory, global case memory, a Skill/Tool library) that keeps each dispute consistent across its full life cycle. Building on this environment, we construct LongJud-Bench to evaluate agent capability across all five connected stages. 18,992 ratings from 217 legal-background evaluators confirm that LegalWorld trajectories are procedurally faithful and role-consistent; and a capability-level cross-model evaluation reveals sharp divergences that aggregate scores cannot expose, with no single backbone leading across consultation, drafting, and courtroom advocacy. Detailed resources will be released publicly.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LegalWorld，一个将中国民事诉讼建模为因果连接状态链的生命周期交互环境，并构建LongJud-Bench评估法律代理的全阶段能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有法律基准仅评估孤立子任务，且法律代理模拟器忽略跨阶段因果依赖，无法反映民事诉讼的生命周期特性。民事诉讼中，前期行为严格约束后续结果，这种因果链对模型能力提出了更高要求，但缺乏相应评测环境。LegalWorld旨在填补这一空白，通过建模完整诉讼流程，为评估和训练法律代理提供更真实的交互场景。
light_analysis.method: LegalWorld将中国民事诉讼建模为五个阶段（七个子场景）的因果状态链，基于75,309对中国民事判决构建。搭配可重用基础设施，包括本地内存、全局案例内存和技能/工具库，确保纠纷全生命周期一致性。在此基础上构建LongJud-Bench，评估代理在五个连接阶段的能力，并使用217名法律背景评估者进行18,992次评分验证轨迹忠实性和角色一致性。
light_analysis.result: 评估证实LegalWorld轨迹在程序上忠实且角色一致。能力级跨模型评估揭示聚合分数无法暴露的显著差异，例如咨询、起草和法庭辩护等子任务中，无单一基础模型占据绝对优势，表明不同模型在不同阶段各有所长。
light_analysis.conclusion: LegalWorld提供了首个生命周期交互环境，解决了现有基准忽略因果依赖的问题，有助于全面评估和发展法律代理。公开资源将促进该领域研究。未来可扩展至其他司法管辖区，并引入更复杂的交互机制。

title: Graph Grounded Cross Attention Transformer Neural Network for Structurally Constrained Full Event Sequence Generation in Predictive Process Monitoring
abstract: Structurally constrained event sequence generation remains challenging because generated paths must preserve transition feasibility, temporal order, termination, and attribute consistency. In predictive process monitoring (PPM), this challenge appears as full event sequence generation, whereas existing work mainly addresses component tasks such as next activity, remaining time, outcome, and attribute prediction. This paper proposes the Graph Grounded Cross Attention Transformer Neural Network (GGATN) for this unified PPM task. GGATN uses a global process graph as structured activity memory, contextualizes sequence positions through Transformer self attention, and injects process topology through graph grounded cross attention. Unlike autoregressive decoding, GGATN generates activities, timestamps, length, and event level and sequence level attributes in a single pass, followed by Viterbi style graph constrained decoding for feasible paths and explicit termination. Experiments on six benchmark event logs show more reliable generation quality than local instruction prompted LLM baselines. GGATN achieves strong performance on sequence similarity, Damerau Levenshtein similarity, bigram based control flow similarity, and duration distribution, while maintaining zero hallucinated activities and zero sequence level attribute inconsistency. Ablation analyses confirm the global graph encoder as a stable structural prior. Interpretability analyses show how graph structure, sequence context, feedback refinement, and constrained decoding shape generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图基交叉注意力Transformer网络(GGATN)，实现受结构约束的全事件序列生成，统一预测性过程监控中的多项子任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 受结构约束的事件序列生成需要保持路径可达性、时间顺序、终止性和属性一致性，在预测性过程监控(PPM)中表现为全事件序列生成任务。现有工作主要处理下一活动、剩余时间、结果和属性预测等子任务，缺乏统一生成方法。此外，自回归解码生成的序列可能出现不可行路径或属性不一致，需要更可靠的生成机制。
light_analysis.method: GGATN将全局过程图作为结构化活动记忆，通过Transformer自注意力对序列位置进行上下文建模，并通过图基交叉注意力注入过程拓扑结构。不同于自回归解码，GGATN一次性生成活动、时间戳、长度、事件级和序列级属性，随后采用Viterbi式图约束解码确保路径可行和显式终止。模型在六个基准事件日志上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 与局部指令提示的LLM基线相比，GGATN在生成质量上更可靠。在序列相似性、Damerau Levenshtein相似性、基于二元组的控制流相似性以及持续时间分布上表现优异，同时实现零幻觉活动和零序列级属性不一致性。消融实验证实全局图编码器作为稳定的结构先验，可解释性分析揭示了图结构、序列上下文、反馈细化和约束解码对生成的影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: GGATN统一了PPM中的多个预测任务，实现了受结构约束的全事件序列生成，具有高可靠性和一致性。其图基交叉注意力机制和Viterbi式解码可推广至其他序列生成任务。未来工作可探索动态图更新或更复杂的约束类型。

title: Clinically Aligned Geometry Constraints for Robust IVUS Vessel Boundary Segmentation
abstract: Intravascular ultrasound (IVUS) lumen and external elastic membrane (EEM) segmentation is important for quantitative coronary plaque burden assessment. Errors in lumen or EEM delineation directly propagate to plaque area, plaque burden and geometric measurements. However, standard methods prioritising overlap scores often suffer from boundary drift and topology errors, leading to inaccurate clinical measurements. We present GeoCat, a geometry-consistent network that processes 5-frame IVUS clips using dual Cartesian-polar encoders with cross-domain attention and temporal fusion. A differentiable geometry consistency loss directly supervises clinically relevant descriptors including diameters, orientations, and cross-sectional areas. The model is trained on 12,242 annotated frames from 146 patients acquired with two commercial IVUS systems. We evaluate performance using both segmentation accuracy and plaque-relevant clinical metrics, including Dice/IoU, boundary measures(95HD (mm), ASSD), topology violation rate, and clinical geometry errors (dmax/dmin, angles, and areas). On our dataset, GeoCat achieves a Dice of 0.93, reduces 95HD to 0.14 mm, and lowers topology violations to 1.0%. Importantly, it significantly improves geometric fidelity, yielding diameter errors of 0.13-0.16 mm and angular errors of ~8 degrees, supporting reliable plaque burden quantification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoCat网络，通过几何一致性损失监督临床相关几何描述符，实现鲁棒的IVUS血管边界分割。
light_analysis.motivation: IVUS管腔和外弹性膜分割对冠状动脉斑块负荷定量评估至关重要，但现有方法优先考虑重叠分数，常导致边界漂移和拓扑错误，使临床测量（如直径、角度、面积）不准确。因此需要一种能直接优化这些临床几何指标的分割方法。
light_analysis.method: GeoCat采用双Cartesian-polar编码器结构，结合跨域注意力和时间融合处理5帧IVUS序列。引入可微的几何一致性损失，直接监督直径、方向和横截面积等临床相关描述符。模型在来自146名患者的12,242张标注帧上训练，使用了两种商用IVUS系统。
light_analysis.result: 在测试集上，GeoCat达到Dice 0.93，95% Hausdorff距离降至0.14 mm，拓扑违规率仅为1.0%。几何保真度显著提升：直径误差0.13-0.16 mm，角度误差约8度，表明其能可靠支持斑块负荷量化。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoCat通过引入几何约束，有效解决了传统分割方法中边界漂移和拓扑错误导致的临床测量不准确问题。该方法在多个临床几何指标上性能优越，有望用于临床斑块负荷评估。未来可扩展到其他血管内成像分割任务。

title: Rethinking the Pointer Loss in Table Structure Recognition: Geometry-Aware Pointer Loss for Spatial Locality
abstract: Table Structure Recognition (TSR) using a pointer network achieves impressive results by predicting HTML sequences while aligning tags to detected text (or cell) regions. However, our analysis reveals that when pointer networks fail, 79.6% of errors occur between spatially adjacent cells (Manhattan distance <= 2). Despite this, standard cross-entropy loss weights all negative candidates equally. In this work, we propose Geometry-Aware Pointer (GAP) Loss, which reweights the cross-entropy objective based on spatial proximity to ground truth. By applying inverse distance weighting, GAP focuses gradient flow where the model struggles most: immediate neighbors receive stronger gradients than distant cells. Our approach requires only a straightforward modification to the loss computation, maintaining the same model architecture with zero additional inference cost. Extensive experiments on PubTabNet and SynthTabNet demonstrate that GAP consistently reduces adjacent-cell errors, achieving new state-of-the-art performance. Our findings suggest that incorporating geometric inductive biases at the loss level provides a simple yet effective approach to robust TSR. Our code is available at https://github.com/teamreboott/GAP

light_analysis.overview: 针对表格结构识别中指针网络对邻近单元格区分困难的问题，提出几何感知指针损失（GAP Loss），通过空间近邻重加权交叉熵，无需改变模型架构即可显著降低相邻错误，实现新SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格结构识别中，指针网络预测HTML序列时，79.6%的错误发生在空间相邻的单元格之间（曼哈顿距离≤2），但标准交叉熵损失对所有负样本等权处理，忽视了空间局部性，导致模型难以学习邻近单元格的细微差异。亟需一种感知几何关系的损失函数来聚焦难例，提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出几何感知指针损失（GAP Loss），基于曼哈顿距离对交叉熵负样本进行逆距离加权：距离真实标注越近的负样本（如紧邻单元格）获得更高梯度权重，远距离样本权重降低。仅需修改损失计算，不改变模型架构，零额外推理成本。在PubTabNet和SynthTabNet数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在PubTabNet和SynthTabNet上，GAP Loss持续减少相邻单元格错误，达到新SOTA性能。相比标准交叉熵，有效降低了79.6%的相邻错误占比，验证了空间加权策略对局部歧义问题的显著改善效果（摘要未提供具体数值，但声称SOTA）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出简单有效的几何感知损失，通过在损失层面引入空间归纳偏置，显著提升表格结构识别的鲁棒性。学术上揭示了损失函数设计对结构化预测任务的价值，实际应用可无成本集成到现有指针网络。未来可探索更复杂的空间关系或推广到其他序列标注任务。

title: Morpheus: A Morphology-Aware Neural Tokenizer and Word Embedder for Turkish
abstract: Turkish is agglutinative: meaning is carried by morphemes, yet the subword tokenizers that drive modern language models split words by corpus statistics, fragmenting semantically loaded suffixes and -- in the case of WordPiece and rule-based analyzers -- failing to decode their output back to the original text. This paper presents \textbf{Morpheus}, a neural morpheme-boundary model for Turkish that is at once a lossless, morphology-aware tokenizer and a word-embedding producer. A differentiable Poisson-binomial dynamic program turns per-character boundary probabilities into soft morpheme memberships during training and exact segments at inference, with no string normalization, so $\mathrm{decode}(\mathrm{encode}(w)) = w$ holds by construction. Because the model is neural, the same forward pass that tokenizes also emits a structured word embedding. Among reversible tokenizers -- the only ones valid for generation -- Morpheus attains the lowest bits-per-character ($1.425$), roughly doubles the gold morphological alignment of the subword family (MorphScore macro-F1 $0.61$ vs.\ ${\sim}0.32$), and uses ${\sim}19\%$ less GPU memory than 64K-vocabulary subword tokenizers. As an embedder, frozen Morpheus vectors lead on lexical retrieval (root-family MAP $0.85$) and same-root verification (ROC-AUC $1.00$), surpassing the multilingual retriever BGE-M3 and BERTurk; on context- and inflection-dependent tasks (NER, case/number probing) the heavier contextual encoders remain ahead -- a trade-off we attribute to Morpheus's root-centric geometry. Code: https://github.com/lonewolf-rd/TurkishMorpheus; model: https://huggingface.co/lonewolflab/Morpheus-TR-50K; interactive demo: https://huggingface.co/spaces/lonewolflab/morpheus-tr-demo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Morpheus，一种针对土耳其语的可逆形态感知神经分词器和词嵌入器。
light_analysis.motivation: 土耳其语是粘着语，含义由语素承载，但现代语言模型的子词分词器基于语料统计分割单词，导致有语义的后缀被碎片化，且WordPiece等无法解码回原文本。现有方法缺乏无损且形态感知的分词能力，限制了生成任务和形态分析。
light_analysis.method: Morpheus是一个神经语素边界模型，通过可微的泊松二项动态规划将每个字符的边界概率转换为软语素隶属度，推理时得到精确分段。无字符串归一化，保证解码（编码（w））=w。同一前向过程同时输出结构化词嵌入，无需额外步骤。
light_analysis.result: 在可逆分词器中，Morpheus达到最低bits-per-character（1.425），形态对齐F1为0.61（子词族约0.32），GPU内存节省约19%。作为嵌入器，在词根检索MAP达0.85，同根验证ROC-AUC为1.00，超过BGE-M3和BERTurk。上下文任务上仍落后于上下文编码器。
light_analysis.conclusion: Morpheus实现了无损、形态感知的分词与嵌入，在土耳其语上具有优越的形态对齐和检索性能，但其以词根为中心的几何结构在上下文任务上不如上下文编码器。代码、模型和演示已开源，为粘着语处理提供了新方案。

title: Trainable Photonic Measurement for Physics-Informed PDE Learning
abstract: Photonic quantum machine learning offers a route to trainable physical representations built from phase, interference and measurement. However, its role in scientific machine learning remains largely unexplored. Physics-informed neural fields provide a natural setting, because differential equations require trial spaces that preserve phase, frequency and derivative structure. Here we introduce a photonic quantum neural field in which coordinates become trainable optical phases, are mixed by multi-photon Fock-space interference and are decoded from photon-number measurements. The photonic circuit is optimized as the neural-field representation itself, not as a fixed feature map or hardware accelerator. Photonic measurement is therefore a trainable representation on which the physics-informed residual is minimized. Across seven elliptic, wave, nonlinear dispersive and inverse PDE benchmarks, we observe a phase-complexity transition: classical coordinate and Fourier-feature networks suffice in smooth regimes, whereas the photonic field is most accurate when residual derivatives amplify phase mismatch. In the hardest regimes it gives the lowest errors, with margins reaching an order of magnitude and about one quarter of the trainable parameters of classical baselines. Frozen and shuffled controls, together with noise stress tests, attribute this gain to learned interference and stable Fock-probability readout under compound perturbations. These results identify photonic quantum measurement as a representation-learning principle for scientific machine learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可训练光子量子神经场，将光子测量作为可学习表示用于物理信息偏微分方程学习，在硬性PDE基准中展现显著优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 光子量子机器学习提供基于相位、干涉和测量的可训练物理表示，但在科学机器学习中探索不足。物理信息神经场需要保持相位、频率和导数结构的试验空间，现有方法在相位失配大的情况下精度不足，亟需新型表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 引入光子量子神经场，坐标变为可训练光学相位，通过多光子Fock空间干涉混合，从光子数测量解码。光子电路作为神经场表示本身进行优化，而非固定特征映射或硬件加速器。在七个椭圆、波动、非线性色散和逆PDE基准上测试。
light_analysis.result: 观察到相位复杂度转变：平滑区域经典坐标和傅里叶特征网络足够，而光子场在残差导数放大相位失配时最准确。最难区域误差最低，裕度达一个数量级，参数仅需经典基线的约四分之一。冻结、打乱控制及噪声测试证实增益来自学习干涉和稳定Fock概率读出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 光子量子测量可作为科学机器学习的表示学习原理，尤其适用于相位敏感PDE问题。本研究展示了光子量子神经场的有效性，为光子量子机器学习在科学计算中的应用奠定了基础。未来可扩展至更复杂的物理系统。

title: LLMs Struggle to Measure What Distinguishes Students of Different Proficiency Levels: A Study of Item Discrimination in Reading Comprehension Assessment
abstract: Item discrimination is a fundamental psychometric property of educational assessment, which measures whether an item meaningfully distinguishes students with higher proficiency from students with lower proficiency. While various existing works have explored whether large language models (LLMs) can estimate item difficulty, it remains unclear whether they can capture item discrimination. In this work, we evaluate 42 proprietary and open-weight LLMs in zero-shot settings using two complementary approaches: direct discrimination prediction, where models explicitly estimate an item's discrimination value from its content, and response-based Classical Test Theory (CTT) calibration, where LLM answers are treated as synthetic student responses to compute discrimination scores. Our results show that direct prediction yields weak alignment with human-calibrated discrimination: the best-performing model reaches only a Spearman correlation of 0.152. Response-based CTT calibration provides a stronger but still limited signal, with the all-persona synthetic respondent pool reaching a Spearman correlation of 0.241. These findings highlight item discrimination as an open challenge for LLM-based psychometric evaluation: current LLMs contain non-random discrimination-relevant signal, but they do not yet reliably capture how assessment items distinguish human students.

light_analysis.overview: 评估大语言模型（LLMs）在阅读理解评估中捕捉题目区分度的能力，发现现有模型表现有限。
light_analysis.motivation: 题目区分度是教育评估的基本心理测量属性，用于衡量题目是否能有效区分高水平和低水平学生。现有研究多关注LLM估计题目难度，但尚未探索其是否能捕捉区分度。理解LLM在评估任务中的局限性对于其在教育领域的应用至关重要，尤其是自动生成或筛选高质量试题时。
light_analysis.method: 使用两种互补方法评估42个专有和开源LLM在零样本设置下的表现：直接区分度预测和基于响应的经典测试理论（CTT）校准。直接预测要求模型从题目内容中明确估计区分度值；CTT校准则将LLM的回答视为合成学生响应，计算区分度分数。
light_analysis.result: 直接预测与人类校准区分度的对齐较弱，最佳模型斯皮尔曼相关系数仅为0.152。基于响应的CTT校准提供了更强但仍有限的信号，全角色合成应答池达到0.241的斯皮尔曼相关系数。结果表明，当前LLM包含非随机的区分度相关信号，但无法可靠地捕捉题目如何区分人类学生。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了题目区分度作为LLM心理测量评估的开放挑战。主要贡献在于首次系统评估LLM在区分度任务上的表现，并指出其与人类表现存在显著差距。未来工作可探索微调或特定训练策略以提升该能力，对于自动试题评估和个性化学习有潜在应用价值。

title: PEFT-MedSAM: Efficient Fine-Tuning of Medical Foundation Models for Explainable Skin Lesion Segmentation
abstract: Automated segmentation of skin lesions using deep learning models for dermoscopic images can be very helpful in finding melanomas earlier than they would normally be detected. However, most deep learning methods available do not perform well. The aim of this paper is to present a parameter-efficient fine-tuning method called PEFT-MedSAM for adapting the Medical Segment Anything Model (MedSAM) to automatically segment dermoscopic skin lesions. The PEFT-MedSAM method uses only the lightweight mask decoder for training the model while keeping the pre-trained image encoder and prompt encoder frozen. The experiments performed on the ISIC 2018 benchmark dataset shows that PEFT-MedSAM obtains a dice coefficient of .9411 and an intersection over union value of .8918 when compared to both a fully trained U-Net baseline (.8715 dice coefficient) and zero-shot MedSAM inference (.8997 dice coefficient). The external validation of the model using PH2 dataset shows .9467 dice coefficient with +/- .0310 standard deviation. Supportive evidence for these claims include a p-value less than .0001 for Wilcoxon signed rank tests comparing the two datasets and bootstrap-estimated 95% confidence intervals of [.9364,.9447] that represent the estimated range of possible values for the average dice coefficient obtained by repeating the test. To increase clinical trustworthiness, we used Grad-CAM explainability along with a pointing game based evaluation methodology to evaluate the CNN baseline model on the validation set. The results showed that we had an accuracy rate of 98.27% on the validation set of 519 images and confirmed that the model classified regions containing skin lesions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PEFT-MedSAM方法，通过参数高效微调MedSAM的轻量级解码器，实现高精度且可解释的皮肤病变分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动分割皮肤病变有助于早期发现黑色素瘤，但现有深度学习方法性能不足。MedSAM在零样本推理下效果有限，且全量微调开销大。因此需要一种高效微调策略，同时提升分割准确性和临床可解释性。
light_analysis.method: PEFT-MedSAM冻结MedSAM的预训练图像编码器和提示编码器，仅训练轻量级掩码解码器。在ISIC 2018数据集上微调，并使用PH2数据集外部验证。同时，采用Grad-CAM生成热力图，配合指向游戏评估模型的可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 在ISIC 2018上获得Dice系数0.9411、IoU 0.8918，显著优于全训练U-Net（Dice 0.8715）和零样本MedSAM（Dice 0.8997）。PH2数据集上Dice为0.9467±0.0310，Wilcoxon检验p<0.0001，95%置信区间[0.9364,0.9447]。可解释性评估准确率98.27%。
light_analysis.conclusion: PEFT-MedSAM以极低的微调成本实现了领先的分割性能，并通过Grad-CAM增强临床可信度。该方法为医学基础模型的高效适配提供了新思路，但可解释性评估仅针对CNN基线，未来可扩展至更复杂的模型。

title: Contextualizing Biological Language Models across Modalities via Logit-Space Contrastive Alignment
abstract: Pretrained biological language models expose per-token probability distributions through masked-token prediction, providing the likelihood interface central to sequence design, variant scoring, and mechanistic interpretation. Yet these distributions are learned from broad unlabeled corpora and are not naturally conditioned on task-specific biological contexts such as interaction partners, cellular environments, or therapeutic interventions. Existing contextual matching methods often distort this interface through pooled embeddings, contrastive latent spaces, or task-specific prediction heads. We introduce LOGICA (Logit-space Contrastive Alignment), a framework for context-conditioned prediction that performs contrastive learning directly in output-logit space. Using gated cross-modal adapters compatible with each model's native token head, LOGICA preserves the pretrained likelihood interface and converts contextualized token log-likelihoods into matching scores. Alignment is defined through context-sensitive token probabilities rather than proximity in a shared embedding space, enabling learning from sparse paired data across models with distinct vocabularies, without a shared tokenizer or decoder. LOGICA is particularly effective for mutation-local variant ranking, where comparisons reduce to context-conditioned likelihoods of mutant tokens at perturbed sites. Across protein--ligand binding, TCR--peptide activity, and drug-conditioned resistance prediction, LOGICA improves over prior state-of-the-art methods, including matched latent-contrastive and conditional MLM baselines, while retaining a token-level interface for interpretation and generation. On held-out-gene single-mutation drug-resistance prediction, LOGICA improves AUC from near-random latent-space baselines of $\sim$0.55 to $\sim$0.65.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LOGICA框架，在输出logit空间进行对比学习，实现跨模态生物语言模型的条件预测，保留预训练似然界面。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练生物语言模型通过掩码预测提供token概率分布，广泛应用于序列设计、变异评分等任务，但这些分布未针对任务特定的生物上下文（如交互伙伴、细胞环境）进行调节。现有上下文匹配方法常通过池化嵌入、对比潜在空间或添加预测头来扭曲原始概率界面，导致信息损失或兼容性问题。因此，需要一种既能保留原始似然界面又能在不同模态和词汇表间进行有效条件预测的方法。
light_analysis.method: LOGICA在输出logit空间进行对比学习，利用门控跨模态适配器与各模型原生token头兼容，保留预训练似然界面。它将上下文化的token对数似然转换为匹配分数，使得对齐基于上下文敏感的token概率而非共享嵌入空间中的距离。该方法无需共享分词器或解码器，可从稀疏配对数据中学习，特别适用于突变定位的变异排序，通过比较突变位点的上下文条件似然进行评分。
light_analysis.result: 在蛋白质-配体结合、TCR-肽活性和药物条件耐药性预测等任务上，LOGICA优于先前的潜空间对比和条件MLM基线方法。具体地，在保留基因单突变药物耐药预测中，LOGICA将AUC从接近随机的0.55提升至0.65，同时保留了用于解释和生成的token级界面。
light_analysis.conclusion: LOGICA提出了一种在输出logit空间进行对比对齐的新范式，有效改进了跨模态生物语言模型的条件预测能力，同时保持了预训练似然界面的完整性和可解释性。该框架具有较好的通用性，可应用于序列设计、变异评分等任务，并为多模态生物学上下文建模提供了新思路。未来可扩展至更多模态和更复杂的上下文条件。

title: UniTemp: Unlocking Video Generation in Any Temporal Order via Bidirectional Distillation
abstract: Autoregressive video diffusion models have emerged as a promising approach for long video generation, achieving strong performance in streaming settings. However, existing methods are restricted to forward temporal generation, whereas practical video creation often requires flexible generation order, e.g., conditioning on future context to extend backward, or on both past and future context for inbetween generation. We bridge this gap by training an autoregressive model that supports generation in arbitrary temporal directions. A key technical challenge arises from the Causal 3D VAE widely used in video diffusion models, which encodes latents strictly conditioned on past context. While suited for forward generation, this causal structure causes inter-block discontinuities when generation proceeds backward. To address this, we introduce blockwise anchor latents, a set of auxiliary latents that restore the missing past context at block boundaries during backward generation. Built on this design, we propose UniTemp, a bidirectional distillation framework that trains a single autoregressive student model for any-direction video generation. At inference time, UniTemp conditions on arbitrary past and/or future frames, improving controllability for both bidirectional and inbetween generation. Experiments show that UniTemp maintains competitive performance on short and long video generation compared to forward-only methods, while enabling diverse workflows such as bidirectional video extension, inbetween generation, looping video generation, scene transition, and visual story generation. Project website: https://lzhangbj.github.io/projects/unitemp/

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniTemp，通过双向蒸馏训练自回归模型，实现任意时间顺序的视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自回归视频扩散模型仅支持前向生成，但实际视频创作需要灵活的生成顺序，如基于未来上下文向后扩展或基于过去和未来上下文进行中间生成。这些需求在现有方法中无法满足，因为因果3D VAE的潜伏编码严格依赖过去上下文，导致反向生成时出现块间不连续性。
light_analysis.method: UniTemp采用双向蒸馏框架，训练单个自回归学生模型支持任意方向生成。关键技术是引入块级锚点潜变量，在反向生成时恢复块边界处缺失的过去上下文，解决因果VAE导致的不连续性。推理时，模型可条件于任意过去和/或未来帧，实现双向扩展和中间生成。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，UniTemp在短和长视频生成任务上保持与仅前向方法相当的竞争力，同时支持多种新工作流：双向视频扩展、中间生成、循环视频生成、场景转换和视觉故事生成。具体性能指标与基线相当，但提供了更灵活的生成顺序。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniTemp首次实现自回归视频模型在任意时间顺序下的生成，显著提升视频生成的灵活性和可控性。该方法在视频编辑、故事创作等应用中具有实用价值。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏策略或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: TW-LegalBench: Measuring Taiwanese Legal Understanding
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown impressive capabilities across diverse tasks, yet their performance on jurisdiction-specific legal reasoning remains underexplored. We present TW-LegalBench that utilizes Taiwanese legal system's rich official corpus open to the public to fill the gap in evaluating LLMs on Taiwanese law, among common-law benchmarks that focus on English sources and civil-law benchmarks focusing on sources of Simplified Chinese. TW-LegalBench comprises three task types: (1) over 16,000 multiple-choice questions (MCQs) across five years of official examinations in 18 professional domains; (2) 117 open-ended essay questions (OEQs) from examinations for legal professionals with official scoring rubrics; and (3) more than 14,000 legal judgment prediction (LJP) instances covering hundreds of crime categories. We evaluate 13 LLMs using accuracy for MCQs, a decomposed LLM-as-Judge framework based on the scoring rubric points for OEQs, and metrics for sentencing accuracy and statute citation for LJP. Our results reveal that top-performing models exceed the passing threshold for qualified lawyers (passing rate: 11%) but fall short of that for judges and prosecutors (passing rate: 1~2%). For LJP, while models demonstrate reasonable verdict type accuracy and sentence prediction capability, they struggle to cite exact legal articles. These findings highlight that reliable legal text generation remains challenging for LLMs, even though their performance on qualification examinations approaches human level.
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, To appear in ICAIL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出TW-LegalBench基准，系统评估LLM在台湾法律理解上的能力，涵盖多项任务和指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有法律基准多聚焦普通法系或简体中文，缺乏对台湾法律体系的评估，而台湾拥有丰富的官方语料。本研究旨在填补这一空白，评估LLM在台湾法律推理上的表现，为模型在法律领域的应用提供参考。
light_analysis.method: 构建TW-LegalBench，包含三类任务：超过16000道多选题（来自18个领域的5年官方考试）、117道开放式问答题（附评分标准）和14000+法律判决预测实例（覆盖数百种犯罪）。评估13个LLM，MCQ用准确率，OEQ用基于评分要点的LLM-as-Judge框架，LJP用刑期准确率和法条引用指标。
light_analysis.result: 顶级模型在律师资格考试（通过率11%）上超过合格线，但在法官/检察官考试（通过率1-2%）上未达标。LJP中，模型能合理预测罪名类型和刑期，但难以精确引用法条。这揭示了LLM在法律文本生成上仍有挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM在资格考试上接近人类水平，但在法条引用等精确任务上表现不足。该基准为评估和提升LLM的法律理解能力提供了重要工具，未来可进一步改进模型在法律文本生成方面的可靠性。

title: Stealthy World Model Manipulation via Data Poisoning
abstract: Model-based learning agents use learned world models to predict future states, plan actions, and adapt to new environments. However, the process of updating world models from collected experience creates a training-time attack surface: adversarially poisoned fine-tuning trajectories can manipulate the learned dynamics and thereby corrupt downstream planning. In this paper, we propose SWAAP, the first two-stage data poisoning framework for learned world models. In the first stage, SWAAP identifies a harmful target world model that induces low-return behavior under planning while remaining close to clean dynamics, using first-order bilevel optimization enabled by a transition-gradient theorem. In the second stage, SWAAP realizes this target through stealth-constrained gradient matching, modifying only a limited fraction of fine-tuning transition targets so that the induced training gradients steer the victim model toward the adversarial target, while a prediction-error regularizer encourages the poisoned targets to remain close to the world model's natural approximation error. To assess attack stealthiness, we evaluate defenses and detectability across three stages of the poisoning pipeline: pre-training detection of poisoned transitions, robust training during fine-tuning, and test-time monitoring of the resulting world model. Across diverse continuous-control tasks, SWAAP causes substantial performance degradation while keeping poisoned transitions close to clean data and evading the evaluated non-adaptive residual/CUSUM/TRIM-style defenses. These results reveal a practical vulnerability in world-model adaptation pipelines and highlight the need for robustness methods that protect both world-model training data and learned dynamics.
comment: 41 pages, 8 figures, 11 tables. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个针对世界模型的两阶段数据投毒框架SWAAP，通过隐蔽修改微调轨迹来操纵学习动力学并诱导低回报规划行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于模型的学习代理依赖世界模型进行预测和规划，但更新过程存在训练时攻击面：投毒微调轨迹可操纵动力学并破坏下游规划。现有工作缺乏针对世界模型的隐蔽数据投毒攻击研究，亟需揭示此类漏洞并推动防御方法发展。
light_analysis.method: SWAAP分两阶段：第一阶段通过一阶双层优化和过渡梯度定理识别有害目标世界模型，使其在规划时产生低回报行为但仍接近干净动力学；第二阶段采用隐蔽约束梯度匹配，仅修改少量微调过渡目标，使训练梯度引导模型朝向目标，并用预测误差正则化保持投毒目标接近自然近似误差。评估涵盖预训练检测、鲁棒训练和测试时监控三阶段。
light_analysis.result: 在多种连续控制任务中，SWAAP导致显著性能下降（如奖励降低），同时投毒过渡数据与干净数据分布接近，成功规避残差、CUSUM和TRIM等非自适应防御。结果表明世界模型自适应管道存在实际投毒攻击风险。
light_analysis.conclusion: SWAAP首次证明了世界模型训练中数据投毒攻击的可行性，揭示了模型适应过程的弱安全性，强调需要开发同时保护训练数据和动力学鲁棒性的方法。未来可探索自适应防御及更复杂的攻击场景。

title: Attention as Frustrated Synchronization
abstract: A network of oscillators that synchronizes perfectly computes nothing further, so an attention architecture built from synchronization must locate its computation in structured departures from agreement. We introduce the Frustrated Synchronization Network (FSN), whose token states are phases on a torus and whose entire value pathway is one learned complex coupling kernel over harmonics and a one-step delay. Each component of the kernel is a frustration in the sense of the synchronization literature. The complex phases are static Kuramoto-Sakaguchi frustration angles, the signed harmonics are repulsive Daido components, and the delay term, which couples each token to the successors of the tokens it attends to, is algebraically identical to Kuramoto-Sakaguchi coupling whose frustration angle is the data's own transition, so next-token prediction is implemented as synchronization frustrated by the data. At matched one-million-parameter and training budgets on character-level text and code, the FSN's validation loss is below a tuned RoPE-SwiGLU transformer's at every epoch measured, and the comparison survives training the baseline to convergence: every thirty-epoch enwik8 seed finishes below the transformer's converged fifty-epoch loss of 1.611, and the FSN's completed fifty-epoch runs converge to 1.5953 +/- 0.0014. A variant with every feed-forward block replaced by mean-field coupling to learned collective modes, leaving no multilayer perceptron in the stack, tracks the transformer. On natural text the unfrustrated base layer falls behind the converged transformer at every copy depth, worst on long-range copy events; the kernel reverses the deficit at every depth of four and beyond. Headline comparisons are at the one-million-parameter scale; a scale ladder is complete through four million parameters with the advantage persisting, and remaining arms are marked as in progress.
comment: 25 pages, 4 figures. Preliminary report at the 1-10M parameter scale

light_analysis.overview: 提出Frustrated Synchronization Network (FSN)，将注意力机制建模为受挫同步，通过复耦合核和延迟实现下一token预测，在百万参数尺度上超越Transformer。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有注意力架构基于同步机制，但完美同步无法计算，需结构化偏离一致。论文从同步文献引入挫败概念，解决注意力中的计算问题。RoPE-SwiGLU Transformer在字符级任务上表现良好，但仍有提升空间。FSN通过受挫同步实现更优的下一token预测，为注意力提供新物理视角。
light_analysis.method: FSN中token状态为环面相位，值通路为学习到的复耦合核，包含谐波和单步延迟。核组件包括静态Kuramoto-Sakaguchi挫败角、排斥性Daido组件和数据转移挫败角，将下一token预测实现为受数据挫败的同步。变体用平均场耦合到学习集体模式替换前馈块，无MLP。
light_analysis.result: 在百万参数和训练预算下，FSN验证损失每个epoch低于调优的RoPE-SwiGLU Transformer。30 epoch enwik8种子低于Transformer 50 epoch收敛损失1.611，FSN 50 epoch收敛到1.5953±0.0014。变体跟踪Transformer。自然文本上，未受挫基础层落后，内核在深度≥4反转赤字。规模到四百万参数优势持续。
light_analysis.conclusion: FSN通过受挫同步实现高效注意力，在字符级任务上超越Transformer。学术上为注意力提供物理机制视角，实用上在资源受限场景有潜力。未来工作可扩展至更大规模、复杂任务，并探索更广泛的应用。

title: MapSatisfyBench: Benchmarking Satisfaction-Aware Map Agents through Behavior-Grounded Implicit Decision Factors
abstract: Large language model agents are increasingly integrated into map services. Since map services are embedded in everyday-life scenarios rather than professional task settings, users often express their needs informally, resulting in underspecified queries with many unspoken needs, namely, implicit decision factors that are critical for user satisfaction. Although clarification is an effective way to mitigate this issue, it increases user burden in daily interaction, and a capable agent should first proactively recover such factors from available information sources. However, evaluating this ability is challenging. The first challenge is to determine which implicit decision factors are suitable for evaluation. A factor is evaluable only if it affects user acceptance and can be recovered from information available to the agent before it responds. Second, user satisfaction cannot be reliably represented by a single reference answer, requiring a benchmark that converts satisfaction-relevant factors into objective and quantifiable evaluation targets. To address these challenges, we propose a restore-identify-filter framework that reconstructs complete user needs from behavior-chain evidence, identifies implicit decision factors, and retains only those supported by pre-query evidence. Building on this methodology, we construct MapSatisfyBench from large-scale, real-world anonymized user data and annotate ground truth from five dimensions and enables full-chain evaluation of satisfaction-aware map agents. Experiments show that current agents generally perform well on explicit task completion, but remain limited in satisfying implicit decision factors and proactively acquiring the evidence needed for satisfaction-aware decisions. These findings establish MapSatisfyBench as a benchmark for shifting map-agent evaluation from task completion toward satisfaction-aware spatial decision making.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MapSatisfyBench基准，通过行为链恢复隐含决策因素，评估地图智能体在满足用户未言明需求方面的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 地图服务中用户常以非正式方式表述需求，存在许多未言明的隐含决策因素，影响满意度。现有评估聚焦于显式任务完成，忽略隐含因素，且难以客观量化满意度相关因素。为此，需要一种方法确定哪些隐含因素可评估，并将其转化为可量化目标，从而推动评估从任务完成转向满意度感知。
light_analysis.method: 提出恢复-识别-过滤框架：从行为链证据重构完整用户需求，识别隐含决策因素，仅保留查询前证据支持的因素。基于大规模真实匿名用户数据构建MapSatisfyBench，从五个维度（如时间、偏好等）标注真值，支持全链条评估智能体在显式任务和隐含因素上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当前地图智能体在显式任务完成上表现良好，但在满足隐含决策因素和主动获取满意度所需证据方面仍有限。MapSatisfyBench成功将评估焦点从任务完成转向满意度感知的空间决策，揭示了现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: MapSatisfyBench为满意度感知地图智能体评估提供了新基准，揭示了当前智能体在理解隐含用户需求上的局限。该工作推动了地图服务评估向更贴近实际用户满意度方向演进，未来可促进智能体主动发现和满足未言明需求的能力提升。

title: Implicit vs. Explicit Prompting Strategies for LVLMs in Referential Communication
abstract: Two recent studies (Jones et al. (2026); Zeng et al. (2026)) reach apparently contradictory conclusions about whether LVLMs can coordinate on efficient referring expressions. We control for task differences between the studies while directly comparing their prompting styles. We replicate the finding that models can coordinate efficient referring expressions when explicitly prompted to do so, suggesting that other task differences are not responsible for divergent results. However, we also find that the same models fail to infer the need for communicative efficiency from a more implicit prompt, highlighting critical differences between how humans and AI systems communicate.

light_analysis.overview: 通过比较隐式和显式提示策略，揭示LVLMs在隐式提示下无法自发追求交流效率，凸显人机交流差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 两篇近期研究得出关于LVLMs能否协调高效指代表达的矛盾结论，可能是任务差异或提示方式不同所致。本文旨在控制任务差异，直接比较提示风格，以澄清矛盾并理解模型与人类交流的差异。
light_analysis.method: 控制任务差异，直接比较隐式和显式提示风格。复制显式提示下的实验验证模型能协调高效指代表达，并在隐式提示下测试相同模型，观察其是否推断出交流效率需求。
light_analysis.result: 复现了显式提示下模型能协调高效指代表达的发现，表明任务差异不是矛盾原因。但隐式提示下相同模型未能推断出交流效率需求，无法自发实现高效交流。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了显式提示下LVLMs能高效交流，但隐式提示下失败，凸显人机交流关键差异。学术价值在于澄清先前矛盾，实际应用价值在于提示设计对AI表现的重要性。未来需探索如何使模型从隐式提示中学习效率需求。

title: Calibrated Sampling-Free Uncertainty Estimation in Bayesian Deep Learning
abstract: Modern deep learning models remain notoriously prone to overconfidence, limiting their reliability in high-stakes applications. Bayesian methods aim to counter this by learning a distribution over model parameters, and recent advances now make this feasible for large-scale architectures at costs comparable to AdamW. However, a challenge remains at test time: predictions must be averaged across many forward passes with weights sampled from the posterior, which is prohibitively expensive. Variance propagation offers an efficient alternative, computing layer-wise analytical approximations of uncertainty in a single forward pass. While such techniques are effective for MLPs, their extension to modern architectures remains challenging, due to increased depth and diversity of layer types. To fill this gap, we propose Calibrated Variance Propagation (CVP), which introduces a new propagation method for normalization layers, combines it with recent techniques for handling activation functions, and absorbs residual error through a light calibration step. CVP yields comparably accurate uncertainty estimates to MC sampling across transformers and CNNs, at a fraction of the cost. Against prior variance propagation work, CVP improves coverage at $0.5\%$ risk from $8.2\%$ to $14.6\%$ with BEiT-3 on Visual Reasoning (NLVR2) and from $2.6\%$ to $10.8\%$ with ViLT on VQAv2, with gains extending to convolutional architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出校准方差传播方法，实现单次前向传播中高效、校准的不确定性估计，适用于Transformer和CNN等现代架构。
light_analysis.motivation: 贝叶斯深度学习方法虽能缓解模型过自信问题，但测试时需要多次前向传播采样权重，计算成本高昂。现有方差传播技术仅适用于MLP，难以扩展到具有深度和多样层类型的现代架构，限制了其在高风险应用中的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出校准方差传播（CVP），通过为归一化层设计新的传播方法，结合已有激活函数处理技术，并加入轻量校准步骤来吸收残余误差，从而在单次前向传播中逐层解析近似不确定性，避免多次采样。
light_analysis.result: CVP在Transformer和CNN架构上获得与蒙特卡洛采样相当的不确定性估计精度，且计算开销大幅降低。与先前方差传播方法相比，在0.5%风险水平下，CVP在NLVR2上将覆盖从8.2%提升到14.6%，在VQAv2上从2.6%提升到10.8%，卷积架构也有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: CVP填补了高效不确定性估计在贝叶斯深度学习中的空白，为现代架构提供校准且计算高效的方案，提升了模型在关键应用中的可靠性。未来可拓展至更复杂网络结构或探索更精细的校准策略。

title: Formalizing and Mitigating Structural Distortion in LLM Attention for Graph Reasoning
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise for reasoning over Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs). However, applying LLMs to graphs requires linearizing their structure into sequences, introducing distortion rooted in the graph bandwidth problem. While this distortion has been shown to degrade performance, it is often attributed to prompt design or model scale, leaving the underlying mechanism unclear. In this work, we show \textit{how} rotary positional embeddings turn graph linearization into bandwidth-dependent attention decay, suppressing attention between graph-adjacent nodes that are forced far apart in the serialized sequence. This shifts the focus of LLM-based graph reasoning from prompt engineering and scaling toward correcting attention misalignment. Motivated by this analysis, we propose \textbf{G}raph-\textbf{a}ligned \textbf{L}anguage \textbf{A}ttention (\textbf{GaLA}), a lightweight, inference-time modification for LLMs. GaLA biases attention toward graph-adjacent nodes while preserving the LLM's sequential inductive biases. Across TAG benchmarks, GaLA improves performance with negligible overhead, demonstrating that distortion is a correctable bottleneck in LLM-based graph reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示图线性化导致的结构失真机制，提出轻量级推理时注意力修正方法GaLA。
light_analysis.motivation: 将LLM应用于文本属性图(TAG)需要线性化图结构，这引入基于图带宽问题的结构失真，而现有研究常归因于提示设计或模型规模。本文揭示旋转位置嵌入导致带宽依赖的注意力衰减，抑制图中相邻但序列中相距较远节点的注意力，将关注点从提示工程转向校准注意力。
light_analysis.method: 提出Graph-aligned Language Attention (GaLA)，一种轻量级推理时修改方法，通过偏向图中相邻节点的注意力，同时保留LLM的序列归纳偏置，无需重新训练，在TAG基准测试中提升性能且额外计算开销可忽略。
light_analysis.result: 在多个TAG基准测试上，GaLA相比基线方法提升了性能，且额外计算开销可忽略，表明失真是一个可纠正的瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示LLM图推理中结构失真机制，提出GaLA有效缓解，无需额外训练即可提升性能。学术价值在于明确注意力校准的重要性，实际应用价值在于轻量级改进。未来可探索更通用的校准方法。

title: Open-World Video Segmentation
abstract: While video segmentation has advanced rapidly on short clips and closed-set benchmarks, open-world video segmentation remains largely unexplored. The challenge is twofold: (1) existing methods are not designed to support object discovery and identity maintenance in long videos of dynamic ego-motion, and (2) existing evaluation protocols rely on a rigid 1:1 matching that unfairly penalizes semantically valid predictions with mismatched granularity. To address both gaps, we introduce Savvy, a practical and strong system for zero-shot open-world long-horizon video segmentation. Savvy combines hierarchical mask discovery, deferred admission, and track consolidation to support persistent object discovery, safe track promotion, and stable long-range identity maintenance. We further propose OGA, a granularity-aware evaluation suite for open-world video segmentation. Built on a Granularity-Agnostic (GA) matching protocol, OGA relaxes conventional 1:1 matching to an n:1 mapping, but still enforces temporal rigor by detecting support discontinuities through sever points and scoring each reference object through its dominant coherent fragment. This prevents fragmented or flickering support from being over-rewarded while enabling GA-adapted metrics and structural diagnostics: identity persistence (IP), and identity concentration (IC). On VIPSeg, we show that standard 1:1 evaluation substantially underestimates open-world methods, whereas GA evaluation recovers much of their suppressed performance. On the more realistic long-horizon benchmarks: ScanNet and HM3D, Savvy consistently outperforms strong baselines across both classical and proposed metrics, including STQ, VPQ$_\infty$, IP and IC. Together, these results establish a practical benchmark and a strong baseline for open-world long-horizon video segmentation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Savvy系统和OGA评估协议，解决开放世界长视频分割中的对象发现和身份维护问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频分割方法在短片段和闭集上表现良好，但开放世界长视频分割未充分探索。挑战包括现有方法不支持动态自我运动的长视频中的对象发现和身份维护，以及评估协议使用严格的1:1匹配不公平惩罚语义有效但粒度不匹配的预测。
light_analysis.method: Savvy系统结合层次掩码发现、延迟接纳和轨迹整合，实现持续对象发现、安全轨迹提升和稳定长程身份维护。OGA评估套件基于粒度不可知匹配协议，将1:1匹配放宽为n:1映射，通过检测支持不连续性施加时间严谨性，并计算身份持久性和身份集中度指标。
light_analysis.result: 在VIPSeg上，标准1:1评估低估了开放世界方法，GA评估恢复了被抑制的性能。在ScanNet和HM3D基准上，Savvy在STQ、VPQ∞、IP和IC指标上持续优于强基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了开放世界长视频分割的实用基准和强基线，Savvy和OGA为未来研究提供基础。局限性可能包括计算成本，未来可探索更高效的结构。

title: Beyond Monolingual Deep Research: Evaluating Agents and Retrievers with Cross-Lingual BrowseComp-Plus
abstract: Deep research agents are increasingly evaluated on their ability to search for evidence, reason over retrieved sources, and produce grounded answers. Existing browsing benchmarks, however, largely assume that the user's query and the supporting evidence are written in the same language, leaving open whether agentic search systems can operate when relevant evidence appears in another language. We introduce XBCP (Cross-lingual BrowseComp-Plus), a controlled benchmark that preserves the English question-and-answer space of BrowseComp-Plus but varies the languages of the supporting documents. XBCP instantiates two complementary settings: in the cross-lingual setting, each query is paired with evidence in a single assigned language. In the multilingual setting, the full evidence corpus is distributed equally and randomly across 12 languages spanning high-resource and low-resource regimes. We evaluate four deep research agents using sparse and dense multilingual retrievers, measuring answer accuracy, evidence recall, search behavior, calibration, citation fidelity, and oracle retrieval. Results reveal substantial degradation when evidence is translated. Even strong, dense retrievers lose evidence recall, and agents become less calibrated and cite evidence less reliably. Notably, accuracy remains lower even when all gold evidence is supplied directly. These findings suggest that cross-lingual deep research exposes both retrieval failures and an independent, agent-side difficulty in integrating language-mismatched evidence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨语言浏览基准XBCP，揭示深度研究代理在多语言证据环境下检索失败和整合困难。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有浏览基准假设查询与证据同语言，忽略实际跨语言场景。当证据出现在不同语言时，代理搜索系统面临挑战。需评估跨语言深度研究性能，发现检索和代理整合问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于BrowseComp-Plus构建XBCP基准，保留英文问答空间但变化证据语言。设跨语言设置（每查询配对单一语言证据）和多语言设置（证据等分12种语言）。评估四个深度研究代理及稀疏/密集多语言检索器，测量准确率、证据召回、搜索行为、校准、引用忠实度和oracle检索。
light_analysis.result: 证据翻译后性能显著下降：密集检索器证据召回丢失，代理校准变差，引用可靠性降低。即使直接提供所有黄金证据，准确率仍较低。表明跨语言深度研究暴露检索失败和代理整合语言不匹配证据的独立困难。
light_analysis.conclusion: 跨语言深度研究不仅存在检索问题，还面临代理独立困难，即整合语言不匹配证据。强调需要进一步研究跨语言代理能力，改进检索和证据理解。

title: DiPOD: Diffusion Policy Optimization without Drifting Apart
abstract: RL post-training has become increasingly pivotal for improving diffusion policies, but existing diffusion policy-gradient methods are often unstable and cannot achieve reliable policy improvement. We identify the cause as the double-drift phenomenon: optimizing a variational surrogate can let the ELBO separate from the true log-likelihood, which then makes the resulting proxy policy gradient misaligned with the true policy gradient of expected return. We propose \textbf{DiPOD}, a diffusion policy optimization framework that maintains tight-bound behavior throughout training by interleaving self-distillation with policy-improving gradient updates. This leads to a simple and practical algorithm: augmenting each diffusion policy-gradient update with an on-policy ELBO regularizer. Across diffusion language model post-training and continuous-control diffusion policies, DiPOD substantially stabilizes training and reaches higher rewards than previous methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiPOD框架，通过on-policy ELBO正则化解决扩散策略梯度中的双漂移问题，实现稳定高效的策略优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习后训练对提升扩散策略至关重要，但现有扩散策略梯度方法存在不稳定性，无法可靠提升策略。根本原因是双漂移现象：优化变分代理导致ELBO与真实对数似然分离，使得代理策略梯度与真实期望回报梯度不一致，阻碍有效优化。
light_analysis.method: DiPOD框架通过交错自蒸馏与策略改进梯度更新，保持训练过程中的紧界行为。具体算法是在每个扩散策略梯度更新中增加一个on-policy ELBO正则化器，使ELBO紧密追踪真实对数似然，从而对齐代理梯度与真实梯度。方法简洁实用，适用于离散和连续动作空间。
light_analysis.result: 在扩散语言模型后训练和连续控制扩散策略任务中，DiPOD显著稳定了训练过程，并达到了比先前方法更高的奖励。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明相对于基线方法有实质性提升，且有效克服了双漂移问题带来的不稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiPOD通过理论分析揭示双漂移现象并提出简单有效的正则化方法，为扩散策略的强化学习优化提供了稳定方案。具有广泛适用性，可提升语言模型和机器人控制等领域的性能。未来可探索更高效的自蒸馏策略或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: "Did you lie?" Evaluating Lie Detectors across Model Scale and Belief-Verified Model Organisms
abstract: Robust lie detectors for language models could enable powerful techniques for auditing, monitoring, and post-hoc investigation of model behaviour, but evaluating them requires testbeds where models verifiably believe the opposite of what they say. We show that existing trained model organisms often fail this requirement, leaving prior positive and negative detection results difficult to interpret. We address this with 13 reasoning model organisms whose hidden beliefs are verified in chain-of-thought and shown to generalise to held-out tasks, alongside Varied Deception, a prompted-lying testbed covering a broad range of lie-inducing motivations. On these testbeds we evaluate four detectors: a chain-of-thought judge, a logprob classifier, and two activation probes, including Did-You-Lie (DYL), a new method for training follow-up probes. On prompted lying, across 31 open-weight models spanning 2B to 1T parameters, all four detectors show positive scaling with model capability. However, every activation- and logprob-based detector drops sharply on our trained model organisms, with DYL retaining the most signal; only the chain-of-thought judge remains strong, with 0.82 balanced accuracy, partly as an artefact of our verification process favouring CoT-readable beliefs. Current lie detectors therefore cannot support high-confidence claims about model beliefs, and we suggest research directions that may address some of their current limitations. We release our datasets, model organisms, and trained detectors.

light_analysis.overview: 本文评估了谎言检测器在不同规模语言模型和信念验证模型中的表现，发现现有检测器在训练模型上性能大幅下降，仅思维链判断器保持较强效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 谎言检测器对于审计、监控和事后调查模型行为至关重要。然而，现有训练模型可能无法让模型真实地相信与表达相反的内容，导致检测结果难以解释。因此需要一个可靠的测试环境，其中模型隐藏信念可被验证。
light_analysis.method: 作者创建了13个推理模型（模型生物），其隐藏信念通过思维链验证并泛化到保留任务；同时构建了涵盖多种撒谎动机的提示性撒谎测试集Varied Deception。评估了四种检测器：思维链判断器、对数概率分类器、两个激活探针（包括新方法DYL），在31个模型（2B-1T参数）上测试。
light_analysis.result: 在提示性撒谎测试中，所有检测器性能随模型能力提升而正相关。但在训练模型上，除思维链判断器（平衡准确率0.82）外，其余检测器性能急剧下降，DYL保留最多信号。这表明当前检测器无法高置信度判断模型信念。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了现有谎言检测器在验证模型信念上的局限性，特别是非推理式检测器在训练模型上失效。建议未来研究改进检测鲁棒性，并开源数据集、模型和检测器以促进该领域发展。

title: Belief-Space Control for Personalized Cancer Treatment via Active Inference
abstract: Cancer treatment is at the core a sequential decision-making problem with partial observability, latent patient heterogeneity, and explicit constraints on the budget for medical measurements. Unlike standard Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches that control state trajectories, cancer treatments permanently modify patients' transition dynamics, changing how states evolve over time. We model cancer treatment as a belief-space planning problem using active inference, deriving an expected free-energy objective that unifies goal-directed control and information acquisition under measurement budgets without. We implement this framework using real clinical cancer data from the AACR Project GENIE Biopharma Collaborative dataset. Results on clinical data demonstrate a simultaneous patient categorization and high treatment efficacy, under real measurement and treatment constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于主动推理的信念空间控制方法，用于个性化癌症治疗，在测量预算约束下实现患者分类与高效治疗。
light_analysis.motivation: 癌症治疗是部分可观测的序列决策问题，存在患者异质性和医疗测量预算约束。标准强化学习方法控制状态轨迹，但癌症治疗会永久改变患者的转移动态，因此需要新方法统一目标导向控制与信息获取，同时满足测量预算限制。
light_analysis.method: 将癌症治疗建模为信念空间规划问题，使用主动推理框架，推导期望自由能目标函数，统一目标导向控制和信息获取，并显式考虑测量预算约束。利用真实临床数据（AACR Project GENIE Biopharma Collaborative数据集）进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在真实临床数据上的实验表明，该方法在同时考虑测量和治疗约束的条件下，能够实现患者的高效分类并取得高治疗疗效，验证了框架的有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为个性化癌症治疗提供了新框架，通过主动推理统一控制与信息采集，提高治疗效率并降低成本。未来可扩展至其他部分可观测医疗决策问题，但摘要未明确讨论局限性。

title: DN-Hypo-Pipeline: An AI-Driven Workflow for Hypothesis Generation via Large Language Models and Scientific Explanations
abstract: A scientific hypothesis is the first step in research and undergoes experimental validation, yet it also reflects a deep understanding of and reasoning about scientific phenomena. We introduce DN-Hypo-Pipeline, an AI-powered workflow based on large language models, designed to support structured scientific thinking and hypothesis generation by leveraging scientific explanations as prior knowledge. This pipeline assists researchers in deriving novel hypotheses from existing literature. Given the explanandum (i.e., the conclusion) of a research paper, it identifies underlying laws, theories, and principles, and reconstructs a new, yet-to-be-verified explanation for the observed phenomenon. We evaluated DN-Hypo-Pipeline in the field of data science modeling using three highly cited papers. Statistical inference, supported by both LLM-as-judge assessment and human expert evaluation, demonstrates that our pipeline is more effective than direct generation methods. Additionally, we validated the two highest-scoring generated hypotheses by developing corresponding novel algorithms, which outperformed the baseline models presented in the original papers. Beyond application in data science, DN-Hypo-Pipeline provides a theoretical framework that not only encompasses theory-guided data science modeling methods but also reveals a more fundamental structure of the modeling process. Moreover, this approach is essentially a generalization of theory-guided modeling, offering potential for extension to other domains and across a broader range of scientific disciplines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DN-Hypo-Pipeline，一种利用大语言模型和科学解释生成可验证假设的AI工作流。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学假设是研究的第一步，但现有方法缺乏对科学现象的深层推理。直接生成假设质量不高，需要结构化方法整合先验知识。本文旨在通过大语言模型结合科学解释，自动从文献中推导新假设，提升假设生成的有效性和可验证性。
light_analysis.method: DN-Hypo-Pipeline利用大语言模型，以论文结论（explanandum）为输入，识别潜在定律、理论和原理，重构对观察现象的新解释。在数据科学领域，基于三篇高引论文评估，使用LLM-as-judge和人类专家进行统计推断，优于直接生成方法。
light_analysis.result: 评估表明DN-Hypo-Pipeline比直接生成更有效。验证了两个得分最高的假设，开发的新算法在性能上超越原论文的基线模型。统计推断（LLM-as-judge和人类专家）支持其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DN-Hypo-Pipeline提出一个涵盖理论指导数据科学建模的理论框架，揭示了建模过程的更根本结构。该方法本质上是理论指导建模的泛化，可扩展到其他科学领域，具有重要学术和应用价值。未来可探索更广泛的学科应用。

title: SegmentAnyTreeV2: Scaling Transformer-Based Tree Instance Segmentation Across Sensors, Platforms, and Forests
abstract: We present SegmentAnyTreeV2, a sensor- and platform-agnostic framework for semantic and instance segmentation of forest point clouds. The model combines a serialization-based Point Transformer v3 backbone with a lightweight semantic head and a tree-focused cross-attention mask decoder. Semantic predictions restrict instance decoding to tree-class voxels, while instance-aware query initialization, one-to-many seed supervision, and asymmetric mask scoring improve separation in dense and structurally complex stands. We further introduce FOR-instance v3, an expanded benchmark comprising 427 scenes and 26,496 annotated trees across diverse biomes, forest structures, and LiDAR platforms. On the FOR-instanceV2 test split, SegmentAnyTreeV2 achieves 90.5% precision, 80.2% recall, 85.0% F1, 90.7% coverage, and 87.6% semantic mIoU, outperforming previous learning-based methods in both instance detection and mask completeness. Zero-shot evaluation on independent sites further demonstrates strong cross-domain generalization.
comment: 25 pages, 6 figures, 10 tables, Corrected bibliography metadata and minor typographical issues; results unchanged

light_analysis.overview: 提出传感器与平台无关的树木实例分割框架，结合点云Transformer与跨注意力掩码解码器，提升密集森林场景的分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 森林点云分割在不同传感器、平台和林分结构下存在泛化挑战。现有方法依赖特定传感器或平台，且难以处理密集、结构复杂的林分，导致实例分割精度和完整性不足。为此，需要一种传感器与平台无关的通用框架，并构建多样化基准以评估跨域泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: SegmentAnyTreeV2采用基于序列化的Point Transformer v3骨干网络，结合轻量级语义头与树木聚焦的跨注意力掩码解码器。语义预测限制实例解码仅针对树木类体素；实例感知查询初始化、一对多种子监督和不对称掩码评分改善密集林分中的分割。引入FOR-instance v3基准，包含427场景及26,496棵标注树木，覆盖不同生物群落、森林结构和LiDAR平台。
light_analysis.result: 在FOR-instanceV2测试集上，SegmentAnyTreeV2达到90.5%精度、80.2%召回率、85.0% F1分数、90.7%覆盖率和87.6%语义mIoU，优于先前基于学习的方法。在独立站点的零样本评估中展现出强大的跨域泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SegmentAnyTreeV2提供了一种传感器与平台无关的树木实例分割方案，显著提升了密集林分的分割性能，并通过大规模多样化基准验证了跨域泛化能力。未来可扩展至更多传感器类型和森林生态系统，推动森林生态监测自动化。

title: SVHighlights: Towards Extremely Long Sport Video Highlight Detection
abstract: While highlight detection for long-form videos is of great practical importance, most existing methods remain limited to short-form content, largely due to the absence of a suitable benchmark. To bridge this gap, we introduce SVHighlights, to the best of our knowledge, the first benchmark for highlight detection in extremely long sports videos, each exceeding one hour in duration, across multiple sports categories. SVHighlights is constructed from pairs of full-length sports videos and their corresponding official highlight videos using a dataset generation pipeline, enabling scalable label generation without conventional per-clip saliency annotation. The benchmark comprises 320 videos with an average duration of 2.00 hours and a total of 640.18 hours, substantially exceeding previous datasets. Existing methods also face fundamental challenges on long videos: models trained on short clips fail to generalize to hour-long content, and their clip-level scoring lacks the broader context needed to identify highlights. To address this and provide a strong baseline, we present TF-SELECTOR, a training-free segment-based approach that divides each video into context-aware segments by merging adjacent shots sharing the same semantic content, and predicts segment-level saliency scores using a large language model with multimodal inputs including visual captions, transcripts, and audio volume. Experiments demonstrate that TF-SELECTOR achieves superior performance across most metrics compared to Video Temporal Grounding (VTG)-tuned baselines, with improvements of +2.50 in HIT@1, +4.04 in HIT@K, and +2.95 in IoU. These results establish SVHighlights as a challenging testbed for long-form highlight detection and demonstrate that a simple segment-based strategy can effectively scale to hour-long videos.
comment: Accepted to KDD 2026 (Datasets and Benchmarks Track). Project Page: https://leedongkyu2019.github.io/SVHighlights/

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个超长体育视频高光检测基准SVHighlights，并设计无需训练的段级方法TF-SELECTOR，有效处理小时级视频。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有高光检测方法局限于短视频，因缺少长视频基准，模型在小时级视频上泛化失败，且片段级评分缺乏全局上下文。该研究旨在填补这一空白，推动长视频高光检测发展。
light_analysis.method: SVHighlights由320个平均2小时的视频对（全长+官方高光）构成，总时长640.18小时，通过自动化流水线生成标签。TF-SELECTOR将视频分割为语义一致的段，利用大语言模型融合视觉字幕、转录和音频音量等多模态输入，预测段级显著性分数，无需训练。
light_analysis.result: TF-SELECTOR在多数指标上超越VTG基线：HIT@1提高2.50，HIT@K提高4.04，IoU提高2.95，证明段级策略可有效扩展至小时级视频，且SVHighlights构成挑战性测试集。
light_analysis.conclusion: SVHighlights为长视频高光检测提供首个大规模基准，TF-SELECTOR表明无需训练的段级方法结合大语言模型可有效识别高光，推动该领域向实用化发展。未来可探索更精细的语义分割或端到端训练策略。

title: Physics in 2-Steps: Locking Motion Priors Before Visual Refinement Erases Them
abstract: Image-to-Video diffusion models leverage input images to generate visually stunning content, yet frequently produce motion that violates physical laws. We reveal a surprising finding: a 2-step generation often exhibits better physical consistency than a 50-step output from the same model. Through spectral analysis, we trace this to phase erosion during denoising; the phase degrades significantly (dropping by $\approx 18\%$ from step 2 to step 50), whereas the magnitude remains relatively stable.
