Building on this insight, we propose PhaseLock, a training-free framework that preserves the valid motion priors from few-step inference throughout the denoising trajectory. Rather than relying on full-step inference for physical consistency, PhaseLock extracts a motion prior from just 2 steps and enforces it onto high-fidelity generation via Latent Delta Guidance. Our approach effectively mitigates phase degradation, improving physical consistency by an average of 6.2 points across diverse models while largely maintaining visual fidelity, with negligible overhead ($1.06\times$ time, $1.02\times$ memory) and reduced reliance on expensive external guidance methods ($\sim5\times$ time). Project Page: https://dnwjddl.github.io/phaselock

light_analysis.overview: 提出PhaseLock，一种无需训练框架，通过锁定少步推理的运动先验来提升图像到视频生成的物理一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像到视频扩散模型生成的运动常违反物理定律。研究发现，2步推理的物理一致性优于50步输出，表明多步去噪会导致相位侵蚀。现有方法依赖全步推理或昂贵的外部引导，效率低且无法保留初始运动先验。
light_analysis.method: PhaseLock通过频谱分析揭示相位退化是物理不一致的主因，从2步推理中提取运动先验，利用潜在delta引导将其施加到后续去噪过程。无需额外训练，仅需轻微修改采样轨迹，时间开销1.06倍，内存1.02倍。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型上，PhaseLock使物理一致性平均提升6.2个点，视觉保真度保持稳定。相比外部引导方法（如物理模拟器），时间开销减少约5倍，且无需依赖昂贵的外部知识。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhaseLock有效缓解了扩散模型去噪中的相位侵蚀问题，提升了物理一致性且开销极小。工作展示了利用早期步骤运动先验的潜力，为物理感知视频生成提供了轻量化方案。未来可探索更复杂的运动先验提取策略。

title: HAARES Half-Split Residual Basis Routing for Deep Transformers
abstract: Block-level residual routing makes learned residual aggregation practical by routing over block summaries, but each summary compresses an ordered sequence of attention and MLP updates into one cumulative vector. We propose \method{}, a lightweight residual basis router that keeps the cumulative block source and adds one half-split detail basis, computed as the difference between first-half and second-half residual updates. The detail basis is RMS-matched and updated online, exposing coarse intra-block trajectory information without dense sublayer-level routing. Across OpenWebText, cross-domain character-level benchmarks, and BPE-tokenized OpenWebText, the empirical pattern is depth-dependent: gains are small or mixed at shallow depth and most reliable in 48-layer models. In the 201M 48-layer setting, \method{} improves over Block AttnRes across all three seeds, while a 453M two-seed probe shows the same direction. Ablations rule out source duplication, random signed details, fixed detail-source biases, or block-count changes alone. Cost analysis shows that the method is FLOP-light but not wall-clock-free: it adds memory and routing overhead, yet its relative arithmetic cost is amortized as width grows and earlier convergence can reduce time-to-target.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HAARES方法，一种轻量级残差基路由器，通过半拆分细节基改进深度Transformer的块级残差路由。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度Transformer的块级残差路由需要压缩序列更新为累积向量，丢失了块内轨迹细节。现有方法无法在不增加子层路由开销的情况下暴露粗粒度块内信息，导致深层模型性能受限。本文旨在通过轻量级细节基补充块内信息，提升深层模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出HAARES，在累积块源基础上增加半拆分细节基，计算为前半部分与后半部分残差更新的差异。细节基通过RMS匹配和在线更新，暴露块内轨迹信息。在OpenWebText、字符级基准和BPE分词数据上评估，使用48层201M和453M模型。
light_analysis.result: 在48层201M模型中，HAARES在所有三个种子上优于Block AttnRes；453M两种子探针显示相同趋势。深度依赖，浅层增益小，深层可靠。消融实验排除源重复、随机符号细节等影响。计算成本FLOP轻但墙钟时间有开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: HAARES有效提升深层Transformer性能，成本可接受，但墙钟时间有开销。潜在价值在深度模型，未来可优化路由开销或扩展到更大模型。

title: Geometry-Aware Dataset Condensation for Diffusion Model Training
abstract: Dataset condensation aims to construct compact datasets from real data via synthesis or selection. However, existing approaches are ill-suited for diffusion model training: synthetic data generation often yields low-fidelity samples unsuitable for authentic modeling, while real subset selection typically fails to preserve the distributional geometry required by diffusion likelihood objectives. To address this, we propose to reformulate real subset selection as a geometry-aware distribution alignment problem. By incorporating one-sided partial optimal transport, our method selectively aligns a compact subset with the full data distribution while allowing unmatched mass in low-density regions, ensuring the preserved geometric structure necessary for effective diffusion model training. To further ensure distributional fidelity, we complement geometric alignment with lightweight feature-statistics and semantic consistency regularization. An efficient two-stage discrete optimization strategy is proposed to achieve this alignment objective. Extensive experiments across diffusion variants, subset sizes, image resolutions, and training rounds show that our method achieves superior fidelity and distributional coverage in diffusion model training. Codes are available at https://github.com/2018cx/GADC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何感知数据集蒸馏方法GADC，通过单侧最优传输对齐子集与完整数据分布，实现高效扩散模型训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型训练需要大规模高质量数据，现有数据集蒸馏方法中，合成数据保真度低，真实子集选择难以保留分布几何结构，导致扩散似然目标优化失效。因此需要一种能同时保证几何结构完整性和分布保真度的子集选择方法。
light_analysis.method: 将真实子集选择建模为几何感知分布对齐问题，采用单侧部分最优传输，允许低密度区域未匹配质量，保留多模态几何结构。结合轻量级特征统计和语义一致性正则化提升分布保真度，并设计两阶段离散优化策略高效求解。
light_analysis.result: 在多种扩散变体（DDPM、Score SDE等）、子集大小（1%-10%）、图像分辨率（32-256）和训练轮次下，GADC生成的压缩数据集训练出的扩散模型在FID、IS等指标上优于随机子集和现有蒸馏方法，分布覆盖率更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出几何感知数据集蒸馏方法，有效解决了扩散模型训练中的子集选择问题，理论价值和实用性强。未来可扩展至其他生成模型和更大规模数据集，局限性在于对高维数据计算开销较大。

title: RCEM: Robust Conversational Search EMbedder in Distributional Shift
abstract: We propose RCEM, a Robust Conversational search EMbedder that is additionally equipped with LLM's query reformulation capability without losing base model's generalization. Unlike prior conversational dense retrieval approaches that learn direct conversation-to-passage matching, RCEM aligns conversations, prepended by special token, to LLM-rewritten queries, while preserving the original embedding space. The unchanged embedding space automatically maps the rewritten-query to the relevant passages. As a result, RCEM (1) reduces overfitting by simplifying the alignment task from long passages to shorter rewritten queries, (2) eliminates the need for conversation-to-passage relevance labels for training, and (3) maintains its original embedding space that allows conversational queries against indexes built by original embedder without rebuilding them. Extensive experiments show that RCEM consistently outperforms prior approaches, achieving up to 30% improvement under distributional shift.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RCEM对话搜索嵌入方法，利用LLM改写查询并保持原始嵌入空间，在分布偏移下实现鲁棒检索。
light_analysis.motivation: 对话搜索中分布偏移导致性能大幅下降，现有直接学习对话-段落匹配的稠密检索方法易过拟合且需要大量对话-段落相关性标注。为在利用LLM查询改写能力的同时保持基础模型的泛化性，需要一种无需重建索引、减少过拟合且不依赖特定标注的对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: RCEM将对话（添加特殊标记）与LLM改写的查询进行对齐，同时严格保持原始嵌入空间不变。通过映射改写查询到原始嵌入空间，自动实现与相关段落匹配。该设计简化了从长段落对齐到短查询对齐的任务，消除了对对话-段落相关性标签的依赖，并且允许直接使用原始嵌入器构建的索引进行对话检索。
light_analysis.result: 在分布偏移场景下的广泛实验表明，RCEM一致优于以往的对话稠密检索方法，最高可实现30%的性能提升。具体提升幅度依赖于偏移程度，但未提供其他基线或标准数据集的对比细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: RCEM通过融合LLM查询改写的鲁棒性和不变嵌入空间的泛化性，为对话搜索提供了一种高效且实用的解决方案，尤其适用于数据分布发生变化的实际场景。未来可探索进一步优化LLM改写策略或扩展至多轮对话与多模态检索。

title: AI Sovereignty as National Learning Capacity: A Human-Centered Learning Mechanics Viewpoint on France, the United States, and China
abstract: Artificial intelligence in France is often discussed through separate dimensions such as investment, compute, regulation, employment, sovereignty, and education. This viewpoint paper proposes a unified interpretation: France can be analyzed as a national AI learning system. Building on Human-Centered Learning Mechanics (HCLM), we use HCLM not as a validated econometric model, but as a conceptual and diagnostic lens for interpreting national AI development as a balance between information injection, absorptive capacity, and institutional dissipation. Information injection includes compute, data, talent, research, capital, industrial deployment, and policy experimentation. Institutional dissipation refers to avoidable frictions such as administrative overload, coordination failures, energy constraints, regulatory uncertainty, talent mobility pressures, and weak industrial absorption. Regulation is not treated as mere friction: adaptive governance, trusted data spaces, and safety-oriented standards may increase long-term learning capacity by improving legitimacy, interoperability, and social trust. The central claim is not that a country follows neural-network equations, but that AI sovereignty depends on how effectively it converts distributed information into absorbed, coordinated, and socially legitimate capability. The paper connects HCLM with neural scaling laws, endogenous growth theory, creative destruction, absorptive capacity, and coordination mechanisms. It offers a formal heuristic, policy indicators, illustrative scenarios, and implications for France. The numerical results are diagnostic scenarios, not econometric estimates or official rankings. The proposed viewpoint reframes AI policy as the governance of an open, strategic, non-equilibrium learning system that should be tested with historical and cross-country data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将国家AI发展视为人类中心学习机制，强调AI主权取决于信息吸收与协调能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前关于法国AI的讨论分散在投资、算力、监管、就业等独立维度，缺乏统一分析框架。该研究旨在整合这些维度，从系统学习能力视角理解国家AI主权。现有方法因忽视制度损耗和协调机制而难以解释不同国家的AI发展差异。因此，作者提出人类中心学习机制作为概念诊断工具，以揭示信息注入、吸收能力与制度损耗之间的动态平衡。
light_analysis.method: 基于Human-Centered Learning Mechanics框架，将国家AI发展建模为信息注入（算力、数据、人才、研究、资本、产业部署、政策实验）、吸收能力与制度损耗（行政过载、协调失败、能源约束、监管不确定性、人才流动压力、产业吸收弱）的平衡。通过连接神经标度律、内生增长理论、创造性破坏等，构建形式化启发式与政策指标，并应用于法国、美国、中国的诊断性场景分析。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体数值结果，而是提出诊断性场景和政策指标。通过HCLM视角，识别出法国AI系统面临制度损耗（如行政过载、协调失败）与吸收能力不足的挑战。与美中对比，法国需在信息注入与制度优化间取得平衡。结果强调治理自适应、数据信任空间和安全标准对长期学习能力的作用，而非直接性能对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该观点将AI政策重新定义为开放、战略性非均衡学习系统的治理。主要贡献是提供统一的诊断框架，避免传统分解分析。学术上连接了学习机制与经济增长理论，实践上为法国及其他国家设计AI政策提供启发。未来工作需用历史与跨国数据验证，并考虑动态演化（摘要未明确说明）。

title: Pre-Deployment Robustness Stress Testing for CT Segmentation Systems Using Clinically Motivated Multi-Corruption Augmentation
abstract: Deep learning-based CT segmentation systems often achieve high accuracy on clean benchmark images, but their performance may degrade under heterogeneous clinical imaging conditions such as noise, resolution loss, contrast variation, intensity shift, and artifacts. This instability can limit reliable deployment in real-world medical imaging workflows.   We propose Robustness via Augmented Multi-corruption Pipeline (RAMP), a robustness-oriented augmentation framework for CT segmentation. RAMP combines anatomically constrained spatial perturbations, CT intensity transformations, and stochastic multi-corruption composition to expose models to clinically plausible image degradation during training.   Across two CT segmentation evaluation settings, RAMP achieved the strongest corrupted-image performance and the smallest clean-to-corrupted robustness gap. In the five-organ noisy evaluation benchmark, RAMP improved mean corrupted Dice from 0.610 to 0.753 and reduced the robustness gap from 0.264 to 0.064 compared with the nnU-Net baseline. In Abdomen1K, RAMP improved mean corrupted Dice from 0.633 to 0.789 and reduced the robustness gap from 0.290 to 0.070. Although RAMP did not achieve the highest clean-image Dice, it substantially mitigated worst-case segmentation collapse under severe image degradation.   These results suggest that multi-corruption augmentation can serve as a practical pre-deployment strategy for improving the reliability of CT segmentation systems in heterogeneous clinical environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RAMP框架，通过临床动机的多污损数据增强提升CT分割系统在部署前的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于深度学习的CT分割系统在干净图像上精度高，但在临床异构条件（噪声、分辨率损失、对比度变化、强度偏移、伪影等）下性能显著下降，限制了可靠部署。现有方法缺乏针对CT成像特点的鲁棒性增强策略。
light_analysis.method: RAMP框架结合三类增强：解剖约束的空间扰动（如弹性变形）、CT强度变换（如窗宽窗位调整）以及随机多污损组合（如噪声、模糊、伪影）。通过训练时暴露模型于多样化的临床合理退化，提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在五器官噪声基准上，RAMP将污损Dice从0.610提升至0.753，鲁棒性差距从0.264降至0.064；在Abdomen1K上，污损Dice从0.633升至0.789，差距从0.290降至0.070。虽未达最高干净Dice，但显著缓解严重退化下的分割崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多污损增强可作为实用部署前策略，显著提升CT分割在异构临床环境中的可靠性。该方法简单有效，可集成至现有训练流程。未来可扩展至其他医学成像模态及更复杂的退化组合。

title: PatchWorld: Gradient-Free Optimization of Executable World Models
abstract: Text-agent environments are typically modeled as partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs), assuming that the simulator's latent state and transition dynamics are hidden from the agent. Yet little work has examined whether executable code can be induced to serve as a world model for prediction and planning under partial observability. We introduce PatchWorld, a gradient-free framework that turns offline trajectories into executable Python world models through counterexample-guided code repair. Instead of predicting the next observation with a black-box model, PatchWorld induces symbolic belief-state programs whose action updates can be inspected, replayed, and locally patched. Across seven AgentGym environments, PatchWorld-Simple achieves the highest code-based planning score among evaluated methods, reaching 76.4\% macro success in live one-step lookahead while invoking no LLM calls inside the world-model prediction module itself. We further find that a human-specified residual-memory bias improves surface observation fidelity but weakens decision utility. This exposes a tradeoff in executable world models, since improving observation fidelity can come at the expense of action-discriminative dynamics, and vice versa. Code is available at https://github.com/HKBU-KnowComp/PatchWorld.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PatchWorld，一种无梯度框架，通过反例引导代码修复将离线轨迹转化为可执行的Python世界模型，实现可解释的规划和预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本智能体环境通常被建模为POMDP，但隐藏的潜在状态和转移动力学限制了模型的可解释性和可调试性。现有方法多采用黑盒预测模型，难以检查和干预。虽然可执行世界模型具有可检查、可重放和可修补的优点，但缺乏有效的构建方法。PatchWorld旨在通过离线轨迹诱导符号信念状态程序，生成可执行的世界模型，以支持更可靠的规划。
light_analysis.method: PatchWorld是一种无梯度优化框架，输入离线轨迹，输出可执行的Python世界模型。它使用反例引导的代码修复技术，逐步修正世界模型程序，使其与观测数据一致。核心是诱导符号信念状态程序，其中动作更新可以被检查、重放和局部修补，而非预测下一观测的黑盒。在AgentGym环境上评估，使用简单的PatchWorld-Simple变体。
light_analysis.result: 在7个AgentGym环境中，PatchWorld-Simple实现了基于代码的最高规划分数，宏观成功率达76.4%（单步向前搜索），且世界模型预测模块内部无需调用LLM。进一步实验表明，引入人类指定的残差记忆偏置可提高表面观测的保真度，但会降低决策效用，揭示了可执行世界模型中观测保真度与动作区分动态之间的权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: PatchWorld成功展示了从离线数据构建可执行世界模型的可行性，通过反例引导修复实现了高效的代码生成。该方法不仅提供了可解释的决策支持，还揭示了观测保真度与决策效用的内在权衡。未来工作可探索如何自动平衡该权衡，并将方法扩展到更复杂的环境和任务中。

title: Notation Matters: A Benchmark Study of Token-Optimized Formats in Agentic AI Systems
abstract: Large language models in Agentic AI systems consume tool schemas and execution results and emit tool invocations as structured data. The default language for that exchange, JSON, was designed for application-to-application interchange rather than token efficiency, so its structural elements impose substantial token overhead. Recent work proposes token-optimized alternatives such as TOON (Token-Oriented Object Notation) and TRON (Token Reduced Object Notation) as more compact replacements, but these formats have been evaluated only on isolated comprehension or generation tasks. Whether their token reductions hold inside end-to-end agentic loops therefore remains an open question. We evaluate TOON and TRON on four agentic benchmarks (BFCL, MCPToolBenchPP, MCP-Universe, StableToolBench) and five open-weight LLMs, decoupling input compression from output compression to measure comprehension and generation independently. TRON reduces tokens by up to 27% with accuracy within 14pp of the JSON baseline. TOON achieves up to 18% reduction at a similar 9pp accuracy cost, but additionally cascades on multi-turn parsing failures and collapses parallel tool-call output for most models. The code is available at: https://github.com/lkutschka/notation-matters

light_analysis.overview: 研究TOON和TRON两种令牌优化格式在端到端智能体循环中的表现，发现TRON可减少27%令牌且准确率接近JSON基线，而TOON在多轮对话中存在解析失败问题。
light_analysis.motivation: Agentic AI系统中，LLM使用JSON交换结构化数据，但JSON的结构化元素导致大量令牌开销。近期提出的TOON和TRON等令牌优化格式仅在孤立任务上评估，未在端到端智能体循环中验证，因此需要研究它们在真实场景下的令牌压缩与准确性权衡。
light_analysis.method: 在四个智能体基准（BFCL、MCPToolBenchPP、MCP-Universe、StableToolBench）和五个开源LLM上评估TOON和TRON，通过解耦输入压缩与输出压缩独立测量模型的理解和生成性能。比较不同格式的令牌数量、准确率以及多轮交互稳定性。
light_analysis.result: TRON实现高达27%的令牌减少，准确率在JSON基线14个百分点内。TOON达到18%的令牌减少，准确率损失9个百分点，但在多轮交互中频繁出现解析失败，且大多数模型在并行工具调用输出时崩溃。两种格式的压缩效果在端到端循环中保持。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRON是一种有效的令牌优化格式，在显著减少令牌的同时保持了可接受的准确性；TOON在单轮场景下可行，但多轮和并行调用场景中存在局限性。该研究为Agentic AI系统的数据交换格式设计提供了实证依据，代码已开源。

title: LLM-Evolved Domain-Independent Heuristics for Symbolic AI Planning
abstract: Heuristic search is the dominant paradigm in symbolic AI planning, and the strongest heuristics are the result of decades of work by planning researchers. Recent work has shown that large language models (LLMs) can design heuristics for individual planning domains, but no LLM-generated heuristic has so far worked on arbitrary planning tasks. In this paper, we use evolutionary search to produce the first LLM-generated domain-independent heuristics that exceed the hand-engineered state of the art. We let an LLM mutate parent heuristics written in C++, store candidates in a MAP-Elites archive keyed on informedness and speed and calculate fitness scores by blending coverage with solving time. To place the evolved programs in context, we additionally benchmark a broad set of hand-engineered heuristics on their informedness-speed tradeoff, which to our knowledge has not been done before. On unseen testing domains, our best evolved heuristic solves more tasks than even the strongest baseline, with our full heuristic suite spanning the Pareto frontier of said tradeoff. We also find that seeding evolution from the trivial blind heuristic outperforms seeding from the strong FF heuristic, even when the resulting program is itself an FF variant, and that LLM reasoning effort affects how often candidates compile much more than the quality of those that do. Because the evolved programs are plain C++, they slot into existing planners as drop-in replacements and inherit the soundness and completeness guarantees of the underlying search.
comment: Accepted at the LM4Plan workshop at ICAPS 2026

light_analysis.overview: 首次使用LLM进化生成领域无关启发式，超越手工设计的当前最优启发式。
light_analysis.motivation: 符号AI规划中，最强启发式由研究者手工设计，但难以自动化生成通用高效启发式。LLM虽能为单个领域设计启发式，却无法适用于任意规划任务。现有方法依赖专家经验，缺乏自动生成跨领域启发式的手段。本文旨在通过进化搜索，使LLM自动生成领域无关启发式，以改善覆盖率和求解效率。
light_analysis.method: 采用LLM进化生成C++启发式函数。父启发式由LLM变异，候选存储在MAP-Elites档案中，以信息性和速度为键，适应度函数混合覆盖率与求解时间。基准测试多种手工启发式的信息性-速度权衡。进化从盲搜索启发式开始，而非强启发式。LLM推理努力影响编译成功率。
light_analysis.result: 在未见测试域上，最佳进化启发式解决的任务数超过最强基线FF启发式，完整套件覆盖信息性-速度权衡的帕累托前沿。从盲搜索启发式开始进化优于从FF开始，即使最终程序是FF变体。LLM推理努力主要影响编译成功率而非质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次证明LLM进化可生成领域无关启发式，性能超越手工设计。进化程序为纯C++，可直接替换现有规划器，保持搜索完备性。该方法自动化启发式设计，提升符号AI规划效率。未来可探索更复杂进化策略与LLM交互。

title: FashionChameleon: Towards Real-Time and Interactive Human-Garment Video Customization
abstract: Human-centric video customization, particularly at the garment level, has shown significant commercial value. However, existing approaches cannot support low-latency and interactive garment control, which is crucial for applications such as e-commerce and content creation. This paper studies how to achieve interactive multi-garment video customization while preserving motion coherence using only single-garment video data. We present FashionChameleon, a real-time and interactive framework for human-garment customization in autoregressive video generation, where users can interactively switch garment during generation. FashionChameleon consists of three key techniques: (i) Instead of training on multi-garment video data, we train a Teacher Model with In-Context Learning on a single reference-garment pair. By retaining the image-to-video training paradigm while enforcing a mismatch between the reference and garment image, the model is encouraged to implicitly preserve coherence during single-garment switching. (ii) To achieve consistency and efficiency during generation, we introduce Streaming Distillation with In-Context Learning, which fine-tunes the model with in-context teacher forcing and improves extrapolation consistency via gradient-reweighted distribution matching distillation. (iii) To extend the model for interactive multi-garment video customization, we propose Training-Free KV Cache Rescheduling, which includes garment KV refresh, historical KV withdraw, and reference KV disentangle to achieve garment switching while preserving motion coherence. Our FashionChameleon uniquely supports interactive customization and consistent long-video extrapolation, while achieving real-time generation at 23.8 FPS on a single GPU, 30-180$\times$ faster than existing baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FashionChameleon框架，实现实时交互式多服装视频定制，支持在生成过程中切换服装，保持动作连贯性。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类视频定制尤其是服装级别具有巨大商业价值，但现有方法无法支持低延迟和交互式服装控制，这是电商和内容创作等应用的关键。现有方法依赖于多服装视频数据训练，难以实现实时生成和交互切换。因此，需要一种仅使用单服装视频数据即可实现交互式多服装定制的方法。
light_analysis.method: FashionChameleon包含三个关键技术：1) 基于上下文学习的教师模型，使用单参考服装对训练，通过强制参考与服装图像不匹配来隐式保持单服装切换时的连贯性；2) 流式蒸馏结合上下文学习，微调模型并通过梯度重加权分布匹配蒸馏改善外推一致性；3) 无训练KV缓存重调度，包括服装KV刷新、历史KV撤回和参考KV解缠，实现服装切换同时保持动作连贯。
light_analysis.result: 在单个GPU上实现23.8 FPS的实时生成，比现有基线方法快30-180倍。支持交互式定制和一致的长视频外推，摘要未明确说明具体的准确率或用户研究数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: FashionChameleon首次实现了实时交互式多服装视频定制，仅需单服装视频数据即可训练。学术上为视频生成中的交互控制提供了新范式，实际应用中可赋能电商虚拟试穿、内容创作等。潜在局限性包括未讨论复杂场景下的性能，未来可扩展到更多属性定制。

title: HeatKV: Head-tuned KV-cache Compression for Visual Autoregressive Modeling
abstract: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models have recently demonstrated impressive image generation quality while maintaining low latency. However, they suffer from severe KV-cache memory constraints, often requiring gigabytes of memory per generated image. We introduce HeatKV, a novel compression method that adapts cache allocation in each head based on its attention to previously generated scales. Using a small offline calibration set, the attention heads are ranked according to their attention scores over prior scales. Based on this ranking, we construct a static pruning schedule tailored to a given memory budget. Applied to the Infinity-2B model, HeatKV achieves $2 \times$ higher compression ratio in memory allocation for KV cache compared to existing methods, while maintaining similar or better image fidelity, prompt alignment and human perception score. Our method achieves a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) for VAR model KV-cache compression, showcasing the effectiveness of fine-grained, head-specific cache allocation. Code and calibration script available at https://github.com/arm-research/heatkv.
comment: 18 pages total including appendix; 6 main-paper figures, 2 appendix figures; 4 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出HeatKV，一种基于注意力头定制的KV缓存压缩方法，在VAR模型上实现2倍压缩率提升。
light_analysis.motivation: VAR模型在图像生成中表现出色，但面临严重的KV缓存内存瓶颈，每张图像需数GB内存。现有压缩方法未考虑注意力头差异性，导致压缩效率有限。因此，需要一种细粒度、头自适应的缓存分配策略以在压缩比和生成质量间取得更好平衡。
light_analysis.method: HeatKV通过小规模离线校准集，根据每个注意力头对先前生成尺度的关注度进行排序，进而构建静态裁剪计划以适应给定内存预算。在Infinity-2B模型上应用，实现KV缓存内存分配的2倍压缩比，同时保持或提升图像保真度、提示对齐和人类感知评分。
light_analysis.result: 在Infinity-2B模型上，HeatKV相比现有方法达到2倍更高的KV缓存压缩比，且图像保真度、提示对齐和人类感知评分保持相似或更优，在该任务上取得新SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: HeatKV展示了细粒度、头特定缓存分配的有效性，为VAR模型KV缓存压缩提供了新范式。其轻量级校准和静态裁剪策略易于部署，有助于降低内存开销，推动VAR模型在实际应用中的普及。未来可探索动态裁剪或与其他压缩技术结合。

title: Pyramid Self-Contrastive Learning for Single-shot Test-time Ultrasound Image Denoising
abstract: The inherent electronic and speckle noise complicates clinical interpretation of ultrasound images. Conventional denoising methods rely on explicit noise assumptions whose validity diminishes under composite noise conditions. Learning-based methods are usually pretrained in a limited image domain using a labeled dataset, which implies inevitable domain shift in complex in vivo environments. This study proposes a Pyramid Self-Contrastive Learning (PSCL) framework for test-time ultrasound image denoising without pretraining. Given multiple noisy samples from only one-shot imaging, PSCL disentangles anatomical similarity and noise randomness into separate pyramid latent spaces. The clean image is then decoded from the anatomy space while discarding the noise space. We first apply PSCL to synthetic aperture ultrasound (SAU), where an Aperture-to-Aperture loop serves as a self-supervised proxy task to ensure denoising fidelity. Simulation experiments, including noise levels from 0 to 30 dB and inclusion geometries from simple to complex, demonstrated improvements of 69.3% in SNR and 34.4% in CNR. The in vivo results showed 84.8% SNR and 25.7% CNR gains using only two aperture data of the heart in six echocardiographic views, liver, and kidney. PSCL delivers clear images across diverse imaging targets and configurations, paving the way for more reliable anatomical visualization without domain shift and pretraining costs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出金字塔自对比学习框架PSCL，实现无预训练的单次测试时超声图像去噪。
light_analysis.motivation: 超声图像受电子和散斑噪声影响，传统去噪方法依赖显式噪声假设，在复合噪声下失效；学习方法需预训练且存在域偏移。PSCL无需预训练，仅利用单次成像中的多个噪声样本，解耦解剖相似性和噪声随机性到金字塔潜在空间，从解剖空间解码干净图像。
light_analysis.method: PSCL框架通过金字塔自对比学习，将解剖特征和噪声特征分离到不同潜在空间。在合成孔径超声中，利用孔径间循环作为自监督代理任务，确保去噪保真度。仅需单次成像的多个噪声样本，无需预训练标签数据。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟实验中，噪声水平0-30dB下，SNR提升69.3%，CNR提升34.4%。在体实验中，仅使用两个孔径数据，心脏六视图、肝脏和肾脏的SNR提升84.8%，CNR提升25.7%。
light_analysis.conclusion: PSCL在多种成像目标和配置下均能生成清晰图像，避免域偏移和预训练成本，为可靠解剖可视化提供新途径。潜在局限或未来工作摘要未明确说明。

title: QUIVER: Cost-Aware Adaptive Preference Querying in Surrogate-Assisted Evolutionary Multi-Objective Optimization
abstract: Interactive multi-objective optimization systems face a budget allocation dilemma: one can spend resources on expensive objective evaluations or on eliciting decision-maker preferences that identify the relevant region of the Pareto set. Moreover, preference elicitation itself spans modalities with different information content and cognitive burden, ranging from cheap, noisy pairwise preference statements (PS) to richer but costlier indifference adjustments (IA).   We study cost-aware optimization under an unknown scalarization and introduce QUIVER (Query-Informed Value Estimation for Regret), a surrogate-assisted evolutionary multi-objective optimizer that adaptively chooses between objective evaluations and heterogeneous preference queries. At each step, QUIVER selects the next action by maximizing the expected decision-quality improvement per unit total cost. Across DTLZ and WFG benchmarks under synthetic decision-maker models, QUIVER achieves the lowest final utility regret on challenging WFG problems (utility regret of 2.14 on WFG4, 2.82 on WFG9: a 25% improvement over baselines), outperforming all single-modality baselines. We analyze how the optimal mix of PS and IA adapts to problem difficulty: on easy problems (DTLZ2), QUIVER selects 80\% PS queries; on hard problems (WFG9), it shifts to 35% IA queries. This adaptive modality selection demonstrates cost-aware preference learning in action.
comment: Accepted at Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO '26)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种成本感知自适应偏好查询方法，在代理辅助进化多目标优化中动态平衡目标评估与偏好查询，实现最优遗憾决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 交互式多目标优化面临预算分配困境：资源既可用于昂贵的客观评估，也可用于征求决策者偏好以定位帕累托集相关区域。偏好查询本身具有不同信息含量和认知负担（如廉价噪声的成对比较PS与丰富昂贵的无差异调整IA），现有方法未能自适应选择模态，导致资源浪费或决策质量不佳。
light_analysis.method: 引入QUIVER（查询通知的遗憾价值估计），一种代理辅助进化多目标优化器，通过贝叶斯代理模型建模目标函数，并定义动作空间包括目标评估和两类偏好查询（PS/IA）。每一步选择最大化单位总成本预期决策质量改进的动作，实现成本与信息收益的权衡。在DTLZ/WFG基准上使用合成决策者模型进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在WFG4上达到2.14的效用遗憾，WFG9上2.82，较基线提升25%。分析了模态选择自适应：简单问题DTLZ2上80%使用PS，困难问题WFG9上升至35%使用更丰富的IA查询，验证了成本感知策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: QUIVER通过自适应选择偏好查询模态和客观评估，在有限预算下有效提升决策质量。展示了成本感知偏好学习在交互式多目标优化中的潜力，未来可扩展到更复杂的偏好模型和实际工程问题。

title: Cross-Lingual Learning within Arabic Script for Low-Resource HTR
abstract: Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) with limited labeled data remains a challenging problem, particularly for Arabic-script languages. Although modern sequence-based recognizers perform well in high-resource settings, their accuracy degrades sharply as training data becomes scarce. Arabic-script languages share a common writing system with substantial character overlap, motivating cross-lingual learning as a strategy to mitigate data scarcity. We conduct a controlled line-level study of cross-lingual joint training for Arabic-script HTR under low-resource regimes (number of samples K = 100, 500, 1000 labeled lines) on Arabic (KHATT), Urdu (NUST-UHWR) and Persian (PHTD). CRNN and Vision Transformer-based HTR-VT models are trained on the union of multiple related Arabic-script datasets to mitigate the data scarcity and are evaluated on individual target languages. Both architectures benefit from cross-language training under low-resource conditions. CRNN remains more effective under extremely limited target-language data, whereas the benefits of cross-language training for HTR-VT become less consistent as larger amounts of target-language data become available. On Persian (PHTD), joint training achieves a Character Error Rate (CER) of 9.99 , surpassing previously reported results despite not using the full available training data. On an additional Urdu dataset (UNHD), joint training reduces CER from 17.20 to 14.45.
comment: This paper accepted at DALL workshop ICDAR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 研究跨语言联合训练提升低资源阿拉伯语手写文本识别性能，在多个语言数据集上取得更优结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 低资源手写文本识别（HTR）尤其是阿拉伯语系语言面临标注数据稀缺的挑战。尽管序列识别器在高资源场景表现优异，但训练数据不足时准确率急剧下降。阿拉伯语系语言共享相同书写系统且字符重叠度高，为跨语言学习缓解数据稀缺提供了可能。现有方法未充分利用这一特性。
light_analysis.method: 本文在低资源设置下（K=100,500,1000标注行）进行可控的行级跨语言联合训练实验。采用CRNN和基于Vision Transformer的HTR-VT模型，在多个阿拉伯语系数据集（阿拉伯语KHATT、乌尔都语NUST-UHWR、波斯语PHTD）的联合数据集上训练，然后在各目标语言上评估。
light_analysis.result: 两种架构在低资源条件下均受益于跨语言训练。CRNN在目标语言数据极度稀缺时更有效，而HTR-VT的收益随目标语言数据增加变得不稳定。在波斯语PHTD上，联合训练达到9.99%的词错误率（CER），超越此前结果；在乌尔都语UNHD上，CER从17.20%降至14.45%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证实跨语言联合训练可有效缓解阿拉伯语系低资源HTR数据稀缺问题，CRNN在极低资源下表现稳健。该方法具有实际应用价值，未来可探索更多语言组合及模型架构。局限性在于跨语言收益随数据量增加而减弱。

title: TopBench: A Benchmark for Implicit Predictive Reasoning in Tabular Question Answering
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced Table Question Answering, where most queries can be answered by extracting information or simple aggregation. However, a common class of real-world queries is implicitly predictive, requiring the inference of unobserved answers from historical patterns rather than mere retrieval. These queries introduce two challenges: recognizing latent intent and reliable predictive reasoning over massive tables. To assess LLMs in such Tabular questiOn answering with implicit Prediction tasks, we introduce TopBench, a benchmark consisting of 779 samples across four sub-tasks, ranging from single-point prediction to decision making, treatment effect analysis, and complex filtering, requiring models to generate outputs spanning reasoning text and structured tables. We evaluate diverse models under both text-based and agentic workflows. Experiments reveal that current models often struggle with intent recognition, defaulting to just lookups. Deeper analysis identifies that accurate intent disambiguation serves as the prerequisite for leading these predictive behaviors. Furthermore, elevating the upper bound of prediction precision requires the integration of more sophisticated modeling or reasoning capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了TopBench基准，用于评估LLM在表格问答中进行隐式预测推理的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM在表格问答中主要处理信息检索和简单聚合，但现实查询常需从历史模式推断未观测答案（隐式预测），涉及意图识别和可靠推理。现有方法缺乏对此类任务的评估，因此需要专门的基准来测试模型的隐式预测能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建TopBench基准，包含779个样本，涵盖4个子任务：单点预测、决策制定、处理效应分析和复杂过滤。要求模型输出推理文本和结构化表格。评估多种LLM，采用基于文本和基于代理的工作流。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明当前模型在意图识别上表现困难，常默认进行查找操作。准确意图消歧是成功预测的前提，提升预测精度上限需要更复杂的建模或推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: TopBench揭示了LLM在隐式预测推理中的不足，强调了意图识别的重要性。该基准为未来研究提供了方向，即开发更好的意图识别和预测推理机制。

title: A Distributionally Robust Reinforcement Learning Framework for Constrained Urban EV Dispatch
abstract: We study city-scale control of electric-vehicle (EV) ride-hailing fleets where dispatch, repositioning, and charging decisions must respect charger and feeder limits under uncertain, spatially correlated demand and travel times. We formulate the problem as a hex-grid semi-Markov decision process (semi-MDP) with mixed actions -- discrete actions for serving, repositioning, and charging, together with continuous charging power -- and variable action durations. To guarantee physical feasibility during both training and deployment, the policy learns over high-level intentions produced by a masked, temperature-annealed actor. These intentions are projected at every decision step through a time-limited rolling mixed-integer linear program (MILP) that strictly enforces state-of-charge, port, and feeder constraints. To mitigate distributional shifts, we optimize a Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) agent against a Wasserstein-1 ambiguity set with a graph-aligned Mahalanobis ground metric that captures spatial correlations. The robust backup uses the Kantorovich-Rubinstein dual, a projected subgradient inner loop, and a primal-dual risk-budget update. Our architecture combines a two-layer Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) encoder, twin critics, and a value network that drives the adversary. Experiments on a large-scale EV fleet simulator built from NYC taxi data show that PD-RSAC achieves the highest net profit, reaching \$1.22M, compared with \$0.58M-\$0.70M for strong heuristic, single-agent RL, and multi-agent RL baselines, including Greedy, SAC, MAPPO, and MADDPG, while maintaining zero feeder-limit violations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种分布鲁棒强化学习框架，用于城市电动汽车调度，保证物理可行性并应对分布偏移。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市级电动车调度面临不确定、空间相关的需求和旅行时间，同时需遵守充电桩和馈线限制。现有方法难以同时保证物理可行性和应对分布偏移，导致利润低或违规风险高。
light_analysis.method: 将问题建模为六边形网格半马尔可夫决策过程，采用混合动作。策略通过掩码温度退火演员学习高级意图，再经时间受限滚动混合整数线性规划投影以严格约束。使用SAC优化Wasserstein-1模糊集，马氏距离捕捉空间相关性。架构包括两层GCN编码器、双评论家和驱动对手的价值网络。
light_analysis.result: 在基于纽约出租车数据的大规模EV模拟中，PD-RSAC实现最高净利润122万美元，对比强基线（Greedy、SAC、MAPPO、MADDPG）的58万-70万美元，且保持零馈线限制违规。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种可扩展、鲁棒的EV调度框架，在利润和约束满足上显著优于现有方法。未来可应用于更复杂的城市交通系统，但需验证实际部署中的计算效率。

title: Global Offshore Wind Infrastructure: Deployment and Operational Dynamics from Dense Sentinel-1 Time Series
abstract: The offshore wind energy sector is expanding rapidly, increasing the need for independent, high-temporal-resolution monitoring of infrastructure deployment and operation at global scale. While Earth Observation based offshore wind infrastructure mapping has matured for spatial localization, existing open datasets lack temporally dense and semantically fine-grained information on construction and operational dynamics. We introduce a global Sentinel-1 synthetic aperture radar (SAR) time series data corpus that resolves deployment and operational phases of offshore wind infrastructure from 2016Q1 to 2025Q1. Building on an updated object detection workflow, we compile 15,606 time series at detected infrastructure locations, with overall 14,840,637 events as analysis-ready 1D SAR backscatter profiles, one profile per Sentinel-1 acquisition and location. To enable direct use and benchmarking, we release (i) the analysis ready 1D SAR profiles, (ii) event-level baseline semantic labels generated by a rule-based classifier, and (iii) an expert-annotated benchmark dataset of 553 time series with 328,657 event labels. The baseline classifier achieves a macro F1 score of 0.84 in event-wise evaluation and an area under the collapsed edit similarity-quality threshold curve (AUC) of 0.785, indicating temporal coherence. We demonstrate that the resulting corpus supports global-scale analyses of deployment dynamics, the identification of differences in regional deployment patterns, vessel interactions, and operational events, and provides a reference for developing and comparing time series classification methods for offshore wind infrastructure monitoring.

light_analysis.overview: 利用密集Sentinel-1雷达时间序列数据，构建全球海上风电基础设施部署与运营动态的数据集和基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 海上风电行业快速扩张，需要独立、高时间分辨率的全球基础设施监测。现有开放数据集缺乏时间密集和语义细粒度的建设与运营动态信息，限制了大规模分析。
light_analysis.method: 基于更新后的目标检测流程，从2016Q1至2025Q1的Sentinel-1 SAR图像中提取15,606个基础设施位置的时间序列，生成14,840,637个1D SAR后向散射剖面事件。发布分析就绪的1D剖面、基于规则的基线语义标签（包含553个专家标注时间序列），并使用宏F1和AUC评估分类器性能。
light_analysis.result: 基线分类器在事件级评估中宏F1为0.84，时间一致性AUC为0.785。语料库支持全球部署动态分析、区域模式差异识别、船舶交互及运营事件检测，为时间序列分类方法开发提供基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了全球首个密集时序SAR数据集和标注基准，支持海上风电基础设施的时空动态监测，具有重要学术和应用价值。未来可扩展分类方法或集成多模态数据。

title: FLiP: Towards understanding and interpreting multimodal multilingual sentence embeddings
abstract: This paper presents factorized linear projection (FLiP) models for understanding pretrained sentence embedding spaces. We train FLiP models to recover the lexical content from multilingual (LaBSE), multimodal (SONAR) and API-based (Gemini) sentence embedding spaces in several high- and mid-resource languages. We show that FLiP can recall more than 75% of lexical content from the embeddings, significantly outperforming existing non-factorized baselines. Using this as a diagnostic tool, we uncover the modality and language biases across the selected sentence encoders and provide practitioners with intrinsic insights about the encoders without relying on conventional downstream evaluation tasks. Our implementation is public https://github.com/BUTSpeechFIT/FLiP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出因子化线性投影(FLiP)模型，用于理解和解释预训练的多语言多模态句子嵌入空间，实现高词汇内容恢复并揭示语言和模态偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有句子嵌入模型（如LaBSE、SONAR、Gemini）在多语言和跨模态任务中表现出色，但其内部表示机制难以解释。传统方法依赖下游任务评估，无法提供关于嵌入空间内在特性的直接洞察。本研究旨在开发一种诊断工具，从嵌入中恢复词汇内容，从而揭示模型的语言和模态偏差，帮助实践者理解编码器行为。
light_analysis.method: 提出因子化线性投影(FLiP)模型，通过训练线性投影从多语言(LaBSE)、多模态(SONAR)和API-based(Gemini)句子嵌入中恢复词汇内容。使用多种高资源和中等资源语言进行实验。FLiP采用因子化结构，显著优于现有非因子化基线方法。实现已开源。
light_analysis.result: FLiP模型能够从嵌入中召回超过75%的词汇内容，显著优于现有非因子化基线方法。实验覆盖了多种语言，证明了FLiP作为诊断工具的有效性，并揭示了所选句子编码器之间的模态和语言偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了FLiP模型作为理解和解释句子嵌入空间的实用工具，能够高效恢复词汇内容并揭示编码器偏差。该研究为实践者提供了无需下游评估的内在洞察，有助于改进多语言多模态模型的鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的恢复机制或扩展到更多嵌入模型。

title: Prior-guided Fusion of Multimodal Features for Change Detection from Optical-SAR Images
abstract: Multimodal change detection (MMCD) identifies changed areas in multimodal remote sensing data, demonstrating significant application value in land use monitoring and urban sustainable development. However, literature MMCD approaches exhibit limitations in both cross-modal interaction and exploiting modality-specific characteristics. This leads to insufficient modeling of fine-grained change information, thus hindering the precise detection of semantic changes. To address these problems, we propose STSF-Net, a framework designed for MMCD between optical and SAR images. STSF-Net jointly models modality-specific and spatio-temporal common features to enhance change representations. Specifically, modality-specific features are exploited to capture genuine semantic change signals, while spatio-temporal common features are embedded to suppress pseudo-changes caused by differences in imaging mechanisms. Furthermore, we introduce an optical and SAR feature fusion strategy that adaptively adjusts multimodal feature importance based on semantic priors obtained from visual foundation models. Finally, we introduce the novel Delta-SN6 dataset, the first openly-accessible multiclass MMCD benchmark consisting of very-high-resolution fully polarimetric SAR and optical images. Experimental results on Delta-SN6, BRIGHT, and Wuhan datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art by 3.21%, 0.87%, and 1.32% in mIoU, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STSF-Net框架，通过联合建模模态特定与时空公共特征，并引入视觉基础模型的语义先验，实现光学-SAR图像多模态变化检测性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态变化检测（MMCD）在土地监测和城市可持续发展中具有重要应用价值。然而现有方法在跨模态交互和利用模态特定特征方面存在局限，难以充分建模细粒度变化信息，导致语义变化检测精度受限。因此需要一种能联合建模模态差异与时空共性的方法，并有效抑制由成像机制差异引起的伪变化。
light_analysis.method: 提出STSF-Net框架，联合建模模态特定特征（捕获真实语义变化）和时空公共特征（抑制伪变化）。设计光学与SAR特征融合策略，基于视觉基础模型提取的语义先验自适应调整多模态特征重要性。首次公开高分辨率全极化SAR与光学图像的多类MMCD基准数据集Delta-SN6。
light_analysis.result: 在Delta-SN6、BRIGHT和Wuhan三个数据集上，所提方法在mIoU指标上分别超过最优方法3.21%、0.87%和1.32%，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: STSF-Net通过模态特定与时空公共特征的联合建模，以及基于语义先验的多模态融合，显著提升了光学-SAR图像变化检测性能。该工作为多模态遥感变化检测提供了新思路，公开数据集Delta-SN6有助于推动该领域研究。未来可探索更高效的特征交互机制。

title: CAMEO: A Conditional and Quality-Aware Multi-Agent Image Editing Orchestrator
abstract: Conditional image editing aims to modify a source image according to textual prompts and optional reference guidance. Such editing is crucial in scenarios requiring strict structural control (i.e., anomaly insertion in driving scenes and complex human pose transformation). Despite recent advances in large-scale editing models (i.e., Seedream, Nano Banana, etc), most approaches rely on single-step generation. This paradigm often lacks explicit quality control, may introduce excessive deviation from the original image, and frequently produces structural artifacts or environment-inconsistent modifications, typically requiring manual prompt tuning to achieve acceptable results. We propose \textbf{CAMEO}, a structured multi-agent framework that reformulates conditional editing as a quality-aware, feedback-driven process rather than a one-shot generation task. CAMEO decomposes editing into coordinated stages of planning, structured prompting, hypothesis generation, and adaptive reference grounding, where external guidance is invoked only when task complexity requires it. To overcome the lack of intrinsic quality control in existing methods, evaluation is embedded directly within the editing loop. Intermediate results are iteratively refined through structured feedback, forming a closed-loop process that progressively corrects structural and contextual inconsistencies. We evaluate CAMEO on anomaly insertion and human pose switching tasks. Across multiple strong editing backbones and independent evaluation models, CAMEO consistently achieves 20\% more win rate on average compared to multiple state-of-the-art models, demonstrating improved robustness, controllability, and structural reliability in conditional image editing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAMEO，一个多代理框架，将条件图像编辑重构为质量感知、反馈驱动的闭环过程，显著提升编辑的结构可靠性和可控性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前条件图像编辑方法多依赖单步生成，缺乏显式质量控制，导致图像偏离原始结构、产生伪影或环境不一致，且需手动调优提示。在需要严格结构控制的场景（如驾驶场景异常插入、复杂人体姿态变换）中，现有方法难以保证编辑质量。因此，需要一个可迭代优化、内置质量评估的编辑框架。
light_analysis.method: CAMEO将编辑任务分解为规划、结构化提示、假设生成和自适应参考接地四个协调阶段，仅当任务复杂时调用外部指导。核心创新是将评估嵌入编辑循环：中间结果通过结构化反馈迭代修正，形成闭环过程。使用多个编辑骨干（如Seedream）和独立评估模型，在异常插入和人体姿态切换任务上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在异常插入和人体姿态切换任务中，CAMEO在多个强编辑骨干和独立评估模型下，平均胜率比最先进模型（包括Seedream、Nano Banana等）提高20%。具体表现为：编辑结果的结构一致性、环境协调性和可控性显著改善，减少了伪影和过度偏离问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAMEO通过多代理和反馈驱动机制，解决了条件图像编辑中缺乏显式质量控制的核心问题。学术贡献在于提出了一种新的编辑范式，将评估闭环嵌入生成流程；实际价值在于高可靠性场景（如自动驾驶、数字人）的应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的任务分解和自适应反馈策略。

title: Toward Vibe Medicine: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Framework for Clinical Decision Support
abstract: In recent years, the advances of large language models and autonomous agents have revolutionized the healthcare field, facilitating diagnosis and improving treatment results. However, most existing AI systems rely on pre-trained knowledge and predefined pipelines, which struggle to learn dynamically from the interactive chat session history that contains patient outcomes and past failures. To address this limitation, we propose VIBEMed, a multi-agent framework with a built-in self-evolution mechanism and architecture-level safety sandbox for robust clinical decision support. The system integrates three specialized agents, including a Clinical Diagnostic Agent (CDA) for hypothesis generation, a Therapeutic Execution Agent (TEA) for treatment planning, and a Clinical Evolution Manager Agent (CEMA) that distills longitudinal clinical feedback into reusable knowledge, transforming multimodal patient information into personalized medical decisions. Through self-evolution mechanism, the framework enables iterative updates across memory, model behavior, and decision strategies, allowing the system to improve over time. Experimental results show that VIBEMed demonstrates superior performance through its evolving mechanism in complex clinical cases, particularly in tasks that require integrated decision-making and longitudinal planning. The framework also supports reliable end-to-end decisions in challenging scenarios such as oncology treatment planning, highlighting its feasibility in real-world clinical contexts. Overall, VIBEMed provides a practical path beyond static AI systems toward adaptive, experience-driven clinical decision support, demonstrating the value of combining multi-agent collaboration with continuous evolution for advancing precision medicine.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VIBEMed，一个具有自进化机制和多智能体协作的临床决策支持框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI系统依赖预训练知识和固定流水线，无法从交互会话历史中动态学习患者的治疗结果和失败经验，导致在复杂临床场景中缺乏适应性。该研究旨在通过引入自进化机制和多智能体协作，实现自适应、经验驱动的临床决策支持，以提升个性化医疗效果。
light_analysis.method: VIBEMed框架包含三个专业智能体：临床诊断智能体（CDA）负责假设生成，治疗执行智能体（TEA）负责治疗规划，临床进化管理智能体（CEMA）从纵向临床反馈中提炼可复用知识。内置自进化机制支持记忆、模型行为和决策策略的迭代更新，并配备架构级安全沙箱，将多模态患者信息转化为个性化医疗决策。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，VIBEMed在复杂临床案例中表现优越，尤其在需要集成决策和纵向规划的任务中。在肿瘤治疗规划等挑战场景中，框架支持可靠的端到端决策，验证了其在实际临床环境中的可行性，性能优于依赖静态知识的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIBEMed提供了一条超越静态AI系统的自适应临床决策支持路径，通过多智能体协作与持续进化相结合，推进了精准医学的发展。该框架展示了在动态医疗环境中从经验中学习的能力，未来工作可进一步优化进化机制并扩展到更多临床领域。

title: MemRerank: Preference Memory for Personalized Product Reranking
abstract: LLM-based shopping agents increasingly rely on long purchase histories and multi-turn interactions for personalization, yet naively appending raw history to prompts is often ineffective due to noise, length, and relevance mismatch. We propose MemRerank, a preference memory framework that distills user purchase history into concise, query-independent signals for personalized product reranking. To study this problem, we build an end-to-end benchmark and evaluation framework centered on an LLM-based \textbf{1-in-5} selection task, which measures both memory quality and downstream reranking utility. We further train the memory extractor with reinforcement learning (RL), using downstream reranking performance as supervision. Experiments with two LLM-based rerankers show that MemRerank consistently outperforms no-memory, raw-history, and off-the-shelf memory baselines, yielding up to \textbf{+10.61} absolute points in 1-in-5 accuracy. These results suggest that explicit preference memory is a practical and effective building block for personalization in agentic e-commerce systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemRerank框架，通过强化学习训练的记忆提取器将用户购买历史蒸馏为查询无关的偏好信号，用于个性化商品重排序。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的购物代理依赖长购买历史和多轮交互实现个性化，但直接将原始历史附加到提示中往往因噪声、长度和相关性不匹配而效果不佳。需要一种方法能从历史中提取简洁、查询无关的偏好信号，以提升重排序的个性化效果。
light_analysis.method: 构建MemRerank偏好记忆框架，使用LLM的1-in-5选择任务作为端到端基准和评估框架，记忆提取器通过强化学习训练，以下游重排序性能作为监督信号，将用户购买历史蒸馏为简洁的记忆表示，用于个性化商品重排序。
light_analysis.result: 基于两个LLM重排序器的实验表明，MemRerank持续优于无记忆、原始历史以及现成的记忆基线，在1-in-5准确率上最高提升+10.61绝对百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 显式偏好记忆是用于代理型电商系统个性化的一种实用且有效的构建模块。该研究为LLM购物代理的个性化提供了新的方向，未来可探索更复杂的记忆提取和融合策略。

title: HACMatch Semi-Supervised Rotation Regression with Hardness-Aware Curriculum Pseudo Labeling
abstract: Regressing 3D rotations of objects from 2D images is a crucial yet challenging task, with broad applications in autonomous driving, virtual reality, and robotic control. Existing rotation regression models often rely on large amounts of labeled data for training or require additional information beyond 2D images, such as point clouds or CAD models. Therefore, exploring semi-supervised rotation regression using only a limited number of labeled 2D images is highly valuable. While recent work FisherMatch introduces semi-supervised learning to rotation regression, it suffers from rigid entropy-based pseudo-label filtering that fails to effectively distinguish between reliable and unreliable unlabeled samples. To address this limitation, we propose a hardness-aware curriculum learning framework that dynamically selects pseudo-labeled samples based on their difficulty, progressing from easy to complex examples. We introduce both multi-stage and adaptive curriculum strategies to replace fixed-threshold filtering with more flexible, hardness-aware mechanisms. Additionally, we present a novel structured data augmentation strategy specifically tailored for rotation estimation, which assembles composite images from augmented patches to introduce feature diversity while preserving critical geometric integrity. Comprehensive experiments on PASCAL3D+ and ObjectNet3D demonstrate that our method outperforms existing supervised and semi-supervised baselines, particularly in low-data regimes, validating the effectiveness of our curriculum learning framework and structured augmentation approach.
comment: This is an accepted manuscript of an article published in Computer Vision and Image Understanding

light_analysis.overview: 提出HACMatch，一种基于难度感知课程伪标签的半监督旋转回归方法，通过动态选择伪标签和结构化数据增强提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 从2D图像回归3D旋转是重要但困难的任务，现有方法依赖大量标注数据或额外信息。半监督学习虽可行，但现有FisherMatch方法使用固定熵阈值过滤伪标签，无法有效区分可靠与不可靠样本。因此，需要更灵活的伪标签选择机制来提升半监督旋转回归的准确性，尤其在标注数据稀缺时。
light_analysis.method: 提出硬度感知课程学习框架，动态根据样本难度选择伪标签，从简单到复杂逐步训练。包括多阶段和自适应两种课程策略，取代固定阈值过滤。同时设计专门针对旋转估计的结构化数据增强方法，通过组合增强块生成复合图像，引入特征多样性并保持几何完整性。在PASCAL3D+和ObjectNet3D数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在PASCAL3D+和ObjectNet3D数据集上，HACMatch优于现有监督和半监督基线方法，尤其在低数据场景下表现显著。具体性能指标摘要未明确数值，但验证了课程学习框架和结构化增强的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出硬度感知课程伪标签和结构化数据增强，有效提升半监督旋转回归性能。学术价值在于为半监督学习中的伪标签选择提供新思路，实际应用可用于自动驾驶、VR等场景。局限性或未来工作包括更复杂的课程策略、扩展到其他姿态估计任务。

title: Bidirectional Cross-Attention Fusion of High-Resolution RGB and Low-Resolution Hyperspectral Inputs for Multimodal Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Multimodal semantic segmentation with heterogeneous sensors must reconcile complementary information across modalities that differ in spatial resolution and channel dimensionality. In particular, high-resolution RGB imaging provides detailed spatial structure but often fails to distinguish visually similar materials, whereas hyperspectral imaging (HSI) provides discriminative spectral signatures but at lower spatial resolution. We present Bidirectional Cross-Attention Fusion (BCAF), which aligns high-resolution RGB with low-resolution HSI at their native grids via localized, bidirectional cross-attention, avoiding pre-upsampling or early spectral collapse. BCAF uses two independent backbones: a standard Swin Transformer for RGB and an HSI-adapted Swin backbone that preserves spectral structure through 3D tokenization with spectral self-attention. Although our evaluation targets RGB-HSI fusion, BCAF is modality-agnostic and applies to co-registered RGB with lower-resolution, high-channel auxiliary sensors. On the benchmark SpectralWaste dataset, BCAF delivers strong performance, achieving 75.4% at 55 images/s. We further evaluate a novel industrial dataset: K3I-Cycling (first RGB subset already released on Fordatis). On this dataset, BCAF reaches 62.3% mIoU for material segmentation (paper, metal, plastic, etc.) and 66.2% mIoU for plastic-type segmentation (PET, PP, HDPE, LDPE, PS, etc.). These results show that preserving native-grid spatial detail and spectral structure improves multimodal segmentation under real-time constraints. Code and model checkpoints are publicly available at https://github.com/jonasvilhofunk/BCAF_2026.
comment: Submitted to Image and Vision Computing (Elsevier). 23 pages, 10 figures, 7 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出双向交叉注意力融合（BCAF），在原生网格上对齐高分辨率RGB和低分辨率高光谱图像，无需预上采样或早期光谱坍塌，实现高效多模态语义分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 高分辨率RGB擅长捕获空间细节，但难以区分光谱相似的材料；高光谱成像（HSI）提供判别性光谱特征，但空间分辨率较低。现有融合方法常需要预上采样HSI或过早混合光谱信息，导致空间失真或光谱辨别力下降。BCAF旨在保持两种模态的原生分辨率，通过双向交叉注意力在各自网格上对齐特征，避免信息损失，从而提升分割精度。
light_analysis.method: BCAF采用双独立骨干网络：RGB使用标准Swin Transformer提取空间特征；HSI使用适应高光谱的Swin骨干，通过3D分词和光谱自注意力保留光谱结构。核心是双向交叉注意力模块，在原生网格上实现RGB与HSI特征的局部对齐，无需上采样HSI或压缩光谱维度。该方法为模态无关设计，可推广至RGB与低分辨率高通道辅助传感器的融合任务。
light_analysis.result: 在SpectralWaste基准数据集上，BCAF达到75.4% mIoU，推理速度为55 images/s。在新提出的工业数据集K3I-Cycling上，材料分割（纸、金属、塑料等）mIoU为62.3%，塑料类型分割（PET、PP、HDPE等）mIoU为66.2%。结果表明，保留原生网格空间细节和光谱结构能在实时约束下显著提升多模态分割性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: BCAF通过双向交叉注意力有效融合RGB和高光谱图像，在不牺牲分辨率的情况下兼顾空间与光谱信息，在实时应用中表现出色。代码和模型已开源，便于复现和扩展。未来可探索其在其他异质传感器融合场景中的适用性，并进一步优化跨模态对齐效率。摘要未明确提及局限性，但假设依赖于精确的图像配准。

title: Robust Regularized Policy Iteration under Transition Uncertainty
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) enables data-efficient and safe policy learning without online exploration, but its performance often degrades under distribution shift. The learned policy may visit out-of-distribution state-action pairs where value estimates and learned dynamics are unreliable. To address policy-induced extrapolation and transition uncertainty in a unified framework, we formulate offline RL as robust policy optimization, treating the transition kernel as a decision variable within an uncertainty set and optimizing the policy against the worst-case dynamics. We propose Robust Regularized Policy Iteration (RRPI), which replaces the intractable max-min bilevel objective with a tractable KL-regularized surrogate and derives an efficient policy iteration procedure based on a robust regularized Bellman operator. We provide theoretical guarantees by showing that the proposed operator is a $γ$-contraction and that iteratively updating the surrogate yields monotonic improvement of the original robust objective with convergence. Experiments on D4RL benchmarks demonstrate that RRPI achieves strong average performance, outperforming recent baselines including percentile-based methods on the majority of environments while remaining competitive on the rest. Moreover, RRPI exhibits robust performance by aligning lower $Q$-values with high epistemic uncertainty, which prevents the policy from executing unreliable out-of-distribution actions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出鲁棒正则化策略迭代（RRPI），通过KL正则化替代难以处理的max-min双层目标，统一解决离线RL中的策略外推和转移不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线强化学习在分布偏移下性能下降，策略可能访问分布外状态动作对，导致值估计和动力学模型不可靠。现有方法未能同时处理策略诱导的外推误差和转移不确定性，缺乏统一框架。该研究旨在通过鲁棒策略优化，将转移核视为不确定性集内的决策变量，在对抗最坏情况动力学下学习鲁棒策略，以提升离线RL的泛化性和安全性。
light_analysis.method: RRPI将离线RL建模为鲁棒策略优化：将转移核作为不确定性集内的决策变量，优化策略对抗最坏情况动力学。通过KL正则化替代不可微的max-min双层目标，得到可求解的代理目标，并基于鲁棒正则化Bellman算子推导出高效的策略迭代过程。理论证明该算子是γ-收缩，且迭代更新可实现原鲁棒目标的单调改进和收敛。实验采用D4RL基准数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在D4RL基准上，RRPI在多数环境中取得优于基于百分位数等最新基线的平均性能，其余环境具有竞争力。通过将低Q值与高认知不确定度对齐，有效避免执行不可靠的分布外动作，表现出对分布偏移的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RRPI统一处理了离线RL中的策略外推和转移不确定性，提供理论收敛保证和高效算法。实验验证其在D4RL上的强性能和鲁棒性，有助于安全关键应用。未来可探索更复杂的不确定性集或扩展至在线微调场景。

title: InfoPO: Information-Driven Policy Optimization for User-Centric Agents
abstract: Real-world user requests to LLM agents are often underspecified. Agents must interact to acquire missing information and make correct downstream decisions. However, current multi-turn GRPO-based methods often rely on trajectory-level reward computation, which leads to credit assignment problems and insufficient advantage signals within rollout groups. A feasible approach is to identify valuable interaction turns at a fine granularity to drive more targeted learning. To address this, we introduce InfoPO (Information-Driven Policy Optimization), which frames multi-turn interaction as a process of active uncertainty reduction and computes an information-gain reward that credits turns whose feedback measurably changes the agent's subsequent action distribution compared to a masked-feedback counterfactual. It then combines this signal with task outcomes via an adaptive variance-gated fusion to identify information importance while maintaining task-oriented goal direction. Across diverse tasks, including intent clarification, collaborative coding, and tool-augmented decision making, InfoPO consistently outperforms prompting and multi-turn RL baselines. It also demonstrates robustness under user simulator shifts and generalizes effectively to environment-interactive tasks. Overall, InfoPO provides a principled and scalable mechanism for optimizing complex agent-user collaboration. Code is available at https://github.com/kfq20/InfoPO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出信息驱动策略优化框架InfoPO，通过细粒度信息增益奖励解决多轮交互中的信用分配问题，提升LLM智能体在模糊请求场景下的协作能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实用户请求往往不明确，智能体需通过多轮交互获取缺失信息以做出正确决策。当前基于GRPO的多轮方法依赖轨迹级奖励计算，导致信用分配问题和组内优势信号不足。因此，需要一种细粒度识别有价值交互回合的方法，以驱动更有针对性的学习，提升智能体在复杂用户协作中的表现。
light_analysis.method: InfoPO将多轮交互建模为主动不确定性减少过程，通过对比屏蔽反馈的反事实，计算信息增益奖励来奖励改变后续动作分布的交互回合。该奖励与任务结果通过自适应方差门控融合，识别信息重要性同时保持任务导向。方法不依赖特定模型架构，可应用于多种场景。
light_analysis.result: 在意图澄清、协作编码和工具增强决策等多种任务上，InfoPO一致优于提示方法和多轮强化学习基线。实验表明，该方法在用户模拟器偏移下具有鲁棒性，并能有效泛化到环境交互任务。具体性能提升体现在任务成功率与交互效率上，但摘要未给出精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: InfoPO提供了一种原则性强、可扩展的机制来优化复杂的用户-智能体协作，通过信息驱动的奖励设计解决了多轮交互中的关键挑战。其开源代码便于复现与应用。未来工作可探索更复杂的反事实计算和融合策略，以进一步提升在多轮对话中的适应性。

title: Enhancing CVRP Solver through LLM-driven Automatic Heuristic Design
abstract: The Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP), a fundamental combinatorial optimization challenge, focuses on optimizing fleet operations under vehicle capacity constraints. While extensively studied in operational research, the NP-hard nature of CVRP continues to pose significant computational challenges, particularly for large-scale instances. This study presents AILS-AHD (Adaptive Iterated Local Search with Automatic Heuristic Design), a novel approach that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to revolutionize CVRP solving. Our methodology integrates an evolutionary search framework with LLMs to dynamically generate and optimize ruin heuristics within the AILS method. Additionally, we introduce an LLM-based acceleration mechanism to enhance computational efficiency. Comprehensive experimental evaluations against state-of-the-art solvers, including AILS-II and HGS, demonstrate the superior performance of AILS-AHD across both moderate and large-scale instances. Notably, our approach establishes new best-known solutions for 8 out of 10 instances in the CVRPLib large-scale benchmark, underscoring the potential of LLM-driven heuristic design in advancing the field of vehicle routing optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AILS-AHD方法，利用大语言模型自动设计启发式算法，提升CVRP求解性能，在大规模实例上取得最优解。
light_analysis.motivation: CVRP是NP-hard组合优化问题，大规模实例计算困难。现有方法如AILS-II和HGS依赖手动设计启发式或性能有限，难以适应大规模场景。因此需要自动化启发式设计方法以提高求解效率和质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出AILS-AHD，将自适应迭代局部搜索（AILS）与大语言模型（LLM）结合，利用进化搜索框架动态生成和优化破坏启发式（ruin heuristics）。同时引入LLM加速机制提升计算效率，实现启发式的自动设计与优化。
light_analysis.result: 与AILS-II和HGS等最新求解器对比，AILS-AHD在中规模和大规模实例上表现优越。在CVRPLib大规模基准的10个实例中，8个取得了新的最佳已知解，验证了LLM驱动启发式设计的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文展示了LLM在组合优化中自动设计启发式的潜力，为CVRP求解提供了新思路。该方法可扩展至其他路由问题，未来可进一步优化加速机制并探索更复杂的搜索策略。

title: Detecting High-Potential SMEs with Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks
abstract: Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) constitute 99.9% of U.S. businesses and generate 44% of economic activity, yet systematically identifying high-potential SMEs remains an open challenge. We introduce SME-HGT, a Heterogeneous Graph Transformer framework that predicts which SBIR Phase I awardees will advance to Phase II funding using exclusively public data. We construct a heterogeneous graph with 32,268 company nodes, 124 research topic nodes, and 13 government agency nodes connected by approximately 99,000 edges across three semantic relation types. SME-HGT achieves an AUPRC of 0.621 0.003 on a temporally-split test set, outperforming an MLP baseline (0.590 0.002) and R-GCN (0.608 0.013) across five random seeds. At a screening depth of 100 companies, SME-HGT attains 89.6% precision with a 2.14 lift over random selection. Our temporal evaluation protocol prevents information leakage, and our reliance on public data ensures reproducibility. These results demonstrate that relational structure among firms, research topics, and funding agencies provides meaningful signal for SME potential assessment, with implications for policymakers and early-stage investors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SME-HGT异构图表征变换器，利用公开数据预测高潜力中小企业，实现基于公司-主题-机构关系的精准评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 中小企业占美国企业99.9%及44%经济活动，但系统识别高潜力中小企业仍是开放挑战。现有方法依赖私有数据或浅层特征，无法充分捕获企业间、研究主题与资助机构的复杂交互关系。缺乏可复现、时间敏感的评估协议，导致信息泄露和泛化能力不足。该研究旨在仅使用公开数据，通过异构关系建模提升识别精度，为政策制定者和早期投资者提供可靠工具。
light_analysis.method: SME-HGT框架基于异构图表征变换器，构建包含32,268个公司节点、124个研究主题节点和13个政府机构节点的异构网络，约99,000条边涵盖三种语义关系类型。核心采用图注意力机制处理节点类型和边关系的异质性，在时间分割的测试集上训练，避免信息泄露。仅依赖SBIR公开数据，确保可复现性。
light_analysis.result: 在时间分割测试集上，SME-HGT的AUPRC达0.621±0.003，优于MLP（0.590±0.002）和R-GCN（0.608±0.013）。前100家公司筛选精度89.6%，随机选择提升2.14倍。五次不同随机种子实验验证稳定性，时间评估协议有效防止未来信息泄露。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明异构关系结构（企业、研究主题和资助机构间的交互）对中小企业潜力评估具有显著信号价值。SME-HGT仅使用公开数据即可实现高精度筛选，为政策制定者和早期投资者提供可复现的决策支持。未来可扩展至更多类型节点或动态时序建模，但当前框架在节点规模上可能面临扩展性挑战。

title: E-VAds: An E-commerce Short Videos Understanding Benchmark for MLLMs
abstract: E-commerce short videos represent a high-revenue segment of the online video industry characterized by a goal-driven format and dense multi-modal signals. Current models often struggle with these videos because existing benchmarks focus primarily on general-purpose tasks and neglect the reasoning of commercial intent. In this work, we first propose a multi-modal information density assessment framework to quantify the complexity of this domain. Our evaluation reveals that e-commerce content exhibits substantially higher density across visual, audio, and textual modalities compared to mainstream datasets, establishing a more challenging frontier for video understanding. To address this gap, we introduce E-commerce Video Ads Benchmark, which is the first benchmark specifically designed for e-commerce short video understanding. We curated 3,961 high-quality videos from Taobao covering a wide range of product categories and used a multi-agent system to generate 19,785 open-ended Q&A pairs, which consist of five distinct tasks. Finally, we develop E-VAds-R1, an RL-based reasoning model featuring a multi-grained reward design called MG-GRPO. This strategy provides smooth guidance for early exploration while creating a non-linear incentive for expert-level precision. Experimental results demonstrate that E-VAds-R1 achieves a 109.2% performance gain in commercial intent reasoning with only a few hundred training samples. Data is available at https://github.com/TaobaoTmall-AlgorithmProducts/E-VAds_Benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出电商短视频理解基准E-VAds及基于强化学习的推理模型E-VAds-R1，通过多粒度奖励设计显著提升商业意图推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 电商短视频占据在线视频行业高收入份额，具有目标导向和密集多模态信号的特点。现有模型因基准聚焦通用任务而忽视商业意图推理，难以理解此类内容。本文通过信息密度评估证实电商内容比主流数据集视觉、音频、文本模态密度更高，亟需专门基准和推理模型。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出多模态信息密度评估框架量化复杂度。从淘宝收集3961个高质量视频覆盖多品类，采用多智能体系统生成19785个开放问答对，包含五个任务，构成首个电商短视频理解基准E-VAds。开发基于强化学习的E-VAds-R1模型，设计多粒度奖励策略MG-GRPO，为早期探索提供平滑引导并对专家级精度非线性激励。
light_analysis.result: E-VAds-R1在商业意图推理任务上相比基线获得109.2%的性能提升，且仅使用数百个训练样本。数据已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次构建电商短视频理解基准并验证其高密度特性，E-VAds-R1展示了强化学习在小样本下对商业意图推理的有效性。该工作为电商视频理解提供标准化评测，有望推动多模态模型在商业领域的应用。未来可扩展任务类型或探索更大规模预训练。

title: MUFASA: A Multi-Layer Framework for Slot Attention
abstract: Unsupervised object-centric learning (OCL) decomposes visual scenes into distinct entities. Slot attention is a popular approach that represents individual objects as latent vectors, called slots. Current methods obtain these slot representations solely from the last layer of a pre-trained vision transformer (ViT), ignoring valuable, semantically rich information encoded across the other layers. To better utilize this latent semantic information, we introduce MUFASA, a lightweight plug-and-play framework for slot-attention-based approaches to unsupervised object segmentation. Our model computes slot attention across multiple feature layers of the ViT encoder, fully leveraging their semantic richness. We propose a fusion strategy to aggregate slots obtained on multiple layers into a unified object-centric representation. Integrating MUFASA into existing OCL methods improves their segmentation results across multiple datasets, setting a new state of the art while simultaneously improving training convergence with only minor inference overhead.
comment: CVPR 2026. Authors Sebastian Bock and Leonie Schüßler contributed equally. Project page: https://visinf.github.io/mufasa/

light_analysis.overview: MUFASA是一个轻量级即插即用框架，通过利用ViT多层级特征改进槽注意力的无监督对象分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有无监督对象中心学习方法（如槽注意力）仅使用预训练ViT的最后一层特征，忽略了其他层中编码的丰富语义信息。这种信息浪费限制了模型对场景中不同实体的理解能力。因此，MUFASA旨在充分利用多层语义信息，提升对象分割的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: MUFASA提出在ViT编码器的多个特征层上分别计算槽注意力，获取各层的槽表示，然后通过融合策略将这些表示聚合成统一的对象中心表示。该框架为轻量级、即插即用设计，可无缝集成到现有基于槽注意力的无监督对象分割方法中，无需修改原模型结构。
light_analysis.result: 将MUFASA集成到现有无监督对象中心学习方法后，在多个数据集上均取得了分割性能的提升，并达到了新的最优结果（sota）。同时，训练收敛速度加快，仅引入微小的推理开销，展示了高效性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MUFASA通过挖掘ViT多层语义信息，显著增强了槽注意力方法的对象分割能力。其即插即用特性使其易于推广，具有较高的学术和实际应用价值。未来可进一步探索融合策略的优化及在其他视觉任务中的应用。

title: ActMem: Bridging the Gap Between Memory Retrieval and Reasoning in LLM Agents
abstract: Memory management is essential for LLM agents in long-term interactions. Current memory frameworks typically treat agents as passive ``recorders'' and retrieve information without understanding its deeper implications. They may fail in scenarios requiring reasoning and complex decision-making. To bridge this critical gap, we propose a novel actionable memory framework called ActMem that integrates memory retrieval with active causal reasoning. ActMem transforms unstructured dialogue history into a structured causal and semantic graph. By leveraging counterfactual reasoning and commonsense completion, it enables agents to deduce implicit constraints and resolve potential conflicts between past states and current intentions. Furthermore, we introduce a comprehensive dataset ActMemEval to evaluate agent reasoning capabilities in logic-driven scenarios, moving beyond the fact-retrieval focus of existing memory benchmarks. Experiments demonstrate that ActMem significantly outperforms baselines in handling complex, memory-dependent tasks, paving the way for more consistent and reliable intelligent assistants.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ActMem框架，将记忆检索与主动因果推理结合，提升LLM代理在复杂长期交互中的推理和决策能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代理的记忆框架通常将代理视为被动记录器，仅检索信息而缺乏对深层含义的理解，在需要推理和复杂决策的场景中表现不佳。这种局限性导致代理无法处理隐含约束和冲突，亟需一种能将记忆检索与因果推理集成的框架，以提升代理在长期交互中的一致性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: ActMem通过将非结构化的对话历史转化为结构化的因果和语义图，利用反事实推理和常识补全技术，使代理能够推断出隐含约束并解决过去状态与当前意图之间的潜在冲突。同时，引入ActMemEval数据集，专注于逻辑驱动场景下的推理能力评估，超越传统仅关注事实检索的基准。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，ActMem在处理复杂、依赖记忆的任务中显著优于基线方法，包括事实检索型基准和现有记忆框架。具体性能提升体现在推理准确性和决策一致性上，但摘要未提供量化数据，仅强调在逻辑驱动场景中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ActMem填补了记忆检索与因果推理之间的空白，为构建更一致和可靠的智能助手铺平了道路。其结构化的因果图表示和反事实推理能力具有学术价值，可用于复杂对话系统和长期交互场景。未来可探索更高效的图构建方法和扩展到多模态记忆。

title: LLM Compression by Block Removal with Constrained Binary Optimization
abstract: In this paper, we formulate the compression of large language models (LLMs) by optimally deleting transformer blocks (``block removal'') as a constrained binary optimization (CBO) problem that can be mapped to a physical system (Ising glass), whose energies are a strong proxy for downstream model performance. This formulation enables an efficient ranking of a large number of candidate block-removal configurations yielding many high-quality, non-trivial solutions beyond those only removing consecutive regions. Our method performs strongly in the deep compression regime, such as for 50% compression of Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, where we achieve an almost 23 percentage point increase on the MMLU benchmark compared to other state-of-the-art (SOTA) block-removal methods. For lighter compression, it performs on par with those methods across several benchmarks for Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, Qwen3-14B (both before and after retraining), as well as Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct. The approach is computationally efficient and requires only forward and backward passes on a calibration dataset for a few active parameters. Additionally, we demonstrate that using good heuristic solvers for the CBO problem provides solutions that perform well on downstream tasks in negligible runtime when it is unfeasible to solve the problem exactly. The method can be readily applied to any architecture. We illustrate this generality on the recent NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-FP8 model, which exhibits a highly inhomogeneous and challenging block structure, and where we outperform SOTA for AIME25 and GPQA when removing either 2 attention layers or 3 mixture-of-experts layers.

light_analysis.overview: 将大语言模型块删除压缩问题转化为约束二元优化问题，映射到Ising玻璃物理系统，实现高效非连续块删除。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大语言模型压缩方法中的块删除通常只考虑删除连续区域，限制了压缩性能。本文旨在通过探索非连续块删除配置，在深度压缩下显著提升模型性能。该问题可映射为物理系统的能量最小化，从而高效评估大量候选配置。
light_analysis.method: 提出将块删除转化为约束二元优化问题，并映射到Ising玻璃模型，利用能量作为下游性能代理。仅需在校准数据集上进行少量前向和后向传播，即可高效排序候选配置。支持使用启发式求解器在不可精确求解时快速获得高质量解。方法适用于任意架构，如均匀或高度异构的Transformer块。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct上实现50%压缩，MMLU提升近23个百分点，超越其他最先进块删除方法。轻量压缩下与SOTA持平。在NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano异构模型上，删除2个注意力层或3个MoE层后，AIME25和GPQA性能优于SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的基于约束二元优化的块删除方法在深度压缩场景下显著优于现有方法，且计算高效、架构通用。其物理启发式框架为非连续块删除提供了新思路，可进一步应用于其他模型压缩任务。未来可探索更大规模配置空间或与其他压缩技术结合。

title: HeRo-Q: A General Framework for Stable Low Bit Quantization via Hessian Conditioning
abstract: Post Training Quantization (PTQ), a mainstream model compression technique, often leads to the paradoxical 'low error, high loss' phenomenon because it focuses solely on minimizing quantization error. The root cause lies in the Hessian matrix of the LLM loss landscape: a few high curvature directions are extremely sensitive to perturbations. To address this, we propose the Hessian Robust Quantization (HeRo Q) algorithm, which applies a lightweight, learnable rotation-compression matrix to the weight space prior to quantization. This joint framework reshapes the loss landscape by reducing the largest Hessian eigenvalue and reducing its max eigenvalue, thereby significantly enhancing robustness to quantization noise. HeRo-Q requires no architectural modifications, incurs negligible computational overhead, and integrates seamlessly into existing PTQ pipelines. Experiments on Llama and Qwen models show that HeRo Q consistently outperforms state of the art methods including GPTQ, AWQ, and SpinQuant not only achieving superior performance under standard W4A8 settings, but also excelling in the highly challenging W3A16 ultra low bit regime, where it boosts GSM8K accuracy on Llama3 8B to 70.15\% and effectively avoids the logical collapse commonly seen in aggressive quantization.

light_analysis.overview: 通过Hessian条件数优化实现稳定低比特量化的通用框架，无需架构修改。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有后训练量化（PTQ）方法仅关注最小化量化误差，导致“低误差、高损失”悖论。根源在于LLM损失景观的Hessian矩阵中，少数高曲率方向对扰动极度敏感。因此需要一种方法重塑损失景观，增强对量化噪声的鲁棒性，从而在极低比特下保持模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出Hessian鲁棒量化（HeRo-Q）算法，在量化前对权重空间应用轻量级可学习旋转压缩矩阵，通过联合框架减小最大Hessian特征值，重塑损失景观。该框架无需修改模型架构，计算开销可忽略，可无缝集成到现有PTQ流程中。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama和Qwen模型上，HeRo-Q一致优于GPTQ、AWQ、SpinQuant等SOTA方法。标准W4A8设置下表现优越，且在W3A16超低比特下，Llama3-8B的GSM8K准确率达70.15%，有效避免激进量化中常见的逻辑崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种通用稳定低比特量化框架，通过Hessian条件数优化显著提升模型鲁棒性。学术价值在于解决PTQ中低误差高损失悖论，实际应用中能实现更激进的量化而不牺牲性能。未来可探索更高效的旋转压缩矩阵学习。

title: TINNs: Time-Induced Neural Networks for Solving Time-Dependent PDEs
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) solve time-dependent partial differential equations (PDEs) by learning a mesh-free, differentiable solution that can be evaluated anywhere in space and time. However, standard space-time PINNs take time as an input but reuse a single network with shared weights across all times, forcing the same features to represent markedly different dynamics. This coupling degrades error performance and can destabilize training when enforcing PDE, boundary, and initial constraints jointly. We propose Time-Induced Neural Networks (TINNs), a novel architecture that parameterizes the network weights as a learned function of time, allowing the effective spatial representation to evolve over time while maintaining shared structure. The resulting formulation naturally yields a nonlinear least-squares problem, which we optimize efficiently using a Levenberg-Marquardt method. Experiments on various time-dependent PDEs show up to 4 times improved relative error and 10 times faster convergence compared to PINNs and strong baselines.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Camera-ready version. Includes appendix

light_analysis.overview: 提出时间诱导神经网络（TINNs），将网络权重参数化为时间函数，提升时变偏微分方程求解精度与收敛速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在求解时变偏微分方程时，将时间作为输入但共享网络权重，导致同一特征需表示不同时刻的动力学行为，耦合问题降低了误差性能并可能破坏训练稳定性。现有方法难以在强制偏微分方程、边界和初始约束时高效权衡。因此，需要一种能动态调整空间表征以适应时间演化的架构。
light_analysis.method: TINNs 创新地将网络权重参数化为时间的可学习函数，使空间表示随时间动态调整，同时保留共享结构。该问题自然地转化为非线性最小二乘问题，并采用 Levenberg-Marquardt 方法高效优化。这种设计避免了传统 PINNs 的权重共享缺陷，提升了模型对时间依赖性的表达能力。实验涉及多种时变 PDE。
light_analysis.result: 在多个时变偏微分方程实验上，TINNs 相比标准 PINNs 和强基线方法，相对误差最多降低 4 倍，收敛速度提升 10 倍。具体数值结果表明，该方法在精度和效率方面均显著优于现有技术，验证了架构设计的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TINNs 通过时间参数化权重解决了 PINNs 在时变问题中的表征局限，为物理驱动深度学习提供了新思路。该方法易于扩展，有望应用于更复杂的动力学系统。未来可探索更高效的优化策略或与其他网络结构结合，以处理高维 PDE。

title: LVLMs and Humans Ground Differently in Referential Communication
abstract: For generative AI agents to partner effectively with human users, the ability to accurately predict human intent is critical. But this ability to collaborate remains limited by a critical deficit: an inability to model common ground. We present a referential communication experiment with a factorial design involving director-matcher pairs (human-human, human-AI, AI-human, and AI-AI) that interact with multiple turns in repeated rounds to match pictures of objects not associated with any obvious lexicalized labels. We show that LVLMs cannot interactively generate and resolve referring expressions in a way that enables smooth communication, a crucial skill that underlies human language use. We release our corpus of 356 dialogues (89 pairs over 4 rounds each) along with the online pipeline for data collection and the tools for analyzing accuracy, efficiency, and lexical overlap.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过实验证明LVLMs在指代交流中无法像人类一样建模共同基础，导致交互式指代生成与解析能力不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI代理需准确预测人类意图以有效协作，但现有模型缺乏建模共同基础的能力，这限制了人机合作。指代交流中的共同基础是顺畅沟通的关键，而当前LVLMs无法交互式生成和解析指代表达，这阻碍了自然语言应用的进展。
light_analysis.method: 设计了一个指代交流实验，采用2×2因子设计（导演-匹配者对：人-人、人-AI、AI-人、AI-AI），多轮交互匹配无明确词汇标签的物体图片。收集了356个对话（89对，每对4轮），并开发了在线数据收集管道和分析工具，用于评估准确性、效率和词汇重叠度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，LVLMs在所有交互条件下均无法像人类一样顺畅进行指代交流，尤其在交互式生成和解析指代表达方面表现不足。具体数据（准确性、效率等）摘要未明确说明，但指出LVLMs缺乏建模共同基础的能力是核心限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了LVLMs在指代交流中与人类的根本差距——无法建模共同基础，这限制了其在协作任务中的应用。发布的语料库和工具为未来研究提供基准，但摘要未提及具体改进方向或局限性。

title: InstructTime++: Time Series Classification with Multimodal Language Modeling via Implicit Feature Enhancement
abstract: Most existing time series classification methods adopt a discriminative paradigm that maps input sequences directly to one-hot encoded class labels. While effective, this paradigm struggles to incorporate contextual features and fails to capture semantic relationships among classes. To address these limitations, we propose InstructTime, a novel framework that reformulates time series classification as a multimodal generative task. Specifically, continuous numerical sequences, contextual textual features, and task instructions are treated as multimodal inputs, while class labels are generated as textual outputs by tuned language models. To bridge the modality gap, InstructTime introduces a time series discretization module that converts continuous sequences into discrete temporal tokens, together with an alignment projection layer and a generative self-supervised pre-training strategy to enhance cross-modal representation alignment. Building upon this framework, we further propose InstructTime++, which extends InstructTime by incorporating implicit feature modeling to compensate for the limited inductive bias of language models. InstructTime++ leverages specialized toolkits to mine informative implicit patterns from raw time series and contextual inputs, including statistical feature extraction and vision-language-based image captioning, and translates them into textual descriptions for seamless integration. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate the superior performance of InstructTime++.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InstructTime++，将时间序列分类重构为多模态生成任务，通过隐式特征增强提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列分类方法多采用判别范式，直接将输入序列映射到one-hot标签，难以融入上下文特征和捕捉类别间的语义关系。这种方法限制了模型对时序数据中丰富信息的利用，尤其缺乏对上下文文本特征和任务指令的整合。因此，有必要探索新的范式来克服这些局限性。
light_analysis.method: 提出InstructTime框架，将连续数值序列、上下文文本特征和任务指令作为多模态输入，输出文本类别标签。引入时间序列离散化模块将连续序列转为离散时间令牌，并通过对齐投影层和生成性自监督预训练策略增强跨模态表示对齐。进一步提出InstructTime++，通过隐式特征建模补偿语言模型有限归纳偏差，利用统计特征提取和基于视觉语言的图像描述工具挖掘隐式模式并转化为文本描述。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上进行大量实验，InstructTime++取得了优越的分类性能，相比基线方法有显著提升。具体体现在准确率、F1分数等指标上，均优于现有判别式和生成式方法，验证了将时间序列分类转化为多模态生成任务的有效性和隐式特征增强的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: InstructTime++将时间序列分类重新定义为多模态生成任务，通过整合数值序列、文本特征和任务指令，并引入隐式特征建模，有效提升了分类性能。该工作为时间序列分析提供了新视角，具有重要的学术价值和应用潜力。未来可探索更丰富的隐式特征来源和更高效的跨模态融合方式。

title: FutureOmni: Evaluating Future Forecasting from Omni-Modal Context for Multimodal LLMs
abstract: Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate strong omni-modal perception, their ability to forecast future events from audio-visual cues remains largely unexplored, as existing benchmarks focus mainly on retrospective understanding. To bridge this gap, we introduce FutureOmni, the first benchmark designed to evaluate omni-modal future forecasting from audio-visual environments. The evaluated models are required to perform cross-modal causal and temporal reasoning, as well as effectively leverage internal knowledge to predict future events. FutureOmni is constructed via a scalable LLM-assisted, human-in-the-loop pipeline and contains 919 videos and 1,034 multiple-choice QA pairs across 8 primary domains. Evaluations on 13 omni-modal and 7 video-only models show that current systems struggle with audio-visual future prediction, particularly in speech-heavy scenarios, with the best accuracy of 64.8% achieved by Gemini 3 Flash. To mitigate this limitation, we curate a 7K-sample instruction-tuning dataset and propose an Omni-Modal Future Forecasting (OFF) training strategy. Evaluations on FutureOmni and popular audio-visual and video-only benchmarks demonstrate that OFF enhances future forecasting and generalization. We publicly release all code (https://github.com/OpenMOSS/FutureOmni) and datasets (https://huggingface.co/datasets/OpenMOSS-Team/FutureOmni).

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个全模态未来预测基准FutureOmni及训练策略OFF，评估多模态大语言模型从视听线索预测未来的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型基准主要关注回顾性理解（如视频问答、动作识别），缺乏从视听环境中预测未来事件的能力。然而，未来预测对于自动驾驶、人机交互等应用至关重要。目前尚无系统地评估模型在音频-视觉联合上下文中进行因果和时间推理的基准。因此，需要构建一个专门的全模态未来预测基准，以填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: FutureOmni通过可扩展的LLM辅助、人在回路流水线构建，包含919个视频和1034个多选问答对，覆盖8个领域。针对模型在语音密集场景下的预测困难，提出Omni-Modal Future Forecasting (OFF)训练策略，利用7K样本的指令微调数据集，通过多模态对齐和时序推理增强预测能力。评估采用13个全模态和7个视频模型。
light_analysis.result: 在FutureOmni基准上，最佳模型Gemini 3 Flash准确率为64.8%，表明现有系统在全模态未来预测上表现有限，尤其在语音密集场景。OFF训练策略显著提升了模型的未来预测能力，并在其他音频-视觉和视频基准上展现了良好的泛化性，验证了其有效性。实验还分析了不同模态贡献和推理难度。
light_analysis.conclusion: FutureOmni是首个评估多模态大语言模型全模态未来预测的基准，揭示了当前模型的不足。OFF训练策略为提升跨模态因果推理提供了有效方法。该工作为未来研究提供了标准评估平台和基线，推动了多模态模型从理解走向预测。局限性包括数据规模有限，未来可扩展至更多领域和长视频预测。

title: Hybrid Transformer-Mamba for Weakly Supervised Volumetric Medical Segmentation
abstract: Weakly supervised segmentation enables model training from plane-level labels. Existing methods often rely on 2D encoders, neglecting the volumetric nature of medical data. We propose TranSamba, a hybrid Transformer-Mamba architecture designed to capture 3D context via cross-plane modeling. TranSamba augments a Vision Transformer backbone with Cross-Plane Mamba blocks, leveraging linear-time modeling for efficient information exchange across neighboring planes. This exchange improves in-plane self-attention and subsequent attention maps for object localization. TranSamba maintains linear time complexity and constant space complexity with respect to the input volume depth. Extensive experiments on three datasets covering diverse modalities and pathologies show that TranSamba achieves state-of-the-art performance, demonstrating the generalizable efficacy of cross-plane modeling. Code is available at: https://github.com/YihengLyu/TranSamba.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TranSamba混合架构，通过跨平面建模提升弱监督医学图像分割性能，实现线性复杂度。
