Third, when the forward problem is an integer linear program (ILP), we give this upper bound as a fully explicit iteration count determined solely by the number of samples, the dimension of the features, and the structure of the constraint coefficient matrix. Through numerical experiments, we confirm this finite-step attainment behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示了MILP逆优化中次优性损失的几何结构，证明梯度方法可在有限步内精确求解。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据驱动逆优化问题（DDIOP）在MILP中常见，但特征预测误差对权重不连续，难以直接应用梯度优化。现有方法往往需要不确定次数的迭代，且难以保证精确解。本文旨在提供一种理论保证，确保梯度方法在有限步内达到与观测数据精确一致。
light_analysis.method: 论文聚焦次优性损失，发现其具有凸性和分段线性结构，且精确一致权重集具有正厚度。利用该几何性质，证明投影次梯度下降等梯度方法可在有限次迭代后达到精确一致性。对于ILP，给出仅由样本数、特征维数和约束系数矩阵决定的显式迭代上界。
light_analysis.result: 通过数值实验验证了有限步收敛行为。理论上证明了梯度方法在有限迭代内获得精确解，并给出了投影次梯度下降的显式迭代次数上界。具体数值结果摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为MILP数据驱动逆优化提供了理论保障，表明梯度方法能在有限时间内精确求解，具有重要实际意义。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的优化问题。

title: Recursive Joint Simulation in Games
abstract: Game-theoretic dynamics between AI agents could differ from traditional human-human interactions in various ways. One such difference is that it may be possible to accurately simulate an AI agent, for example because its source code is known. Such an agent would then be fundamentally uncertain whether it is in the real world or in a simulation. Our aim is to explore ways of leveraging this possibility to achieve more cooperative outcomes in strategic settings. In this paper, we study an interaction between AI agents where the agents run a recursive joint simulation. That is, the agents first jointly observe a simulation of the situation they face. This simulation in turn recursively includes additional simulations (with a small chance of failure, to avoid infinite recursion), and the results of all these nested simulations are observed before an action is chosen. We show that the resulting interaction is strategically equivalent to an infinitely repeated version of the original game, allowing a direct transfer of existing results such as the various folk theorems. As evidence that the equivalence is robust, we show that it holds even when we relax some of the assumptions and that it also holds ``from the inside'' -- meaning, for an agent that finds itself inside the game and has self-locating uncertainty.

light_analysis.overview: 提出递归联合模拟方法，证明其等价于无限重复博弈，从而将现有重复博弈合作理论直接应用于AI代理交互。
light_analysis.motivation: AI代理间的博弈可能因可模拟性（如已知源代码）而不同于人类交互。现有方法未充分利用这种模拟能力来促进合作。本研究旨在通过递归联合模拟实现战略环境中的更合作结果。
light_analysis.method: AI代理首先共同观察一个模拟，该模拟递归包含更深层模拟（有微小失败概率避免无限递归）。所有嵌套模拟结果被观察后选择动作。证明该交互策略等价于原始博弈的无限重复版本，从而可迁移民间定理等现有结果。
light_analysis.result: 证明了递归联合模拟与无限重复博弈的策略等价性。即使放松部分假设，等价性依然成立。同时，从内部视角（代理有自定位不确定性）也成立。提供了理论证明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 递归联合模拟为AI代理合作提供了新框架，建立了有限模拟与无限重复博弈的联系。学术上可借用重复博弈理论；实际中可设计合作策略。未来可放宽假设或进行实验验证。

title: A DeepLearning Framework for Dynamic Estimation of Origin-Destination Sequence
abstract: OD matrix estimation is a critical problem in the transportation domain. The principle method uses the traffic sensor measured information such as traffic counts to estimate the traffic demand represented by the OD matrix. The problem is divided into two categories: static OD matrix estimation and dynamic OD matrices sequence(OD sequence for short) estimation. The above two face the underdetermination problem caused by abundant estimated parameters and insufficient constraint information. In addition, OD sequence estimation also faces the lag challenge: due to different traffic conditions such as congestion, identical vehicle will appear on different road sections during the same observation period, resulting in identical OD demands correspond to different trips. To this end, this paper proposes an integrated method, which uses deep learning methods to infer the structure of OD sequence and uses structural constraints to guide traditional numerical optimization. Our experiments show that the neural network(NN) can effectively infer the structure of the OD sequence and provide practical constraints for numerical optimization to obtain better results. Moreover, the experiments show that provided structural information contains not only constraints on the spatial structure of OD matrices but also provides constraints on the temporal structure of OD sequence, which solve the effect of the lagging problem well.

light_analysis.overview: 提出深度学习与数值优化集成方法，利用神经网络推断OD序列结构约束，解决欠定和滞后问题。
light_analysis.motivation: OD矩阵估计是交通领域的关键问题，分为静态和动态两类，均面临参数过多、约束不足的欠定问题。动态估计还面临滞后挑战：不同交通条件下，同一车辆在同一观测时段出现在不同路段，导致相同OD需求对应不同行程。现有方法难以有效解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出集成方法，结合深度学习与传统数值优化。首先用神经网络从数据中学习OD序列的潜在结构（包括空间和时间结构），然后将这些结构作为约束条件，引导传统的数值优化过程（如最小二乘法）进行参数估计。该方法无需预定义结构假设，能自适应提取有效约束。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，神经网络能有效推断OD序列的结构信息，为数值优化提供实用约束，显著提升估计精度。结构信息不仅约束OD矩阵的空间分布，还约束序列的时间演化，有效缓解滞后问题。相比纯数值方法，集成方法在模拟和真实数据上均表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种解决OD序列估计欠定和滞后问题的有效框架，通过深度学习提取结构约束，增强了数值优化的鲁棒性。该工作为交通需求动态估计提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的神经网络架构或融合多源数据以进一步改进。

title: Simple Domain Generalization Methods are Strong Baselines for Open Domain Generalization
abstract: In real-world applications, a machine learning model is required to handle an open-set recognition (OSR), where unknown classes appear during the inference, in addition to a domain shift, where the data distribution differs between the training and inference phases. Domain generalization (DG) aims to handle the domain shift situation where the target domain of the inference phase is inaccessible during the model training. Open domain generalization (ODG) considers DG and OSR. Domain-augmented meta-learning (DAML) is a method targeting ODG; however, it has a complicated learning process. By contrast, although various DG methods have been proposed, they have not been evaluated in ODG situations. In this study, we comprehensively evaluate the existing DG methods in ODG and show that the two simple DG methods, CORrelation ALignment (CORAL) and maximum mean discrepancy (MMD), are competitive with DAML in several cases. In addition, we propose simple extensions of CORAL and MMD by introducing the techniques used in DAML, such as ensemble learning and Dirichlet mixup data augmentation. The experimental evaluation demonstrates that the extended CORAL and MMD can perform comparably to DAML with lower computational costs. This suggests that the simple DG methods and their simple extensions are strong baselines for ODG.
comment: Accepted at IJCNN 2024. The code used in the experiments is available at https://github.com/shiralab/OpenDG-Eval

light_analysis.overview: 简单域泛化方法在开放域泛化中可作为强基线，扩展后性能与复杂方法相当且计算成本更低。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实应用中，机器学习模型需同时处理开放集识别（未知类别）和域偏移问题。现有开放域泛化方法如域增强元学习（DAML）学习过程复杂，而许多域泛化方法未在开放域泛化场景下评估。因此，需要探索简单方法在开放域泛化中的表现。
light_analysis.method: 本文系统评估了现有域泛化方法在开放域泛化中的表现，发现简单的CORAL和MMD方法在多种情况下与DAML竞争力相当。进一步，通过引入DAML中的集成学习与Dirichlet混合数据增强技术，提出了CORAL和MMD的简单扩展，提升了性能且保持较低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，扩展后的CORAL和MMD方法在开放域泛化任务中性能与DAML相当，但计算成本显著更低。具体数值在摘要中未明确给出，但指出多种情况下简单方法竞争力强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 简单域泛化方法及其扩展可作为开放域泛化的强基线，为后续研究提供了低成本替代方案。未来可探索更高效的数据增强策略和集成学习方案，以进一步提升开放域泛化性能。

title: RNN(p) for Power Consumption Forecasting
abstract: An elementary Recurrent Neural Network that operates on p time lags, called an RNN(p), is the natural generalisation of a linear autoregressive model ARX(p). It is a powerful forecasting tool for variables displaying inherent seasonal patterns across multiple time scales, as is often observed in energy, economic, and financial time series. The architecture of RNN(p) models, characterised by structured feedbacks across time lags, enables the design of efficient training strategies. We conduct a comparative study of learning algorithms for these models, providing a rigorous analysis of their computational complexity and training performance. We present two applications of RNN(p) models in power consumption forecasting, a key domain within the energy sector where accurate forecasts inform both operational and financial decisions. Experimental results show that RNN(p) models achieve excellent forecasting accuracy while maintaining a high degree of interpretability. These features make them well-suited for decision-making in energy markets and other fintech applications where reliable predictions play a significant economic role.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RNN(p)模型，作为ARX(p)的非线性推广，用于多时间尺度季节模式的时间序列预测，在电力消耗预测中兼顾高准确性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 能源、经济和金融时间序列常呈现多时间尺度的固有季节模式，而线性自回归模型ARX(p)非线性能力不足，难以准确捕捉复杂模式。需要一种既有强预测能力又保持可解释性的模型，以支持能源市场等领域的运营和财务决策。
light_analysis.method: 提出RNN(p)，即基于p个时间滞后的循环神经网络，是线性ARX(p)的自然推广。其架构具有跨时间滞后的结构化反馈，支持设计高效训练策略。通过比较多种学习算法，分析了计算复杂度和训练性能，并在电力消耗预测任务中应用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RNN(p)模型在保持高度可解释性的同时，实现了优秀的预测准确性。摘要未明确具体性能指标，但指出其在能源市场和金融科技中具有显著经济作用，验证了模型的实际有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RNN(p)有效结合了预测准确性和可解释性，适合能源市场和fintech等需要可靠预测决策的领域。作为ARX(p)的非线性推广，为季节模式时间序列预测提供了新工具，未来可探索更高效训练算法或扩展应用场景。

title: Investigation of Neural Network Methods for Reconstruction and Classification of Texture Images Under Conditions of Incomplete Information
abstract: The automated analysis of heterogeneous natural textures is frequently hindered by physical damage and data loss, presenting a significant challenge to computer vision. While deep learning has shown success in controlled environments, its application to complex geological materials under conditions of incomplete information remains underexplored. This study presents an integrated framework for the inpainting and classification of high-resolution core sample images. We propose an end-to-end pipeline that utilizes object detection for sample segmentation, followed by image inpainting using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) with Contextual Residual Aggregation (CRA) to reconstruct missing high-frequency details. Subsequently, we evaluate the performance of modern Transformer-based (Swin, ViT) and CNN architectures on the reconstructed data. Our experiments revealed a critical divergence between reconstruction quality and downstream utility: despite high structural fidelity (PSNR 28.7~dB, FID 74.01), classification accuracy plateaued at 53\%. To improve minority-class detection, we propose a confidence-based hybrid ensemble that raises MCA from 48\% to 58\%. These results highlight the limitations of current state-of-the-art generative models, which may produce visually plausible but semantically ambiguous features ("hallucinations") that confound classifiers. This work provides insights into the dependencies between image reconstruction quality and classification performance, offering a reproducible baseline for future research in non-destructive testing and material science. Given that cross-well accuracy remains in the 49--53\% range, we position the resulting system as a decision-support and screening tool for lithofacies interpretation rather than as a fully autonomous classifier. The code is available at https://github.com/GalymzhanAbdimanap/Lithology_recognition

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对不完整信息下纹理图像修复与分类的集成框架，揭示了生成质量与下游性能的脱节。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动分析异质自然纹理常因物理损伤和数据丢失而受阻，对计算机视觉构成挑战。深度学习在受控环境中表现成功，但在不完整信息下处理复杂地质材料尚待探索。现有方法可能产生视觉上合理但语义模糊的特征，混淆分类器，需研究重建质量与分类性能的关系。
light_analysis.method: 提出端到端流水线：先用目标检测分割样本，再用带上下文残差聚合的生成对抗网络修复图像，重建缺失的高频细节。随后在修复数据上评估现代Transformer（Swin、ViT）和CNN架构。为改善少数类检测，提出基于置信度的混合集成方法。使用高分辨率岩心样本图像数据集。
light_analysis.result: 修复图像达到较高结构保真度（PSNR 28.7dB，FID 74.01），但分类准确率仅53%。提出的置信度混合集成将多类准确率从48%提升至58%。跨井准确率在49-53%之间，表明系统适合作为决策支持工具而非自主分类器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明当前生成模型存在语义模糊问题，可能导致分类器混淆。工作揭示了图像重建质量与分类性能间的依赖关系，为无损检测和材料科学提供了可复现基线。未来需解决生成模型的幻觉问题，并提升跨井泛化能力。代码已开源。
